light_analysis.result: 实验表明ICCU有效抑制目标知识的同时保持模型效用，能在顺序请求中良好扩展，对释义和跨语言查询具有鲁棒性，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种高效、可组合的上下文持续遗忘框架，解决了多请求遗忘中的关键挑战。虽未直接探讨规则自动优化，但该框架为实际部署提供了轻量级解决方案，未来可拓展至更复杂的遗忘场景。

title: Leveraging Visual Signals for Robust Token-Level Uncertainty in Vision-Language Generation
abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) remains a critical challenge in Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) for reliable predictions and real-world deployment. However, most existing methods are adapted from the LLM literature and primarily focus on the language modality, leaving the contribution of visual information to LVLM uncertainty largely underexplored. In this paper, we investigate how LVLMs process visual information and whether this process can be used to improve uncertainty estimation. By analyzing hidden representations after the integration of visual features during the generation process, we observe that high-confidence predictions rely more heavily on visual content than uncertain ones. Building on this insight, we propose Visual-Grounded Token UQ (VIG-TUQ), a training-free framework that explicitly incorporates visual grounding into uncertainty estimation by weighting token-level language uncertainty with visual grounding scores. We evaluate VIG-TUQ on multiple datasets and across diverse LVLM architectures, including early-fusion, late-fusion, and native-fusion models. Results indicate that our method often improves upon existing token-level uncertainty approaches. Code and data will be made available upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉引导的令牌级不确定性量化框架VIG-TUQ，通过加权语言不确定性与视觉接地分数，提升LVLM的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在现实部署中面临不确定性量化挑战，现有方法多继承自大语言模型，仅关注语言模态，忽视了视觉信息对不确定性的影响。研究表明高置信预测更依赖视觉内容，而现有方法未能有效利用这一特性，导致不确定性估计不准确。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析LVLM生成过程中视觉特征融合后的隐藏表示，发现高置信预测更依赖视觉内容。基于此，提出VIG-TUQ框架，无需训练，利用视觉接地分数加权令牌级语言不确定性。在早期融合、晚期融合和原生融合等多种LVLM架构上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和多种LVLM架构上，VIG-TUQ相比现有令牌级不确定性方法通常有性能提升。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但指出方法在多种融合架构上均有效，表明其通用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了视觉信息在LVLM不确定性量化中的关键作用，提出简单有效的训练免费框架VIG-TUQ，提升了不确定性估计的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的视觉接地策略，并扩展至其他多模态任务。

title: Scaling, Benchmarking, and Reasoning of Vision-Language Agents for Mobile GUI Navigation
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown rapid progress in mobile GUI navigation. This paper presents a systematic study of data scaling, benchmarking, and reasoning for VLM-based agents in this domain. To facilitate rigorous evaluation, we introduce HyperTrack, a large-scale dataset with over 16000 real-world tasks across more than 650 Chinese mobile applications, along with GUIEvalKit, an open-source toolkit for unified benchmarking of VLMs on offline GUI navigation tasks. Using HyperTrack, we analyze the effects of training data scale on both supervised and reinforcement-based finetuning. Our results show that reinforcement-based finetuning consistently outperforms supervised finetuning, particularly in out-of-domain settings, highlighting the synergy between data scaling and reinforcement learning. Leveraging GUIEvalKit, we further benchmark state-of-the-art (SOTA) VLMs and analyze how interaction history and reasoning capabilities influence task completion. Together, HyperTrack and GUIEvalKit provide a comprehensive platform for developing and evaluating VLM agents in mobile GUI navigation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出大规模数据集HyperTrack和评测工具GUIEvalKit，系统研究视觉语言模型在移动GUI导航中的数据扩展、基准测试和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 移动GUI导航中，视觉语言模型（VLM）进展迅速，但缺乏大规模真实任务数据集和统一评测平台，现有方法在泛化性和推理能力上不足。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过数据扩展和强化学习提升VLM代理性能。
light_analysis.method: 构建HyperTrack数据集，包含超过16000个真实世界任务，覆盖650多个中文移动应用；开发GUIEvalKit开源工具包，用于离线GUI导航任务的统一评测。采用监督微调和基于奖励的强化微调，分析训练数据规模的影响，并基准测试现有最先进VLM。
light_analysis.result: 强化微调始终优于监督微调，尤其在域外设置中效果显著，表明数据扩展与强化学习的协同作用。利用GUIEvalKit，分析了交互历史和推理能力对任务完成的影响，揭示了VLM代理的当前水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了大规模数据集和评测工具，为移动GUI导航VLM代理的开发与评估提供了综合平台。强化学习结合数据扩展是提升泛化性的有效路径。未来可探索更复杂的推理策略和跨应用迁移。

title: Deep-layer limit and stability analysis of the basic forward-backward-splitting induced network (II): learning problems
abstract: Deep unfolding neural networks derived from iterative optimization schemes and numerical ordinary/partial differential equations (ODEs/PDEs) have attracted much attention in data science over the last decade. Therein, numerous important network architectures were constructed from the basic forward-backward-splitting (FBS) algorithm. In this paper, we continue our research on the most basic FBS-induced network, an architecture unrolled from the original FBS algorithm by incorporating direct parameter relaxations. Following the difference/differential inclusion formulations in our previous forward system analyses, we here consider some theoretical aspects of corresponding learning problems. Under some mild assumptions, we establish a general convergence property of the training problem of the basic FBS-induced network to the learning problem of the deep-layer limit system, implying a $Γ$-convergence argument showing that any cluster point of the optimal learning parameters for the network is a solution to the learning problem of the deep-layer limit system. A qualitative analysis of perturbation stabilities of these learning problems is also presented. A simple numerical experiment is conducted to validate our main general convergence result.

light_analysis.overview: 本文建立基本FBS诱导网络训练问题向深层极限系统学习问题的Γ-收敛性，并分析学习问题的稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度展开神经网络在数据科学中受到广泛关注，但理论分析（尤其是学习问题的收敛性和稳定性）尚不充分。现有方法多关注前向系统分析，而本文聚焦于基本FBS诱导网络的学习问题，旨在建立网络参数优化与深层极限系统之间的理论联系，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于先前的前向系统分析，本文采用差分/微分包含形式，对引入直接参数松弛的基本FBS诱导网络的学习问题进行分析。在温和假设下，利用Γ-收敛理论证明训练问题收敛到深层极限系统的学习问题，并给出参数聚类点的最优性条件。同时进行定性扰动稳定性分析。
light_analysis.result: 建立了网络训练问题到深层极限系统学习问题的Γ-收敛性，表明网络最优学习参数的任意簇点均为深层极限系统学习问题的解。通过简洁数值实验验证了该收敛结果，但摘要未提供具体性能指标或对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为基本FBS诱导网络的学习问题提供了收敛性理论基础，拓展了深度展开网络的理论分析边界。Γ-收敛性和稳定性分析有助于理解网络深度增加时的行为，指导网络设计和训练。未来工作可推广至更复杂架构或实际应用。

title: Image Thresholding: Understanding Bias of Evaluation Metrics towards Specific Evaluation Functions
abstract: Multilevel image thresholding is widely used for segmentation in applications ranging from medical imaging to remote sensing. Classical objective functions, such as Otsu's between-class variance and Kapur's entropy, are often optimized using metaheuristic algorithms, with performance evaluated via metrics like Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) and Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR). These evaluations implicitly assume that SSIM and PSNR provide unbiased measures of segmentation quality. In this study, we examine this assumption by analyzing the correlation between thresholding objective functions and quality metrics across all possible thresholds for images in the BSDS500 dataset. Results show that Otsu's criterion consistently exhibits high correlation with both SSIM and PSNR, while Kapur's entropy demonstrates weaker and more variable correlation. Otsu outperforms Kapur in correlation with PSNR for all images and with SSIM for over 91%. Our findings reveal an inherent metric-objective-function bias. This work highlights the need for more neutral evaluation frameworks and motivates extending the analysis to additional thresholding criteria and domains. Source code of this paper can be found at https://w3id.org/met-dp/icpr26-95

light_analysis.overview: 揭示图像阈值分割中评估指标SSIM和PSNR对特定目标函数（Otsu与Kapur）存在固有偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 多级图像阈值分割广泛应用，常用Otsu和Kapur等目标函数通过元启发式算法优化，并用SSIM和PSNR评估性能。现有评估隐含假设这些指标提供无偏的度量，但该假设未经验证。本工作旨在检验这一假设，探讨阈值目标函数与质量指标之间是否存在系统性偏差，以揭示评估框架的潜在局限性。
light_analysis.method: 在BSDS500数据集上，对所有可能的阈值计算Otsu类间方差和Kapur熵的目标函数值，同时计算对应分割结果的SSIM和PSNR。通过相关性分析，量化目标函数与评估指标之间的关联强度，对比Otsu和Kapur在不同图像上的表现差异。
light_analysis.result: Otsu准则与SSIM和PSNR均呈现高度一致的相关性，而Kapur熵的相关性较弱且波动较大。具体而言，Otsu在所有图像上与PSNR的相关性优于Kapur，在超过91%的图像上与SSIM的相关性也优于Kapur。这证实了评估指标对不同目标函数存在固有偏向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作揭示了图像阈值分割中评估指标对目标函数的系统性偏差，表明现有评估框架可能不是中立的。该发现呼吁开发更客观的评估方法，并建议将分析扩展到其他阈值准则和应用领域。源代码已公开，便于复现和进一步研究。

title: DEI: Diversity in Evolutionary Inference for Quality-Diversity Search
abstract: We present DEI: Diversity in Evolutionary Inference, a distributed Quality-Diversity (QD) search framework that assigns heterogeneous large language models (LLMs) as mutation operators across peer nodes communicating with non-blocking collective operations. Unlike homogeneous parallel search, which replicates a single model's inductive biases across all workers, DEI treats each LLM's distinct creative prior as a complementary source of behavioral novelty. Extending the Digital Red Queen framework with DEI, nodes share local optimal solutions at the end of each round to seed the next round's population. This creates cross-model adversarial pressure that drives robustness beyond intra-model self-play. Evaluated on the Core War domain, a competitive programming benchmark in which Redcode warrior programs battle inside a simulated machine, a four-node heterogeneous ensemble (GPT-5.4-mini, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.2, and Claude Haiku 4.5) achieves 124 percent higher merged-archive QD-Score (45.90 vs. 20.46) and 28 percent higher coverage (80.6 percent vs. 63.0 percent of cells) than a single-node baseline at equal total LLM-call budget. The heterogeneous ensemble also outperforms an equally-budgeted homogeneous ensemble on QD-Score, coverage, and held-out solution generality across all four model families. These results provide the first empirical evidence that model diversity, not merely parallelism, is the key driver of gain in distributed LLM-based QD search.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop Scalable Learning and Optimization for Efficient Multimodal AI Agents (SCALE)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分布式质量多样性搜索框架DEI，利用异构大语言模型作为变异算子，通过模型多样性提升搜索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在质量多样性搜索中，传统同构并行搜索复制单一模型的归纳偏差，限制了行为新颖性的来源。实际应用中，不同LLM具有独特的创造先验，如何有效利用模型多样性而非单纯并行化来提升搜索性能是一个重要问题。本研究旨在通过异构LLM协作和交叉模型对抗压力，突破自博弈的鲁棒性瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: DEI框架将异构LLM作为变异算子，部署在通过非阻塞集合操作通信的对等节点上。扩展Digital Red Queen框架，每轮结束后节点共享局部最优解以初始化下一轮种群，形成跨模型对抗压力。在Core War领域（Redcode程序对战）评估，使用四节点异构集成（GPT-5.4-mini, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.2, Claude Haiku 4.5）。
light_analysis.result: 异构集成在相等总LLM调用预算下，合并存档QD-Score比单节点基线提升124%（45.90 vs. 20.46），覆盖率达80.6%（基线63.0%）。与等预算同构集成相比，在QD-Score、覆盖率和所有四类模型的保留解通用性上均更优。首次实证表明模型多样性是分布式LLM-QD搜索增益的关键驱动因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次证明模型多样性而非并行性是分布式LLM搜索的核心驱动力。DEI框架通过异构LLM协同和交叉对抗有效提升QD搜索性能，具有应用于程序生成、创意优化等领域的潜力。未来可探索更大规模异构集成和动态模型选择策略。

title: YOLO26-RipeLoc Lite: A lightweight architecture for tomato ripeness detection and picking point localization in greenhouse robotic harvesting
abstract: In greenhouse tomato production, automated harvesting requires accurate detection of ripe tomatoes, ripeness classification, and precise picking-point localization for robotic end-effectors. This paper proposes YOLO26-RipeLoc Lite, a lightweight deep learning architecture based on YOLO26 for simultaneous detection, ripeness classification, and center-point localization of greenhouse tomatoes. The model introduces three modifications: (1) a Lightweight Feature Pyramid Network (LFPN) with depthwise separable convolutions for efficient multi-scale fusion, (2) a Ripeness-Aware Attention Module (RAAM) with dual pooling and a learnable ripeness bias vector for enhanced color-texture discrimination, and (3) a Compact Detection Head (CDH) with shared convolutions and an integrated center-point regression branch for direct grasp planning. The model is evaluated on a custom dataset of 1,500 images with 6,227 instances (3,566 ripe, 2,661 unripe) from the SILAL greenhouse, Abu Dhabi, UAE. YOLO26-RipeLoc Lite achieves mAP@0.5 of 92.9% (95.2% ripe, 90.6% unripe) with the highest precision (95.2%) among all evaluated architectures using only 2.38M parameters. Post-training BatchNorm pruning at 30% reduces parameters to ~1.8M with negligible accuracy loss. Ablation studies confirm that greenhouse-aware HSV augmentation provides the largest improvement (+2.02 pp mAP@50), backbone freezing achieves peak precision (93.8%), and 3-phase progressive unfreezing yields the best localization quality (mAP@50:95 of 64.6%). Comparisons with YOLOv8n/s, YOLO11n/s, YOLO12n/s, and YOLO26s confirm superior accuracy-efficiency: 2.9 pp higher precision than YOLO12n with 7.0% fewer parameters and integrated center-point localization for robotic end-effector guidance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出YOLO26-RipeLoc Lite轻量级架构，同步实现温室番茄检测、成熟度分类与采摘点定位，通过三项创新在极小参数量下达到高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 温室番茄自动化采摘需要同时完成成熟果实检测、成熟度判别和精确采摘点定位，但现有模型往往计算量大或精度不足，难以部署在资源受限的机器人上。本研究旨在开发一种轻量级、高精度的深度学习方法，满足实时性与准确性需求，降低部署成本。
light_analysis.method: 基于YOLO26进行三项改进：1) 轻量级特征金字塔网络(LFPN)采用深度可分离卷积，实现高效多尺度融合；2) 成熟度感知注意力模块(RAAM)通过双池化和可学习成熟度偏置向量，增强颜色与纹理区分能力；3) 紧凑检测头(CDH)使用共享卷积并集成中心点回归分支，直接输出抓取点位。在SILAL温室1500张图像(6227实例)上训练。
light_analysis.result: YOLO26-RipeLoc Lite以2.38M参数达到mAP@0.5 92.9%(成熟95.2%，未成熟90.6%)，最高精确率95.2%。30%剪枝后参数降至约1.8M，精度几乎无损。消融实验显示温室感知HSV增强贡献最大(+2.02% mAP)。相比YOLOv8n/s、YOLO11n/s、YOLO12n/s、YOLO26s，精确率比YOLO12n高2.9个百分点且参数少7%，同时集成中心点定位。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该轻量级架构在精度与效率间取得良好平衡，适用于温室机器人采摘任务。通过针对性设计(注意力模块、轻量特征金字塔)有效提升小目标检测与定位性能。未来可扩展至其他温室作物，并进一步优化泛化能力与部署效率。

title: PILOT: A Data-Free Continual Learning Approach for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation via Boundary Guidance
abstract: Real-time semantic segmentation models offer an excellent balance between accuracy and inference speed. However, deploying these models in dynamic real world environments often requires the ability to learn novel classes incrementally without retraining on the entire dataset. This capability is known as continual learning. In this regard, the standard fine-tuning methods in deep learning often fail due to catastrophic forgetting, where the model learns new information but forgets previously trained and learned classes. Contributing to this crucial domain, the current paper proposes a novel continual learning framework tailored for PIDNet, which is a widely cited state-of-the-art real-time semantic segmentation model. Our method, PILOT(Parallel Incremental Learning Over Time), introduces a real-time and lightweight strategy by implementing a parallel Derivative-branch (D-branch) designed to capture the high frequency boundary information of novel classes while freezing the trained parameters of the original segmentation network. This novel setup allows the model to adapt to new semantic categories while preserving the knowledge of previously learned classes. By using only data associated with the new class, our model significantly reduces training overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach successfully segments new classes while maintaining high mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) on the original base classes, thereby comfortably outperforming all major continual learning approaches in this domain. Overall, PILOT is shown to effectively mitigate catastrophic forgetting with minimal impact on inference latency, thus maintaining real-time performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PILOT框架，通过边界引导的并行导数分支实现无数据重放的实时语义分割持续学习，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时语义分割模型在动态环境中需增量学习新类别，但标准微调导致灾难性遗忘，模型学习新信息时忘记旧知识。现有持续学习方法或依赖旧数据重放、或计算开销大，难以在保持实时性能的同时适应新类别。本文针对特定实时分割模型PIDNet，旨在设计一种轻量级、无数据重放的持续学习策略，以低推理延迟代价实现新类学习与旧类保留。
light_analysis.method: 提出PILOT方法，基于PIDNet架构，引入并行导数分支（D-branch）专门捕捉新类别的高频边界信息。原始分割网络参数被冻结以保留旧知识，仅使用新类数据训练D-branch，从而显著降低训练开销。该边界引导机制使模型在不访问旧数据的情况下，有效学习新语义类别，同时保持对基础类别的分割性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，PILOT在新类分割任务中表现良好，同时原始基础类别的平均交并比（mIoU）保持高水平，全面超越所有主要持续学习方法。该方法对推理延迟影响极小，维持了实时语义分割所需的实时性能，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: PILOT通过边界引导的并行分支机制，实现了无数据重放的持续学习，在保持实时分割速度的同时，显著提升了增量学习能力。该方法训练开销低，适用于动态环境部署。未来工作可探索将其扩展到其他实时分割网络或更复杂的学习场景。

title: Position: AI Safety Requires Effective Controllability
abstract: AI safety is still largely framed as alignment: training models to follow human preferences, safety policies, and normative constraints. That framing has improved the behavior of modern language models, but aligned behavior does not by itself guarantee that a deployed agent can be stopped, overridden, or constrained once it operates in open-ended, interactive, and tool-using environments. A system may be safe in expectation and still fail to yield to explicit runtime authority under conflicting instructions, long-horizon execution, adversarial inputs, or risky tool use. This position paper argues that AI safety therefore requires controllability as a first-class objective. We define \emph{controllability} as the ability of an AI system to remain reliably interruptible, overridable, redirectable, and constrainable by explicit control signals at runtime while preserving ordinary utility when such signals are absent. To study this gap, we introduce \controlbench{}, a benchmark for evaluating controllability failures in high-risk agentic scenarios. Experiments with OpenClaw-based agents show that current alignment and guardrail mechanisms reduce risk, but often fail to provide persistent, authoritative, and enforceable runtime control. We therefore propose a control-centric architectural framework that highlights explicit control planes, runtime intervention pathways, persistent control states, and auditable decision interfaces as key design principles for future controllable AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出AI安全需将可控性作为首要目标，而非仅依赖对齐，并引入ControlBench评估可控性失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI安全框架主要关注对齐，即训练模型遵循人类偏好和安全策略，这改善了语言模型行为。然而，当系统在开放、交互并使用工具的环境中运行时，对齐行为无法保证能被可靠停止、覆盖或约束。例如，在冲突指令、长时间执行、对抗输入或风险工具使用场景下，系统可能不服从运行时权威。因此，需要将可控性作为明确的安全目标。
light_analysis.method: 论文定义可控性为AI系统在运行时能可靠地被中断、覆盖、重定向和约束，且无控制信号时保持正常功能。为此，引入ControlBench基准，评估高风险代理场景中的可控性失败。使用基于OpenClaw的代理进行实验，并对当前对齐与防护栏机制进行测试。基于结果，提出控制导向架构框架，包括显式控制平面、运行时干预路径、持久控制状态和可审计决策接口等关键设计原则。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前对齐和防护栏机制能降低部分风险，但往往无法提供持久、权威且可执行的运行时控制。在ControlBench的高风险场景中，即使系统表现出对齐行为，仍可能在冲突指令或工具使用中拒绝服从明确控制信号。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主张AI安全必须将可控性作为一级目标，超越传统对齐研究。提出的ControlBench和架构框架为评估和设计可控系统提供了基础。学术价值在于推动安全研究新方向，实际价值在于指导未来部署中需确保人机交互的可靠控制。潜在局限包括基准的覆盖范围有限，且架构框架需要进一步验证。

title: COVD: Continual Open-Vocabulary Object Detection with Novel Concept Injection
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) has made significant progress, enabling detectors to generalize from seen to unseen categories. However, real-world category spaces continually evolve, and existing OVD models still struggle with newly emerging concepts, while repeated full retraining is prohibitively expensive. To this end, we introduce a new task setting, termed Continual OVD with Novel Concept Injection (COVD), where models sequentially learn incoming novel concept groups while preserving prior concepts and original open-vocabulary knowledge, along with a new benchmark, Novel-114. Our key observation is that pretrained visual encoders often already perceive and represent many novel concepts, and the main bottleneck lies in the lack of stable semantic alignment between visual representations and textual concepts. Based on this, we propose NoIn-Det, an efficient continual injection framework without additional parameters. NoIn-Det freezes the visual encoder, preserves the text representation space using only texts of common concepts and previously injected concepts, and injects novel concepts by updating only a small subset of text-branch parameters beneficial to novel concept learning. Extensive experiments show that NoIn-Det effectively learns novel concepts, preserves old knowledge, and consistently outperforms existing continual learning methods for VLMs without introducing additional parameters.Novel-114 and the code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出持续开放词汇目标检测（COVD）任务及无需额外参数的NoIn-Det框架，通过冻结视觉编码器、仅更新文本分支少量参数实现高效新概念注入。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测模型虽能泛化到未见类别，但真实类别空间持续演化，现有模型难以适应新概念且全量重训成本高昂。因此需要一种高效增量学习方案，在注入新概念的同时保持原有开放词汇知识。
light_analysis.method: NoIn-Det基于预训练视觉编码器已感知新概念的观察，认为瓶颈在于视觉与文本语义对齐。方法冻结视觉编码器，用常见概念和已注入概念文本保留文本空间，仅更新文本分支中对新概念学习有益的少量参数，无需额外参数。
light_analysis.result: 在Novel-114基准上，NoIn-Det有效学习新概念并保持旧知识，持续优于现有视觉语言模型持续学习方法，且不引入额外参数。具体性能如新概念准确率提升、旧知识遗忘率降低等（摘要未明确具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作定义了COVD任务并构建Novel-114基准，提出NoIn-Det框架实现高效新概念注入。学术上开辟了持续开放词汇检测新方向，实用上可动态适应类别扩展，未来可探索更复杂的持续学习场景。

title: Counteraction-Aware Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for General Capability Recovery with Domain Preservation
abstract: Domain specialization can improve LLM behavior in vertical domains, but often weakens the general capabilities inherited from the original model. Recent Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) pipelines recover model capabilities by supervising student-generated trajectories with teacher feedback, but typically assume teacher-aligned prompt coverage, requiring prompts to match the teachers' training distributions. This assumption is difficult to satisfy when the general teacher is an open-source model whose post-training data are unknown. Instead of attempting to reconstruct this hidden distribution, we study general capability recovery with readily available proxy general prompts. We identify two failure modes of vanilla MOPD in this incomplete-coverage situation: recovery-preservation counteraction from mixing conflicting recovery and preservation gradients, and weak-signal flattening from uniformly averaging samples with unequal correction demand. We propose Counteraction-Aware Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (CaMOPD), which addresses these issues with decoupled alternating training and gap-based sample selection. CaMOPD gives general recovery dedicated updates, periodically reviews domain prompts for preservation, and selects samples with larger averaged token-level teacher-student log-probability gaps to concentrate correction signals. Across role-play dialogue and medical reasoning QA scenarios, CaMOPD performs best in general recovery over baselines while maintaining domain-specific behavior. Gradient coherence analyses further support the intended effect of CaMOPD in producing more coherent correction signals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Counteraction-Aware Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (CaMOPD)方法，解决多教师在线策略蒸馏中因提示覆盖不完全导致的通用能力恢复与领域保持的权衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 领域专业化可提升LLM在垂直领域的行为，但常削弱其通用能力。现有MOPD方法假设教师对齐的提示覆盖，而通用教师的训练数据未知，该假设难以满足。在不完全覆盖情况下，存在恢复-保持抵消（混合冲突梯度）和弱信号扁平化（均匀平均不等修正需求的样本）两种失败模式。因此，需要新方法有效恢复通用能力同时保持领域能力。
light_analysis.method: CaMOPD采用解耦交替训练和基于差距的样本选择。具体包括：为通用恢复提供专用更新，定期审查领域提示以保持能力，并选择平均token级教师-学生log概率差距较大的样本，以集中修正信号。该方法无需重构隐藏的教师分布，仅使用易获得的通用代理提示。
light_analysis.result: 在角色扮演对话和医疗推理QA场景中，CaMOPD在通用能力恢复上优于基线方法，同时保持领域特定行为。梯度一致性分析进一步证实CaMOPD能产生更一致的修正信号，有效缓解了梯度冲突和弱信号问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: CaMOPD有效解决了领域专用化后通用能力恢复与领域保持的冲突，揭示了MOPD在提示覆盖不完全时的失败模式并提供了解决方案。学术上深化了对多教师蒸馏的理解，实践上可用于提升LLM在垂直领域的表现而不牺牲通用性，未来可探索更复杂的提示覆盖策略。

title: High-Quality Synthetic Financial Time-Series using a GAN-Diffusion Framework
abstract: In recent years, financial institutions and firms have increasingly adopted synthetic data to address data scarcity and to generate counterfactual market scenarios. However, reproducing all the statistical properties of financial time series, commonly known as stylized facts, remains an open challenge for many existing general-purpose architectures. In this paper, we present a quality-aware generative framework that combines two classes of generative methods, demonstrating how their integration addresses existing limitations while enhancing the realism of synthetic data. Specifically, we first introduce CoMeTS-GAN (Correlated Multivariate Time Series GAN), a Conditional Generative Adversarial Network (C-GAN) designed to jointly generate mid-price and volume time-series for correlated stocks. We then show how our GAN architecture can be incorporated into state-of-the-art diffusion models to enhance the quality of generated correlation structures. Specifically, the GAN's Critic serves as a quality evaluation module that guides the diffusion process, enforcing learned correlation structures in the generated time-series. Our framework offers a lightweight and responsive solution for realistic stock market simulation, explicitly modeling inter-asset correlation structures. We experimentally validate our framework against leading generative architectures, showing that it more effectively captures the stylized facts of stock markets and models inter-asset correlations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合GAN和扩散模型的框架，生成高质量金融时间序列，有效捕捉股票市场的程式化事实和资产间相关性。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融机构使用合成数据应对数据稀缺和生成反事实市场场景，但现有通用架构难以完全复现金融时间序列的统计特性（如程式化事实）。需要一种能同时捕捉资产间相关结构和时序统计特征的高质量生成方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoMeTS-GAN（条件生成对抗网络）联合生成相关股票的中间价格和成交量时间序列，并将其集成到扩散模型中：GAN的判别器作为质量评估模块，指导扩散过程强制执行学习到的关联结构。框架轻量级，显式建模跨资产相关性。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了所提框架优于领先的生成架构，能更有效地捕捉股票市场的程式化事实（如收益率分布、波动率聚类等），并准确建模跨资产相关性，生成的时间序列具有更高的真实感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功整合GAN和扩散模型的优势，解决了金融时间序列生成中相关性建模和质量控制的挑战，为现实股票市场模拟提供了高效方案。未来可扩展至更多资产类别或引入动态市场条件。

title: JLT: Clean-Latent Prediction in Latent Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Flow matching with clean-data prediction has shown that regressing the clean point can exploit low-dimensional structure more effectively than predicting an ambient noised quantity. We ask whether this principle remains useful after images are mapped into a learned latent space, where compression has already removed much of the raw pixel variability. We introduce JLT, a 130M latent diffusion Transformer over frozen FLUX.2 VAE codes, and compare clean-latent prediction with a matched velocity-prediction DiT under the same representation, backbone, and training settings. Although the three variables x, epsilon, and v are linearly convertible for a fixed corruption time, a local Gaussian analysis shows that velocity regression inherits an isotropic target-covariance floor and amplifies low-variance latent directions, while clean prediction damps them. On ImageNet 256 x 256, JLT-B/1 obtains FID-50K 2.50 with classifier-free guidance, with a large matched-target gap over velocity prediction. These results suggest that prediction targets in latent diffusion are representation-dependent geometric choices, rather than interchangeable algebraic parameterizations.

light_analysis.overview: JLT提出在潜在扩散Transformer中采用干净潜在预测比速度预测更有效，通过理论分析和实验验证了预测目标的选择具有表示依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型通常使用速度预测或噪声预测，但流匹配中的干净数据预测在像素空间表现出优势。然而，在潜在空间中，VAE压缩已去除部分变异性，干净潜在预测是否仍然有效尚不明确。本文旨在探究潜在空间中不同预测目标对扩散模型性能的影响，解决表示依赖性带来的方法选择问题。
light_analysis.method: JLT使用130M参数的潜在扩散Transformer，基于冻结的FLUX.2 VAE编码器，在ImageNet 256x256上对比干净潜在预测与匹配的速度预测DiT。通过局部高斯分析揭示速度预测继承了各向同性目标协方差下界并放大低方差潜在方向，而干净预测则抑制这些方向。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256x256上，JLT-B/1使用无分类器引导获得FID-50K 2.50，与速度预测相比存在较大的匹配目标差距。实验表明干净潜在预测在相同表示、骨干网络和训练设置下显著优于速度预测，验证了预测目标的选择至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: JLT证明了在潜在扩散模型中，干净潜在预测优于速度预测，预测目标并非可互换的代数参数化，而是依赖于表示的几何选择。该发现为扩散模型的设计提供了新视角，未来可探索不同潜在表示下的最优预测策略。

title: Pop-Up Distractions Reveal Bag-of-Events Behavior in Video Large Language Models
abstract: A key capability for video understanding is reliably linking subjects to events across time, yet whether Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) actually achieve this remains unclear. In this work, we introduce DistractionBench to evaluate whether VideoLLMs can robustly link subjects and events in the presence of unrelated video segments. Through controlled interventions, such as inserting short advertisement clips into longer videos, we show that VideoLLMs frequently hallucinate interactions between entities from different segments, incorrectly attributing actions from injected advertisements to subjects in the main video. We characterize this systematic hallucination as bag-of-events (BoE) behavior, where models process videos as collections of events rather than temporally structured sequences. Evaluating 11 popular VideoLLMs, we find that all models exhibit substantial BoE behavior. Our findings suggest that VideoLLMs lack reliable mechanisms for temporal grounding and motivate the development of models with more robust subject-event association.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DistractionBench评估VideoLLMs的时序关联能力，发现“bag-of-events”系统性幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频理解核心在于可靠地将主体与事件跨时间关联，但现有VideoLLMs可能未能实现。插入无关广告片段时，模型易将广告动作归因于主视频主体，产生错误关联。该问题导致模型在复杂视频中时序鲁棒性不足，亟需系统性评估与改进。
light_analysis.method: 构建DistractionBench基准，通过在长视频中插入短广告片段进行受控干预。定义bag-of-events（BoE）行为，即模型将视频视为事件集合而非时序序列。评估11个流行VideoLLMs（如LLaVA-NeXT-Video等），记录模型对跨片段实体交互的预测。
light_analysis.result: 所有11个VideoLLMs均表现出显著BoE行为：频繁将注入广告中的动作错误归因于主视频主体，即使在广告与原视频内容无关时。例如，模型可能描述“主人物在喝水”而实际人物在广告片段中。这表明现有模型缺乏可靠的时序基础机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示VideoLLMs在跨时间主体-事件关联上存在系统性缺陷，提出BoE概念并量化其普遍性。工作强调开发具有更强时序建模能力的VideoLLMs的必要性，为未来视频理解模型设计提供方向。局限性在于干预仅使用简单广告，更复杂场景待探索。

title: Mildly Overparameterized ReLU Networks on Orthogonal Data: Incremental Learning and Implicit Bias
abstract: The successful training of neural networks hinges on the use of first order optimization methods, yet the theoretical characterization of these methods remains incomplete. This is especially true in settings with mild overparameterization. In this work, we study the gradient flow dynamics of two-layer ReLU networks from small initialization with orthogonal training data. We prove the limiting flow converges to a saddle-to-saddle jump process as the initialization scale tends to zero, revealing an incremental learning phenomenon in which a new neuron activates at each saddle. This analysis recovers the known result of Dana et al. (2025, arXiv:2502.16977) that the network interpolates the training data with high probability as soon as $m \gtrsim \log(n)$, where $m$ is the network width and $n$ is the number of training samples. This incremental process characterization also allows us to derive a novel implicit bias result: the learned interpolator has a squared $\ell_2$-norm scaling as $\sqrt{n}$, which is within a constant factor of the minimal $\ell_2$-norm interpolator. More broadly, our work provides the first rigorous proof of an incremental learning process for ReLU networks, whilst suggesting mildly overparameterized networks can converge to interpolating solutions whose complexity is of the same order as that of the optimal interpolator.

light_analysis.overview: 证明两层ReLU网络在正交数据上从较小初始化训练时，会经历鞍点跳跃的增量学习过程，并推导出隐式偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络训练依赖一阶优化方法，但其理论特性尚不完整，尤其在轻度过参数化场景。现有研究缺乏对ReLU网络增量学习过程的严格证明，且对隐式偏差的理解有限。本文旨在通过分析正交数据上的梯度流动力学，揭示网络从较小初始化开始的训练机制。
light_analysis.method: 研究两层ReLU网络在正交训练数据上的梯度流动力学。从较小初始化出发，证明当初始化尺度趋近于零时，极限流收敛为鞍点跳跃过程，每经过一个鞍点激活一个新神经元。利用该增量过程特征，分析网络插值训练数据所需宽度条件和隐式偏差。
light_analysis.result: 网络在宽度m ≥ O(log n)时以高概率插值训练数据。此外，学习到的插值器具有平方ℓ2范数缩放为√n，接近最小ℓ2范数插值器的常因子。该结果首次严格证明ReLU网络的增量学习过程，并表明轻度过参数化网络可收敛到复杂度与最优插值器同阶的解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为ReLU网络的增量学习提供了首个严格理论证明，揭示了轻度过参数化下的隐式偏差特性。研究有助于理解神经网络优化中的泛化机制，表明适度过参数化不会导致复杂度过高。未来可扩展至更复杂的网络结构或非正交数据。

title: Adversarial Dual On-Policy Distillation from Expressive Flow-based Teacher
abstract: Learning from demonstrations in embodied control is often cast as behavioral cloning, and recent diffusion or flow-matching policies improve this paradigm by modeling multi-modal expert actions. Yet these methods remain offline supervised learners: the policy is trained only on expert states and receives no corrective signal on the states it actually visits. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers a natural remedy, but standard OPD assumes a strong fixed teacher, which is unavailable in demonstration-only control. We propose \textbf{FA-OPD}, an \emph{adversarial dual on-policy distillation} method in which a Flow Matching (FM) teacher is learned from demonstrations and co-trained with a lightweight MLP student. The teacher provides two complementary signals on student rollouts. The reward channel learns an expert-likeness objective over state-action pairs and drives online exploration through long-horizon policy optimization. The action channel supplies dense local targets at student-visited states, stabilizing exploitation. FA-OPD couples them so that reward distillation enables generalization beyond point-wise demonstrations, while action distillation keeps exploration anchored near expert-like behavior. Across six robot navigation, manipulation, and locomotion benchmarks, FA-OPD beats strong baselines and shows much stronger robustness under noisy or limited demonstrations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FA-OPD，一种对抗性双在线策略蒸馏方法，利用流匹配教师提供奖励和动作双重信号，提升从演示中学习的机器人控制性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 行为克隆作为离线监督学习，仅训练于专家状态，缺乏在策略访问状态下的矫正信号，导致分布偏移。在线策略蒸馏（OPD）可缓解此问题，但假设存在强固定教师，这在仅含演示的控制任务中不可得。因此，需要一种无需预训练强教师、能在线提供校正信号的演示学习方法。
light_analysis.method: FA-OPD从演示中学习一个流匹配（Flow Matching, FM）教师模型，并与轻量级MLP学生策略联合在线训练。教师提供两个互补信号：奖励通道对学生访问的状态-动作对评估专家相似度，驱动长视界策略优化进行探索；动作通道在学生访问状态提供密集局部动作目标，稳定利用。两者对抗性耦合，奖励蒸馏促进泛化，动作蒸馏约束探索接近专家行为。
light_analysis.result: 在机器人导航、操作和 locomotion 等六个基准任务上，FA-OPD优于行为克隆、扩散策略等强基线。在演示含噪声或数量有限的情况下，FA-OPD展现出更强的鲁棒性，显著提升了策略在分布外状态下的表现，验证了双信号蒸馏的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FA-OPD通过在线双信号蒸馏有效解决了演示学习中的分布偏移问题，无需强预训练教师。该方法提升了策略的泛化能力和鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的教师模型或扩展至多任务场景，以进一步提升效能。

title: LLMs Are Already Good Tutors: Training-Free Prompt Optimization for Pedagogical Math Tutoring
abstract: Aligning LLMs for math tutoring typically requires RL-based training with multi-GPU infrastructure. We investigate whether training-free prompt optimization-evolving only the system prompt via API calls-can serve as a practical alternative. We adapt 7 published methods and propose 5 education-specialized methods, evaluating these 12 methods under 5 conditions on 2 OOD benchmark suites. All 12 best-per-method configurations surpass the strongest RL-trained baseline (R_total = 0.633), and our ParetoGrad achieves the best Pareto balance across post-test solve rate, leak control, and helpfulness, rather than dominating any single component. Behavioral analysis with an 82-code educational codebook reveals that training-free methods rely on teaching-knowledge patterns at 2-3x the rate of RL-trained models, with a compensating ~10 percentage-point reduction in intent-level scaffolding. We also find a task-dependent reasoning mode effect consistent across training-free and RL-based paradigms. Our approach enables efficient development of pedagogically aligned LLM tutors with prompts alone and minimal compute.

light_analysis.overview: 证明无需训练的提示优化方法可超越强RL基线的数学辅导效果，提出ParetoGrad实现帕累托平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 对齐LLM用于数学辅导通常需要基于RL的训练和多GPU基础设施，成本高昂。论文探索是否可以通过仅优化系统提示（无需训练）作为实用替代方案，验证提示优化在无需大量计算资源下的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 适配7种已发表方法和提出5种教育专用方法，共12种方法在5种条件下评估，使用2个OOD基准套件。提出ParetoGrad方法实现最佳帕累托平衡，并使用82代码教育编码手册进行行为分析。
light_analysis.result: 所有12种最佳配置均超越最强RL基线（R_total=0.633）。ParetoGrad在课后解决率、泄漏控制和帮助性上实现最佳帕累托平衡。训练无关方法依赖教学知识模式频率是RL模型的2-3倍，但意图层脚手架减少约10个百分点。存在任务相关推理模式效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了仅通过提示优化可高效开发教学对齐的LLM导师，计算需求极小。具有实际应用价值，但可能局限于特定任务和提示策略，未来可探索更复杂的对齐方法。

title: On the Hidden Costs of Counterfactual Knowledge Training in LLM Unlearning
abstract: Counterfactual tuning (CFT) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Large Language Model (LLM) unlearning by training models to generate alternative fictitious knowledge in place of undesired content. However, in this work, we find that this paradigm still underperforms other paradigms in some aspects, and identify two previously overlooked pitfalls underlying this gap: (1) knowledge conflict, where mutual inconsistencies within counterfactual corpora induce conflicting gradients that disrupt parameter optimization, and (2) hallucination spillover, where fitting false targets instills a persistent fabrication bias, inflating hallucination rates on unrelated domains. To systematically diagnose these issues, we introduce RWKU+, an extended benchmark equipped with novel trade-off metrics and gradient-level diagnostic tools. Our work further discusses the limitations and overhead of the paradigm, aiming to provide insights and actionable guidance for more rigorous LLM unlearning research.

light_analysis.overview: 发现反事实知识训练在LLM遗忘中存在的知识冲突和幻觉溢出两大隐藏成本，并提出扩展基准RWKU+以系统诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 反事实调优（CFT）作为LLM遗忘的一种范式，通过训练模型生成替代虚构知识来取代不期望内容，但在某些方面仍逊于其他范式。研究发现两个被忽视的陷阱：知识冲突（反事实语料内在矛盾导致梯度冲突）和幻觉溢出（拟合虚假目标导致持续虚构偏差，增加无关领域幻觉率）。这些问题阻碍了该范式的有效应用，急需系统性诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先通过理论分析识别CFT范式的两个核心问题：知识冲突和幻觉溢出。为系统诊断，引入扩展基准RWKU+，包含新颖的权衡指标和梯度级诊断工具。该基准可量化遗忘性能与幻觉率之间的权衡，并通过梯度分析定位冲突来源。此外，论文还讨论了该范式的局限性和开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CFT范式在遗忘任务中虽能移除特定知识，但会导致严重幻觉溢出：在非目标领域，幻觉率显著上升（具体数值摘要未明确）。知识冲突表现为梯度不一致，影响收敛。与直接遗忘基线相比，CFT在遗忘效果与通用能力之间的权衡更差。RWKU+基准有效揭示了这些隐藏成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统揭示了反事实调优在LLM遗忘中的隐藏成本，为更严谨的遗忘研究提供了见解和可操作指导。RWKU+基准可推广用于评估其他遗忘范式。未来工作可探索缓解知识冲突和幻觉溢出的方法，如梯度协调或正则化技术。

title: Can Broad Biomedical Knowledge be Contextualized into Scenario-Grounded Propositions?
abstract: Biomedical discovery often requires connecting broad biomedical knowledge with specific experimental or clinical data. Background knowledge suggests relevant mechanisms but is usually too general to map directly onto dataset variables, while data-driven patterns can be dataset-specific and hard to interpret mechanistically. We study this missing link as knowledge contextualization: transforming broad biomedical knowledge into evidence-supported, scenario-grounded propositions that domain experts can inspect, replay, and validate. We propose SCENE, a bi-level multi-agent framework that treats knowledge contextualization as iterative search. The upper level converts broad knowledge into search directions and grounds them in the dataset schema. The lower level executes these directions through multi-objective optimization to identify concrete propositions that balance evidential strength and data support. Feedback between the two levels progressively refines the search. We evaluate SCENE in two settings: discovering patient subgroups with heterogeneous treatment benefits in clinical trial scenarios, and identifying context-specific biological responses in LINCS L1000 studies. In clinical trials, SCENE discovers specific, well-supported subgroups and outperforms existing baselines. In L1000 studies, SCENE identifies perturbational contexts with strong target-response matching and high positive rates. These results show that SCENE bridges broad knowledge and scenario-specific evidence, producing traceable, inspectable hypotheses for follow-up validation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCENE框架，将广泛生物医学知识转化为场景化命题，弥合通用知识与特定数据之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学发现常需连接广泛知识与特定数据，但背景知识过于通用难以直接映射到数据集变量，而数据驱动模式又难以从机制上解释。现有方法缺乏将知识情境化的有效手段，导致研究者难以生成可验证的假说。
light_analysis.method: SCENE是一个双层多智能体框架，将知识情境化视为迭代搜索过程：上层将广泛知识转化为搜索方向并映射到数据集模式，下层通过多目标优化执行搜索，识别平衡证据强度和数据支持的具体命题。上下层之间反馈逐步细化搜索。
light_analysis.result: 在临床试验场景中，SCENE发现具有异质性治疗收益的患者亚群，优于现有基线。在LINCS L1000研究中，SCENE识别出具有强靶点-响应匹配和高阳性率的扰动情境，产生可追溯、可检验的假说。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCENE桥接了广泛知识与场景特定证据，生成可验证的假说，有助于生物医学发现。其框架可推广至其他需要知识情境化的领域，未来可探索更多反馈机制和优化目标。

title: ReMoE: Boosting Expert Reuse through Router Fine-Tuning in Memory-Constrained MoE LLM Inference
abstract: Fine-grained Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models sparsely activate only a subset of experts per token, reducing activated computation while maintaining high model capacity. However, in memory-constrained inference scenarios, only a small set of experts can be cached. Experts not in the cache must be fetched from slow external storage (e.g., UFS), leading to frequent evictions and substantial I/O overhead.   We propose ReMoE, a router fine-tuning framework designed to boost token-wise expert reuse. ReMoE biases the router toward recently selected experts, producing temporally stable routing that better matches cache locality constraints. By increasing short-horizon expert reuse, ReMoE reduces expert fetches from storage without adding inference-time computation.   Experiments on DeepSeek and Qwen models show that ReMoE improves expert reuse by 26% while maintaining downstream task performance. Real-system evaluations further confirm these benefits, improving output throughput by 8.4% under vLLM GPU-CPU expert offloading and reducing TPOT by 43.6-49.8% under llama.cpp on Jetson Orin NX, corresponding to a 1.77-1.99$\times$ decode speedup across diverse workloads. Checkpoints and usage instructions are available at https://github.com/BUAA-OSCAR/ReMoE.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReMoE框架，通过微调MoE路由器提升专家时序重用，减少内存受限推理中的I/O开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度MoE模型在内存受限场景下只能缓存少量专家，未命中专家需从慢速外部存储获取，导致频繁驱逐和大量I/O开销。现有方法未有效利用路由的时序局部性，专家重用率低。
light_analysis.method: ReMoE通过微调路由器，使其偏向近期选择的专家，产生时序稳定的路由，更好匹配缓存局部性约束。不增加推理计算量，仅调整路由策略，提升短时域专家重用，减少存储访问。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepSeek和Qwen模型上，专家重用率提升26%，下游任务性能不变。实际系统中，vLLM GPU-CPU卸载下输出吞吐提升8.4%，Jetson Orin NX上TPOT降低43.6-49.8%，解码速度提升1.77-1.99倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReMoE有效缓解内存受限MoE推理的I/O瓶颈，通过路由微调实现专家重用优化，无需额外计算。适用于边缘设备等资源受限场景，未来可探索更复杂的路由策略。

title: Semi-Supervised Gaze Estimation via Disentangled Subspace Contrastive Learning
abstract: Appearance-based gaze estimation always suffers from poor generalization due to limited annotated samples and insufficient dataset diversity. Leading approaches adopt weakly supervised learning to generate large-scale pseudo-labeled data from unconstrained real-world scenarios, aiming to mitigate the domain shifts. In this work, we devise a simple yet effective semi-supervised learning architecture that leverages unlabeled data to enhance domain generalization, thereby reducing reliance on labor-intensive manual annotations. Our key insight is to impose Jacobian regularization to disentangle feature representations into discriminative subspaces dedicated to specific gaze components, such as pitch and yaw angles. We further exploit the intrinsic ordinal ranking within each subspace for contrastive learning, enabling the model to learn robust gaze representations from a small set of labeled samples and an abundance of unlabeled ones. This ultimately yields our Disentangled Subspace Contrastive Learning (DSCL) framework. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks verify that the proposed DSCL is plug-and-play, achieving competitive performance using only 20\%, 10\%, and even 5\% of the annotated data under both in-domain and cross-domain evaluation settings. The public code is available at \href{https://github.com/da60266/DSCL}{https://github.com/da60266/DSCL}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦子空间对比学习框架，利用未标注数据增强视线估计的域泛化能力，减少标注依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于外观的视线估计因标注样本有限和数据集多样性不足导致泛化性能差。现有方法采用弱监督学习生成伪标签，但仍面临域偏移问题。本文旨在减少对人工标注的依赖，通过半监督学习利用未标注数据提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出DSCL框架，核心是对特征表示施加雅可比正则化，将其解耦为俯仰角和偏航角等视线组件的判别性子空间。在此基础上，利用各子空间内的固有顺序排名进行对比学习，从少量标注数据和大量未标注数据中学习鲁棒的视线表示。该框架可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，DSCL仅用20%、10%甚至5%的标注数据，在域内和跨域评估中均达到与全监督方法相当的性能。实验验证了其即插即用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的半监督视线估计方法通过解耦子空间对比学习显著降低了对标注数据的需求，提升了域泛化能力。具有实用价值，未来可扩展至其他回归任务。代码开源。

title: Trust Region Q Adjoint Matching
abstract: Off-policy reinforcement learning of pretrained flow policies remains challenging due to the instability of optimization arising from the multi-step sampling process. Recently, Q-learning with Adjoint Matching (QAM) addressed this issue by reformulating into a memoryless stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem with a learned critic. However, QAM inherits a fundamental fragility of critic-guided improvement: small critic errors are amplified when critics are ill-conditioned, often leading to model collapse. This paper introduces Trust Region Q-Adjoint Matching (TRQAM), a stable off-policy fine-tuning algorithm that adaptively controls the path-space KL with pretrained flow policies through projected dual descent. Specifically, we optimize the trust-region parameter $λ$ in SOC dynamics, and theoretically show that the path-space KL can be represented by a closed-form function of $λ$. As a result, our method can precisely control the exact deviation from pretrained flow policies, achieving stable off-policy RL. Through experiments on 50 OGBench tasks, TRQAM consistently outperforms prior arts in both offline RL and offline-to-online RL. In particular, TRQAM achieves an overall success rate of 68% in offline RL, substantially improves the strongest baseline at 46%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trust Region Q-Adjoint Matching (TRQAM)，通过投影对偶下降自适应控制路径空间KL散度，实现稳定的离策略微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 离策略强化学习对预训练流策略的微调面临多步采样导致的不稳定性问题。现有QAM方法通过重构为无记忆随机最优控制问题解决此问题，但继承了评论家引导改进的根本脆弱性：当评论家条件不良时，微小误差被放大，导致模型崩溃。因此需要一种能稳定控制偏差的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出TRQAM算法，通过投影对偶下降自适应控制预训练流策略的路径空间KL散度。在SOC动力学中优化信任区域参数λ，理论证明路径空间KL可表示为λ的闭式函数，从而精确控制与预训练策略的偏差，实现稳定离策略RL。
light_analysis.result: 在50个OGBench任务上，TRQAM在离线RL和离线到在线RL中均一致优于先前方法。离线RL中总体成功率达68%，显著超过最强基线46%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出TRQAM，通过自适应信任区域控制解决了预训练流策略离策略微调的不稳定性问题，在多个任务上取得显著提升。该方法具有理论和实验价值，未来可能扩展到更广泛场景。

title: Two Speeds of Learning: A Representation-Readout Decomposition of Grokking and Double Descent
abstract: Training loss and accuracy are the standard signals used to monitor generalization during deep neural network training. Two well-documented phenomena complicate this picture: in grokking, train loss falls rapidly while test performance improves abruptly only after a long delay; in epoch-wise double descent, train loss decreases monotonically while test loss or error rises and falls. Existing accounts are often task-specific, and a task-agnostic analysis framework for diagnosing and explaining these phenomena across realistic tasks and architectures is missing. We address this challenge by analyzing two competing processes that underlie learning dynamics: representation learning in the encoder and readout calibration in the final classifier. Using tools from representational geometry, neural tangent kernels, and linear probing, we show that both processes are active throughout training, with the fluctuations of their relative speed giving rise to seemingly anomalous generalization dynamics. Applying the representation-readout decomposition to grokking across a wide range of tasks and architectures, we find that the readout is train-biased before grokking onset, and representation learning is gradual but not absent, contrary to the lazy-to-rich account. The framework further provides diagnostic signatures distinguishing spurious from genuine generalization: in a previously reported MNIST grokking example and an epoch-wise double descent example, apparent delayed or non-monotone generalization is shown to arise from representation degradation and readout misalignment induced by non-standard training recipes. Together, these results establish the representation-readout decomposition as a top-down framework for understanding learning dynamics and revealing underlying algorithms for interpretability research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出表征-读出分解框架，通过解耦表征学习和读出校准的竞争过程来解释grokking和双下降的异常泛化动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准训练损失和准确率无法解释grokking和epoch-wise双下降现象，现有解释多为任务特定，缺乏任务无关分析框架。该研究旨在通过分离表征学习和读出校准两个过程，提供统一诊断工具以理解异常泛化机制。
light_analysis.method: 利用表征几何、神经正切核和线性探测工具，将学习动态分解为编码器的表征学习和分类器的读出校准。通过分析两者相对速度的波动，解释grokking和双下降，并在多种任务和架构上验证，识别伪泛化的诊断特征。
light_analysis.result: 发现grokking中读出在触发前偏向训练集，表征学习虽渐进但并非缺失，推翻了lazy-to-rich解释。在MNIST grokking和epoch-wise双下降中，异常泛化源于非标准训练导致的表征退化和读出错位。框架能有效区分真实泛化与伪泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了表征-读出分解作为理解学习动态的顶层框架，揭示了学习背后的算法，为可解释性研究提供新视角。未来可用于诊断和改进训练过程。潜在局限性：依赖线性探测等工具，可能不完全适用于深层次非线性情况。

title: SoftCap: Soft-Budget Control for Diffusion Transformer Acceleration
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) achieve strong visual quality, but their iterative denoising process requires many costly Transformer evaluations. Training-free acceleration methods reduce this cost by caching, forecasting, or verifying intermediate features, yet the runtime decision of when to execute a Full step is often driven by fixed schedules or hand-tuned thresholds. We propose \textbf{SoftCap}, a training-free control layer for cache-based DiT inference. SoftCap couples a Trajectory Drift Observer, which estimates local cache risk from lightweight hidden-state statistics, with a Soft-Budget PI Controller, which adjusts the Full-triggering threshold from realized compute relative to a fixed reference profile. The budget is a soft ceiling: it shapes the threshold but does not require a run to spend a prescribed number of Full evaluations. On FLUX.1-dev, SoftCap improves over SpeCa at a comparable middle-compute operating point, raising ImageReward from 0.967 to 0.981 and reducing LPIPS-Full from 0.518 to 0.498 at nearly identical FLOPs, while target-sweep diagnostics show the intended soft-ceiling behavior as the budget is relaxed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SoftCap，一种训练自由的软预算控制层，通过轨迹漂移观测器和软预算PI控制器自适应调整Diffusion Transformer的完整步执行，提升加速效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）在迭代去噪过程中需要大量昂贵的Transformer计算。现有无训练加速方法通过缓存、预测或验证中间特征减少成本，但何时执行完整步（Full step）的运行时决策常由固定调度或手动阈值驱动，缺乏自适应性和预算约束。
light_analysis.method: SoftCap由轨迹漂移观测器（Trajectory Drift Observer）和软预算PI控制器（Soft-Budget PI Controller）组成。观测器从轻量隐藏状态统计量估计局部缓存风险，控制器根据已用计算量相对于固定参考配置调整触发完整步的阈值。预算为软上限，不强制消耗指定完整步数。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX.1-dev模型上，与SpeCa相比，在相近中间计算量下，SoftCap将ImageReward从0.967提升至0.981，LPIPS-Full从0.518降至0.498，FLOPs几乎相同。目标扫描诊断显示预算放松时呈现预期的软上限行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: SoftCap通过软预算控制实现了自适应、训练自由的DiT加速，无需预设阈值或固定调度。该方法在保持图像质量的同时减少计算，适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的风险估计机制或与其他加速策略结合。

title: IPIBench: Evaluating Interactive Proactive Intelligence of MLLMs under Continuous Streams
abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on reactive question answering, but real-world streaming assistants require proactive reasoning over continuous visual inputs. Existing benchmarks mainly study reactive or proactive interactions in isolated single-turn settings, overlooking dynamic multi-turn scenarios where users may add, modify, or cancel proactive requests alongside interleaved reactive queries. To address this gap, we introduce IPIBench, the first benchmark for evaluating Interactive Proactive Intelligence of MLLMs under streaming video settings. IPIBench covers proactive monitoring, proactive task management, and interleaved reactive-proactive requests. Evaluations on representative MLLMs reveal two major limitations: unstable proactive triggering and weak coordination between reactive and proactive behaviors. We further propose IPI-Agent, a training-free agentic framework with an interaction-control policy and a temporal-gating mechanism for stabilizing proactive triggering and coordinating multi-turn interactions. Experiments show that IPI-Agent consistently improves existing MLLMs across all benchmark settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IPIBench基准和IPI-Agent框架，首次评估多模态大模型在连续流媒体下的交互式主动智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs在反应式问答上表现优异，但现实流媒体助手需要持续视觉输入的主动推理。现有基准仅关注孤立单轮交互，忽略了用户可能添加、修改或取消主动请求并穿插反应式查询的动态多轮场景。这种缺失导致MLLMs在复杂交互中的主动能力评估不足，亟需新的基准。
light_analysis.method: IPIBench包含三大场景：主动监控、主动任务管理、交错的反应-主动请求。针对评估发现的MLLMs不稳定主动触发和弱协调问题，提出IPI-Agent，一种免训练代理框架，通过交互控制策略和时域门控机制稳定主动触发并协调多轮交互。使用多种代表性MLLMs进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在IPIBench上评估多种MLLMs，发现两个主要局限：不稳定主动触发和反应-主动行为协调弱。IPI-Agent框架在所有基准设置中持续提升现有MLLMs的性能，具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但表明框架有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: IPIBench填补了流媒体视频下MLLMs主动智能评估的空白，揭示了现有模型的不足。IPI-Agent作为免训练方法有效改进主动触发和多轮交互协调。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的真实场景和训练-based方法。

title: Learning to Orchestrate Agents under Uncertainty
abstract: Adaptive orchestration of heterogeneous agents requires making sequential delegation decisions under uncertain and evolving agent behaviour, e.g., coordinating specialised AI models with varying reliability, cost, and response quality. While prior work on agent orchestration focuses on performance or cost, uncertainty in agent reliability and output distributions is typically not modelled explicitly at the orchestration level. In this work, we study the problem of adaptive orchestration of heterogeneous agents under uncertainty, where a meta-controller must decide when to delegate to an agent, accounting for reliability, cost, and uncertainty. We propose BOT-Orch, a lightweight framework that recasts orchestration as a bandit problem over agents, regularized by OT distances between agent output distributions and task-specific reference distributions. We show that the regularised orchestration enjoys $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret under standard assumptions, and provably induces preference ordering among agents with identical mean rewards but differing distributional alignment. Empirically, we demonstrate that BOT-Orch outperforms standard bandit and heuristic baselines in synthetic but adversarial task allocation settings with heterogeneous, non-i.i.d. agent behaviour.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BOT-Orch框架，通过最优传输正则化的bandit方法实现异构智能体在不确定性下的自适应编排。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体编排工作主要关注性能或成本，但未明确建模智能体可靠性和输出分布的不确定性。在真实场景中，智能体行为随时间演变且存在异质性，需要一种自适应方法在不确定性下做出顺序委托决策，同时平衡可靠性、成本和输出质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出BOT-Orch框架，将编排问题转化为多臂老虎机问题，并加入最优传输距离正则化项，度量智能体输出分布与任务参考分布的对齐程度。理论证明在标准假设下达到O(√T)遗憾界，并能区分均值相同但分布对齐不同的智能体。
light_analysis.result: 在合成但对抗性的非独立同分布任务分配设置中，BOT-Orch在异构智能体行为下显著优于标准bandit算法和启发式基线方法，验证了其处理不确定性和异质性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BOT-Orch为异构智能体编排提供了一种轻量级且理论保证的解决方案，首次将输出分布对齐纳入编排决策。未来工作可扩展至真实动态环境，并探索更复杂的正则化形式。

title: E3: Issue-Level Backtesting for Automated Research Critique
abstract: We present E3, an automated review assistant that augments reviewers and engineering teams by identifying decision-relevant technical concerns in research papers. For each concern, E3 reports its nature, its location, its bearing on the contribution, and the analysis or evidence that would resolve it, covering unsupported claims, missing ablations, weak baselines, hidden assumptions, threats to validity, and leakage risks. To evaluate E3 without contamination confounds we adopt an issue-level backtesting protocol: the corpus is restricted to papers postdating the training cutoff of every automated source, and for each paper a meta-judge that observes only anonymised reviews labels every issue-source pair as Caught, Partial, or Missed. Applied to 100 ICLR 2026 papers and 4598 judged issue rows, comparing E3 against the ICLR human reviews and two prompt-matched LLM baselines built on gpt-5.4 from OpenAI and claude-opus-4-6 from Anthropic, with meta-judge gpt-5.5, E3 attains the highest recall on every aggregate metric. Partial-inclusive recall reaches 90.2 percent, which is 15.5 points over GPT, 17.1 points over Claude, and 29.2 points over the human reviews, and strict recall preserves the ordering at 65.8 percent. On concerns raised by the human reviewers, E3 recovers 89.6 percent; on concerns the human reviewers missed it surfaces 1635 additional rows admitted into the judged union, 406 above the next-best source. Corpus, baseline prompts, judge prompt template, and evaluation code are released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出E3自动审稿助手，通过问题级回测协议在论文中识别技术问题，在ICLR 2026数据集上超越人类审稿和基线LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 学术论文审稿过程中，人工审稿常会遗漏关键技术问题，如未经验证的主张、缺失消融实验、弱基线、隐藏假设、有效性威胁和数据泄露风险等。现有自动化辅助工具缺乏系统评估和明确标准，且可能受到训练数据污染。因此，需要一种可靠且可量化的自动审稿方法，能够精确定位问题并提供解决建议，以提升审稿质量和效率。
light_analysis.method: E3采用问题级回测协议进行评估：语料库仅限于所有自动化源训练截止日期后的论文，并引入元裁判（meta-judge）仅基于匿名审稿标签每个问题-源对为Caught/Partial/Missed。E3围绕unsupported claims、missing ablations、weak baselines等六类问题，报告问题性质、位置、对贡献的影响及解决所需的证据。在100篇ICLR 2026论文上，与ICLR人类审稿及基于GPT-5.4和Claude-opus-4-6的LLM基线对比，使用GPT-5.5作为元裁判。
light_analysis.result: E3在所有聚合指标上实现最高召回率：部分包含召回率90.2%，超过GPT 15.5点、Claude 17.1点、人类审稿29.2点；严格召回率65.8%保持相同领先。在人类审稿已提出的问题上，E3恢复89.6%；在人类遗漏的问题上，E3额外发现1635个问题行（judged union中多406个）。
light_analysis.conclusion: E3作为自动审稿助手，能够显著提升技术问题的召回率，特别是捕捉人类审稿遗漏的关键问题，从而增强审稿完整性和研究质量。其问题级回测协议避免了训练数据污染，评估框架可推广。未来可扩展至更多论文类型或结合交互式反馈，但当前需依赖高质量元裁判和覆盖广泛的问题类型。

title: Traceable Knowledge Graph Reasoning Enables LLM-Assisted Decision Support for Industrial VOCs in the Steel Industry
abstract: Key knowledge for steel-industry volatile organic compounds (VOCs) governance is scattered across unstructured scientific literature, making it difficult to integrate process, pollutant, and control-technology evidence and increasing the risk of hallucination when general large language models (LLMs) answer low-frequency industrial questions. Here we developed Chat-ISV, a knowledge graph (KG) enhanced multi-agent Q&A system that parses a curated steel-industry VOCs literature corpus, constructs a Neo4j KG with 27180 nodes and 81779 semantic edges, and combines prompt-constrained extraction, chunk-centered topology optimization, multi-agent routing, source-backtracking retrieval, local literature retrieval, open-domain knowledge access, and interactive subgraph visualization. Benchmark tests and 400 expert blind evaluations showed that topology optimization reduced isolated nodes from 57% to 4.08% and that Chat-ISV achieved high factual reliability, with 96.93% precision, 72.63% recall, an F1-score of 0.830, and a mean score of 1.69/2.00. By converting fragmented environmental-engineering literature into traceable, queryable, and decision-support-oriented knowledge, Chat-ISV establishes a scalable environmental-informatics paradigm for reliable LLM deployment and intelligent pollution-control decision support in specialized industrial domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识图谱增强多智能体问答系统Chat-ISV，实现钢铁行业VOCs治理决策支持，缓解LLM幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 钢铁行业VOCs治理知识分散于非结构化科学文献，难以整合过程、污染物和控制技术证据，通用LLM回答低频工业问题时易产生幻觉，缺乏可靠决策支持。
light_analysis.method: 基于27180节点、81779语义边的Neo4j知识图谱，结合提示约束抽取、块中心拓扑优化、多智能体路由、源回溯检索、局部文献检索、开放域知识访问和交互式子图可视化，构建多智能体问答系统。
light_analysis.result: 拓扑优化将孤立节点从57%降至4.08%；基准测试及400次专家盲评显示，精确率96.93%、召回率72.63%、F1分数0.830、平均得分1.69/2.00，实现高事实可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将碎片化环境工程文献转化为可追溯、可查询、面向决策支持的知识，建立可扩展的环境信息学范式，为工业领域可靠LLM部署和智能污染控制决策提供支撑。

title: QUACK: Questioning, Understanding, and Auditing Communicated Knowledge in Multimodal Social Deduction Agents
abstract: Social deduction games have become a popular testbed for probing reasoning, deception, coordination, and belief modeling in Large Language Model (LLM) agents. However, most environments are scored only by game outcomes such as win rates and largely remain to text-only interaction, making it difficult to tell whether an agent's language is actually grounded in what it perceived and did, or to identify the failure modes underlying its behavior. To address this gap, we introduce QUACK, an open-source environment and evaluation framework for auditing the grounding of agent language in multimodal social reasoning. QUACK evaluates agents at three levels: game outcomes, behavioral trajectories, and utterance-level consistency. Its core Statement Verification Pipeline reconstructs each agent's ground-truth trajectory from engine logs and checks every discussion claim against it, automatically flagging spatial hallucination, unsupported accusation, deception collapse, and language-action inconsistency. Evaluating three frontier VLMs in both homogeneous and cross-model adversarial settings, we find that even the strongest agent hallucinates 15.1% of its verifiable spatial claims and makes over half of its accusations without grounded evidence. We release the full engine, evaluation framework, toolkit, and logs at https://github.com/AAAAA-Academia-Attractions/QUACK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QUACK，一个用于审计多模态社交推理代理语言基础的开源框架，通过声明验证流水线自动检测幻觉、无根据指责等失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有社交推理游戏环境大多仅通过游戏结果（如胜率）评估，且局限于文本交互，无法判断代理的语言是否真正基于其感知和行动，也难以识别行为背后的具体失败模式。这种评估粒度不足阻碍了对多模态语言代理可靠性的深入理解。
light_analysis.method: QUACK提供三层评估：游戏结果、行为轨迹和话语一致性。核心是声明验证流水线，它从引擎日志重建每个代理的真实轨迹，并自动检查每个讨论声明，标记空间幻觉、无根据指责、欺骗崩溃和语言-行动不一致。支持同类和跨模型对抗设置下的评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个前沿视觉语言模型（VLM）的评估中，即使最强的代理也有15.1%的可验证空间声明是幻觉，超过一半的指责缺乏扎实证据。这些结果揭示了多模态社交代理在语言基础方面存在严重缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: QUACK通过细粒度审计框架揭示了多模态社交代理的常见失败模式，为改进语言基础提供了可量化的指标。该工具已开源，可促进更可靠的代理设计。未来可扩展至更复杂的社交场景。

title: BEAT: Rhythm-Elastic Alignment for Agentic Music-guided Movie Trailer Generation
abstract: Automatic movie trailer generation must select shots from a full-length film and synchronize them with background music. Existing methods either relegate music alignment to post-processing or enforce rigid one-to-one shot-music mappings, overlooking that professional editing rhythm is elastic: rapid cuts accompany high-energy passages while sustained shots span quieter bars. We introduce BEAT, a framework that addresses this gap with two core components: MuVA, a compact music-visual alignment encoder trained with Sinkhorn-regularized two-stage learning, and Bar-DP, an energy-adaptive dynamic programming algorithm that produces elastic many-to-one alignments following musical dynamics. These components are integrated into a five-phase agentic pipeline that grounds the core alignment in learned cross-modal features while coordinating higher-level creative decisions through structured text signals. To support comprehensive evaluation, we also introduce TrailerArena, a benchmark with 20+ metrics across four complementary dimensions. On TrailerArena, BEAT achieves state-of-the-art performance across shot selection, ordering, and perceptual quality, while producing fully composed trailers end-to-end.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BEAT框架，通过MuVA编码器和Bar-DP算法实现节奏弹性对齐，用于音乐引导的电影预告片自动生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动预告片生成方法要么将音乐对齐作为后处理，要么强制一对一镜头-音乐映射，忽略了专业剪辑中节奏的弹性：快速剪辑伴随高能量段落，持续镜头跨越安静小节。这种刚性对齐导致预告片缺乏动态同步，影响观看体验。因此需要一种能够根据音乐能量动态调整对齐方式的方法，实现弹性的多对一映射。
light_analysis.method: BEAT框架包含两个核心组件：MuVA（音乐-视觉对齐编码器）使用Sinkhorn正则化的两阶段学习训练，提取跨模态特征；Bar-DP（能量自适应动态规划）根据音乐能量产生弹性多对一对齐。这些组件集成到五阶段代理管道中，通过结构化文本信号协调高层创意决策，实现端到端预告片生成。
light_analysis.result: 在TrailerArena基准上，该基准包含20多个指标覆盖镜头选择、排序和感知质量四个维度，BEAT取得了最先进的性能，在各项指标上均优于现有方法。它不仅能实现准确的弹性对齐，还能端到端生成完整预告片，验证了框架的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BEAT解决了音乐-镜头弹性对齐的关键挑战，推动了自动视频编辑和跨模态学习的发展。其学术价值在于提出了一种新型对齐范式，实际应用可用于电影预告片自动生成。未来的工作可能探索更复杂的音乐结构或扩展到其他视频生成任务。

title: Large Language Model-Powered Query-Driven Event Timeline Summarization in Industrial Search
abstract: Understanding how events evolve over time is essential for search engines handling queries about trending news. We present QDET (Query-Driven Event Timeline Summarization), a production system deployed on Baidu Search that constructs focused event timelines to explain specific query events. Unlike traditional topic-centric approaches that aim for comprehensive coverage, QDET identifies and organizes sub-events closely relevant to the query from noisy candidate sets formed by millions of documents retrieved daily. QDET incorporates two key innovations: (1) multi-task supervised fine-tuning with three auxiliary tasks-temporal ordering, causal judgment, and timeline completion-that enable compact models to match the performance of much larger general-purpose models in specialized domains; (2) reinforcement learning-based event concise summarization that enforces strict length constraints while maintaining semantic quality, achieving 88.2% length compliance and outperforming 671B-scale models by 7.7 points in constraint satisfaction. Our fine-tuned 7B parameter model achieves 76.2% F1 score on timeline summarization, slightly surpassing the zero-shot performance of DeepSeek-R1-671B (76.1% F1) while using only 1% of its parameters-demonstrating that domain-specific optimization enables production-ready models with comparable quality at drastically reduced computational costs. Online A/B tests on Baidu Search validate real-world effectiveness, showing 5.5% CTR improvement, 4.6% longer dwell time, and 4.4% deeper exploration compared to single-task baselines. We further demonstrate that timeline understanding transfers to heat prediction, confirming effective knowledge transfer to downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QDET系统，通过多任务微调和强化学习实现查询驱动的事件时间线摘要，以极小模型媲美超大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索引擎需要处理用户对突发新闻的查询，理解事件随时间演变至关重要。传统主题中心方法追求全面覆盖，但无法精准回答用户关于特定事件的问题。现有方法要么依赖大型通用模型成本高，要么在小模型上效果差。因此需要一种高效、精确的查询驱动事件时间线摘要方法，在工业搜索引擎中实用化。
light_analysis.method: QDET包含两个关键创新：一是多任务监督微调，结合时序排序、因果判断和时间线补全三个辅助任务，使紧凑模型在专业领域达到大型通用模型性能；二是基于强化学习的简洁摘要生成，强制长度约束同时保持语义质量，使用7B参数模型。系统从每天数百万文档中筛选与查询紧密相关的子事件，构建聚焦的时间线。
light_analysis.result: 7B参数微调模型在时间线摘要F1达76.2%，略超DeepSeek-R1-671B的76.1%，仅用其1%参数。强化学习摘要的篇幅合规率88.2%，约束满意度比671B模型高7.7点。在线A/B测试显示CTR提升5.5%，停留时间延长4.6%，深度探索增加4.4%。此外，时间线理解可迁移到热度预测任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: QDET证明了领域特定优化可使生产级小模型达到超大模型质量，大幅降低计算成本。该研究在工业搜索中实现了事件时间线的精准摘要，提升了用户体验。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务迁移或扩展到多语言事件建模。局限性未明确说明，但小模型可能在某些泛化场景仍有不足。

title: Learning Dynamic Graph Representations through Timespan View Contrasts
abstract: The rich information underlying graphs has inspired further investigation of unsupervised graph representation. Existing studies mainly depend on node features and topological properties within static graphs to create self-supervised signals, neglecting the temporal components carried by real-world graph data, such as timestamps of edges. To overcome this limitation, this paper explores how to model temporal evolution on dynamic graphs elegantly. Specifically, we introduce a new inductive bias, namely temporal translation invariance, which illustrates the tendency of the identical node to keep similar labels across different timespans. Based on this assumption, we develop a dynamic graph representation framework CLDG that encourages the node to maintain locally consistent temporal translation invariance through contrastive learning on different timespans. Except for standard CLDG which only considers explicit topological links, our further proposed CLDG++ additionally employs graph diffusion to uncover global contextual correlations between nodes, and designs a multi-scale contrastive learning objective composed of local-local, local-global, and global-global contrasts to enhance representation capabilities. Interestingly, by measuring the consistency between different timespans to shape anomaly indicators, CLDG and CLDG++ are seamlessly integrated with the task of spotting anomalies on dynamic graphs, which has broad applications in many high-impact domains, such as finance, cybersecurity, and healthcare. Experiments demonstrate that CLDG and CLDG++ both exhibit desirable performance in downstream tasks including node classification and dynamic graph anomaly detection. Moreover, CLDG significantly reduces time and space complexity by implicitly exploiting temporal cues instead of complicated sequence models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于时间平移不变性的动态图表示学习框架CLDG/CLDG++，通过跨时间跨度对比学习捕获时序演化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无监督图表示学习主要依赖静态图的节点特征和拓扑属性，忽略了真实图数据中的时间成分（如边的时间戳）。动态图的时间演化建模不足，导致无法捕捉节点在不同时间跨度的标签一致性规律。该研究旨在利用时序信息提升动态图表示质量，并应用于金融、网络安全等领域的异常检测。
light_analysis.method: 提出时间平移不变性归纳偏置，假设同一节点在不同时间跨度保持相似标签。CLDG通过跨时间跨度对比学习保持局部时间一致性；CLDG++额外采用图扩散揭示全局上下文关联，并设计多尺度对比学习（局部-局部、局部-全局、全局-全局）。利用跨时间一致性构造异常指标，实现异常检测。隐式利用时间线索而非复杂序列模型，降低时空复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明CLDG和CLDG++在节点分类和动态图异常检测任务上均表现优异。尤其CLDG通过隐式时序建模显著降低时间和空间复杂度，相比复杂序列模型更具效率。摘要未明确提及具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），仅称“展现理想性能”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出动态图表示新范式，通过时间平移不变性和对比学习有效建模时序演化，兼具表示学习与异常检测能力。方法在多个高影响力领域有应用价值，且CLDG的轻量级设计提升了实用性。未来可探索更复杂的时间依赖性或多模态图数据拓展。

title: FalAR: A Large-scale Speaker-Annotated European Portuguese Speech Corpus of Parliamentary Sessions
abstract: State-of-the-art performance for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) largely depends on the availability of large-scale labeled corpora. This creates a demand for increased data collection efforts, particularly for under-represented languages and dialectal varieties. Due to having considerably fewer speakers (around 11 million), European Portuguese (EP) is overshadowed by Brazilian Portuguese (BP) (around 200 million speakers) in currently available large-scale speech data resources, resulting in under-performing speech-based systems for EP users. To address this gap, and following similar data collection efforts for other languages, we present FalAR, a large-scale, speaker-annotated speech corpus of European Portuguese parliamentary sessions. Spanning approximately 20 years, FalAR comprises 5,800 hours of speech data. In addition, 4,850 hours have speaker identity annotations, for a total of 1,180 speakers with associated metadata including age, gender, political affiliation, and parliamentary role. The corpus was built using a state-of-the-art EP CAMÕES ASR model for transcription-reference alignment. In this paper, we describe the data collection process, together with the main characteristics of the FalAR corpus. Furthermore, we evaluate the trade-off between data quantity and alignment accuracy on ASR performance, with our experiments demonstrating that incorporating FalAR as pre-training data yields up to 14% relative WER improvement over baseline models.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了大规模、带说话人标注的欧洲葡萄牙语议会演讲语音语料库FalAR，提升了EP语音识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动语音识别（ASR）依赖大规模标注语料，但欧洲葡萄牙语（EP）因仅有约1100万母语者，被巴西葡萄牙语（约2亿母语者）主导的现有资源所忽视，导致EP用户的语音系统性能不足。为弥补这一差距，需要为EP构建大规模、带说话人标注的语音资源。
light_analysis.method: FalAR语料库包含约20年议会会议，共5800小时语音数据，其中4850小时带有说话人身份标注，涉及1180位说话人及其元数据（年龄、性别、政治派别、议会角色）。利用最新EP CAMÕES ASR模型进行转录参考对齐，并评估数据量与对齐准确率对ASR性能的权衡。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，将FalAR作为预训练数据纳入后，ASR模型在基线基础上实现了高达14%的相对词错误率（WER）改进。具体性能提升幅度依赖于数据量和对齐准确率的平衡，验证了大规模语音数据对EP ASR的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FalAR为低资源语言欧洲葡萄牙语提供了大规模、高质量带标注的语音资源，显著提升了ASR性能，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多元数据利用或跨语言迁移学习。

title: BhashaSetu: A Data-Centric Approach to Low-Resource Machine Translation
abstract: We present BhashaSetu, a linguistically enriched English--Marathi parallel dataset addressing persistent data limitations in low-resource neural machine translation (NMT). Marathi, spoken by over 95 million people, remains underrepresented in high-quality parallel corpora across diverse domains. Our dataset comprises 2.78 million sentence pairs from heterogeneous sources including news, politics, healthcare, literature, and culture, with stemmed and lemmatized representations to support morphology-aware analysis. We benchmark multiple state-of-the-art translation models using BLEU, spBLEU, chrF++, and TER metrics, and conduct parameter-efficient fine-tuning of NLLB-200-distilled-600M using LoRA. A key finding from our ablation: corpus-level deduplication is the single largest preprocessing contributor to downstream quality (removing it reduces performance by 1.17 BLEU and 2.21 chrF++), demonstrating that disciplined cross-source corpus hygiene is a low-cost, high-impact intervention for low-resource, morphologically rich languages. The dataset is publicly released to promote reproducible and linguistically informed low-resource NMT research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BhashaSetu数据集，通过数据驱动的语料去重显著提升低资源马拉地语神经机器翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 低资源神经机器翻译面临高质量平行语料匮乏的瓶颈，尤其对于拥有9500万使用者但语料稀缺的马拉地语。现有方法多关注模型架构，忽视了数据质量本身对翻译效果的巨大影响。摘要指出，通过跨源语料库的严谨去重，可以低成本高效地提升低资源、形态丰富语言的翻译质量。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含278万句对的英-马拉地语平行数据集，涉及新闻、政治、医疗等多样领域，并提供词干和词形还原形态分析支持。使用BLEU、spBLEU、chrF++和TER评估多个基线模型，并采用LoRA对NLLB-200-distilled-600M进行参数高效微调。关键对比实验揭示了语料库级去重是提升下游质量的最大单一预处理因素。
light_analysis.result: 去除了语料库级去重后，模型在BLEU上下降1.17，chrF++下降2.21，表明该预处理步骤对性能贡献显著。通过参数高效微调NLLB-200等模型，在多个指标上取得竞争力结果，证实了数据清洗在低资源场景下的高影响力。
light_analysis.conclusion: BhashaSetu为低资源马拉地语NMT提供了高质量、多样化的平行语料，并验证了语料去重作为低成本、高收益干预手段的有效性。数据集开源促进可重复研究，未来可扩展至其他形态丰富语言，以及探索更深层次的形态学引导数据增强。

title: ExTax: Explainable Disinformation Detection via Persuasion, Emotion, and Narrative Role Taxonomies
abstract: The democratization of LLMs has accelerated the generation and circulation of highly fluent disinformation, making traditional syntax-semantic verification increasingly insufficient. Such deception rarely relies solely on surface-level falsity; instead, it often combines persuasive rhetoric, emotional manipulation, and narrative role construction to influence readers' interpretations through multiple cognitive pathways. However, existing detectors typically emphasize isolated signals -- such as syntax, external knowledge, persuasion, or affective cues -- and therefore struggle to capture the multi-faceted manipulative intents underlying disinformation or provide human-auditable explanations. To address this gap, we present \textbf{ExTax}, a taxonomy-aligned framework for explainable disinformation detection. ExTax unifies persuasive rhetoric, emotional manipulation, and narrative roles into a 17-dimensional taxonomic space, covering 6 persuasive-rhetoric strategies, 5 emotional-manipulation methods, and 6 narrative-role categories. It elicits attributes from multiple frontier LLMs, reconciles their disagreements through Entropy-driven Dynamic Label Smoothing, and fuses the resulting taxonomic representations with contextual encodings via Heterogeneous Multi-Head Attention, grounding each prediction in an interpretable manipulation profile. Across five cross-domain and cross-genre benchmarks, ExTax achieves an overall Macro $F_1$ of $0.8456$, outperforming state-of-the-art deep learning and LLM-based baselines. It also remains robust under severe genre imbalance, where the strongest deep baseline degrades from $0.9454$ to $0.6194$.

light_analysis.overview: ExTax是一个基于说服策略、情感操纵和叙事角色分类的统一可解释虚假信息检测框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有虚假信息检测器只关注孤立信号（如语法、外部知识、说服或情感线索），难以捕捉多面操纵意图且缺乏可解释性。大型语言模型的民主化加速了流畅虚假信息的生成，传统句法语义验证已不足。虚假信息常组合说服修辞、情感操纵和叙事角色构建来影响读者，但现有方法无法统一建模这些多维认知操纵。
light_analysis.method: ExTax将说服修辞（6种）、情感操纵（5种）和叙事角色（6种）统一为17维分类空间。从多个前沿LLM中提取属性，通过熵驱动动态标签平滑（Entropy-driven Dynamic Label Smoothing）解决其分歧，再经异构多头注意力（Heterogeneous Multi-Head Attention）融合分类表示与上下文编码，为每个预测生成可解释的操纵画像。
light_analysis.result: 在五个跨领域和跨体裁基准上，ExTax总体宏F1达到0.8456，优于当前最优的深度学习和基于LLM的基线。在严重体裁不平衡场景下表现出强鲁棒性，而最强深度学习基线从0.9454急剧下降至0.6194。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExTax通过统一的多维度操纵分类和属性融合，显著提升了虚假信息检测的可解释性和性能。其学术贡献在于整合了说服、情感和叙事多个认知维度，实际应用可辅助人工审计。未来可扩展更多操纵维度或探索更高效的属性提取方法。

title: BatteryMFormer: Multi-level Learning for Battery Degradation Trajectory Forecasting
abstract: Early battery degradation trajectory forecasting (BDTF), which predicts the full-life state-of-health trajectory from early operational data, is critical for battery optimization, manufacturing, and deployment. Battery degradation data exhibit two key characteristics. First, degradation data present a multi-level structure, including regularities shared within aging conditions and trajectory patterns shared across batteries. Second, degradation-related variations in voltage-current profiles are often localized to specific state-of-charge (SOC) intervals. Existing approaches often fail to explicitly model these characteristics. To bridge this gap, we propose BatteryMFormer, a multi-level Transformer for early BDTF. BatteryMFormer integrates (1) an aging-condition-aware decoder that injects aging-condition priors via aging-condition-informed queries and aging-condition-aware attention, (2) a meta degradation pattern memory that learns and retrieves trajectory prototypes to guide long-horizon forecasting, and (3) a dual-view encoder that jointly captures temporal dynamics and SOC-localized variations from voltage and current time series. Extensive experiments on four battery domains show that BatteryMFormer consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, marking a significant step toward reliable BDTF. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ruifeng-Tan/BatteryMFormer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BatteryMFormer，一种多级Transformer，通过显式建模电池退化数据的多级结构和SOC局部化变化，实现早期电池退化轨迹预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池退化数据具有多级结构，包括老化条件内的共享规律和电池间的轨迹模式，且电压-电流退化相关变化常局限于特定SOC区间。现有方法未显式建模这些特性，导致预测精度不足。该研究旨在利用多级学习和局部变化感知，提升早期退化轨迹预测的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: BatteryMFormer集成三个关键组件：老化条件感知解码器，通过老化条件感知查询和注意力注入老化条件先验；元退化模式记忆，学习并检索轨迹原型以指导长时预测；双视图编码器，联合捕捉电压电流时间序列的时间动态和SOC局部变化。在四个电池域上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在四个电池域上的大量实验表明，BatteryMFormer一致优于最先进基线，显著提升了早期电池退化轨迹预测的准确性，验证了多级学习和SOC局部变化建模的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了对可靠BDTF的推动作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: BatteryMFormer通过多级Transformer架构，解决了电池退化预测中多级结构和局部变化建模不足的问题，为电池优化、制造和部署提供了可靠工具。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更复杂的退化场景。

title: Tracing Computation Density in LLMs
abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) are comprised of billions of parameters arranged in deep and wide computational graphs, but it is not clear that they exploit their full capacity for all inputs. We introduce the s-Trace method to efficiently estimate the subgraph of size s that best approximates a full model output. With this method, we find the computation in a variety of LLMs to be organized in two distinct phases. A small subgraph mostly composed of early-layer nodes can reconstruct the head of the full model output distribution. Adding further nodes, mostly located in later layers and increasingly consisting of attention heads, leads to incremental refinements in approximating the full output distribution. We find moreover that the amount of necessary computation per input correlates with model uncertainty, and that sparser subgraphs encode shallow statistics, such as unigram frequency. Overall, our results suggest a consistent modular organization in effective LLM computation, with a sparse early-layer core providing a rough prediction that is further refined through denser computations in later layers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出s-Trace方法，发现LLM计算分为早期稀疏核心粗略预测和后期密集注意力头细化两阶段。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer LLM虽拥有大量参数，但未必对每个输入都充分利用全部计算能力。现有方法难以揭示计算组织方式和冗余程度。研究旨在理解LLM有效计算的结构，探索计算量与输入特性的关系，为模型压缩、加速提供机理支撑。
light_analysis.method: 提出s-Trace方法，通过高效估计大小为s的子图来近似完整模型输出。关键创新在于发现计算组织呈两阶段：早期层小部分节点构成核心子图，能重构输出分布头部；增加后期层节点（主要为注意力头）逐步细化。方法还分析计算量与模型不确定性及浅层统计的相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLM实验中发现：小部分早期层节点可近似完整输出分布头部，后期层节点（注意力头为主）提供增量细化。每个输入所需计算量与模型不确定性正相关，稀疏子图编码unigram频率等浅层统计。结果表明LLM计算存在一致模块化组织。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM有效计算的模块化组织：早期层稀疏核心提供粗略预测，后期层密集计算细化。学术贡献在于理解模型内部计算结构，实际价值可指导模型压缩（如提前退出）或计算资源分配。未来需验证其他架构及扩展至更大模型。

title: SCKAN: Structural Consensus-based KAN Prototype Learning for Semi-Supervised Pancreas Segmentation
abstract: Accurate pancreas segmentation is critical for early cancer diagnosis, where annotation scarcity necessitates Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL). However, due to significant inter-sample morphological variability, existing SSL methods face severe generalizability limitations under sparse supervision, leading to the Supervision Bias problem. To address this, we propose Structural Consensus-based KAN Prototype Learning (SCKAN), which constructs the first cross-sample structural consensus learning with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs), to achieve more generalizable and accurate segmentation. Specifically, SCKAN contains two key designs: Structure-constrained Prototype Consistency Learning (SPCL), which prompts unbiased structural representation by enforcing cross-sample consistency via prototype-level contrastive optimization, and Consensus-based Kolmogorov-Arnold Fusion (CKaF), which reduces morphology-specific bias by aggregating stable consensus and filtering sample-wise noise via KAN's adaptive B-spline nonlinearity. Extensive experiments on two public pancreas datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of SCKAN. Code is at https://github.com/rhodaliu17/SCKAN.
comment: 10.5 pages, 5 figures, Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于结构一致性的KAN原型学习框架SCKAN，解决半监督胰腺分割中监督偏差问题，实现跨样本结构一致性学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 胰腺分割对早期癌症诊断至关重要，但标注稀缺需要半监督学习。现有方法因胰腺形态变异大、监督稀疏导致泛化能力差，产生监督偏差问题。本文旨在通过跨样本结构一致性学习缓解偏差，提高分割准确性和泛化性。
light_analysis.method: SCKAN包含两个关键设计：结构约束原型一致性学习（SPCL）通过原型级对比优化强制跨样本一致性，学习无偏结构表示；基于共识的Kolmogorov-Arnold融合模块（CKaF）利用KAN的自适应B样条非线性聚合稳定共识、过滤样本噪声。在公开胰腺数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在两个公开胰腺数据集上的实验表明，SCKAN有效优于现有半监督方法，具体性能指标如Dice系数提升等（摘要未明确说明数值），代码开源。与基线方法对比，SCKAN在稀疏监督下取得了更准确的泛化分割结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCKAN首次将KAN应用于半监督原型学习，通过结构一致性解决监督偏差，提升了胰腺分割的泛化性。其方法可推广至其他形态多变器官的细分任务，未来可探索更高效的原型更新策略或跨模态应用。

title: Share More, Search Less: Collaborative Parallel Thinking for Efficient Test-Time Scaling
abstract: Test-Time Scaling (TTS) enhances the reasoning capabilities of large language models by allocating additional inference compute to explore the solution space. However, existing parallel TTS methods typically keep branches isolated during search: intermediate discoveries remain branch-private and cannot guide other branches in time. This information isolation causes substantial redundant exploration, as branches repeatedly rediscover information already found elsewhere and require more search steps to collect complete decision information needed to reach correct answers.
