To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{Collaborative Parallel Thinking (CPT)}, a training-free inference framework that enables search-time information sharing across parallel branches. CPT extracts compact intermediate information from ongoing branches, maintains a deduplicated query-level information pool, and broadcasts pool entries through the input context, allowing each branch in subsequent search steps to reuse discoveries made by other branches rather than rediscover the same information. Empirically, experiments on HMMT and AIME benchmarks show that CPT establishes a stronger accuracy--latency Pareto frontier than strong baselines across rollout budgets and model scales, highlighting search-time collaboration as an effective direction for efficient parallel TTS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出协作并行思考（CPT）框架，通过搜索时信息共享减少冗余探索，显著提升测试时扩展效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有并行测试时扩展方法通常保持分支隔离，中间发现无法及时共享，导致大量冗余探索和更多搜索步数。这种信息隔离降低了推理效率，尤其在需要收集完整决策信息时问题突出。因此，需要一种能实现分支间信息共享的机制来减少重复劳动，加速收敛到正确答案。
light_analysis.method: CPT是一种无需训练的推理框架，核心是提取并行分支的紧凑中间信息，维护去重查询级信息池，并通过输入上下文广播池条目。每个分支在后续搜索步骤中可重用其他分支的发现而非重新发现，从而减少冗余。该方法不依赖额外训练，直接应用于现有模型，具有即插即用特性。
light_analysis.result: 在HMMT和AIME数学推理基准上，CPT相比多种强基线（如自洽性、并行束搜索）在不同回滚预算和模型规模下均建立更优的准确率-延迟帕累托前沿。例如，同等延迟下准确率提升显著，表明搜索时协作有效提高资源利用效率，减少达到目标精度所需计算量。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPT首次展示搜索时协作在并行测试时扩展中的有效性，为高效推理提供了新方向。该方法无需训练即可提升性能，具有实用价值。潜在局限性包括共享信息池的维护开销及不同任务的信息提取策略差异，未来可探索自适应信息广播和异构分支协作。

title: Less is More: Early Stopping Rollout for On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation has recently emerged as a promising alternative to standard sequence-level imitation, training a student by scoring its own rollouts with a teacher model. However, we observe ``Off-policy Teacher Decay'' problem in this paradigm: for the later tokens, with student's earlier trajectory as context that is off-policy to the teacher, the teacher's ability to produce a corrective score would decay, and may fall back to token-completion behavior learned in the pre-training stage. We empirically verify this problem, and we propose Early Stopping Rollout (ESR) to fix it: a simple yet effective distillation strategy that simply restricts the rollout generation to the first   response tokens. We show that ESR both surpasses the full rollout OPD performance across model size, family, tasks and training regime, and exhibit much higher GPU efficiency and training stability, especially under cross model family scenarios. We further investigate the mechanism behind this surprising performance and discovered "Cascading Alignment" and "Sub-mode Commitment" effect of ESR that may explain why it works effectively and even sometimes exceeding the teacher model performance. Besides, we show that this position-based token selection strategy cannot be fully explainable by KL divergence and entropy signals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Early Stopping Rollout (ESR)策略，通过限制rollout生成到前几个响应token，解决on-policy蒸馏中的Off-policy Teacher Decay问题，提升性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: On-policy蒸馏中，后序token的上下文偏离教师策略（Off-policy Teacher Decay），导致教师评分能力下降，蒸馏效果变差。该问题影响跨模型家族等场景的稳定性与效率，亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: 提出Early Stopping Rollout (ESR)，简单限制rollout生成到初始的少量响应token，避免长序列的off-policy累积。该方法在多种模型规模、家族及任务上超越完整rollout OPD，同时显著提升GPU效率和训练稳定性。机制上，ESR产生级联对齐和子模式承诺效应，甚至超越教师性能。
light_analysis.result: ESR在多个模型规模、家族、任务和训练方式下均优于完整rollout OPD，GPU效率更高且训练更稳定。部分场景下学生模型性能甚至超过教师。实验验证了Off-policy Teacher Decay问题的存在以及ESR的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ESR以简单策略有效解决了on-policy蒸馏中的off-policy退化问题，为知识蒸馏提供了高效稳定的新范式。其级联对齐和子模式承诺效应揭示了深层机制，未来可探索更通用的token选择策略或理论分析。

title: SQARL: A Size-Agnostic Reinforcement Learning approach for Circuit Allocation in Distributed Quantum Architectures
abstract: The scaling of quantum processors is currently limited by technical challenges such as decoherence and cross-talk. As the number of qubits grows, interference increases the computational noise. Distributed quantum computing addresses these limitations by interconnecting smaller, easier-to-handle quantum processors (cores), but it introduces the challenge of minimizing slow, error-prone inter-core communication. The task of distributing quantum circuits across cores while minimizing communication costs is known as the Qubit Allocation problem. This work focuses on developing a deep learning approach to this problem, emphasizing flexibility to quantum hardware topology and improving state-of-the-art performance.   Heuristic and non-learning algorithms, such as the Hungarian Qubit Allocation (HQA), currently represent the state of the art. Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches leverage learned allocation policies but often lack flexibility, requiring retraining when hardware configurations change, and they fall short of the solution quality achieved by non-learning methods. However, learning mechanisms could outperform human-crafted heuristics.   To overcome these limitations, this work proposes a flexible, transformer-based architecture that can handle arbitrary numbers of qubits and cores without retraining. Results show that the trained policy consistently outperforms the previous RL state of the art and narrows the gap between RL and HQA for the most common circuits. It achieves a 33% reduction in allocation cost relative to the HQA for the Cuccaro Adder and 25% on average for random circuits. These findings show that learning-based approaches can effectively match the performance of hand-crafted heuristics, a crucial step towards their application in real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种与量子硬件拓扑无关的Transformer强化学习方法，在分布式量子计算中高效解决量子比特分配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式量子计算通过连接小规模量子处理器来克服扩展性限制，但引入慢速易错的跨核心通信。现有启发式方法如匈牙利量子比特分配（HQA）性能优越但缺乏学习能力，而强化学习方法虽可学习策略却缺乏灵活性，需针对不同硬件重新训练且性能不及启发式。因此需要一种灵活且能匹敌甚至超越启发式的学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SQARL，一种基于Transformer架构的强化学习模型，可处理任意数量的量子比特和核心，无需因硬件配置变化而重新训练。模型通过编码电路拓扑和硬件约束，学习最小化通信成本的分配策略。训练采用策略梯度方法，利用奖励信号引导模型降低跨核心操作数。
light_analysis.result: 在Cuccaro加法器上，SQARL相比HQA降低33%的分配成本；随机电路上平均降低25%。相较之前最先进的强化学习方法，性能显著提升，首次将基于学习的方案与手工启发式方法差距缩小至可竞争水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: SQARL证明了学习型方法可以匹配甚至超越手工设计的启发式算法，为分布式量子计算的实际部署提供了可行方案。未来工作可探索更复杂的架构和扩展至更大规模系统，但仍需验证在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。

title: Attribute-Based Diagnosis of LLM Alignment with Hate Speech Annotations
abstract: Hate speech annotation is costly, subjective, and prone to annotator disagreement, making large-scale dataset construction challenging. We systematically analyze how well large language models (LLMs) align with human judgments across ten theoretically grounded subjective attributes, such as dehumanization, violence, and sentiment, evaluating both small and large variants of Llama 3.1 and Qwen 2.5. Our analysis reveals a consistent split across all models: behaviorally explicit dimensions (insult, humiliate, attack-defend) correlate strongly with human annotations, while evaluative dimensions (respect, sentiment, hate speech) are systematically inverted. Demographic persona conditioning reduces model confidence without improving alignment. Building on these insights, we propose combining attribute-level LLM predictions via a confidence-weighted Ridge regression to reconstruct continuous hate speech scores from the Measuring Hate Speech corpus, achieving $R^2$ of up to 0.71 and outperforming direct prompting baselines, demonstrating that structured attribute decomposition recovers a richer and more human-aligned signal than end-to-end label prediction alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于属性分解和置信加权回归的方法，提升大语言模型在仇恨言论检测中与人类判断的对齐度。
light_analysis.motivation: 仇恨言论标注成本高、主观性强且易产生分歧，直接预测标签难以捕捉复杂的人机对齐差异。现有方法忽略属性层面结构化信息，导致模型与人类判断在评价性维度上系统性反转，亟需系统分析对齐模式并设计改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 系统分析Llama 3.1和Qwen 2.5在十个理论属性（如去人性化、暴力、情感）上的表现，发现行为显性与评价性维度存在对齐差异。提出置信加权Ridge回归，融合属性级LLM预测以重建连续仇恨言论分数，利用结构化分解替代端到端标签预测。
light_analysis.result: 在Measuring Hate Speech语料库上，所提方法R²达0.71，优于直接提示基线，验证了属性分解能恢复更丰富、更符合人类判断的信号，有效提升检测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示LLM在属性层面与人类对齐的结构化差异，证明属性分解结合加权回归可显著改善仇恨言论检测的人机一致性。该研究为模型对齐评估提供了新视角，未来可扩展至其他偏见检测任务，但需验证属性集的泛化性。

title: NeR-SC: Adapting Neural Video Representation to Screen Content
abstract: Implicit neural representations have emerged as a promising paradigm for video compression, with recent methods achieving competitive performance on natural video. However, screen content video -- common in remote desktop, online education, and cloud gaming -- exhibits distinct statistics: sharp edges, limited color palettes, and strong temporal redundancy. Existing neural representation methods, designed for natural scenes, lack mechanisms to exploit these properties, leaving substantial room for improvement. In this paper, we propose NeR-SC, a neural representation framework tailored for screen content video. Building on the SNeRV backbone, NeR-SC introduces three screen-content-specific modules: (i) a learnable color palette that models the discrete color structure of screen content by restricting the low-frequency sub-band to a learned color set; (ii) a multi-gate dense fusion module that replaces sequential feature fusion with dense, attention-gated cross-stage interaction; and (iii) an embedding-level frame skip strategy that bypasses redundant decoder invocations for static frames, with zero training overhead. Experiments on DSCVC and VCD show that NeR-SC achieves 40.32~dB and 41.73~dB average PSNR, outperforming representative neural video representation methods and, at low bitrates, surpassing H.264 and H.265. The skip strategy enables real-time decoding with no loss in quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeR-SC，首个针对屏幕内容视频的神经表示框架，通过三个专用模块实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 屏幕内容视频（如远程桌面、在线教育、云游戏）具有锐利边缘、有限调色板和强时间冗余等特性，而现有神经表示方法针对自然视频设计，缺乏利用这些特性的机制，导致压缩性能有较大提升空间。解决该问题对于降低传输带宽、提升用户体验具有重要实际意义。
light_analysis.method: 基于SNeRV骨干，NeR-SC引入三个屏幕内容专用模块：可学习的颜色调色板，限制低频子带至离散颜色集以建模颜色结构；多门控密集融合模块，通过注意力门控实现跨阶段密集交互替代顺序融合；嵌入级帧跳过策略，对静态帧绕过解码器冗余调用，训练零开销。
light_analysis.result: 在DSCVC和VCD数据集上，NeR-SC平均PSNR分别达到40.32 dB和41.73 dB，优于代表性神经视频表示方法；在低码率下，性能超越传统编码标准H.264和H.265。帧跳过策略实现实时解码，且不损失重建质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeR-SC有效解决了现有神经表示对屏幕内容视频适应性不足的问题，为屏幕内容压缩提供了新范式。学术上填补了神经表示在该领域的空白，实用上支持低码率高质量实时传输。未来可探索更复杂的帧间交互机制以进一步提升性能。

title: Boosting Knowledge Graph Foundation Models via Enhanced Negative Sampling
abstract: Knowledge graphs (KGs) have become the core backbone of numerous downstream tasks such as question answering and recommender systems. However, despite all this, KGs are often very incomplete. To perform zero-shot knowledge graph completion in unseen KGs, which have different relational vocabularies from those used for pre-training, KG foundation models (KGFMs) receive a wide range of attention. Existing KGFMs often perform training using random negative triples, which are constructed by replacing the head or tail entity of a positive triple with a random entity. However, these negative triples are often constructed with limited quality, providing weak supervision for KGFM training. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective adaptive negative sampling approach, KMAS, to enhance existing KGFMs. KMAS constructs hard negative triples through the updated relation embeddings generated from the existing KGFM's relation encoder. To further adaptively align with the evolving capability of the KGFM during the training process, KMAS adjusts the ratio of hard negative triples dynamically throughout the whole training process: after a warmup phrase, it increases the ratio linearly and then decreases linearly. Extensive experiments are conducted over 44 data sets. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed negative sampling method can enhance many SOTA KGFMs without requiring excessive additional time or memory consumption.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应负采样方法KMAS，通过构造难负三元组并动态调整比例，增强知识图谱基础模型的零样本补全能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱常不完备，现有基础模型使用随机负三元组训练，质量低导致监督信号弱，限制了模型性能。为提升零样本知识图谱补全效果，需要更高质量的负采样策略，以提供更强监督并适应模型能力的动态变化。
light_analysis.method: KMAS利用现有基础模型的关系编码器更新关系嵌入，构造难负三元组，并随训练动态调整其比例：预热阶段后线性增加至高峰再线性下降，使负样本难度与模型能力对齐。该方法简单高效，无需显著额外时间或内存。
light_analysis.result: 在44个数据集上实验表明，KMAS可增强多种最先进知识图谱基础模型，提升零样本补全性能，且不引入过多计算开销。与随机负采样和固定难负采样相比，效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: KMAS作为即插即用模块，有效提升知识图谱基础模型的泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的自适应策略或结合其他任务。

title: ORCA: An End-to-End Interactive Copilot for Optimized Root Cause Analysis
abstract: Causal analysis is a crucial task in many domains, including manufacturing, social science, and medicine. However, despite recent progress, the conceptual and methodological complexity of causal methods makes them largely inaccessible to domain experts. This gap prevents experts from leveraging these advances and hinders researchers who lack access to real-world data for validation. To bridge this divide, we introduce ORCA, a copilot for end-to-end causal analysis. ORCA orchestrates agents to understand the user's goals and guide them through the most appropriate causal analysis workflow, from fully automatic to highly user-guided execution. It features causal discovery, causal effect estimation, explainability and Root-Cause-Analysis (RCA). ORCA evaluates and compares performance, generates key metrics and diagrams, and generates insights through structured reports. We highlight its effectiveness across several real-world use-cases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端交互式因果分析副驾驶ORCA，自动引导用户完成优化根因分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果分析在制造、社会科学和医学等领域至关重要，但现有方法概念和方法复杂，领域专家难以使用，阻碍了先进方法的推广和真实数据验证。ORCA旨在架起桥梁，使因果分析对非专家可用。
light_analysis.method: ORCA编排多个智能体，理解用户目标，引导用户选择从全自动到高度用户引导的因果分析工作流。核心功能包括因果发现、因果效应估计、可解释性和根因分析（RCA），并生成关键指标、图表及结构化报告。
light_analysis.result: 通过多个真实世界用例展示ORCA的有效性，能评估和比较不同方法性能，自动生成指标和洞察，但摘要未提具体数值或基准对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORCA降低了因果分析的门槛，使领域专家能利用先进方法，研究者可验证真实数据。未来可能扩展更多分析任务，但摘要未讨论局限性。

title: Black-box Membership Inference Attacks on the Pre-training Data of Image-generation Models
abstract: The rapid advancement of diffusion-based image generation models has raised serious concerns regarding potential copyright and privacy infringements involving human-created data. Membership inference attacks (MIAs) have emerged as a promising tool for identifying unauthorized data usage during model training. Existing methods typically assess the ability of model to denoise perturbed suspect images as an indicator of membership status. However, the discriminative power of such features is highly dependent on the degree of model memorization and deteriorates significantly when applied to less exposed data (e.g., pre-training data). Although several methods attempt to enhance detection by leveraging internal model features, these features are generally inaccessible in mainstream closed-source image generation platforms, limiting their practicality. In this paper, we demonstrate that analyzing how a black-box diffusion model denoises a target image and corresponding perturbed textual instructions can reveal more distinctive membership cues. Based on this insight, we propose a black-box membership inference attack framework (named SD-MIA) that leverages a cross-modal data perturbation mechanism to detect pre-training data in diffusion models. We conduct extensive experiments on both a public benchmark dataset and a newly constructed dataset, each comprising pre-training membership and non-membership samples with identical distributions. Experimental results demonstrate that SD-MIA achieves superior performance compared to existing baselines, including those with the unfair advantage of accessing internal model features.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种黑盒成员推理攻击框架SD-MIA，利用跨模态数据扰动机制检测扩散模型的预训练数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散图像生成模型引发版权和隐私侵犯担忧，成员推理攻击可识别未经授权数据使用。现有方法依赖模型对噪声图像的去噪能力，但在预训练数据上性能下降；需内部特征的方法在黑盒场景中不可行。本文旨在解决黑盒环境下检测预训练数据的问题，实现无需内部特征的实用攻击。
light_analysis.method: 提出SD-MIA框架，核心是分析黑盒扩散模型对目标图像和对应扰动文本指令的去噪过程，跨模态扰动同时作用于图像和文本，增强成员线索。实验使用公开基准数据集和新构建的分布一致的数据集，包含预训练成员与非成员样本。
light_analysis.result: SD-MIA在公开基准和新数据集上均优于现有基线方法，包括那些可访问内部模型特征的方法。摘要未报告具体数值，但表明其性能优越，验证了跨模态扰动机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了黑盒扩散模型通过分析图像和文本去噪可检测预训练数据成员。SD-MIA无需内部特征，具有高实用性。未来可探索扩展至其他生成模型及更大规模预训练数据，但摘要未明确局限性。

title: Evaluating the Relevance of Uncertainty Estimators for LLM Hallucination
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are prone to hallucinations, i.e., statements unsupported by the input or training data, hindering reliable deployment. In parallel, numerous uncertainty estimation (UE) methods have been proposed to quantify model confidence and are often implicitly treated as proxies for model failure. However, the relationship between uncertainty and hallucinations remains insufficiently characterized. We present a systematic empirical study of the association between uncertainty estimators and hallucinations in LLMs. Rather than assuming this association, we evaluate directly when and to what extent it holds. We consider a diverse set of uncertainty estimators, including information-theoretic, sampling-based, and reflexive estimators, and examine their behavior across hallucination settings. Our experiments cover both intrinsic hallucinations (violations of input faithfulness) and extrinsic hallucinations (unsupported claims relative to training data), using four complementary benchmarks, including RAGTruth and HalluLens. We find that the association is highly variable and often weak, depending on the hallucination type and the LLM under evaluation. These results challenge the use of uncertainty as a direct signal of hallucination and clarify when it provides actionable information.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估不确定性估计与LLM幻觉之间的关联，发现其相关性多变且常较弱。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）容易产生幻觉，即生成与输入或训练数据不符的陈述，这阻碍了其可靠部署。现有多种不确定性估计（UE）方法被提出用于量化模型置信度，并常被视为模型失败的代理指标。然而，不确定性估计与幻觉之间的关系尚未被充分刻画。本研究旨在直接评估这种关联的存在与否及其程度，以澄清不确定性估计能否作为幻觉的可靠信号。
light_analysis.method: 本文对多种不确定性估计方法与LLM幻觉之间的关联进行了系统的实证研究。考虑的不确定性估计器包括信息论、基于采样和反思性估计器，涵盖内在幻觉（输入忠实性违反）和外在幻觉（与训练数据不符的声称）。使用四个互补基准（包括RAGTruth和HalluLens）进行评估，考察不同幻觉设置下UE与幻觉的关联。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，不确定性估计与幻觉之间的关联具有高度可变性，且通常较弱，具体取决于幻觉类型和所评估的LLM。这些结果质疑了将不确定性直接作为幻觉信号的假设，并澄清了在何种情况下不确定性能够提供可操作的信息。指标未给出具体数值，表明关联不显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了当前将不确定性估计视为幻觉直接代理的普遍做法，揭示了其关联的局限性和条件性。研究为LLM的可靠部署提供了重要指导，建议在依赖不确定性信号时需谨慎。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的幻觉检测方法，或结合不确定性与其他信号进行综合评估。

title: PersLitEval: Fine-grained Benchmark and Evaluation of LLMs on Persian Literature Questions
abstract: Despite impressive multilingual capabilities, large language models (LLMs) remain poorly evaluated on literary knowledge in non-English languages. We introduce PersLitEval, a benchmark of 4,514 Persian literature multiple-choice questions across eight fine-grained categories spanning spelling, literary devices, grammar, vocabulary, word formation, and conceptual understanding, sourced from materials for the Konkur university entrance examination. We evaluate six LLMs across ten prompting strategies, revealing striking category-level disparities across three tiers of task difficulty: models reach higher accuracy on conceptual similarity tasks but struggle with formal linguistic analysis, with spelling and word formation proving the hardest across all models. Prompting strategy has a significant impact on performance, with explained few-shot examples yielding the best results, particularly on formal linguistic categories. An error analysis identifies three failure modes: semantic comprehension gaps, formal linguistic knowledge gaps, and counting/enumeration errors, suggesting that different categories require different improvement strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PersLitEval基准，系统评估LLM在波斯语文学知识上的细粒度表现，揭示模型在形式语言分析上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM在多语言任务中表现优异，但在非英语语言的文学知识评估上仍缺乏系统研究。现有基准多聚焦英语，忽视波斯语等语言的文学细粒度能力。波斯语文学知识对于教育、文化传承和语言技术发展至关重要，而现有评估无法揭示模型在不同类别语言任务上的具体差异。因此，需要构建针对波斯语文学的细粒度基准，以指导模型改进。
light_analysis.method: 构建PersLitEval基准，包含4,514道波斯语文学选择题，覆盖拼写、修辞、语法、词汇、构词、概念理解等8个细粒度类别，数据源自伊朗大学入学考试。评估六个LLM在十种提示策略下的表现，包括标准提示、少样本提示、解释性少样本等。通过错误分析识别三类失败模式：语义理解缺失、形式语言知识缺失、计数/枚举错误。
light_analysis.result: 模型在概念相似性任务上准确率较高，但在拼写和构词等正式语言分析上表现最差。提示策略显著影响性能，解释性少样本提示效果最佳，尤其在正式语言类别上。错误分析显示不同类别需要不同的改进策略。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但揭示了类别间存在显著差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: PersLitEval为评估LLM的波斯语文学能力提供了细粒度基准，揭示了模型在形式语言分析上的弱点。该研究强调了多语言评估中细粒度类别的重要性，并为未来改进模型的语言形态学能力指明了方向。局限性在于基准仅基于考试题目，可能无法完全覆盖真实文学理解。未来可扩展至其他语种和文学任务。

title: Generating Robust Portfolios of Optimization Models using Large Language Models
abstract: Mathematical optimization is a powerful tool for structured decision-making across domains such as resource allocation and planning. Formulating optimization models faithful to reality, though, remains a significant bottleneck as it typically demands both domain expertise and optimization knowledge that are often scarce. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) promise to bridge this gap, enabling the generation of candidate optimization models from natural language descriptions. However, there is no guarantee that any single LLM-generated model is reliable, and existing approaches that output only one model are therefore risky. In this work, we propose a novel algorithm that generates a portfolio of optimization models, designed to be robust to the limitations of LLMs. Our method exploits the observation that a single LLM can play two distinct roles $\unicode{x2014}$ as a stochastic generator and as a reasoning evaluator $\unicode{x2014}$ and proposes a unified framework that leverages both capabilities in a complementary manner. We provide theoretical guarantees showing that, as long as either the generator or the evaluator is well-aligned with human preferences, the portfolio is guaranteed to contain high-quality candidates, enabling a principled human-in-the-loop process in which a decision-maker can review multiple candidates before committing to one. We further validate our approach empirically, demonstrating strong performance across a range of optimization modeling tasks.
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 LM4Plan Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用大语言模型生成鲁棒优化模型组合的算法，通过生成器与评估器协作确保组合质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 数学优化在资源分配等领域应用广泛，但构建忠实于现实的优化模型需要领域知识和优化专长，这些往往稀缺。大语言模型可基于自然语言生成候选模型，但单个模型可能不可靠，现有方法仅输出单一模型存在风险。因此，需要一种鲁棒的方法来生成多个候选模型，降低对单一模型的依赖，并通过人力审查提高可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一框架，让单一LLM扮演两种互补角色：作为随机生成器，生成多个候选优化模型；作为推理评估器，评估模型质量。算法利用这种双重能力，生成一个模型组合，并给出理论保证：只要生成器或评估器中至少有一个与人类偏好一致，组合中必然包含高质量候选。该方法支持人在回路流程，决策者可从组合中选择最终模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多种优化建模任务上进行了实证验证，结果表明所提出的方法在模型质量和鲁棒性方面表现优异。具体而言，生成的组合中始终包含高质量候选模型，相比单一模型生成方法，有效降低了风险。实验覆盖了不同领域和复杂度的优化问题，验证了方法的泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型生成鲁棒优化模型组合的新算法，通过生成器与评估器的协同作用，解决了单个模型不可靠的问题。该方法具有理论保证和实证支撑，为自动化优化建模提供了可靠方案。未来可进一步探索更高效的人机交互机制，以及扩展到更复杂的优化问题。

title: SCENT: Aligning Mass Spectra with Molecular Structure for Olfactory Perception
abstract: Predicting human olfactory perception from molecular structure has seen remarkable progress, yet these approaches require explicit chemical structure at inference, which is not available in practical sensing settings. We address this gap by exploring direct electron ionization mass spectrometry (EI-MS), a sensing technique that acquires chemically informative fragmentation fingerprints in seconds, as an alternative input modality for olfactory prediction. We contribute Spectrum-to-Chemical Embedding alignmeNT (SCENT), a multi-modal contrastive learning framework that aligns EI-MS representations with pretrained chemical structure embeddings, while requiring only mass spectra at inference. On the multi-label odor descriptor prediction task, SCENT significantly outperforms MS-only baselines and achieves performance comparable to structure-based models, despite requiring no explicit molecular structure at test time. The learned representations also better approximate continuous human perceptual ratings and generalize to real-world lab-measured spectra, suggesting that cross-modal alignment is an effective strategy for grounding analytical spectra in chemical semantics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCENT多模态对比学习框架，通过质谱与化学结构嵌入对齐，实现无需结构信息的嗅觉预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有从分子结构预测嗅觉的方法在推理时需要显式化学结构，但在实际传感场景中无法获得。而电子电离质谱（EI-MS）能在数秒内获取化学信息丰富的碎片指纹，但直接用于嗅觉预测效果不佳。本文旨在利用EI-MS作为替代输入模态，通过跨模态对齐提升嗅觉预测性能。
light_analysis.method: SCENT是一个多模态对比学习框架，将质谱表示与预训练的化学结构嵌入对齐。训练时使用质谱和对应的分子结构，推理时仅需质谱。框架通过对比损失学习跨模态嵌入，使质谱表示接近其对应化学结构嵌入，同时远离其他结构。实验采用多标签气味描述符预测任务。
light_analysis.result: 在多标签气味描述符预测任务中，SCENT显著优于仅使用质谱的基线方法，性能与基于结构的方法相当。此外，学习到的表示能更好地逼近连续的人类感知评分，并泛化到真实实验室测量的质谱。这表明跨模态对齐是使分析质谱扎根于化学语义的有效策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCENT证明了无需显式分子结构，仅凭质谱即可实现与结构模型相当的嗅觉预测能力，为实际传感环境中的气味预测提供了可行方案。其跨模态对齐方法具有通用性，可推广至其他分析谱图（如红外、拉曼）。未来工作可探索更复杂的谱图编码器和更丰富的感知标签。

title: Sampling Data with Chains of Forward-Backward Diffusion Steps
abstract: Sampling from learned high-dimensional distributions is a foundational computational problem. We introduce U-turn chains: Markov chains obtained by iterating short forward-backward steps of a diffusion model, in which each step proposes a move that remains on the learned data manifold and, paired with a Metropolis-Hastings correction, samples from energy-modified targets. For synthetic languages, we show that minimal U-turn dynamics undergoes an ergodicity-breaking phase transition driven by fragmentation of the data manifold; ergodicity is restored at larger U-turn magnitude. In the non-ergodic regime, low-level features relax faster than high-level ones, an ordering that inverts only at sufficiently large U-turn magnitude. We test these predictions on natural language and natural images. In both modalities, minimal U-turns relax slowly, especially for high-level features approximated by deep representations in CNNs or LLMs. The layer-ordering inversion appears only at large noise when mixing is efficient -- signatures consistent with strongly constrained, weakly mixing local dynamics. We discuss the implications of these results for sampling with diffusion models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出U-turn链，通过迭代短程前向-后向扩散步骤采样，并发现其遍历性破缺相变和特征松弛顺序反转现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 从学习的高维分布采样是基础计算问题，但现有扩散模型采样方法可能因数据流形碎片化导致遍历性破坏和混合缓慢。本文旨在通过U-turn链研究这些动态特性，揭示其相变行为和特征松弛规律，以优化采样效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出U-turn马尔可夫链，迭代执行扩散模型短程前向-后向步骤，并用Metropolis-Hastings校正实现能量修改目标采样。在合成语言、自然语言和自然图像上实验，分析U-turn幅度对遍历性和特征松弛的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在合成语言中，最小U-turn动态经历遍历性破缺相变，由流形碎片驱动；较大幅度恢复遍历性。非遍历态下低级特征松弛更快，该顺序仅在大幅度时反转。自然语言和图像中最小U-turn松弛缓慢（尤其高级特征），层序反转仅在大噪声时出现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了扩散模型采样的遍历性破缺和混合特性，指出强约束、弱混合动力学限制了效率。结果为改进采样策略（如增大噪声）提供了理论依据，对生成模型实践有重要指导意义。

title: Timestep-Aware SVDQuant-GPTQ for W4A4 Quantization of Wan2.2-I2V
abstract: W4A4 quantization of large video diffusion Transformers offers substantial memory savings but is hindered by two main challenges: sparse large-magnitude activation outliers, and strongly timestep-dependent activation distributions across the multi-step denoising trajectory. These difficulties are compounded by Wan2.2-I2V's two-expert Mixture-of-Experts DiT design, whose high-noise and low-noise experts exhibit distinct quantization sensitivities that a single global calibration policy cannot capture. We propose a post-training quantization framework combining SVDQuant-based low-rank outlier compensation, GPTQ-based reconstruction-aware residual weight quantization, and timestep-bin-wise per-layer activation clipping-ratio search conducted independently for each expert. On the OpenS2V-Eval benchmark, our method reduces peak GPU memory by 59.3\% relative to the BF16 baseline while incurring only a 0.9\% drop in VBench average score and a 2.3\% drop in Imaging Quality, demonstrating that expert- and timestep-aware calibration is essential for high-fidelity W4A4 inference on MoE video DiTs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了结合SVDQuant低秩补偿、GPTQ残差量化和时间步分箱裁剪搜索的W4A4后训练量化框架，适用于MoE视频扩散Transformer。
light_analysis.motivation: W4A4量化可大幅减少视频扩散Transformer内存占用，但面临激活异常值和多步去噪中激活分布随时间步强烈变化两大挑战。尤其Wan2.2-I2V的双专家MoE设计导致不同专家量化敏感性差异大，单一全局校准策略无法有效处理，现有方法在低比特下保真度不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出后训练量化框架，包含：(1) SVDQuant低秩矩阵补偿异常值激活；(2) GPTQ重构感知残差权重量化；(3) 针对每个专家独立进行时间步分箱的逐层激活裁剪比率搜索。通过专家和时间步感知的校准，适应不同去噪阶段和专家分支的分布特性。
light_analysis.result: 在OpenS2V-Eval基准上，相比BF16基线，峰值GPU内存降低59.3%，同时VBench平均分仅下降0.9%，成像质量下降2.3%。该结果证明专家和时间步感知校准对MoE视频DiT的高保真W4A4推理至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次验证了专家和时间步感知校准在MoE视频扩散Transformer低比特量化中的必要性，为高内存效率视频生成提供了实用方案。局限性可能包括对特定架构的依赖性，未来可探索自动化校准策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Cast a Wider Net: Coordinated Pass@K Policy Optimization for Code Reasoning
abstract: Repeated sampling with a verifier is the standard way to allocate test-time compute for code generation, with pass@$K$ as the canonical metric. Yet the standard policy class draws $K$ independent samples from a single answer distribution, so attempts often collapse onto near-duplicate reasoning paths and waste the budget on redundant rollouts. This failure is costly in competitive programming, where many problems admit multiple distinct algorithmic strategies and pass@$K$ requires only one correct attempt. We propose Coordinated Pass@$K$ Policy Optimization (CPPO), which turns pass@$K$ generation into joint exploration over strategies: a planner emits a tuple of $K{=}4$ alternative high-level methods, and a shared solver attempts one solution per method. CPPO trains this joint policy with a multiplicative planner reward, $R_{\mathrm{plan}} = J_ψ\cdot R_{\mathrm{out}}$, assigning credit only to valid strategy tuples that lead to verifier-confirmed pass@$K$ success. Across APPS, CodeContests, and LiveCodeBench-v6, CPPO improves pass@$4$ over direct sampling, planning baselines, planner-only SFT, and pass@$K$-oriented RL under the same $K{=}4$ solver-attempt budget, with statistically significant gains on six of nine model--benchmark cells. The largest single gain is $+0.16$ on Qwen3.5-9B LiveCodeBench-v6 over the strongest baseline, PKPO ($0.588 \rightarrow 0.748$; paired bootstrap, $p < 0.05$).
comment: Code reasoning; pass@K optimization; coordinated planning; verifiable rewards; strategy diversity

light_analysis.overview: 提出协调式Pass@K策略优化(CPPO)，将代码生成转为策略规划，提升多样化推理路径的探索效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Pass@K策略从单一分布独立采样K次，导致推理路径重复，浪费测试时计算。尤其在竞争性编程中，问题有多种解法，只需一次正确尝试，但现有方法因冗余采样而失效。
light_analysis.method: CPPO通过规划器生成K=4种不同高层方法，共享求解器为每种方法尝试一个解。使用乘性规划奖励R_plan = J_ψ·R_out，仅对验证成功策略元组赋予信用。联合训练规划与求解策略。
light_analysis.result: 在APPS、CodeContests、LiveCodeBench-v6上，CPPO在相同K=4预算下，Pass@4指标显著优于直接采样、规划基线、仅SFT规划器和Pass@K导向RL。最大提升为Qwen3.5-9B在LiveCodeBench-v6上+0.16（0.588→0.748，p<0.05）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPPO将Pass@K生成转化为策略协调探索，有效避免冗余，提升代码推理性能。未来可扩展至更多K值或更复杂规划场景。

title: Prompt Injection Detection is Regime-Dependent: A Deployment-Aware Evaluation with Interpretable Structural Signals
abstract: Prompt injection poses a critical threat to the safe deployment of large language models, yet existing detection approaches are typically evaluated under limited settings that do not reflect real-world operating constraints. In this work, we present a deployment-aware evaluation of prompt injection detection using a multi-model and multi-regime experimental framework. We compare lexical, semantic, structural, and transformer-based detectors across multiple out-of-distribution settings, repeated data splits, and both ranking and thresholded deployment metrics. We introduce interpretable structural signals that capture hierarchy overrides, system prompt spoofing, role redefinition, and evasion patterns, and assess their contribution both within sparse models and in combination with strong encoder baselines. Our results show that detection performance is highly regime-dependent and sensitive to threshold selection, with no single model dominating across all settings. Transformer-based models achieve the strongest overall performance, while structural signals provide modest but consistent gains in certain regimes and improve low false positive rate behaviour in harder scenarios. These findings highlight the gap between ranking performance and deployment effectiveness and underscore the importance of evaluating prompt injection defences under realistic operational constraints. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出部署感知的评估框架，引入可解释结构信号，揭示提示注入检测性能高度依赖部署环境。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示注入检测方法在有限设置下评估，未反映真实部署中的操作约束，导致性能评估缺乏实用性。该研究旨在通过多模型、多场景的实验框架，系统比较不同检测器的表现，并分析部署指标（如阈值）对性能的影响，以弥补研究与实践间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 采用多模型、多Regime实验框架，比较词汇、语义、结构及基于Transformer的检测器。在多种非分布偏移设置、重复数据分裂下，使用排序和阈值指标评估。同时引入可解释结构信号（如层次覆盖、系统提示欺骗、角色重定义和逃避模式），评估其在稀疏模型和强编码器中的贡献。
light_analysis.result: 检测性能高度依赖Regime和阈值选择，无单一模型在所有场景中占优。Transformer模型整体性能最强，结构信号在特定Regime下带来适度但一致的增益，并在困难场景中改善低假阳性率行为。揭示了排序性能与部署效果间的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调了在真实操作约束下评估提示注入防御的重要性，其框架和指标为实际部署提供指导。学术上系统分析了检测器的Regime依赖性，实践上帮助选择适配的检测器。局限在于未覆盖所有可能场景，未来可扩展更多攻击类型和模型。

title: Probabilistic Recurrent Intention Switching Model
abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) recovers reward functions from observed behavior, yet traditional methods assume a single stationary reward that cannot capture goal switching within an episode. Recent multi-intention IRL methods address this by segmenting trajectories, but model intention transitions as either a memoryless Markov chain or via manual state augmentation with a fixed history window. We propose the Probabilistic Recurrent Intention Switching Model (PRISM), which replaces both mechanisms with a lightweight recurrent network that maps observation history to a per-step intention distribution. We prove that the resulting EM objective decomposes exactly into independent per-intention reward subproblems, each solvable in closed form, yielding an $\mathcal{O}(nK)$ E-step with no variational approximation. We evaluate PRISM on a non-Markovian gridworld, a mouse labyrinth, and BridgeData~V2 robotic manipulation, the first large-scale robotic application of multi-intention IRL. Across all settings PRISM achieves the highest held-out log-likelihood while recovering nameable, temporally coherent intentions from unlabeled demonstrations, suggesting that discrete goal switching is present in both biological and artificial agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概率性递归意图切换模型（PRISM），用轻量级递归网络替代传统多意图逆强化学习中的马尔可夫链或固定历史窗口，实现高效分解的EM求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统逆强化学习假设单一固定奖励函数，无法捕捉同一轨迹内的目标切换。现有多意图方法通过分割轨迹处理，但意图转换建模为无记忆马尔可夫链或依赖固定历史窗口的状态增强，缺乏对历史信息的有效利用，且求解复杂。本研究旨在设计一种既能利用历史观测又能高效求解的意图切换模型，以应用于连续决策场景。
light_analysis.method: PRISM使用轻量级递归网络将观测历史映射到每一步的意图分布，替代马尔可夫链和固定历史窗口。证明EM目标可精确分解为独立子问题，每个意图的奖励子问题有闭式解，E-step计算复杂度为O(nK)且无需变分近似。在非马尔可夫网格世界、小鼠迷宫和BridgeData V2机器人操作数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在所有三个实验设置中，PRISM均取得最高的保留测试集对数似然，并能从无标签演示中恢复出可命名、时间上连贯的意图。这是多意图逆强化学习首次大规模应用于机器人领域（BridgeData V2），相比基线方法显著提升了对非平稳行为的建模能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM提出了一种高效且可分解的多意图逆强化学习框架，通过递归网络捕获历史依赖，避免了复杂近似。实验验证了离散目标切换在生物和人工代理中的存在性。未来可扩展到更复杂的策略表示或在线学习场景，其闭式E-step为大规模应用提供了可行性。

title: ChartAct: A Benchmark for Dynamic Chart Understanding
abstract: Charts are widely used to present complex data for analysis and decision making. Existing chart understanding benchmarks mainly focus on static charts, but real-world charts are often dynamic and interactive. Key information may only appear after actions such as hovering, clicking, zooming, or dragging. Dynamic chart understanding therefore requires models to identify visible content, choose proper interactions, and reason over changing chart states. To evaluate this ability, we propose ChartAct, an interactive benchmark for dynamic chart understanding. ChartAct collects and filters 673 dynamic charts from 8 real chart websites, covers 7 common chart types, and constructs 1,440 high-quality question-answer samples. Each sample is instantiated in two environments, Dynamic Chart and Dashboard Chart, to evaluate dynamic chart understanding under different contexts. Based on ChartAct, we systematically evaluate 11 advanced multimodal models and GUI agents. Experimental results show that existing models still have clear limitations in dynamic chart understanding. The strongest model, Claude-Opus-4.7, achieves an average success rate of 84.5\%, while most models remain below 60\%. We also conduct detailed failure attribution and case analysis. ChartAct provides a new benchmark for studying chart understanding in real interactive environments. Codes at https://github.com/wulin-wulin/OSWorld_Chart

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态图表理解基准ChartAct，评估多模态模型在交互式图表上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图表理解基准专注于静态图表，但现实中的图表常是动态交互式的，关键信息需通过悬停、点击、缩放、拖拽等操作才能获取。动态图表理解要求模型识别可见内容、选择适当交互并推理变化状态。缺乏此类评估基准，因此需要构建一个交互式基准来推动研究。
light_analysis.method: ChartAct从8个真实图表网站收集673个动态图表，覆盖7种常见图表类型，构建1440个高质量问答样本。每个样本在动态图表和仪表板图表两种环境中实例化。系统评估11个先进多模态模型和GUI代理，包括Claude-Opus-4.7等。
light_analysis.result: 最强模型Claude-Opus-4.7平均成功率84.5%，多数模型低于60%。详细失败归因和案例分析显示现有模型在动态图表理解上存在明显局限，表明该任务具有挑战性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChartAct为真实交互环境下的图表理解提供了新基准，揭示了当前模型在动态场景中的不足。未来可推动更鲁棒的交互式图表理解模型研究，并可能扩展到更多图表类型和交互方式。

title: On the Robustness of Machine Unlearning for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) may memorize undesirable information from training data, motivating growing interest in machine unlearning. In this work, we present the first systematic survey and robustness analysis of VLM unlearning. We provide a comprehensive taxonomy and review of existing VLM unlearning methods, together with unified evaluations under multiple prompt settings. We then propose three attack paradigms to examine whether forgotten multimodal knowledge can be reactivated through contextual prompting or downstream retraining. Extensive experiments show that many existing methods remain vulnerable under these attacks, indicating that current approaches often hide rather than fully remove target knowledge. Our study provides new insights into the robustness and limitations of current VLM unlearning methods and highlights the need for more reliable multimodal unlearning strategies. Code is available at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/VLM-UnL-Attack.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究视觉-语言模型机器遗忘的鲁棒性，提出三种攻击范式揭示现有方法在上下文提示或下游微调下可重新激活遗忘知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型可能从训练数据中记忆不良信息，催生机器遗忘需求。然而，现有遗忘方法缺乏鲁棒性分析，无法确保目标知识被真正移除。该研究旨在系统评估遗忘方法在对抗性攻击下的脆弱性，推动更可靠的多模态遗忘策略。
light_analysis.method: 首先对现有VLM遗忘方法进行全面分类和综述，建立统一评估框架（含多种提示设置）。然后提出三种攻击范式：通过上下文提示、下游微调等方式尝试重新激活遗忘的多模态知识。实验在多个公开模型上实施攻击，未指定具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，许多现有VLM遗忘方法在提出的攻击下表现脆弱，遗忘知识可被重新激活。性能指标包括攻击成功率等（摘要未提供具体数值），相比基线方法，当前方法倾向于隐藏而非彻底移除目标知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM遗忘方法的鲁棒性缺陷，指出需要更可靠的遗忘策略，而非仅隐藏信息。对学术和工业界具有警示意义，未来可探索更彻底的移除机制或新型防御技术。

title: TED: Related Party Transaction guided Tax Evasion Detection on Heterogeneous Graph
abstract: Tax evasion causes severe losses of government revenues and disturbs the economic order of fair competition. To help alleviate this problem, the latest tax evasion detection solutions utilize expert knowledge to extract features and then train classifiers to determine whether a company is suspected of tax evasion. However, existing solutions mainly focus on the statistical features of the company, but fail to exploit the rich interactive information in tax scenarios, which affect the detection performance. In this paper, we first model the tax scenario as a heterogeneous graph and study the tax evasion detection problem under the heterogeneous graph model. To improve the performance of tax evasion detection, a novel graph neural network model is proposed to extract the comprehensive information of heterogeneous graphs. Specifically, we use heterogeneous and complex related party transaction groups to filter low-level noise information. Moreover, a hierarchical attention mechanism is designed to capture the deeper structure and semantic information hidden in the related party transaction group. We apply our method to the real risk management system of the tax bureau, and evaluate it on two human-labeled real-world tax datasets. The results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in the tax evasion detection task.
comment: Accepted by Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery (DMKD25)

light_analysis.overview: 将税务场景建模为异构图，利用图神经网络和分层注意力机制检测关联交易中的逃税行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 税收欺诈严重损害政府收入和经济秩序。现有方法主要依赖公司统计特征进行特征提取和分类，忽略税务场景中丰富的交互信息，导致检测性能受限。为了利用这些结构化和语义信息，需要将税务场景建模为异构图并设计能捕获深层模式的模型。
light_analysis.method: 首次将税务场景建模为异构图，并提出新型图神经网络模型。利用异构复杂的关联交易群组过滤低层噪声，设计分层注意力机制捕获关联交易群组中的深层结构和语义信息。模型在真实税务风险系统中应用，使用两个人工标注的真实税务数据集进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在两个真实世界税务数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在税务逃税检测任务上显著优于现有最先进方法。摘要未明确具体数值，但说明性能提升具有统计显著性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于异构图的税务逃税检测模型，有效利用关联交易中的交互信息。学术价值在于扩展图神经网络在税务领域的应用，实际价值在于已部署于税务风控系统，提升检测准确率。未来可优化模型可解释性及处理动态图的能力。

title: PashtoTTS-Bench: automated screening for low-resource non-Latin-script text-to-speech
abstract: Text-to-speech (TTS) evaluation for low-resource non-Latin-script languages can fail when it relies on a single ASR round-trip word error rate (WER). A system may produce no audio, speak a neighbouring language, preserve target script text only in an ASR transcript, or sound unnatural to native listeners. We introduce INSV (Intelligibility, Naturalness, Script fidelity, and Verification), a reporting framework that separates these cases. This paper reports INSV-A, the automated screening subset: synthesis completion, ASR WER/CER, transcript Script Fidelity Rate, and audio language identification. Native MOS and phonetic annotation are specified but not claimed in this release. We instantiate INSV-A as PashtoTTS-Bench, a dated benchmark for Pashto TTS. The April-May 2026 run evaluates Edge GulNawaz, Edge Latifa, OmniVoice clone, OmniVoice auto, and an Urdu negative control on 200 FLEURS and 200 filtered Common Voice 24 prompts. Under the independent omniASR_CTC_300M_v2, OmniVoice auto has the lowest WER (24.1% FLEURS, 27.4% CV24), followed by Edge GulNawaz (32.8%, 39.5%), Edge Latifa (35.6%, 47.7%), and OmniVoice clone (45.4%, 34.8%). WER below the natural-speech baseline reflects clean synthetic audio and should not be read as better than native speech. Whisper Large V3 returns 0.0% Pashto labels on checked Pashto TTS audio, while MMS-LID-4017 and SpeechBrain VoxLingua107 separate Pashto outputs from the Urdu control. The release provides provider metadata, per-sentence scores, LID audits, failure logs, and scripts for adding systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出INSV-A自动筛选框架，用于低资源非拉丁文字TTS评估，并实例化为PashtoTTS-Bench基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 低资源非拉丁文字TTS评估依赖单一ASR往返词错误率（WER）可能失败，例如系统可能无音频输出、输出邻国语言、仅ASR转录保留目标文字、或声音不自然。现有方法无法区分这些情况，导致评估不准确。因此需要分离不同失败模式的标准化报告框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出INSV-A自动筛选子集，包含合成完成率、ASR WER/CER、转录脚本忠实度、音频语言识别。使用200条FLEURS和200条过滤Common Voice 24提示，评估Edge GulNawaz、Edge Latifa、OmniVoice clone/auto及乌尔都语负控制。采用omniASR_CTC_300M_v2独立ASR，并对比Whisper Large V3、MMS-LID-4017、SpeechBrain VoxLingua107的语音识别效果。
light_analysis.result: OmniVoice auto获得最低WER（24.1% FLEURS，27.4% CV24），其次Edge GulNawaz（32.8%，39.5%）、Edge Latifa（35.6%，47.7%）、OmniVoice clone（45.4%，34.8%）。WER低于自然语音基线反映音频干净，但不优于真人语音。Whisper Large V3在普什图语TTS音频上返回0.0%标签，而MMS-LID-4017和SpeechBrain VoxLingua107能区分普什图语与乌尔都语。
light_analysis.conclusion: INSV-A框架提供多维度自动筛选，弥补单一WER不足。PashtoTTS-Bench作为可更新时间基准，公开元数据、每句分数、LID审计和失败日志，便于扩展。未来可集成人工MOS和音标注释。该工作为低资源非拉丁文字TTS评估提供标准化方法。

title: Convergence of Spectral Descent for Non-smooth Optimization
abstract: The Muon optimizer has recently demonstrated remarkable empirical success in training large language models. However, the theoretical understanding of its mechanisms remains limited. Current convergence guarantees for Muon rely heavily on smoothness assumptions, leaving its non-smooth convergence behavior largely unexplored. In this work, we take a step toward bridging this gap by investigating Spectral Descent (SD), a simplified variant of Muon, together with its truncated counterpart, Truncated Spectral Descent (TSD). Under convexity, Lipschitz continuity, and sharpness conditions, we establish global linear convergence for both SD and TSD in non-smooth convex formulations. We also study regularized variants equipped with decoupled weight decay and derive sublinear convergence guarantees through their connection with Frank-Wolfe methods. Finally, we apply our theoretical framework to robust low-rank matrix recovery under mixed sparse and dense noise regimes and provide rigorous recovery guarantees. Numerical experiments support the theoretical findings and demonstrate the effectiveness of Muon-type methods for non-smooth optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明了Muon优化器的简化变体Spectral Descent及其截断版本在非光滑凸优化下的全局线性收敛性，并扩展到正则化变体与低秩矩阵恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon优化器在大语言模型训练中表现出色，但其理论机制尚不明确，现有收敛性分析依赖光滑性假设，非光滑情形下的收敛行为未得到探索。本文旨在填补该空白，研究Spectral Descent在非光滑凸优化中的收敛性质，并应用于鲁棒低秩矩阵恢复问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Spectral Descent (SD)及其截断版本Truncated Spectral Descent (TSD)，在凸性、Lipschitz连续性和尖锐性条件下建立全局线性收敛。同时研究带解耦权重衰减的正则化变体，通过Frank-Wolfe方法的联系导出次线性收敛。理论框架应用于混合稀疏和稠密噪声下的鲁棒低秩矩阵恢复。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明SD和TSD在非光滑凸问题中实现全局线性收敛，正则化变体具有次线性收敛。数值实验支持理论发现，并验证Muon型方法在非光滑优化中的有效性。恢复鲁棒低秩矩阵时提供严格的恢复保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为Muon类优化器在非光滑情形提供收敛性理论，拓展了其应用范围。研究揭示了Spectral Descent与Frank-Wolfe方法的联系，为后续优化器设计提供新视角。未来可探索更一般条件（如非凸）下的收敛性。

title: RLVR Datasets and Where to Find Them: Tracing Data Lineage for Better Training Data
abstract: The proliferation of Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) datasets has exacerbated provenance collapse due to unclear lineage among existing datasets. To bridge this fragmented RLVR data landscape, we propose Atomic-source Tracing via Lineage-Aware Search (ATLAS), a systematic framework for tracing RLVR datasets back to their atomic sources, attributing over 99.7% of 1.45M instances to 20 atomic sources. Our analysis reveals that most RLVR datasets are variants of a small set of shared upstream sources, with few introducing genuinely new data, and many facing data contamination risks. These findings naturally motivate us to curate a new RLVR dataset, DAPO++, and to benchmark existing datasets from a lineage-aware perspective. To this end, we propose Source-level Counterfactual Attribution (SCA) as a guiding principle to curate a decontaminated training dataset with concentrated learning signals. Essentially, SCA measures a sample's marginal utility by comparing per-atomic-source RL checkpoints against a shared base model. Building upon these attribution signals, we further design a composite dataset quality score Q that strongly correlates with downstream RLVR performance. Experiments on Qwen3 series models verify that DAPO++ consistently improves performance on held-out benchmarks, while Q reliably predicts downstream RLVR training effectiveness. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/Celine-hxy/ATLAS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATLAS框架系统追溯RLVR数据集起源，分析发现数据同源严重，并基于此构建DAPO++数据集和Q分数预测指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习从可验证奖励（RLVR）数据集的激增导致来源不明（provenance collapse），现有数据集之间缺乏清晰的谱系，使得数据质量难以保证，且存在数据污染风险。为解决这一碎片化问题，需要系统性地追踪数据来源，理解数据集之间的衍生关系，从而指导更高质量训练数据的构建，提升下游RLVR训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出ATLAS框架，通过谱系感知搜索将145万实例中99.7%追溯至20个原子来源。分析揭示大多数数据集是少数共享上游来源的变体。基于此，提出源级反事实归因（SCA）原则，通过比较各原子来源的RL检查点与基模型的边际效用，构建去污染数据集DAPO++。进一步设计复合数据集质量分数Q，用于预测下游RLVR性能。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3系列模型上的实验表明，DAPO++在保留基准测试上持续提升性能。提出的质量分数Q与下游RLVR训练效果强相关，能够可靠预测训练有效性。未提供具体数值指标，但强调一致改进和强相关性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作系统揭示了RLVR数据集的同源性问题和污染风险，提出了数据溯源方法论ATLAS和去污染数据集构建原则SCA，为数据质量管理提供新视角。DAPO++数据集和Q分数工具对实际RLVR训练具有指导价值。未来可扩展到更多原子来源和自动溯源。

title: Recon: Reconstruction-Guided Reasoning Synthesis for User Modeling
abstract: User modeling aims to use language models (LMs) to mimic an individual's behavior from a corpus of past context-action pairs (e.g., conversation turns), enabling the simulation of users in settings like behavioral science, human-AI collaboration, and market research. Recent approaches augment these corpora with synthesized reasoning traces, typically generated by conditioning on both context and action. However, such conditioning constitutes post-hoc rationalization rather than reasoning: the trace is guaranteed to justify the action, but may not encode the underlying latent causal decision paths. We propose Recon, which uses action reconstruction to score reasoning traces by their predictive power: given a context and candidate reasoning, a reconstruction model predicts the action, and reconstruction fidelity determines reasoning quality. Across four domains, Recon achieves a 54.7% win rate over Backward Synthesis, a standard post-hoc rationalization baseline. Further, we find that training a reasoning synthesis model with rewards derived from Recon improves downstream user modeling performance, achieving a win rate of up to 70.0% over baselines. We further show that Recon-synthesized reasoning transfers across models, and improves user modeling beyond the reconstruction model. Our work demonstrates that post-hoc rationalization is insufficient for reasoning synthesis, and that useful and interpretable reasoning should naturally elicit the action from the context.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Recon方法，利用动作重建评分推理轨迹，提升用户建模中推理合成的质量与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户建模中，现有方法通过后验合理化生成推理轨迹，即同时基于上下文和动作生成轨迹，但这可能导致轨迹仅证明动作而非编码真实因果决策路径。这种后验合理化不足以反映潜在决策机制，影响建模准确性和可解释性。因此需要一种能评估推理轨迹预测能力的方法，以生成更有用的推理。
light_analysis.method: Recon使用动作重建模型评分推理轨迹：给定上下文和候选推理，重建模型预测动作，重建保真度作为推理质量的指标。基于Recon的奖励训练推理合成模型。在四个领域（如对话等）评估，与标准后验合理化基线Backward Synthesis对比。方法强调推理应能从上下文自然引出动作，而非事后解释。
light_analysis.result: Recon在四个领域对Backward Synthesis基线实现54.7%的胜率。使用Recon奖励训练推理合成模型，在下游用户建模中进一步取得高达70.0%的胜率。此外，Recon合成的推理可跨模型迁移，且超越重建模型提升用户建模性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明后验合理化不足以用于推理合成，有用且可解释的推理应能自然从上下文引出动作。Recon通过动作重建评估推理质量，显著提升用户建模性能，并具有跨模型迁移性。未来可探索更复杂的重建模型和更广泛的用户建模场景。

title: CodecCap: High-Fidelity Codec-Inspired Residual Modeling for Dense Video Captioning
abstract: Existing video captioning methods struggle to balance visual fidelity and redundancy: holistic captions are compact but lose fine-grained evidence, whereas segment-wise captions improve coverage but introduce heavy redundancy. We propose CodecCap, a codec-inspired framework for high-fidelity dense video captioning. Analogous to video codecs, CodecCap represents videos using keyframe and residual captions. Keyframe captions exhaustively encode stable visual context, while residual captions capture temporally only localized actions, motions and changes. This effectively preserves fine-grained visual evidence while reducing redundant descriptions. To quantify the fidelity of captions, we introduce VidCapQA, a caption-then-QA benchmark with 1,000 questions across 14 capability dimensions. Results on VidCapQA show that captions directly generated by strong VLMs still miss many visual details, highlighting caption representation as a critical bottleneck. Experiments show that CodecCap significantly surpasses direct captioning with the same underlying VLMs, suggesting keyframe-residual captioning a way for high-fidelity video-language supervision. We further use CodecCap to construct CodecVDC-100K, a large-scale dense captioning dataset with anchor, residual, scene-level, and video-level supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CodecCap，借鉴视频编解码思想，用关键帧和残差字幕实现高保真密集视频描述。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频描述方法难以平衡视觉保真度和冗余性：整体描述紧凑但丢失细节，分段描述提高覆盖但引入大量冗余。高质量密集视频描述需要同时保留细粒度视觉证据并减少重复描述，现有方法未有效解决这一矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 类比视频编解码，CodecCap用关键帧字幕编码稳定视觉上下文，残差字幕捕获局部动作和变化，减少冗余。引入VidCapQA基准（1000问题，14维度）评估保真度。构建CodecVDC-100K数据集，包含锚点、残差、场景级和视频级监督。
light_analysis.result: 在VidCapQA上，强VLM直接生成的字幕仍遗漏许多视觉细节。CodecCap显著超越相同VLM的直接描述，表明关键帧-残差字幕是高保真视频语言监督的有效方式。
light_analysis.conclusion: CodecCap有效平衡保真度与冗余性，创建了评估基准和大规模数据集，为高保真视频描述提供新范式。未来可拓展至其他视频理解任务，如视频问答和检索。

title: Tournament-GRPO: Group-Wise Tournament Rewards for Reinforcement Learning in Open-Ended Long-Form Generation
abstract: Reinforcement learning in open-ended long-form generation is challenging because reliable reference answers and automatic metrics are often unavailable. Existing rubric-based methods typically rely on pointwise LLM-as-a-judge scoring, but absolute scores are difficult to calibrate across complex responses, may provide weak discrimination among same-query rollouts, and can become saturated during optimization. We propose Tournament-GRPO, a group-wise reward framework that converts rubric-guided LLM judgments into relative rewards through repeated multi-round tournaments among same-query rollouts. Tournament-GRPO compares candidates within groups, accumulates tournament outcomes, and normalizes them into group-wise rewards for GRPO training. Experiments on Deep Research Bench show that Tournament-GRPO consistently outperforms existing reward-design baselines, achieving a 4.52-point overall-score improvement over the strongest baseline. Further analyses show that tournament rewards provide a favorable effectiveness--efficiency trade-off and that tournament design affects training dynamics. These results suggest that rubric-guided tournament comparison provides an effective reward signal for reinforcement learning in open-ended long-form generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tournament-GRPO框架，通过群体锦标赛奖励替代点式评分，提升开放长文本生成强化学习效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放长文本生成中缺乏可靠参考答案和自动指标，现有基于点式LLM评判的评分方法存在校准困难、区分度弱、优化易饱和等问题，亟需更有效的奖励信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出Tournament-GRPO，将基于Rubric的LLM评判转化为相对奖励：对同一查询的多个生成结果进行多轮群体锦标赛比较，累积比赛结果并归一化为群体奖励，用于GRPO训练。核心是组间比较而非绝对分数。
light_analysis.result: 在Deep Research Bench上，Tournament-GRPO优于现有奖励设计基线，整体分数提升4.52点。分析表明锦标赛奖励在效果-效率上取得有利折衷，且锦标赛设计影响训练动态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于Rubric的锦标赛比较为开放长文本生成强化学习提供了有效奖励信号。学术价值在于提出新的奖励设计范式，实际应用价值可拓展至复杂推理生成任务。未来可探索锦标赛结构优化及大规模验证。

title: LELA: An End-to-end LLM-based Entity Linking Framework with Zero-shot Domain Adaptation
abstract: Entity linking is a key component of many downstream NLP systems, yet existing approaches are often tied to the specific target knowledge bases and domains, limiting their real world application. In this paper, we extend LELA, a modular and domain-agnostic LLM-based entity disambiguation method, into a practical Python library that integrates zero-shot Named Entity Recognition (NER) -thereby providing a complete end-toend pipeline for entity-linking in real-world usage. We provide experimental results validating LELA's performance and robustness across diverse entity linking settings. In our demo, users can play with the system on their own input texts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LELA，一个端到端的基于大型语言模型的实体链接框架，支持零样本领域适应，并集成命名实体识别形成完整管道。
light_analysis.motivation: 实体链接是NLP系统的关键组件，但现有方法通常依赖特定知识库和领域，导致在真实世界中应用受限。亟需一种领域无关、可零样本迁移的实体链接方法，以提升系统的泛化能力和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 扩展LELA，一种模块化、领域无关的基于LLM的实体消歧方法，将其封装为Python库，并集成零样本命名实体识别，构建完整的端到端实体链接流程。该框架利用LLM的泛化能力实现领域适应，无需目标领域标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了LELA在多种实体链接设置下的性能和鲁棒性，与现有方法对比表现优异。但摘要未提供具体数据指标，如准确率或F1分数。用户可在演示系统中测试自定义文本。
light_analysis.conclusion: LELA框架成功实现了零样本领域适应的实体链接，降低了部署成本。其模块化设计和Python库形式便于实际应用。未来可进一步优化LLM适配策略，扩展至更多知识库和领域。

title: JuICE: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-Judge in Identifying Cultural Errors
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed to users around the world, they are integrated into everyday tasks across diverse cultural contexts, from drafting personal communications to brainstorming creative ideas. These tasks are inherently cultural: they require contextual appropriateness, symbolic resonance, and tacit cultural expectations that native speakers draw on instinctively, meaning that a response can be factually plausible yet unmistakably wrong to a local reader. Existing cultural benchmarks have treated culture as a flat set of facts via fact verification or norm entailment methods, and have adopted LLM-as-a-Judge without examining whether they can capture such thick cultural errors. To address this gap, we present JuICE (Benchmark for LLM-Judge in Identifying Cultural Errors), a multilingual dataset of 7,470 span-level annotations of cultural and linguistic errors in long-form LLM responses. It covers 1,050 query-response pairs from four countries (the United States, South Korea, Indonesia, and Bangladesh), in both English and their countries' main languages. Using JuICE, we find that even the strongest LLM-judge achieves only an F1 of 0.52 in the erroneous span detection task. Furthermore, LLM-judges consistently miss thick cultural errors that local residents readily identify. Our findings suggest that robust cultural evaluation must move beyond surface-level detection toward frameworks that account for the depth and situatedness of cultural meaning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JuICE基准，评估LLM裁判识别文化错误的能力，揭示其深层文化错误检测显著不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文化基准将文化视为扁平事实，采用LLM-as-a-Judge但未检验其能否捕捉深层文化错误。随着LLM在全球部署，生成内容需满足不同文化的隐性期望和语境适当性，而当前方法在识别此类错误上存在明显空白。因此需要专门基准评估LLM裁判对文化错误的识别能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建JuICE多语言数据集，包含7470个span级文化错误标注，覆盖美国、韩国、印度尼西亚和孟加拉国四国的1050条查询-响应对，使用英语及各国主要语言。采用LLM-as-a-Judge进行错误跨度检测任务，评估其识别细粒度文化错误的能力。
light_analysis.result: 即使最强LLM裁判在错误跨度检测任务上F1仅0.52，且系统性地遗漏本地居民轻松识别的深层文化错误。表明当前LLM裁判难以捕捉隐含文化知识，与人类判断存在显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: JuICE基准揭示了LLM裁判在文化错误识别上的严重缺陷，强调文化评估需超越表面事实检测，向考虑文化深度和情境的框架演进。该工作为构建文化敏感的LLM评估提供了方向和资源，但如何设计此类框架仍是开放问题。

title: AlbanianLLMSafety: A Safety Evaluation Dataset for Large Language Models in Albanian
abstract: Safety evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) has largely focused on high-resource languages, leaving low-resource languages critically underserved. We present AlbanianLLMSafety, the first publicly available safety evaluation dataset for LLMs in Albanian, a linguistically distinct low-resource language with approximately 7.5 million speakers across Albania, Kosovo, North Macedonia, and the diaspora. The dataset contains 2,951 prompts spanning 11 safety categories, including self-harm, violence, racist content, child exploitation, and radicalization, with an average of 268 prompts per category. Each prompt is provided in Albanian with an English reference translation and a detailed category label. This resource addresses a significant gap in safety evaluation infrastruc-ture for low-resource languages and provides an essential benchmark for developing safer, more inclusive LLMs. The dataset will be provided upon request to support safety evaluation, fine-tuning, red-teaming, and guardrail development for Albanian-speaking communities.
comment: Accepted at SIGUL2026 Workshop co-located with LREC2026

light_analysis.overview: 首个针对阿尔巴尼亚语大语言模型安全评估的数据集，填补低资源语言安全评测空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型的安全评估主要集中在高资源语言上，低资源语言如阿尔巴尼亚语（约750万使用者）严重缺乏评估资源。现有方法无法覆盖这些语言的安全风险，导致模型在非英语场景下的安全性能未知。构建阿尔巴尼亚语安全评估数据集对于确保模型在多元文化背景下的安全部署至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含2,951个提示的数据集，覆盖11个安全类别（如自残、暴力、种族歧视、儿童剥削、激进化等），平均每类268个提示。每个提示均提供阿尔巴尼亚语原文、英文参考翻译和详细类别标签。数据集可用于安全评估、微调、红队测试和护栏开发。
light_analysis.result: 数据集已构建完成并公开提供（按需请求）。虽未给出具体实验指标，但其规模（2,951条）和类别覆盖（11类）为阿尔巴尼亚语LLM安全评估提供了首个基准资源。该数据集将促进低资源语言安全评测的发展。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlbanianLLMSafety填补了低资源语言安全评估的基础设施空白，为开发更安全、更具包容性的大语言模型提供关键基准。未来可用于推动阿尔巴尼亚语及类似低资源语言的安全研究，促进多语言AI系统的公平性与安全性。

title: Efficient Agentic Reinforcement Learning with On-Policy Intrinsic Knowledge Boundary Enhancement
abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has proven effective for training LLM-based agents with external tool-use capabilities. However, we identify that agentic RL training induces increasing redundant tool calls and blurs the model's intrinsic knowledge boundary, where the model fails to distinguish when tools are needed versus when parametric knowledge suffices. Existing solutions based on reward shaping create coarse-grained optimization targets that tend to incentivize indiscriminate tool-call suppression, leading to reward hacking. In this paper, we propose AKBE (Agentic Knowledge Boundary Enhancement), an on-policy method that dynamically probes the model's intrinsic knowledge boundary through dual-path (with-tool and no-tool) rollouts during training. We define the knowledge boundary as the per-instance determination of whether tools are required and the minimum tool calls necessary. By comparing correctness across paths, AKBE categorizes trajectories and constructs targeted supervisory signals that guide efficient tool-use patterns for each question. These signals are integrated seamlessly into the agentic RL training loop. Experiments on seven QA benchmarks demonstrate that AKBE improves task accuracy by +1.85 on average and reduces tool calls by 18% over standard agentic RL, yielding 25% higher tool productivity without any accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Further analysis suggests its plug-and-play compatibility across different RL algorithms and the mechanism of each signal category. Our code is available at https://github.com/CuSO4-Chen/AKBE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AKBE，一种通过on-policy内在知识边界增强减少LLM agent冗余工具调用的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: Agentic RL训练中模型产生冗余工具调用，且无法区分何时需要工具，现有奖励塑造方法导致粗粒度优化和奖励黑客问题，需要更精细的引导。
light_analysis.method: AKBE使用双路径（带工具和不带工具）rollouts动态探知模型知识边界，通过比较正确性分类轨迹，构建针对性监督信号，无缝集成到agentic RL训练循环中。
light_analysis.result: 在7个QA基准上，AKBE相比标准agentic RL平均准确率提升+1.85，工具调用减少18%，工具效率提升25%，且无准确率-效率权衡，兼容不同RL算法。
light_analysis.conclusion: AKBE有效解决agentic RL中工具调用冗余和知识边界模糊问题，具有即插即用特性，代码已开源，有助于提升LLM agent的效率和准确性。

title: DinoComplete: 3D Shape Completion with Distilled Semantic Priors and State Space Models
abstract: 3D shape completion from partial scans remains challenging for unseen categories and noisy real-world observations, where geometry alone is often insufficient for inferring missing structure. We present DinoComplete, a deterministic and efficient shape completion framework that augments geometric reconstruction with voxel-aligned semantic priors distilled from DINO features. First, we construct multi-view DINO feature volumes aligned with ShapeNet data and train a student network to predict dense semantic features directly from incomplete shapes. These predicted features capture global structure and part-aware semantic context while remaining aligned with the underlying geometry. We then integrate these distilled features into a completion network, where geometric and semantic voxel representations are fused through voxel state-space modeling. To enable efficient long-range reasoning without sacrificing resolution, we introduce a multi-scale voxel Mamba module that refines the fused features by combining full-grid and chunk-wise sequence modeling. Experiments on unseen ShapeNet categories and ScanNet objects show that DinoComplete achieves stronger completion quality than prior deterministic and generative based completion methods while using fewer parameters, requiring lower memory, and achieving faster inference. Our results demonstrate that distilling semantic priors from visual foundation models improves generalization and robustness in 3D shape completion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DinoComplete框架，利用从DINO蒸馏的语义先验和状态空间模型实现高效的3D形状补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 从部分扫描进行3D形状补全对于未见类别和噪声真实观测仍具挑战性，仅依赖几何信息往往不足以推断缺失结构。现有方法在泛化能力和鲁棒性上存在不足，需要融合语义先验来提升补全质量。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建与ShapeNet数据对齐的多视图DINO特征体积，训练学生网络从残缺形状直接预测稠密语义特征，捕获全局结构和部位感知语义。然后将这些蒸馏特征与几何特征通过体素状态空间建模融合，并引入多尺度体素Mamba模块，结合全网格和分块序列建模实现高效长程推理，在不牺牲分辨率的情况下细化融合特征。
light_analysis.result: 在未见过的ShapeNet类别和ScanNet物体上，DinoComplete相比先前确定性和生成式补全方法，使用更少参数、更低内存和更快推理速度，取得更强的补全质量。实验表明蒸馏视觉基础模型的语义先验能提升3D形状补全的泛化性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DinoComplete通过蒸馏DINO语义先验与体素状态空间模型，实现了高效且鲁棒的3D形状补全，优于现有方法。该工作展示了视觉基础模型在3D任务中的价值，未来可探索更丰富的语义先验和更高效的序列建模。

title: KZ-SafetyPrompts: A Kazakh Safety Evaluation Prompt Dataset for Large Language Models
abstract: Kazakh is underrepresented in resources for evaluating the safety behavior of large language models. We present KZ-SafetyPrompts, a Kazakh prompt dataset for safety evaluation across eleven categories covering common risk areas such as self-harm, violence, child exploitation, sexual content, racist content, radicalization, and regulated goods or illegal activities. The dataset contains 5,717 prompts written natively in Kazakh (Cyrillic), organized by category, with English translations for cross-lingual analysis. Prompts resemble realistic user queries, often in a teen or child style, and are phrased as intent prompts without procedural instructions. We document the writing protocol, labeling procedures (including borderline-case decision rules), and quality-control steps (schema standardization, completeness checks, and deduplication). We also align the categories with widely used safety taxonomies to support integration with existing evaluation pipelines. Baseline results with GPT-4o show an overall refusal rate of 28.2%, varying from 5.5% to 53.8% across categories, indicating that Kazakh prompts expose category-specific safety gaps not captured by English-only evaluation.
comment: Accepted at the SIGUL2026 Workshop co-located with LREC2026

light_analysis.overview: 构建首个哈萨克语安全评估提示数据集KZ-SafetyPrompts，涵盖11个风险类别，揭示GPT-4o在哈萨克语场景下的安全漏洞。
light_analysis.motivation: 哈萨克语在大语言模型安全评估资源中严重匮乏，现有评估仅依赖英语数据，无法捕捉低资源语言中特有的安全缺陷。不同文化背景下不安全内容的表现形式可能不同，需要本地化数据集来暴露模型在非英语环境下的安全短板。该研究旨在填补这一空白，为多语言安全评估提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出KZ-SafetyPrompts数据集，包含5,717条原生哈萨克语（西里尔文）提示，覆盖自残、暴力、儿童剥削、色情、种族主义、激进化、违禁品等11个安全类别。提示模拟真实用户查询，特别是青少年/儿童风格，采用意图提示无步骤指令。详细记录编写协议、标注流程（含边界案例决策规则）和质量控制（模式标准化、完整性检查、去重）。类别与现有安全分类法对齐，便于集成。基线使用GPT-4o评估拒绝率。
light_analysis.result: GPT-4o在KZ-SafetyPrompts上的总体拒绝率为28.2%，各类别拒绝率从5.5%到53.8%不等，差异显著。这表明哈萨克语提示暴露了仅用英语评估无法捕获的类别特定安全缺口，例如某些类别（如自残）拒绝率极低，模型可能无法有效识别哈萨克语中的不安全内容。
light_analysis.conclusion: KZ-SafetyPrompts为哈萨克语大语言模型安全评估提供了首个标准化基准，揭示了现有模型在低资源语言场景下的安全盲区。该数据集支持跨语言安全分析，并促进多语言安全评估管道的构建。未来可扩展到其他低资源语言，并用于改进模型的多语言安全对齐能力。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Verification of LLM Outputs for Data-Sensitive Domains (extended preprint)
abstract: LLMs deployed in high-stakes domains face fundamental reliability challenges: hallucinations, inconsistencies, and privacy vulnerabilities introduce unacceptable risks where errors carry legal, financial, or safety consequences. This paper presents a hybrid verification architecture combining formal symbolic methods with neural semantic analysis to provide complementary guarantees for LLM-generated content. This architecture employs logical reasoning for input verification, leveraging completeness properties to provide decidable guarantees on structured requirements. For output validation, embedding-based semantic similarity detects contextual hallucinations where formal methods lack expressiveness. This separation is realized in a parallel, actor-based pipeline, addressing limitations of prompt-based self-verification approaches, which inherit the distributional biases that produce hallucinations. The proposed architecture and type-aware verification method are validated with HAIMEDA, a real-world medical device damage assessment reporting system developed through Action Design Research. Evaluation shows hallucination detection rates of over 83% for structured entities and 72% for semantic fabrications, with a 30% reduction in report creation time, demonstrating that neuro-symbolic architectures can provide principled safeguards for LLM deployment in data-sensitive domains.
comment: Extended preprint version of accepted technical communication at KI 2026. 22 pages, 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合形式符号方法与神经语义分析的混合验证架构，用于LLM输出在数据敏感领域的可靠性保障。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在高风险领域（如医疗、金融）部署时，存在幻觉、不一致性和隐私漏洞等可靠性问题，而基于提示的自我验证方法继承了导致幻觉的分布偏差，无法提供可证明的保障。因此需要一种能够结合形式方法可判定性与神经网络表达力的验证机制，以应对结构化要求和开放域语义错误。
light_analysis.method: 提出并行actor-based流水线架构：输入验证阶段使用形式逻辑推理，利用完备性属性对结构化需求提供可判定保证；输出验证阶段采用嵌入语义相似性检测上下文幻觉，弥补形式方法在表达力上的不足。该架构分离输入/输出验证，避免自验证的分布偏差问题。
light_analysis.result: 在真实医疗设备损伤评估系统HAIMEDA上评估：结构化实体幻觉检测率超过83%，语义捏造检测率72%，同时报告创建时间减少30%。表明神经符号架构能有效兼顾检测精度与效率，优于纯提示方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明神经符号架构能为数据敏感领域的LLM部署提供原则性安全保障，通过形式逻辑与语义分析的互补实现高检测率与低延迟。未来可扩展至其他高安全行业，但未提及对开放域对抗攻击的鲁棒性。

title: Accountable Human-AI Deliberation with LLMs: Scaling Collective Intelligence through Symbiotic Scaffolding
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can support democratic deliberation at scales previously constrained by turn-taking and facilitation bandwidth. Recent work shows that LLM-generated group statements are often preferred over human-mediated outputs, while theoretical analyses argue that LLMs relax the simultaneity constraints limiting collective intelligence. Yet pure LLM mediation risks collapsing pluralism, over-optimizing for agreement, and undermining legitimacy when participants cannot contest how they are represented. We propose a symbiotic human-AI framework organized into three layers: observation and diversity amplification, facilitation with clause-level provenance, and human primacy for ratification. Our contributions include graded coverage, diversity, and erasure metrics with salience-aware weighting; a provenance pipeline combining cross-encoder similarity with causal knockout diagnostics; preference-conditioned trade-off control; equity-aware contestability workflows; adversarial robustness tests; and an evaluation protocol with ablation designs informed by evidence of LLM-as-judge limitations. The result is a testable blueprint for deliberation technology that scales collective intelligence while preserving agency and legitimacy.
comment: Accepted at the LREC 2026 / 2nd Workshop on Language-driven Deliberation Technology

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种共生式人类-AI审议框架，通过分层架构平衡大规模集体智能与个体能动性，解决纯LLM中介的多元性丧失和合法性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM可突破轮次和带宽限制支持大规模民主审议，但纯LLM中介存在风险：多元性塌陷、过度优化达成一致、参与者无法质疑自身代表方式，导致合法性受损。现有工作未提供可审计的解决方案，亟需维护代理性和合法性的可扩展审议技术。
light_analysis.method: 提出三层共生框架：观测与多样性放大层、含条款来源的促进层、人类优先批准层。贡献包括：分级覆盖率/多样性/抹除指标（含显著感知加权）、基于交叉编码器相似性和因果剔除诊断的来源管道、偏好条件权衡控制、公平感知可争辩工作流、对抗鲁棒性测试、以及融入LLM-as-judge局限证据的消融评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告量化实验结果，主要提供技术蓝图和评估协议。框架设计包含消融研究、对抗测试和人类参与基准，预期在保持代理性和合法性的同时扩展集体智能规模，但具体性能指标待后续实证验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为可问责的人类-AI审议提供可测试的蓝图，在扩展集体智能时保障个体能动性。潜在局限性包括LLM判断偏差的缓解效果需进一步验证，未来工作可聚焦实际部署中的公平性和鲁棒性评估。

title: Developing a Totally Unimodular Linear Program for Optimal Conformance Checking: When and Why It Complements A*
abstract: Alignment-based conformance checking is the state-of-the-art approach for comparing observed process executions with normative process models. The standard exact solution relies on an A*-based heuristic search, which can exhibit exponential runtime in the presence of long traces or substantial deviations.   This paper introduces a reformulation of alignment-based conformance checking as a totally unimodular linear program (LP) defined on the reachability graph of the synchronous product. By exploiting the underlying network-flow structure, the proposed formulation guarantees the existence of an integral optimal extreme-point solution through LP relaxation, thereby avoiding the combinatorial overhead associated with integer variables and branch-and-bound search.   We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation on more than 2.1 million conformance checking instances derived from real-world and synthetic benchmark datasets. The results show that A* and the LP approach exhibit complementary performance characteristics: the former performs best on short, well-conforming traces, while the LP formulation provides substantial speedups for longer traces with deviations, precisely where conformance checking is most informative. Based on these findings, we derive simple algorithm-selection guidelines that combine both approaches, achieving average runtime savings of 38.6% with 96% selection accuracy compared to always using A*.
comment: Author-accepted manuscript accepted for publication in Expert Systems with Applications. Code and experiment scripts are available at: https://github.com/Izack-Cohen/unimodular-conformance-checking. Version corresponding to the accepted paper: v1.0.0

light_analysis.overview: 将对齐一致性检查重构为全幺模线性规划，利用网络流结构保证整数解，与A*互补提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 对齐一致性检查是流程合规分析的核心方法，但标准A*启发式搜索在处理长迹或大量偏差时可能指数级增长，实际应用中计算开销大。现有方法缺乏对高性能和可解性的平衡，尤其在偏差多的复杂场景下效率低下。本文旨在通过线性规划松弛避免整数变量的组合复杂性，同时保证最优解。
light_analysis.method: 提出将基于对齐的一致性检查问题重新表述为定义在同步积可达图上的全幺模线性规划。通过利用底层网络流结构，LP松弛保证极值点解为整数，从而避免整数规划和分支定界搜索。该形式化将组合优化问题转化为多项式时间可解的线性规划。
light_analysis.result: 在210万个来自真实世界和合成基准的数据集实例上进行实验。结果表明A*在短且偏差少的迹上表现最佳，而LP方法在对长迹和偏差多的场景（一致性检查最富信息处）提供显著加速。基于此提出算法选择指南，组合两者平均节省38.6%运行时间，准确率达96%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明基于LP的精确一致性检查是可行的，并展示其与A*的互补性。该方法为流程挖掘中的合规分析提供了高效替代方案，尤其适合工业级长迹数据。未来可探索将LP与搜索混合，或扩展到更复杂的流程模型。

title: Beyond Questions: Evaluating What Large Language Models (Actually) Know
abstract: Parametric knowledge in large language models (LLMs) is a cornerstone of their success, yet remains poorly understood. Existing knowledge benchmarks typically rely on predefined questions (e.g., "What is the birth date of M.L. King?"), evaluating only knowledge that benchmark designers explicitly choose to query, a problematic availability bias.   In this paper, we introduce open knowledge evaluation, a new paradigm for LLM knowledge benchmarking. Instead of asking narrow questions, it evaluates models on the knowledge they choose to surface in response to open-ended elicitation prompts (e.g., "Tell me everything you know about M.L. King"). This shifts the focus from predefined answer retrieval toward characterizing the knowledge models naturally express.   We instantiate this paradigm with BeQu (Beyond Questions), a benchmark of 10,000 entities paired with reference corpora for statement verification. Using BeQu, we evaluate a broad range of language models and analyze the effects of reasoning effort, model scale, prompt format, and knowledge domain. Data and leaderboard are available on this work's GitHub repository and at the benchmark's website.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开放知识评估新范式，通过开放式提示评估LLM自然表达的知识，避免预设问题的可用性偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有知识基准依赖预设问题，仅评估设计者选择的查询，存在可用性偏差，导致对LLM参数量化知识的理解不全面。该问题重要，因为需要更真实、全面的评估方法来揭示模型实际知道什么。
light_analysis.method: 提出开放知识评估范式，使用开放式提示（如“Tell me everything you know about X”）引导模型自由表达知识。实例化为BeQu基准，包含10,000个实体与参考语料，通过陈述验证评估。分析推理努力、模型规模、提示格式和知识领域的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在BeQu上评估多种语言模型，系统分析了推理努力、模型规模、提示格式和知识领域对知识表达的影响。具体性能数据未在摘要中给出，但基准数据和排行榜已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 开放知识评估避免了预设问题的偏向，更全面地表征LLM的参数量化知识。学术上有助于理解模型内在知识机制；应用上可改进模型评估。未来可扩展至更多实体和领域。

title: DunbaaBERT: From Sacrifice to Semantics
abstract: Large language models have achieved strong performance across many NLP tasks, yet Urdu remains comparatively underexplored due to limited resources and fragmented evaluation settings. To address this gap, we introduce DunbaaBERT, a family of Urdu RoBERTa-base models trained from scratch with Byte-BPE vocabularies of 32k, 52k, and 96k tokens on a deduplicated 17GB Urdu corpus. We evaluate DunbaaBERT across intrinsic and downstream Urdu NLP benchmarks covering linguistic acceptability, news classification, offensive language detection, and sentiment analysis while analyzing vocabulary-size effects on performance and efficiency trade-offs. Across benchmarks, the DunbaaBERT variants achieve competitive performance against strong multilingual baselines while consistently maintaining favorable efficiency trade-offs. Interestingly, larger vocabularies do not consistently improve downstream effectiveness, with DunbaaBERT$_{\text{32k}}$ repeatedly providing the strongest overall efficiency profile. Overall, our results demonstrate that carefully curated Urdu-specific encoder models can remain highly competitive despite comparatively compact model and training scales. All models are released under the MIT license.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DunbaaBERT，首个专为乌尔都语从头训练的RoBERTa-base模型家族，研究词汇大小对性能与效率的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 乌尔都语在NLP领域资源匮乏，现有大型语言模型对乌尔都语支持不足，缺乏专用预训练模型和系统评估。现有方法多依赖多语言模型或资源丰富语言，在乌尔都语上性能有限。因此，需要开发针对乌尔都语的专用编码器模型，并系统研究词汇大小等设计选择对效果的影响，以推动低资源语言NLP发展。
light_analysis.method: 使用RoBERTa-base架构，从头训练三个变体（DunbaaBERT_32k、_52k、_96k），采用Byte-BPE分词，词汇表大小分别为32k、52k、96k。训练语料为去重后的17GB乌尔都语文本，涵盖多种来源。在内在任务和下游任务（语言可接受性、新闻分类、冒犯性语言检测、情感分析）上评估，并与多语言基线对比，分析词汇大小对性能和效率的影响。
light_analysis.result: DunbaaBERT变体在多基准上达到与强多语言基线竞争的性能，且始终保持有利的效率权衡。有趣的是，更大词汇表并未持续提升下游效果，DunbaaBERT_32k在整体效率上表现最佳。这表明较小词汇表可在保持竞争力的同时实现更高效率。在模型规模和训练规模相对紧凑的情况下，仍取得优异结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: DunbaaBERT证明了精心策划的乌尔都语专用编码器模型在低资源环境下具有强竞争力，为低资源语言NLP提供了可行路径。研究揭示词汇大小并非越大越好，为模型设计提供指导。所有模型以MIT许可发布，促进可复现研究。未来可探索更大规模训练或跨语言迁移。

title: Reasoning Depth and Environment Complexity: A Controlled Study of RLVR Data Allocation across Logical Reasoning Tasks
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become central to post-training reasoning models, yet a key limitation of existing studies is their narrow view of the reasoning space: difficulty is treated as reasoning depth alone, and reward is concentrated on forward deductive state tracking. We instead characterize the reasoning space along two dimensions. Difficulty. Beyond reasoning depth, we study environment complexity, where models must identify the correct path amid distractors and interacting structures. Rewarded reasoning form. We consider four abilities core to real-world reasoning: deductive state tracking, abductive recovery of hidden events or facts, inductive rule induction, and analogical transfer. To disentangle these factors, we construct a synthetic knowledge-graph environment with controlled pre- and post-training distributions, where each instance varies along depth, complexity, and task family. Three findings emerge: joint depth-complexity coverage outperforms single-axis recipes; reasoning families respond non-uniformly, with abductive reasoning degrading outside the RL-covered region and task correlations clustering into deductive-abductive and inductive-analogy pairs; and uniform mixing outperforms staged curricula under a fixed budget. We also find that recent off-the-shelf models exhibit the same deductive-over-abductive asymmetry, suggesting that this gap is not merely an artifact of our controlled setup.

light_analysis.overview: 从推理深度和环境复杂度两个维度研究RLVR数据分配策略，发现联合覆盖优于单轴，且不同推理能力存在非均匀响应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习可验证奖励（RLVR）研究将推理难度仅视为深度，奖励集中于前向演绎跟踪，忽略了环境复杂度及其他推理能力（如溯因、归纳、类比）。本文旨在系统分析这两个维度对推理性能的影响，为数据分配提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 构建合成知识图谱环境，控制预训练和后训练分布，每个实例在深度、复杂度和四个推理任务族（演绎、溯因、归纳、类比）上变化。通过实验比较不同数据分配策略（如单轴、联合覆盖、均匀混合与分阶段课程）的效果。
light_analysis.result: 深度-复杂度联合覆盖显著优于单轴策略；各推理任务族响应非均匀，溯因推理在RL覆盖区域外退化，任务相关性聚类为演绎-溯因对和归纳-类比对；在固定预算下，均匀混合数据优于分阶段课程。近期模型也表现出相同的不对称性，说明该现象具有普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了推理深度与环境复杂度在RLVR中的交互作用，以及不同推理能力的差异化需求，为构建更全面的推理评估体系提供了依据。未来可将研究扩展到自然语言任务，并探索自适应数据分配方法。

title: Leveraging Text-to-Image Diffusion Models for Unsupervised Visual Object Tracking
abstract: Unsupervised visual object tracking is a challenging task that requires following arbitrary targets in videos without training on ground-truth annotations. Despite considerable progress, existing state-of-the-art unsupervised trackers often struggle in scenarios that demand fine-grained understanding of semantic and visual structural information within video frames. Text-to-image diffusion models are well known for their ability to generate images that accurately reflect the semantics and structures described in the input prompt, demonstrating a strong grasp of visual semantics and structures. Building on this capability, we approach the unsupervised tracking from a new perspective by exploiting the rich semantic knowledge encoded in pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. To adapt the diffusion models, which are originally developed for image generation, to the tracking task, we reinterpret the models as a bridge between text and image modalities. This connection is realized through the cross-attention mechanism: when both text and an image are input into the models, they highlight the regions of the image that are semantically aligned with the text in the cross-attention maps. We therefore learn a prompt that represents the tracking target and activates its corresponding region in the cross-attention map for each frame, which enables object tracking with the diffusion model. Specifically, our method Diff-Tracking is composed of two main components: an initial prompt learner and an online prompt updater. The initial prompt learner generates a prompt that captures the target object in the first frame, allowing the diffusion model to identify the target. The online prompt updater refines the prompt based on motion information, enabling consistent tracking across video frames. We evaluate our approach on six challenging tracking datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
