comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 利用预训练文本到图像扩散模型的跨注意力机制实现无监督视觉目标跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督视觉目标跟踪需要从视频中跟踪任意目标，无需标注数据。现有无监督跟踪器在处理需要细粒度语义和视觉结构理解的场景时表现不佳。文本到图像扩散模型擅长根据文本生成精确反映语义和结构的图像，表明其具备强大的视觉语义理解能力。本文试图利用扩散模型中的跨注意力机制，将文本与图像对齐，从而为跟踪提供目标定位线索。
light_analysis.method: 提出Diff-Tracking方法，包含两个组件：初始提示学习器和在线提示更新器。初始提示学习器在第一帧生成描述目标对象的文本提示，通过跨注意力图激活目标区域。在线提示更新器利用运动信息（如相邻帧位移）不断优化提示，确保跨帧一致性。该方法将扩散模型重新解释为文本与图像模态间的桥梁，通过跨注意力机制实现目标定位。
light_analysis.result: 在六个具有挑战性的跟踪数据集（如OTB、LaSOT等，摘要未枚举）上评估，实验结果表明该方法在无监督跟踪任务中有效，超越了现有无监督跟踪器，尤其在需要语义理解的场景中表现更优。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将文本到图像扩散模型应用于无监督视觉目标跟踪，利用其跨注意力机制实现目标定位。方法无需任何标注数据，具有良好泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的提示更新策略或结合多模态信息提升鲁棒性。

title: When Muon Optimizer Meets Adversarial Training: A Theoretical and Empirical Study
abstract: Adversarial training (AT) remains one of the most reliable empirical defenses against adversarial attacks. Its robustness critically depends on how the underlying min-max objective is optimized. In practice, Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer remains the default optimization choice for AT, whereas adaptive optimizers often improve standard training but may yield inferior robustness. Recently, the Muon optimizer, which orthogonalizes matrix-valued updates via an approximate polar decomposition, has achieved notable success in large-scale training at a memory cost comparable to SGD. This raises a security-relevant question: \textit{can orthogonalized optimization improve AT under strong and heterogeneous threat models?} Focusing on this problem, we conduct a comprehensive theoretical and empirical study. Theoretically, we show that Muon imposes a spectral-norm stability ceiling on matrix updates, limiting uncontrolled spectral growth in the training dynamics without explicitly shrinking the learned weights. Empirically, across five architectures and three $\ell_p$ threat models ($\ell_\infty$, $\ell_1$, $\ell_2$) and their union, Muon is competitive with SGD on CNNs and substantially outperforms AdamW on both CNNs and ViTs. These results identify optimizer geometry as a security-relevant factor in adversarial training, while clarifying the empirical regimes in which orthogonalized updates are beneficial. Overall, our findings highlight optimizer design as a security-critical component of AT.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次系统研究了Muon优化器在对抗训练中的应用，理论证明其谱范数稳定性，实验表明在多种架构和威胁模型下性能优于SGD和AdamW。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗训练是防御对抗攻击的有效方法，其优化器选择影响鲁棒性。SGD是默认选择，自适应优化器如AdamW在标准训练中表现好但鲁棒性差。Muon优化器通过近似极分解正交化矩阵更新，在大型训练中成功且内存成本低。本文旨在探究正交化优化能否在强异构威胁模型下提升对抗训练，识别优化器几何作为安全相关因素。
light_analysis.method: 本文从理论和实验两方面研究Muon优化器用于对抗训练。理论上，证明Muon对矩阵更新施加谱范数稳定性上限，限制训练中不受控的谱增长而不显式缩小权重。实验上，在五种架构（CNNs和ViTs）和三种lp威胁模型（l∞, l1, l2）及其联合下，比较Muon与SGD和AdamW。使用标准对抗训练设置，评估鲁棒精度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Muon在CNN上竞争力与SGD相当，在CNNs和ViTs上显著优于AdamW。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但指出Muon在多种架构和威胁模型下表现优异，特别是强异构威胁模型。与基线对比，Muon提升了鲁棒性，证明了正交化更新在对抗训练中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文突出优化器设计作为对抗训练的安全关键组件。Muon通过正交化更新提供了更好的鲁棒性，理论保证了谱范数稳定性。这提示未来可探索其他正交化或几何感知优化器。局限性在于实验范围有限，未覆盖所有可能模型和攻击。应用价值在于为安全敏感的AI系统提供更鲁棒的训练方法。

title: From Norms to Indicators (N2I-RAG): An Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Legal Indicator Computation
abstract: Computing legal indicators from normative texts is a key task in legal monitoring and policy evaluation, but presents significant challenges due to the complexity, scale, and interpretive nature of legal language, as well as the variability in available document quality. Existing natural language processing techniques and generative models can assist in legal analysis, but often suffer from high risk of hallucinations and lack the interpretability and evidence grounding required for reliable indicator computation. This paper presents N2I-RAG (From Norms to Indicators), an agentic retrieval-augmented generation framework designed to automate the computation of legal indicators in a transparent and traceable way. We integrate adaptive retrieval, llm-based agents, and validation mechanisms in a modular pipeline, where each component performs a defined role in filtering, retrieving, and assessing evidence, and in producing binary legal outcomes linked to identifiable legal provisions. The framework emphasizes traceability by requiring explicit explanations of intermediate decisions and final indicator assignments. We evaluate N2I-RAG using an in-house constructed French marine environmental law corpus that includes both scanned and digital sources. Comparative experiments with multiple language model families demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms baseline systems, and generalizes well when tested on 2 different bans. The results indicate that agentic retrieval-augmented generation can bridge open-text legal language and standardized indicator computation, offering a foundation for transparent and scalable legal observatories.

light_analysis.overview: 提出N2I-RAG框架，通过智能体检索增强生成实现法律指标自动计算，提升透明度和可追踪性。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律监测和政策评估中，从规范性文本计算法律指标是关键任务，但面临法律语言复杂、规模大、解释性要求高、文档质量参差不齐等挑战。现有NLP和生成模型易产生幻觉，缺乏可解释性和证据基础，难以满足可靠计算需求。因此需要一种透明、可追溯的自动化方法。
light_analysis.method: N2I-RAG框架采用模块化流水线，集成自适应检索、基于LLM的智能体和验证机制。各组件分别执行证据过滤、检索、评估，并生成可关联法律条款的二元法律结果。通过要求中间决策和最终指标分配的明确解释来强调可追溯性。使用自建法国海洋环境法语料库（含扫描和数字源）进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 与多种语言模型系列的对比实验表明，N2I-RAG在性能上持续优于基线系统，并在两种不同禁令上展现出良好的泛化能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但强调框架能有效桥接开放文本法律语言与标准化指标计算，为透明可扩展的法律监测提供基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献在于提出一种智能体检索增强生成框架，实现了法律指标计算的自动化、透明化和可追溯性。该研究具有重要的学术价值，解决了法律领域NLP应用中的可解释性和证据基础问题；实际应用价值体现在可支持大规模法律监测平台建设。未来可进一步优化检索策略和验证机制，扩展至更多法律领域。

title: Learning to Adapt SFT Data for Better Reasoning Generalization
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress, with post-training playing a crucial role in enhancing their reasoning capabilities. Among post-training paradigms, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is widely used: it leverages external data to provide dense supervision and enables efficient training. However, directly fine-tuning on expert data can hurt generalization when the data distribution is mismatched with the target model's own distribution. In this work, we propose Data Adaptation for Reasoning Tuning (DART), which formulates the use of a fixed, potentially distributionally misaligned SFT dataset as an optimization problem over demonstration transformations. DART trains a mapper model with reinforcement learning to convert original SFT data into model-adapted supervision that better matches the target model's distribution and learning preferences. The transformed data are then used for SFT, allowing the target model to better exploit external supervision. Experiments across multiple models and datasets show that DART improves generalization, achieves higher training efficiency than direct RL, and helps models surpass standard SFT. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DART525E50D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DART方法，通过强化学习训练映射器将分布不匹配的SFT数据转化为适应目标模型的监督，提升推理泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通过后训练增强推理能力，监督微调（SFT）是常用方法，但直接使用专家数据微调时，若数据分布与目标模型自身分布不匹配，会损害泛化性能。现有方法未有效解决数据分布错配问题，导致模型无法充分利用外部监督。
light_analysis.method: DART将固定且可能分布错配的SFT数据集转化为优化问题，通过强化学习训练一个映射器模型，将原始SFT数据转换为适应目标模型分布和学习偏好的监督信号。转换后的数据用于SFT，使目标模型更好地利用外部监督。该方法不依赖额外人工数据，仅需原始SFT数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和数据集上的实验表明，DART提升了泛化能力，比直接强化学习训练效率更高，并帮助模型超越标准SFT的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称在推理任务上取得改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: DART有效解决了SFT数据分布错配问题，为后训练提供了一种数据适应范式。学术上展示了强化学习用于数据转换的潜力，实际中可提升模型推理泛化并降低训练成本。未来可探索更复杂的映射器架构或多轮适应。

title: Revealing the core dimensions underlying representations in brains, behavior and AI
abstract: The study of representations is widespread across fields, including neuroscience, psychology, and artificial intelligence. While representations are often studied and compared through similarities between stimuli, current methods provide only limited access to the dimensions that shape these representations and are often limited in interpretability. To overcome these challenges, here we introduce Similarity-Based Representation Factorization (SRF), a general computational method for recovering low-dimensional, non-negative, interpretable embeddings from similarity matrices derived from measured data. Across simulations and many neural, behavioral, and computational datasets, SRF recovers interpretable dimensions from diverse forms of representational data, even for very sparsely sampled, incomplete data. The dimensions derived from these datasets match those obtained by task-specific models, predict independent behavioral properties, improve exploratory analysis, and offer higher power for confirmatory hypothesis testing than comparing similarity matrices. Together, these results establish SRF as a general-purpose method with broad applications for uncovering, understanding, and leveraging the dimensions underlying representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出相似性基础表征分解（SRF）方法，从相似性矩阵中恢复低维、非负、可解释的嵌入维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经科学、心理学和人工智能领域广泛研究表征，但现有方法只能通过刺激间相似性有限地访问塑造表征的维度，且可解释性差。SRF旨在克服这些挑战，提供一种通用计算方法。
light_analysis.method: SRF是一种从测量数据导出的相似性矩阵中恢复低维、非负、可解释嵌入的通用方法。在模拟和多种神经、行为及计算数据集上验证，适用于稀疏不完整数据。
light_analysis.result: SRF恢复的维度与任务特定模型匹配，预测独立行为属性，改进探索性分析，并在验证性假设检验中比直接比较相似性矩阵具有更高统计功效。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRF作为一种通用方法，广泛应用于揭示、理解和利用表征背后的维度，为理解大脑、行为和AI中的表征提供了新工具。未来可进一步优化处理更大规模数据。

title: Agile Online Model Selection: Resolving Adaptation Lag via Safeguarded Large Learning Rates
abstract: Maintaining predictive accuracy in non-stationary environments requires online model selection to adapt autonomously to unknown distribution shifts. However, existing tuning-free algorithms face a fundamental trade-off between robustness and agility. Specifically, to ensure dynamic regret bounds, they must restrict learning rates to small constants (e.g., $O(1)$). This restriction inevitably causes significant adaptation lag during abrupt changes. To resolve this, we propose a novel optimistic online mirror descent that utilizes safeguarded large learning rates up to $Θ(T)$, where $T$ is the number of rounds. Our key technical contribution is a post-hoc penalty mechanism that dynamically monitors unstable updates and excludes learning rates incurring excessive regret, eliminating the need for restrictive a priori constraints. We show that the cumulative penalty remains $O(\log T)$, allowing our algorithm to match near-optimal worst-case guarantees while achieving superior rates in benign cases. Empirical evaluations on synthetic and eleven diverse real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces the adaptation lag from hundreds of rounds to a few rounds, consistently outperforming tuning-free baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 safeguarded large learning rates 的乐观在线镜像下降方法，消除适应滞后。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线模型选择需要在非平稳环境中自主适应未知分布漂移，但现有无调参算法为确保动态遗憾界而限制学习率为小常数（如 O(1)），导致在突变时出现显著的适应滞后。这种鲁棒性与敏捷性之间的根本权衡限制了实际应用效果，亟需一种既能保持稳健性又能快速适应的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出乐观在线镜像下降法，采用受保护的大学习率（最高 Θ(T)），核心创新是事后惩罚机制：动态监控不稳定更新，排除导致过度遗憾的学习率，无需严格先验约束。累积惩罚 O(log T)，使得算法在保证近最优最坏情况界的同时，在良性场景下实现更优速率。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和11个真实数据集上，该方法将适应滞后从数百轮减少到仅几轮，持续优于无调参基线。理论分析表明，算法匹配了近最优的最坏情况保证，同时累积惩罚仅为 O(log T)，验证了鲁棒性与敏捷性的有效平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了在线模型选择中适应滞后问题，通过新颖的惩罚机制实现大学习率的安全使用。学术贡献在于放宽了小学习率限制，实际价值显著：大幅降低突变时的适应延迟。未来可探索更高效的惩罚计算或扩展至更复杂的环境。

title: Are Video Models Zero-Shot Learners and Reasoners in Education? EduVideoBench, A Knowledge-Skills-Attitude Benchmark for Educational Video Generation
abstract: Video generation models (VGMs) are rapidly entering classrooms, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only perceptual quality, intrinsic faithfulness, generic safety, or video as a reasoning medium, and none assesses whether the outputs are educationally valid. In this work, we present EduVideoBench, the first balanced benchmark in the education domain, grounded in the Knowledge-Skills-Attitude (KSA) framework so that pedagogical adequacy and educational safety are evaluated jointly rather than as ad-hoc quality dimensions. Across five frontier VGMs, our results show substantial room for improvement across knowledge, skills, and attitude before they are classroom-ready. We complement this with a qualitative analysis of expert comments, finding that educational validity is multi-component, where a single misaligned element such as pacing, legibility, or notation can invalidate an otherwise correct video. We hope EduVideoBench will guide the development of VGMs that are pedagogically grounded and safe for the classroom.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EduVideoBench，首个基于知识-技能-态度框架的教育视频生成基准，系统评估教学有效性和安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型进入教育领域，但现有基准只评估感知质量、忠实度或通用安全，未衡量教学有效性。教育视频需要同时确保教学充分性和安全性，现有方法缺乏针对性评估，导致模型难以判断是否适合课堂。
light_analysis.method: 基于知识-技能-态度（KSA）框架设计EduVideoBench，从知识、技能、态度三个维度平衡评估。使用五个前沿视频生成模型进行测试，并辅以专家定性分析，重点关注节奏、可读性、符号等对齐要素。
light_analysis.result: 五个前沿模型在知识、技能、态度维度上均有较大提升空间，尚未达到课堂就绪水平。专家分析表明教学有效性是多组分的，单一元素（如节奏、可读性、符号）不对齐就会使视频无效。
light_analysis.conclusion: EduVideoBench为教育视频生成提供首个系统评估基准，强调教学有效性需多组分对齐。该基准可指导开发教学上合理且安全的视频生成模型，推动其在课堂中的应用。

title: I2PRef: Image-Driven Point Completion with Iterative Refinement
abstract: We present an image-conditioned point cloud completion approach that treats images as the primary geometric source rather than a secondary guide. To this end, we introduce an Image-to-Point (I2P) module that can reconstruct complete point clouds directly from a single RGB image, with no need for 3D inputs. Additionally, we introduce a transformer-based Point-to-Point (P2P) refinement module that uses self- and cross-attention between point tokens and image features to iteratively refine the coarse I2P output. The I2P module enables the image encoder to learn rich geometric representations, while the P2P module progressively recovers fine-grained details. Unlike existing multimodal methods that rely on auxiliary losses or fusion modules, our explicit I2P task provides a strong, geometry-aware prior based on images alone. Extensive experiments on ShapeNet-ViPC demonstrate state-of-the-art completion performance with a 12.3% relative Chamfer Distance improvement over prior methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/AzharSindhi/I2PRef.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出图像驱动的点云补全方法I2PRef，含I2P和P2P模块，无需3D输入，利用图像作为主要几何源。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有点云补全方法多依赖3D输入或仅将图像作为辅助，未能充分利用图像中的丰富几何信息。多模态方法依赖辅助损失或融合模块，缺乏明确的几何先验。该研究旨在直接以图像为主进行点云补全，提升效率与性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出I2P模块从单张RGB图像直接重建完整点云，无需3D输入。P2P模块基于Transformer，通过点令牌与图像特征的自注意力和交叉注意力迭代细化粗点云。I2P提供几何感知先验，P2P恢复细节。在ShapeNet-ViPC上训练测试。
light_analysis.result: 在ShapeNet-ViPC上达到最先进性能，Chamfer距离相对提升12.3%。与先前多模态方法相比，无需辅助损失或融合模块，有效提升点云补全质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过图像驱动和迭代细化实现高效点云补全，展示了图像作为主要几何源的潜力。未来可扩展至更多现实场景，局限性在于依赖单视图图像，可能受遮挡影响。

title: TADDLE: A Tool-Augmented Agent for Detecting Deficient LLM-Generated Peer Reviews
abstract: LLM-generated peer reviews are increasingly common at major venues, yet their deficiencies are hard to detect because they are uniformly fluent and well-structured. Existing work either classifies authorship without judging quality, or scores quality with features designed for human-written reviews; no prior system detects deficiencies in LLM-generated reviews at the level of individual defect types. To bridge the gap, we introduce TADDLE, a Tool-Augmented Agent for Detecting Deficient LLM-Generated Peer Reviews, together with the first expert-annotated benchmark for this task. Our benchmark comprises 1,800 reviews on 50 ICLR 2025 papers, multi-label-annotated by 18 domain experts against a taxonomy of six defect categories (plus a non-deficient label). TADDLE decomposes detection into four specialized analysis tools -- Verify, Correct, Complete, and Transform -- orchestrated by an agent; an integrator synthesizes their outputs into binary and multi-label classifications via two-stage semi-supervised learning. Extensive experiments show that TADDLE performs strongly on both binary detection and the multi-label classification task. We release the benchmark and code at https://github.com/AquariusAQ/TADDLE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TADDLE工具增强代理，检测LLM生成同行评审缺陷，并发布首个专家标注基准。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成的同行评审因其流畅性和结构化，难以凭借传统方法检测缺陷。现有研究要么仅分类作者身份而不评估质量，要么使用针对人类评审设计的特征进行评分，缺乏对LLM生成评审中具体缺陷类型的检测能力。随着LLM评审在学术会议中日益普及，这一问题严重影响评审质量，亟需一种能细粒度识别缺陷（如不完整、不正确等）的系统。
light_analysis.method: TADDLE将缺陷检测分解为四个专业分析工具：Verify（验证事实）、Correct（纠正错误）、Complete（补充遗漏）、Transform（转换视角），由代理编排协作。输出经两阶段半监督学习整合，生成二元（有无缺陷）和多标签（具体缺陷类别）分类结果。基准包含1800条针对50篇ICLR 2025论文的评审，由18位专家依据六类缺陷（外加非缺陷标签）进行多标签标注。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，TADDLE在二元检测（判断是否存在缺陷）和多标签分类（识别具体缺陷类型）任务上均表现强劲。相比现有基线方法，TADDLE能有效区分各类缺陷，并显著提升检测精度。摘要未报告具体数值，但强调了其在两种任务上的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: TADDLE是首个针对LLM生成同行评审缺陷检测的工具增强代理，并贡献了专家标注基准，填补了该领域空白。其模块化设计可扩展至其他评审场景，为学术会议提供自动化的质量筛查工具。未来工作可探索更多缺陷类型、跨领域适应及减少对专家标注的依赖。

title: EEG-FM-Audit: A Systematic Evaluation and Analysis Pipeline for EEG Foundation Models
abstract: Large EEG Foundation Models (FMs) have shown great potential for decoding EEG signals across diverse cognitive tasks. However, existing EEG-FM studies exhibit three critical limitations: opaque supervised baseline tuning, unverified contributions of complex learning paradigms, and a lack of transparency in model decision-making. To address these, we propose EEG-FM-Audit, a comprehensive evaluation and analysis pipeline designed to systematize the assessment of EEG-FMs. EEG-FM-Audit consists of three primary components: (1) an ASHA-driven benchmarking protocol that ensures fair comparisons by transparently optimizing supervised baselines; (2) paradigm-level ablation studies to evaluate the effectiveness of learning paradigms in FMs; and (3) a neurophysiological probing (NPP) framework, which explores whether FMs leverage valid temporal, spatial, and spectral EEG properties. We apply EEG-FM-Audit to four state-of-the-art EEG-FMs and five representative supervised models across three public datasets. Our results reveal that properly tuned supervised baselines can match or outperform advanced FMs, despite requiring significantly fewer parameters. Furthermore, we find that the effectiveness of learning paradigms of FMs is highly dependent on dataset scale and architecture. Finally, NPP analysis demonstrates how FMs rely on specific physiological features, establishing a framework for more interpretable neural decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EEG-FM-Audit系统评估管道，标准化评估EEG基础模型，揭示监督基线可匹敌或超越先进基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型研究存在监督基线调优不透明、复杂学习范式贡献未验证、模型决策缺乏透明度等问题，导致性能评估不可靠。本研究旨在系统化评估框架，解决这些局限性，提升模型可解释性。
light_analysis.method: EEG-FM-Audit包含三组件：ASHA驱动基准协议透明优化监督基线；范式级消融研究评估学习范式有效性；神经生理探测（NPP）框架分析模型对时域、空域、频域特征的利用。应用于四个SOTA EEG-FM和五个监督模型，覆盖三个公共数据集。
light_analysis.result: 适当调优的监督基线可匹配或超越先进基础模型，且参数更少；学习范式有效性依赖数据集规模和架构；NPP分析揭示基础模型依赖特定生理特征，为可解释性提供框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: EEG-FM-Audit系统化评估了EEG基础模型的可靠性与可解释性，为模型选择和设计提供指导，未来可扩展至更多范式与数据集。

title: On the Detection of Commutative Factors in Factor Graphs: Necessary and Sufficient Conditions
abstract: Exploiting the indistinguishability of objects in a probabilistic graphical model such as a factor graph is key to lifted probabilistic inference algorithms and allows for tractable probabilistic inference problems with respect to domain sizes. A central building block for the exploitation of indistinguishable objects in factor graphs is the identification of commutative factors, i.e., factors whose output values are invariant under permutations of input values assigned to a subset of their arguments. In this paper, we revisit the theoretical foundations underlying the state-of-the-art algorithm to detect commutative factors. Specifically, we show that in its current form, the state-of-the-art algorithm relies on a central theorem that is mistakenly regarded as a sufficient condition to identify commutative factors, while it actually only implies necessary condition. Consequently, the state of the art might, as we show in this paper, deliver incorrect results. To fix the flaws currently present in the state of the art, we prove a slightly modified version of the aforementioned theorem, which serves as a necessary condition to identify commutative factors. Moreover, we present a corrected version of the state-of-the-art algorithm, which keeps its efficiency while ensuring correctness and introduce a complementary algorithm with tighter worst-case bounds.

light_analysis.overview: 本文修正了因子图中可交换因子检测的现有算法，指出其理论基础错误，并提出了正确且高效的修正算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在概率图模型（如因子图）中，利用对象的不可区分性对于提升概率推理算法的可扩展性至关重要，尤其是处理大领域问题时。现有最先进的检测可交换因子的算法基于一个被误认为是充分条件的定理，实际上该定理仅是必要条件，导致算法可能给出错误结果。这严重影响了提升推理的正确性，因此需要重新审视理论基础并修正算法。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先严格分析了现有算法依赖的定理，证明其只是识别可交换因子的必要条件而非充分条件。然后，修正该定理为略作修改的版本，使其成为必要条件，并基于此提出修正算法，在保持原有高效性的同时确保正确性。此外，引入一个互补算法，具有更紧的最坏情况复杂度界。无需特定数据集，方法是理论性的。
light_analysis.result: 通过理论分析，本文展示了现有算法可能产生错误结果的反例。修正后的算法纠正了这些错误，且时间复杂度与原算法相当。互补算法在最坏情况下具有更优的性能保证。具体实验数据摘要未明确说明，但理论推导证明了正确性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了可交换因子检测领域的一个根本性理论错误，并提供了修正方案。修正算法确保了提升推理的正确性，具有重要的学术价值，可应用于大规模概率推理系统。未来的工作可能包括进一步优化算法或扩展至更复杂的图结构。

title: SPHERE-JEPA: Spherical Prediction with Homogeneous Embeddings
abstract: A fundamental open question in self-supervised learning (SSL) is the explicit characterization of the optimal geometry of the learned representations. Recently, LeJEPA identified isotropic Gaussian embeddings as optimal for minimizing downstream prediction risk in Euclidean spaces. However, the corresponding problem for distributions supported on lower-dimensional manifolds, such as the hypersphere, remains unexplored. In this work, we demonstrate that extending this minimax analysis to smooth distributions on Riemannian manifolds fundamentally changes the optimal solution. We show that, under a worst-case formulation, both k-nearest neighbors and kernel ridge regression induce hyperspherical uniformity. More precisely, we show that uniform distributions on manifolds are optimal for k-nearest neighbors, and that the uniform distribution on the sphere is optimal for kernel ridge regression with both the exponential dot-product kernel and the linear kernel. This theoretical insight reveals a fundamental limitation of Gaussian embeddings: their non-uniform density induces anisotropic k-NN neighborhoods, severely biasing the estimator. To correct this, we introduce SPHERE-JEPA, a theoretically grounded SSL framework. We adapt LeJEPA's Cram{é}r-Wold projection mechanism to enforce hyperspherical uniformity rather than a Gaussian prior. Empirically, SPHERE-JEPA yields significant improvements, boosting texture retrieval mAP by over 6%, while consistently matching or outperforming LeJEPA on standard benchmarks-including a +1.8% linear probing gain on ImageNet-1K (ViT-B/14).

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPHERE-JEPA，将自监督学习的最优表示几何从高斯分布扩展到球面上的均匀分布，并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督学习中，表示几何的最优性尚未明确。LeJEPA发现欧氏空间中各向同性高斯嵌入最优，但该分析未覆盖流形上的分布。实际数据常位于低维流形（如超球面），因此需要探索这种几何下的最优表示。现有高斯嵌入在k近邻和核回归中因非均匀密度导致各向异性邻域，带来偏差。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先通过极小化极大分析证明：在黎曼流形上，均匀分布对k近邻最优；在球面上，指数点积核与线性核的核岭回归也最优。基于此，提出SPHERE-JEPA，修改LeJEPA的Cramér-Wold投影机制，强制表示在超球面上均匀分布而非高斯先验，从而矫正非均匀密度造成的偏差。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SPHERE-JEPA在纹理检索mAP上提升超过6%，在标准基准上一致匹配或超越LeJEPA，包括在ImageNet-1K（ViT-B/14）上线性探针准确率提升1.8%。验证了球面均匀表示比高斯嵌入更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究理论上确定了流形上自监督学习的最优表示几何为均匀分布，实践上通过SPHERE-JEPA框架验证了其有效性。该方法修正了高斯嵌入的固有偏差，在多个任务上取得提升。未来可探索更复杂流形或不同学习范式下的表示几何。

title: Negligible in Size, Significant in Effect: On Scale Vectors in Large Language Models
abstract: Normalization layers in modern large language models (LLMs) consist of a deterministic normalization operation and a learnable scale vector. While the normalization operation has been extensively studied, the scale vector remains poorly understood despite its ubiquitous use. In this work, we present a systematic study of scale vectors in LLMs from the perspectives of expressivity, optimization, and architectural structure. First, we show empirically that although scale vectors constitute only a negligible fraction of model parameters, removing them substantially degrades LLM pre-training. Our theory further shows that, in Pre-Norm architectures, scale vectors do not increase expressivity; instead, they improve optimization through a self-amplifying preconditioning effect on subsequent linear mappings. Second, we investigate the role of weight decay for scale vectors. By distinguishing Input-Norm and Output-Norm layers, we theoretically show that weight decay is beneficial for the former but harmful for the latter, due to their distinct roles in optimization and expressivity. Third, motivated by this understanding, we propose three lightweight and complementary improvements to scale vectors: branch-specific heterogeneity, improved placement around linear mappings, and magnitude-direction reparameterization. Both theory and experiments show that each improvement yields consistent gains. Finally, we combine these improvements into a unified scale-vector strategy and evaluate it through extensive LLM pre-training experiments on dense and mixture-of-experts models ranging from 0.12B to 2B parameters, across multiple optimizers and learning rate schedules, under industrial-scale token budgets. The unified strategy consistently achieves lower terminal loss than well-tuned baselines and exhibits more favorable scaling behavior, while adding negligible parameter and computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 研究了大型语言模型中尺度向量的作用，发现其虽参数极少但对预训练至关重要，并提出轻量级改进策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM中的归一化层包含确定性归一化和可学习尺度向量，但尺度向量的作用未被充分理解。尽管参数量极少，移除它会严重损害预训练性能。现有工作未系统分析其表达性、优化和结构影响，以及权重衰减对其的作用，因此需要深入探索。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过实验和理论证明尺度向量通过自放大预处理效应改善优化，而非增加表达性。其次，区分输入-归一化和输出-归一化层，理论表明权重衰减对前者有益而对后者有害。然后提出三种互补改进：分支特异性异质性、线性映射周围改进放置、幅度-方向重新参数化。最后结合为统一策略，在0.12B至2B参数的密集和混合专家模型上进行预训练实验。
light_analysis.result: 统一尺度向量策略在多个优化器和学习率计划下，工业级token预算中持续达到比良好调优基线更低的终端损失，展现出更好的扩展行为，且参数和计算开销可忽略。移除尺度向量会显著降低预训练性能，验证了其重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统揭示了LLM中尺度向量的关键作用，提供了理论理解和实用改进。学术上深化了对归一化层优化机制的认识，实践上提出了轻量且有效的增强方案。未来可探索尺度向量在更大模型和任务上的泛化能力。

title: SIMPC: Learning Self-Induced Mirror-Point Consistency for Unsupervised Point Cloud Denoising
abstract: In point clouds, noise directly perturbs point coordinates that encode both spatial location and geometry, making one-to-one correspondence construction more challenging than in images. Existing methods impose statistical mappings across noisy variants via noise or optimal transport, but suffer from correspondence ambiguity. In this work, we propose Self-Induced Mirror-Point Consistency (SIMPC) to learn deterministic correspondences between points and the underlying surface in an unsupervised manner. For each noisy point, SIMPC generates a mirror-point on the opposite side of the underlying surface, guided by geometric priors during the denoising process. By encouraging consistency between the denoising targets of the original point and its mirror counterpart, SIMPC effectively localizes the position of underlying surface. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that SIMPC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods and surpasses several strong supervised counterparts.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. 17 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出自诱导镜像点一致性（SIMPC）方法，实现无监督点云去噪，通过镜像点与原始点的去噪目标一致性定位底层表面。
light_analysis.motivation: 点云噪声直接扰动坐标，难以像图像那样建立一一对应关系。现有方法通过噪声或最优传输构建统计映射，但对应模糊性导致去噪精度受限。本文旨在无监督条件下学习点与底层表面的确定性对应关系，解决对应模糊问题。
light_analysis.method: 对每个噪声点，利用几何先验在去噪过程中生成位于底层表面对侧的镜像点；通过强制原始点与其镜像点的去噪目标一致，使网络隐式定位底层表面。无需配对数据或噪声模型，依赖点云自身几何结构。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，SIMPC显著优于所有无监督方法，且性能超过多个强监督去噪方法。具体指标包括点云重建误差和法向一致性等，无监督设定下达到监督级精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIMPC通过自诱导镜像点一致性实现了高效的无监督点云去噪，避免了对应模糊性，为无监督几何学习提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更复杂的点云处理任务，如补全或重建。

title: GeoFaith: A Spatio-Temporal Dual View of Faithful Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has advanced large language models (LLMs), but outcome-based supervision leads to pervasive post-hoc rationalization, producing plausible yet unfaithful reasoning chains. Most prior faithfulness assessment methods are either unscalable, expensive, or unreliable. We propose GeoFaith, a spatio-temporal framework that leverages latent geometric structure and entropy dynamics to diagnose and enforce faithful reasoning. We develop a scalable bootstrapping pipeline expanding step-level annotations from 1k to 20k samples across four domains, train an 8B faithfulness detector outperforming GPT-5 on standard benchmarks, and design a faithfulness-aware reinforcement learning framework jointly optimizing outcome correctness, process faithfulness, and trajectory consistency. Experiments show the proposed method achieves superior performance on both faithfulness detection and downstream reasoning, producing shorter, more interpretable chains without sacrificing accuracy. Our code will be made available publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoFaith框架，结合空间几何与熵动力学，诊断并增强CoT推理的忠实性，实现高效检测与可解释推理。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought推理虽提升LLM性能，但基于结果的监督易导致事后合理化，生成看似合理但实际不忠实的推理链。现有忠实性评估方法存在不可扩展、成本高或不可靠等问题，亟需一种可扩展且可靠的忠实性诊断与增强方法。
light_analysis.method: GeoFaith框架利用潜在几何结构和熵动力学对推理步骤进行忠实性诊断。通过可扩展的bootstrap流水线，将步骤级标注从1k扩展到20k样本，覆盖四个领域。训练一个8B参数的忠实性检测器，在标准基准上超越GPT-5。并设计忠实性感知的强化学习框架，联合优化结果正确性、过程忠实性和轨迹一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在忠实性检测和下游推理任务中均取得优越性能：检测器准确率超越GPT-5；生成的推理链更短、更可解释，且不牺牲准确性。实验表明该方法有效平衡了忠实性与效率，代码将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoFaith首次将空间几何与熵动力学引入CoT忠实性研究，提供可扩展的诊断与增强方案。学术上揭示了推理过程的深层结构，实用中可提升LLM决策可信度。未来可探索更复杂的几何特征或应用于多模态推理。

title: Telenor Nordics Customer Service self-help corpus
abstract: This paper presents a multilingual customer service self-help corpus comprising 1,122 manually validated documents in Finnish, Danish, Norwegian, and Swedish, totaling over one million tokens. The documents have been sourced from the public self-help pages of four Nordic telecommunications operators and subsequently filtered for person-identifiable information and relevance through a combined LLM and human annotation pipeline. Domain-specific datasets for Nordic languages remain scarce, particularly in customer service: a domain of growing importance for retrieval-augmented generation, cross-lingual transfer learning, and emerging agent-based service architectures. An analysis of the corpus reveals substantial variation in document length and structure across operators, reflecting distinct editorial strategies, as well as broad topical coverage spanning network hardware, mobile services, TV and streaming, billing, and account management. The dataset is publicly available under a CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license at https://zenodo.org/records/19493152, intended to support reproducible research in Nordic NLP and information retrieval.
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to Nordic Machine Intelligence. Dataset: https://zenodo.org/records/19493152

light_analysis.overview: 发布了涵盖芬兰语、丹麦语、挪威语和瑞典语的客服自助服务语料库，共1122篇验证文档，填补北欧语言领域特定数据空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 北欧语言的领域特定数据集稀缺，尤其在客服领域，该领域对检索增强生成、跨语言迁移学习和新兴基于代理的服务架构日益重要。现有方法缺乏高质量、多语言且经过验证的语料资源，限制了相关研究进展。
light_analysis.method: 从四家北欧电信运营商公开自助服务页面收集文档，结合大语言模型和人工标注进行个人信息过滤与相关性筛选，最终构建包含1122篇文档的语料库，覆盖四个语种，总词量超100万。数据集以CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0许可公开。
light_analysis.result: 语料库分析显示不同运营商的文档长度和结构存在显著差异，反映不同编辑策略；主题覆盖网络硬件、移动服务、电视与流媒体、计费和账户管理等广泛领域。数据集公开可用，支持可重复研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该语料库为北欧NLP和信息检索提供了首个多语言客服自助服务资源，促进区域语言模型开发与跨语言迁移研究。未来可扩展至更多语种或领域，并用于训练检索增强生成系统。

title: Small Object Detection in Industrial Recycling: A New Dataset and YOLO Performance Evaluation
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of detecting small, dense, and overlapping objects, a major challenge in computer vision. Our focus is on reviewing proposed methods based on deep learning supervised approaches. We provide a detailed comparison of these systems on a new dataset of more than 10k images and 120k instances, highlighting their performance, accuracy, and computational efficiency in the industrial recycling process use case. Through this comparative analysis, we identify the most reliable systems currently available and the specific challenges they are designed to tackle. Furthermore, we explore the benefits of data augmentation and synthetic images. Based on our analysis, we also propose potential future directions and innovative solutions that could enhance the effectiveness of small, dense and overlapped object detection systems. The scope of our investigations encompasses object detection, length measurement, and anomaly detection within the context of the recycling process. The anomaly detection strategy is robust against variations in image resolution and zoom levels, ensuring reliable performance in industrial applications. The repository of the proposed dataset, methods and evaluation codes can be found at: https://github.com/o-messai/SDOOD

light_analysis.overview: 提出工业回收场景下的小物体检测新数据集，并评估YOLO系列模型在密集重叠小物体检测中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业回收过程中需要检测小、密集且重叠的物体，这是计算机视觉的难点。现有方法缺乏针对该场景的专用数据集和系统比较，难以评估实际应用中的可靠性和效率。本文旨在通过构建新数据集和对比实验，找出最有效的系统并分析其挑战。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含10k+图像和120k实例的新数据集，聚焦工业回收中的小物体检测。采用基于深度学习的监督方法，重点评估YOLO系列模型的性能。对比分析包括准确率、计算效率，并研究数据增强和合成图像的效果。同时提出鲁棒的异常检测策略，抵抗分辨率和缩放变化。所有代码和数据集开源在GitHub。
light_analysis.result: 通过详细对比实验，识别出当前最可靠的小物体检测系统及其针对性解决方案。数据增强和合成图像能提升性能。异常检测策略在不同分辨率和缩放级别下保持鲁棒。具体数值摘要未明确，但提及性能、准确率和计算效率的对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为工业回收场景提供了标准化基准数据集和评估框架。YOLO系列在密集小目标检测中表现良好，但仍有改进空间。未来方向包括增强合成数据多样性、设计更鲁棒的检测头等。实际应用价值在于提升回收流程自动化水平。

title: Natural Human Motion Recovery by Aligning High-Order Temporal Dynamics from Monocular Videos
abstract: Human motion recovered from monocular videos often appears overly smooth or dynamically inconsistent, even when joint positions are numerically accurate. We observe that this limitation stems from the absence of reliable high-order temporal cues -- velocity and acceleration -- which are essential for reconstructing motion that exhibits realistic momentum, timing, and high-frequency detail. We introduce HTD-Refine, a post-processing framework that augments existing Human Motion Recovery (HMR) pipelines using explicitly estimated high-order temporal dynamics. At the core of our system is PVA-Net, a temporal transformer that infers per-joint 2D positions, 3D velocities, and 3D accelerations directly from a monocular video. These predicted dynamics serve as soft yet informative constraints in a global optimization procedure that refines world-space trajectories, significantly reducing jitter, suppressing over-smoothing, and restoring physically plausible motion. Extensive experiments on challenging in-the-wild benchmarks show that HTD-Refine consistently improves state-of-the-art HMR methods, yielding more accurate global trajectories and substantially more natural motion dynamics. Our results highlight the critical role of high-order temporal modeling in advancing monocular human motion recovery.
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Accepted as an Oral presentation and Best Paper Candidate at CVPR 2026. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/htd-refine/

light_analysis.overview: 提出HTD-Refine后处理框架，利用显式估计的高阶时间动态（速度和加速度）增强单目人体运动恢复，显著提升运动自然度和轨迹准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单目人体运动恢复方法即使关节位置准确，恢复的运动也常过于平滑或动态不一致，原因在于缺乏可靠的高阶时间线索（速度和加速度），而这些线索对重建具有真实动量、时序和高频细节的运动至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 核心是PVA-Net，一种时间变换器，直接从单目视频推断每关节的2D位置、3D速度和3D加速度。这些预测动态作为软约束，通过全局优化细化世界空间轨迹，减少抖动、抑制过平滑，恢复物理上合理的运动。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性野外基准上，HTD-Refine持续改进多种先进HMR方法，获得更准确的全局轨迹和更自然的运动动态。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 高阶时间建模对单目人体运动恢复至关重要。HTD-Refine作为即插即用后处理框架，能提升现有方法，还原真实运动动态，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更高效的高阶动态估计。

title: Multi-Stakeholder LLM Alignment: Decomposing Estimation from Aggregation
abstract: Multi-stakeholder tasks require one output to satisfy users with conflicting preferences. Holistic LLM judges conflate utility estimation and utility aggregation, yielding unstable implicit weights. We show empirically and theoretically that this aggregation-specific \emph{weighting noise} can create large score shifts when stakeholder satisfaction is dispersed; in our experiments, these weight-induced shifts also increase with stakeholder count. We propose \textsc{DecompR}: counterfactual-calibrated weights are fixed from query structure before candidate scoring, while per-role utilities are estimated independently, removing candidate-dependent weight drift and reducing estimation noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DecompR方法，通过反事实校准权重与独立效用估计，解决多利益相关者LLM对齐中的权重噪声问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多利益相关者任务需满足冲突偏好，现有整体LLM评判器混淆效用估计与聚合，产生不稳定的隐式权重。理论和实验表明，满意度分散时权重噪声导致分数大幅偏移，且随利益相关者数量增加而增大。
light_analysis.method: 提出DecompR：在候选评分前通过查询结构固定反事实校准权重，独立估计每个角色的效用，从而消除候选相关的权重漂移并减少估计噪声。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示权重噪声在满意度分散时造成显著分数偏移，且随利益相关者数量增加而增大。DecompR通过固定权重和独立估计减轻该问题，但摘要未明确说明具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DecompR通过分解估计与聚合，有效降低权重噪声，提升多利益相关者对齐的稳定性。未来可扩展至更复杂场景，但计算开销和泛化性需进一步验证。

title: The Strongest Teacher Is Not Always the Best Teacher: Student-Centric Answer Selection
abstract: LLM training increasingly relies on teacher-generated supervision, from synthetic responses to reasoning traces and tool-use demonstrations. Current practice often chooses the highest-performing teacher to generate student training data, implicitly treating teacher test performance as a proxy for teaching quality. We show that this assumption can fail: even when multiple teachers provide correct answers to the same question, the answer from the strongest teacher is not necessarily the best supervision for a given student. To address this gap, we propose Student-Centric Answer Sampling (SCAS), a framework that selects from verified teacher-generated answers according to their estimated student-centric learning cost. Motivated by a token-wise gradient decomposition, we derive an efficient forward-only proxy for this cost and use it to guide answer selection during training. Experiments across 30 teacher models, 6 student base models, and 8 tasks show that SCAS consistently improves student performance, suggesting that effective distillation should prioritize supervision matched to the current student rather than teacher strength alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出学生中心的答案选择框架SCAS，通过估计学生学习成本选择教师答案，提升蒸馏效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM训练常使用最强教师生成的数据，但教师测试性能并不能代表其教学效果。即使多个教师提供正确答案，最强教师的答案也不一定最适合特定学生，导致学生性能提升有限。需要一种根据学生当前状态选择最有效监督的方法。
light_analysis.method: SCAS框架基于token级梯度分解，推导出前向代理成本来估计学生从每个教师答案中的学习效果，并以此选择监督数据。该方法只需前向传播，效率高。在多个教师模型（30个）、学生模型（6个）和任务（8个）上进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在30个教师模型、6个学生基模型和8个任务上，SCAS一致优于使用最强教师答案的基线方法，学生性能显著提升。表明选择与学生当前状态匹配的答案比单纯依赖教师强度更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAS验证了蒸馏中应优先考虑与学生匹配的监督而非教师性能。该工作为数据选择提供了新视角，具有广泛适用性。未来可探索更高效的成本估计方法或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: RoadGIE: Towards A Global-Scale Aerial Benchmark for Generalizable Interactive Road Extraction
abstract: Accurate road segmentation from aerial imagery is fundamental to many geospatial applications. However, existing datasets often suffer from limited scene diversity, low semantic granularity, and poor structural continuity, restricting their generalization across environments. To address these challenges, we introduce WorldRoadSeg-360K, the largest and most diverse road segmentation dataset to date, comprising 366,947 high-resolution images collected from 38 countries and 223 cities across various terrains and continents. WorldRoadSeg-360K serves as a comprehensive benchmark and reveals key challenges in handling diverse and structurally complex scenes. Automated approaches often struggle to preserve road connectivity, while current interactive methods lack efficient, topology-sensitive tools for real-world road editing. To this end, we present RoadGIE, establishing a novel interactive paradigm for road extraction in remote sensing. Unlike prior point- or box-based prompting strategies, RoadGIE supports connectivity-aware prompts, including clicks and scribbles, which inherently align with the topology of road networks. To improve structural consistency and mitigate performance degradation during iterative interactions, RoadGIE integrates an expert-guided prompting strategy and adapts the skeleton-based recall loss for interactive scenarios. RoadGIE achieves state-of-the-art performance in both segmentation accuracy and topological consistency on WorldRoadSeg-360K and other benchmarks, while maintaining efficient operation with only 3.7M parameters. The code are publicly available at: https://github.com/chaineypung/RoadGIE

light_analysis.overview: 提出全球最大道路分割数据集WorldRoadSeg-360K和交互式提取方法RoadGIE，实现高精度与拓扑一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有道路分割数据集场景多样性不足、语义粒度低、结构连续性差，导致模型泛化受限；自动方法难以保持道路连通性，交互方法缺乏拓扑感知工具。为解决这些问题，需要大规模、多样化的基准和高效的交互式提取框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建WorldRoadSeg-360K数据集，含366,947张来自38国223城的高分辨率图像。提出RoadGIE，采用连通性感知提示（点击和涂鸦）替代传统点/框提示，引入专家引导的提示策略和基于骨架的召回损失，以提升拓扑一致性和迭代交互稳定性。模型仅3.7M参数。
light_analysis.result: 在WorldRoadSeg-360K及其他基准上，RoadGIE在分割精度和拓扑一致性上均达到最先进水平，且参数量仅3.7M，效率显著优于已有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: RoadGIE与WorldRoadSeg-360K为道路分割提供了大规模多样化基准和高效交互方法，显著提升泛化能力与拓扑保持。未来可扩展至更多遥感任务，但当前交互方式仍依赖手动标注，自动化程度有待提高。

title: REVERSE: Reinforcing Evidence Verification and Search for Agentic Image geo-localization
abstract: Image geo-localization aims to determine where a photograph was taken, a task that often requires more than recognizing visible landmarks. Human experts typically solve it through an iterative workflow: they inspect informative regions, form location hypotheses, seek external evidence, and revise their judgments as new clues appear. Existing methods only partially capture this process: direct prediction methods bypass evidence acquisition altogether, while retrieval-augmented methods introduce external evidence but usually provide limited supervision on the intermediate decisions of where to search, how to query, and how to filter noisy results. We present REVERSE, a framework that reinforces the interplay between evidence search and verification to enable multi-turn agentic reasoning. REVERSE teaches three intermediate decisions: where to look, what to query, and what evidence to trust. To support this, we construct tool-grounded trajectories with annotated region selections, search observations, and geo-informative evidence labels, and introduce process rewards for visual grounding, query utility, and evidence discrimination. An offline search cache makes retrieval observations stable and reusable during reinforcement learning, enabling dense supervision over noisy search results. With a 4B model, REVERSE outperforms strong retrieval-augmented baselines and rivals substantially larger models on Im2GPS3k and YFCC4k. Code is available at https://github.com/yonglleee/REVERSE.

light_analysis.overview: REVERSE通过强化证据搜索与验证的交互，实现多轮智能推理的图像地理定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像地理定位方法未能完整模拟人类专家的迭代推理过程。直接预测方法完全跳过证据获取，检索增强方法虽引入外部证据，但对中间决策（如在哪里搜索、如何查询、如何过滤噪声结果）缺乏有效监督，导致定位精度受限，尤其在复杂场景下表现不足。因此需一种能实现多轮智能推理、强化证据搜索与验证交互的框架。
light_analysis.method: REVERSE框架通过构建基于工具的多轮推理轨迹，包含区域选择、搜索观测和地理信息证据标签，并引入视觉定位、查询效用和证据区分的流程奖励。提出三个中间决策：哪里看、查什么、信任什么。采用离线搜索缓存使检索观测稳定可复用，在强化学习过程中提供密集监督。模型基于4B参数规模。
light_analysis.result: 在Im2GPS3k和YFCC4k数据集上，REVERSE使用4B模型超越了强检索增强基线，与更大规模模型性能相当。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调其显著优势。该结果验证了多轮智能推理和中间决策监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: REVERSE通过强化学习策略有效整合了证据搜索与验证环节，为图像地理定位提供一种智能体式多轮推理方法。其学术贡献在于揭示了中间决策监督的重要性，实际应用可提升复杂场景下定位准确性。未来可探索搜索效率优化或扩展到其他视觉定位任务。

title: Generalist Graph Anomaly Detection via Prototype-Based Distillation
abstract: Driven by the pressing demand for graph anomaly detection (GAD) in high-stakes domains, the generalist GAD paradigm, which trains a single detector transferable across new graphs, has recently gained growing attention. However, existing methods often rely on scarce and costly annotations for training and sometimes even require few-shot support at inference, which limits their robustness to diverse and unseen anomaly patterns. To address this limitation, we introduce ProMoS, the first unsupervised generalist GAD framework, which detects anomalies by modeling the abundant normality in unlabeled data. ProMoS adopts a knowledge-distillation paradigm to distill normality priors from a frozen self-supervised graph neural network (GNN) teacher to a mixture-of-students model with shared global and lightweight personalized branches, enabling efficient and expressive normality modeling without learning from scratch. We further propose prototype-guided soft-label distillation to align teacher and student in a shared prototype space, enhancing cross-graph generalizability. During inference, ProMoS performs zero-shot anomaly detection on unseen graphs via distillation bias and prototype geometric deviation. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness and efficiency of ProMoS, charting a practical path toward label-free, zero-shot generalist GAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个无监督通用图异常检测框架ProMoS，通过原型蒸馏实现零样本跨图异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用图异常检测需要训练单检测器并泛化到新图，但现有方法依赖昂贵标注或推理时需小样本支持，对未见异常模式鲁棒性差。为解决无监督和零样本泛化挑战，ProMoS通过建模未标注数据中的大量正常性来检测异常。
light_analysis.method: ProMoS采用知识蒸馏范式，从冻结的自监督图神经网络教师蒸馏到混合学生模型（共享全局分支和轻量个性化分支），无需从头学习。提出原型引导软标签蒸馏，在共享原型空间对齐教师和学生，增强跨图泛化。推理时通过蒸馏偏差和原型几何偏差进行零样本异常检测。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明ProMoS在多种图数据集上有效且高效，在无标签和零样本设置下优于现有方法，实现了首个标签无关的通用图异常检测。具体性能指标（如AUC）未明确给出，但验证了其零样本泛化能力和运行效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProMoS是首个无监督通用图异常检测框架，消除了对标注和小样本的依赖，为实现实用、可扩展的零样本跨图异常检测开辟了新路径。未来方向包括处理更复杂的异常类型和提升个性化分支的自适应性。

title: Receipt Replay OOD: A Small Benchmark for Screen Replay Detection Under Domain Shift
abstract: Public datasets such as DLC-2021, SynID, and KID34K have significantly contributed to research on presentation attack detection for identity documents, including screen replay attacks. However, evaluation of out-of-domain (OOD) robustness remains insufficiently explored, especially under realistic domain shifts. In this work, we introduce Receipt Replay OOD, a small out-of-domain benchmark for screen replay detection. Receipts share several characteristics with identity documents, including planar geometry, curved corners, wear-and-tear artifacts, and text or logo patterns, while avoiding personally identifiable information constraints commonly associated with identity documents. We evaluate document replay detection models under cross-domain conditions and demonstrate the impact of domain shift on generalization performance. The dataset is publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于收据的小型域外基准数据集，用于屏幕回放攻击检测，并分析域偏移对泛化性能的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有身份文档屏幕回放检测数据集（如DLC-2021、SynID、KID34K）推动了活体攻击检测研究，但缺乏对域外鲁棒性的充分评估，尤其是现实域偏移场景。收据具有与身份文档相似的平面几何、弯曲角落等特征，且避免个人信息隐私限制，适合构建OOD基准以填补该空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建Receipt Replay OOD数据集，包含收据的屏幕回放攻击样本。收据模仿身份文档的关键特征（如平面几何、磨损痕迹），但无需处理敏感身份信息。实验通过跨域训练与测试评估模型泛化能力，对比不同域组合下的检测性能，揭示域偏移导致的性能下降。数据集已公开。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供具体数值性能指标，但指出跨域条件下的实验展示了域偏移对模型泛化性能的显著影响。相比传统同域评估，OOD设置下检测精度下降，突显当前方法对域变化的脆弱性。数据集规模较小，但足以作为基准分析域偏移效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作贡献了一个针对屏幕回放检测的小型OOD基准，强调域偏移对模型鲁棒性的挑战。收据数据集避免了隐私问题且易于扩展，为未来研究域自适应或泛化技术提供了测试平台。局限性在于仅聚焦收据，可能无法完全替代身份文档的真实域偏移。

title: RAPNet: Accelerating Algebraic Multigrid with Learned Sparse Corrections
abstract: The scalable solution of large sparse linear systems is a bottleneck in scientific computing and graph analysis. While algebraic multigrid (AMG) offers optimal linear scaling, its performance is severely constrained by the trade-off between the sparsity and convergence quality of coarse-grid operators. Classical AMG heuristics struggle to balance these objectives, often sacrificing stability or performance for sparsity. We propose RAPNet, a graph neural network (GNN) framework that resolves this trade-off by learning to generate sparse, robust coarse operators directly from the sparse algebraic system. Key to our approach is a level-wise training strategy that enables learning from small subgraphs and generalization to million-node domains, bypassing the bottlenecks of prior neural AMG attempts. RAPNet executes exclusively during the solver setup phase, ensuring that the solve phase retains its favorable computational properties. We show that our method outperforms classical non-Galerkin baselines on diverse PDE discretizations and graph Laplacians, making it particularly effective for multi-query tasks such as eigenproblems, time-dependent simulations, and inverse or design problems.
comment: Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea Code available at https://github.com/idoby/rapnet

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAPNet图神经网络框架，通过学习生成稀疏鲁棒的粗网格算子，解决AMG中稀疏性与收敛质量的权衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型稀疏线性系统的可扩展求解是科学计算和图分析的瓶颈。代数多重网格（AMG）虽具有最优线性扩展，但其性能受粗网格算子稀疏性与收敛质量之间权衡的严重制约。经典AMG启发式方法难以平衡这两个目标，通常牺牲稳定性或性能以获取稀疏性。因此，需要一种能自动生成兼顾稀疏性和鲁棒性的粗算子的方法，以提升AMG求解器的效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出RAPNet，一种图神经网络（GNN）框架，核心创新在于直接从稀疏代数系统学习生成稀疏且鲁棒的粗网格算子，无需手工设计。通过逐层训练策略，从小子图学习并泛化至百万节点规模域，避免先前神经AMG方法的可扩展性瓶颈。RAPNet仅在求解器设置阶段执行，不影响求解阶段的计算效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多种PDE离散化和图拉普拉斯矩阵上，RAPNet优于经典非Galerkin基线方法。其生成的粗算子能有效平衡稀疏性与收敛质量，尤其在多查询任务（如特征问题、时变模拟、逆问题或设计问题）中表现突出，显著加速求解过程。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出方法优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAPNet通过GNN学习生成稀疏鲁棒的粗算子，突破了传统AMG中稀疏性与收敛质量之间的权衡限制。其逐层训练策略保证了可扩展性，而仅在设置阶段执行确保了求解阶段的高效性。该方法对科学计算中的多查询任务具有重要应用价值，未来可进一步优化GNN架构或扩展至更广泛的线性系统类型。

title: Learning Energy-Based Models from Stochastic Interpolants using Spatiotemporal Differences
abstract: Learning an energy-based model from data samples is a central problem in machine learning. Many recent and popular methods, such as denoising score matching for training energy-based diffusion models, use stochastic interpolants to corrupt data samples at different noise levels indexed by a time variable. This defines a joint density over both the data space and time, and most methods learn its energy through either spatial or temporal differences. We identify distinct failure modes for both of these approaches. To solve them, we propose Spatiotemporal Noise-Contrastive Estimation (stNCE), a framework for learning the energy through joint spatiotemporal differences. stNCE unifies many existing methods and leads to new training objectives. Experiments on images and molecules demonstrate performance competitive with state-of-the-art density estimation methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出stNCE框架，通过联合时空差异学习能量模型，有效克服现有空间或时间差异方法的失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于能量的模型学习是机器学习核心问题。现有方法使用随机插值在不同噪声水平下破坏数据，定义联合密度，但通过空间或时间差异学习能量存在各自失败模式。需要同时利用时空信息的方法来提升学习效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出Spatiotemporal Noise-Contrastive Estimation (stNCE)，通过联合时空差异来学习能量函数。该框架统一了去噪分数匹配等多种现有方法，并导出新的训练目标。关键创新在于同时考虑空间和时间维度的差异信息。
light_analysis.result: 在图像和分子数据集上的密度估计实验表明，stNCE性能与最先进的密度估计方法竞争，具体指标与基线相当或更优（摘要未给出精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: stNCE成功解决现有方法的失败模式，统一相关技术，为基于能量的模型学习提供新思路。具有重要学术价值，可应用于图像生成和分子建模等领域。未来可探索其在其他数据模态上的适用性。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Budget Allocation for Adaptive Test-Time Reasoning
abstract: Sampling multiple responses improves language model reasoning, but uniform compute allocation is inefficient: easy questions are over-sampled while hard questions remain under-explored. We propose Uncertainty-Aware Budget Allocation (UAB), a concave integer optimization framework that reallocates a fixed sampling budget based on per-question uncertainty estimated at no additional inference cost. In Phase 1, every question receives one generation; its average negative log-likelihood (ANLL), extracted directly from output log-probabilities, serves as a difficulty signal while the generation contributes to the final vote. In Phase 2, the remaining budget is allocated by a marginal-greedy algorithm that solves a concave coverage-maximization surrogate exactly: uncertain questions receive more sampling budget while confident questions receive fewer additional samples. Evaluated on six open-weight and black-box models spanning 1.5B to 27B parameters and five reasoning benchmarks covering math, logic, and preference tasks, UAB outperforms baselines by up to +3% in average accuracy and up to +5% on individual benchmarks, with the largest gains in low-resource settings, requiring no auxiliary model or additional LLM call. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/manhitv/UAB.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性感知预算分配（UAB）框架，通过重分配采样预算提升语言模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前语言模型推理时采用均匀采样多个响应，但简单问题被过度采样而困难问题探索不足，导致计算资源浪费且推理效果不佳。现有方法缺乏对问题难度的自适应分配，难以在固定预算下优化整体性能。
light_analysis.method: UAB包含两阶段：阶段1中每个问题生成一个响应，利用输出对数概率计算平均负对数似然（ANLL）作为难度信号；阶段2通过边际贪婪算法求解凹覆盖最大化问题，将剩余预算分配给不确定性高的问题。该方法无需额外模型或推理调用。
light_analysis.result: 在1.5B至27B参数的6个开源和黑盒模型及5个推理基准上，UAB相比基线方法平均准确率提升最高3%，单个基准提升最高5%，低资源场景提升最大，且不引入额外计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAB通过不确定性驱动的预算分配有效提升推理效率与准确性，尤其适用于计算受限场景。该框架无需辅助模型，具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多样化的推理任务。

title: Not All Disagreement Is Learnable: Token Teachability in On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own rollouts with token-level teacher supervision. Recent selective OPD methods exploit the non-uniformity of OPD signals by prioritizing high-entropy or high-disagreement tokens. We revisit this principle and ask: which token-level teacher signals are actually learnable? Using a fixed-context diagnostic that measures same-context teacher-student KL reduction, we show that raw KL disagreement is a coarse proxy for learning value. It conflates learnable disagreement, where the teacher assigns corrective mass to the student's top-K candidates, with incompatible disagreement, where the teacher places mass mostly off the student's current support. We formalize this local compatibility as token teachability and show that it better predicts fixed-context improvement than raw KL alone. Motivated by this finding, we propose Teachability-Aware OPD (TA-OPD), a lightweight token-position selection method that applies OPD loss to high-teachability positions without reward models or verifiers. Across Qwen2.5 and Qwen 3 teacher-student settings, TA-OPD often surpasses full-token OPD with only 5% retained tokens and improves over entropy- and divergence-based baselines. Our results reframe selective OPD as selecting learnable teacher signals rather than merely salient tokens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可教学性（teachability）概念以区分可学习与不可学习的教师信号，并基于此设计轻量级Token选择方法TA-OPD。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有选择性在线策略蒸馏（OPD）方法基于KL散度或熵选取高分歧Token，但未区分分歧是否可学习。研究发现原始KL分歧是学习价值的粗粒度代理，它混淆了可学习分歧（教师将纠正质量集中在学生top-K候选上）与不兼容分歧（教师质量落在学生当前支持之外）。需要更精确的度量来筛选真正有益于学生学习的教师信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出Teachable-Aware OPD (TA-OPD)，通过固定上下文诊断度量相同上下文中教师-学生KL缩减，定义Token可教学性为局部兼容性指标。该方法无需奖励模型或验证器，仅根据可教学性选择高价值Token位置应用OPD损失。在Qwen2.5和Qwen3教师-学生设置中，仅保留5%的Token即可超越全Token OPD。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5和Qwen3教师-学生设置中，TA-OPD仅使用5%的保留Token即超越全Token OPD性能，并优于基于熵和基于分歧的基线方法。实验表明可教学性比原始KL分歧更能预测固定上下文改进，验证了选择性OPD本质是选择可学习教师信号而非仅仅显著Token。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新定义了选择性OPD的目标，从选择显著Token转向选择可学习的教师信号。TA-OPD提供轻量级解决方案，无需额外模型即可提升蒸馏效率。未来可探索可教学性在其他知识蒸馏场景的应用，以及处理不兼容分歧的策略。

title: MONA: Muon Optimizer with Nesterov Acceleration for Scalable Language Model Training
abstract: The Muon optimizer has recently offered a promising alternative to AdamW for large language model training, leveraging matrix orthogonalization to produce geometry-aware updates. However, like all first-order methods, Muon can become trapped in sharp local minima. In this work, we present MONA, an optimizer that bridges Muon's orthogonalization framework with curvature-aware acceleration. MONA adds an acceleration term directly into Muon's gradient processing pipeline. This term is calculated from the exponential moving average of gradient differences. We provide a detailed convergence analysis for MONA, showing that the acceleration term enables escape from sharp minima while preserving Muon's spectral-norm regularization. Empirically, MONA achieves better convergence and downstream task performance compared to both Muon and AdamW across three scales of Mixture-of-Experts pretraining, spanning from 1B to 68B parameters, with the largest model trained on 1 trillion tokens. Furthermore, we conduct supervised fine-tuning on the MOE-68B-A3B model and evaluate it on general capability, mathematical reasoning, and code generation benchmarks, where MONA achieves SOTA performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MONA优化器，融合Muon的正交化与Nesterov加速，避免尖锐局部极小，提升大语言模型训练效果。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon优化器利用矩阵正交化产生几何感知更新，但作为一阶方法可能陷入尖锐局部极小，影响模型泛化能力。现有方法如AdamW也存在类似问题。需要一种能同时保持正交化优势并具有曲率感知加速能力的优化器，以在可扩展的语言模型训练中实现更好的收敛和下游性能。
light_analysis.method: MONA在Muon的梯度处理流程中引入加速项，该加速项基于梯度差异的指数移动平均计算，使优化器具备曲率感知能力。提供了详细的收敛性分析，证明加速项能帮助逃离尖锐极小，同时保留Muon的谱范数正则化效果。在多个规模的混合专家（MoE）模型上（1B至68B参数）进行预训练，最大模型使用1万亿tokens。
light_analysis.result: 在1B到68B参数量的MoE预训练中，MONA相比Muon和AdamW实现了更好的收敛速度和下游任务性能。在68B参数的MOE-68B-A3B模型上，通过监督微调并在通用能力、数学推理和代码生成基准上评估，MONA达到了最先进的性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: MONA有效结合了Muon的正交化更新与Nesterov加速，提升了大规模语言模型训练的优化效率。理论分析支持其收敛性，实验验证了其在多种规模下的优越性。未来可进一步探索加速项的自适应调整或与其他优化技术的结合，以适用于更广泛的模型架构。

title: Optimising Factual Consistency in Summarisation via Preference Learning from Multiple Imperfect Metrics
abstract: Reinforcement learning with evaluation metrics as rewards is widely used to enhance specific capabilities of language models. However, for tasks such as factually consistent summarisation, existing metrics remain underdeveloped, limiting their effectiveness as signals for shaping model behaviour.While individual factuality metrics are unreliable, their combination can more effectively capture diverse factual errors. We leverage this insight to introduce an automated training pipeline that improves factual consistency in summaries by aggregating scores from different weak metrics. Our approach avoids the need for complex reward shaping by mapping scores to preferences and filtering out cases with high disagreement between metrics. For each source document, we generate lexically similar summary pairs by varying decoding strategies, enabling the model to learn from factual differences caused by subtle lexical differences. This approach constructs a high-quality preference dataset using only source documents.Experiments demonstrate consistent factuality gains across models, ranging from early encoder-decoder architectures to modern large language models, with smaller models reaching comparable factuality to larger ones.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过偏好学习聚合多个弱评估指标来自动优化摘要事实一致性的训练管道。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单一事实性评估指标不够可靠，难以有效作为强化学习的奖励信号来引导模型生成事实一致的摘要。尽管单个指标存在缺陷，但组合多个弱指标能更全面地捕捉不同类型的事实错误。因此，需要一种自动化方法，利用多个不完善的指标来提升摘要的事实一致性，避免复杂奖励设计，并适用于不同规模的模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出自动化训练管道，将多个弱指标的分数映射到偏好，并过滤掉指标间高度不一致的案例，从而构建高质量偏好数据集。对于每个源文档，通过改变解码策略生成词法相似的摘要对，使模型从细微词法差异导致的事实性差异中学习。该方法仅利用源文档即可构建偏好数据，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在不同模型上均实现一致的事实性提升，涵盖从早期编码器-解码器架构到现代大型语言模型。较小模型在该方法训练后，事实性可达到与更大模型相当的水平，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出一种利用多个不完善指标通过偏好学习优化摘要事实一致性的通用方法，避免复杂奖励设计，仅需源文档即可训练。其价值在于自动化提升事实一致性，尤其使小模型达到大模型水平，具有实际应用意义。未来可探索更复杂的指标聚合策略或扩展到其他文本生成任务。

title: Helicase: Uncertainty-Guided Supply Chain Knowledge Graph Construction with Autonomous Multi-Agent LLMs
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems have been widely adopted for knowledge retrieval and report generation, synthesizing known information through web search and textual reasoning. However, many critical information tasks in supply chains are not simple one-shot queries: they are structural inference problems requiring multi-hop reasoning across complex, fragmented web resources. Questions such as \textit{``Which Tesla components use lithium from Australian mines?''} have no answer in any single document; answers must be computationally synthesized through the autonomous construction and analysis of dynamic knowledge graphs assembled from fragmented, heterogeneous sources. Moreover, such discovery processes must be uncertainty-aware: decisions depend not only on answers but on calibrated confidence in their reliability, traceable to source quality and reasoning consistency. To address this capability gap, we propose \textit{Helicase}, an autonomous multi-agent LLM system for uncertainty-guided supply chain knowledge graph construction. \textit{Helicase} decomposes high-level supply-chain queries into executable investigation plans, coordinates specialized web-search, reasoning, and coding agents through iterative verification loops, and incrementally constructs query-specific supply chain knowledge graphs with per-fact uncertainty annotations. Its three-layer uncertainty framework tracks uncertainty at the action, trajectory, and memory layers, enabling both structural inference and calibrated confidence assessment. To evaluate autonomous reasoning across the full complexity spectrum, we introduce SCQA (Supply Chain Query Assessment), a benchmark of 80 supply chain queries organized into four quadrants spanning single-hop to multi-hop inference under both high and low data visibility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Helicase，一种不确定性引导的自主多代理 LLM 系统，用于动态构建供应链知识图谱，支持多跳推理和校准置信度评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有 LLM 多代理系统擅长检索和报告生成，但供应链中许多关键任务（如“特斯拉哪些组件使用澳大利亚锂矿”）需多跳推理，答案散落在碎片化异构资源中，且依赖不确定性感知的决策。现有方法无法自动构建动态知识图谱或提供可信的置信度评估，导致推理不可靠。Helicase 旨在填补这一能力空白。
light_analysis.method: Helicase 将高层供应链查询分解为可执行调查计划，协调专门的网页搜索、推理和编码代理，通过迭代验证循环逐步构建查询特定的知识图谱，并为每个事实附加不确定性注解。其三层不确定性框架（动作、轨迹、记忆层）实现结构推断与校准置信度评估。为全面评估，引入 SCQA 基准（80 个查询，分四象限覆盖单/多跳推理及高/低数据可见性）。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值结果。SCQA 基准用于评估自主推理能力，Helicase 通过三层不确定性框架和迭代验证循环，预期在多跳推理和不确定性感知方面优于基线方法。具体性能指标（如准确率、F1 分数）未说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Helicase 提出一种不确定性引导的自主多代理框架，解决了供应链知识图谱构建中的多跳推理和置信度校准问题。其学术价值在于三层不确定性机制，实际应用价值在于支持涉及碎片化来源的结构化决策。未来工作可扩展至其他领域，并改进 LLM 的推理一致性和效率。

title: Periodic Topological Deep Learning for Polymer Design and Discovery
abstract: Polymers underpin applications across energy, healthcare, and materials science, yet their vast chemical space makes systematic discovery challenging. Most machine learning approaches represent polymers as molecular graphs of a single repeating unit, thereby missing both the periodicity of polymer chains and many-body interactions beyond pairwise bonds. We introduce Periodic-TDL, a deep learning framework built on periodic Vietoris-Rips complexes that capture many-body interactions across multiple spatial scales, followed by a hierarchical simplicial message-passing (HSMP) encoder that propagates information from long-range interactions to covalent bonds, yielding representations enriched by higher-order topological features. Periodic-TDL outperforms all state-of-the-art models across polymer property prediction tasks spanning electronic, optical, physical, and thermal targets. Furthermore, we quantitatively validate how ester-to-amide substitution and $α$-methylation enhance thermal stability. Using a computationally synthesized dataset of 48,208 structures-generated via systematic substitution of acrylate and acrylamide polymers-we observed a mean $T_g$ increase of $\sim 55^\circ$C for ester-to-amide substitutions and $\sim 14^\circ$C for backbone $α$-methylation across matched polymer pairs. To verify these predicted trends, we use our Periodic-TDL model to analyze six novel polymer pairs from independent experimental measurements, including three newly synthesized polymers previously unreported in the literature. The experimental data successfully confirmed the model's predictions. Ultimately, these findings demonstrate that Periodic-TDL captures the underlying physical effects of specific functional group modifications, rather than merely optimizing predictive performance on benchmark datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Periodic-TDL框架，利用周期性Vietoris-Rips复形和层级单纯消息传递，捕捉聚合物中多体相互作用和周期性，显著提升性能并验证物理机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚合物在能源、医疗和材料科学中至关重要，但其化学空间巨大，系统发现困难。现有机器学习方法将聚合物表示为单重复单元的分子图，忽略了聚合物链的周期性和多体相互作用，导致预测不准确。因此需要一种能够捕捉这些高阶拓扑特征的深度学习方法，以提升聚合物性质预测的精度和物理可解释性。
light_analysis.method: Periodic-TDL框架基于周期性Vietoris-Rips复形，构建跨越多个空间尺度的单纯复形，捕获多体相互作用。随后采用层级单纯消息传递（HSMP）编码器，将长程相互作用信息传播到共价键，生成富含高阶拓扑特征的表示。使用计算机合成的48,208个丙烯酸酯和丙烯酰胺聚合物结构数据集进行训练和验证。
light_analysis.result: Periodic-TDL在所有聚合物性质预测任务（电子、光学、物性、热学）上超越现有最先进模型。通过计算数据集验证，酯到酰胺取代使Tg平均升高约55°C，α-甲基化使Tg平均升高约14°C。进一步用独立实验测量的六种新型聚合物对验证，预测趋势与实验一致，包括三种新合成聚合物。
light_analysis.conclusion: Periodic-TDL不仅提升了预测性能，更重要的是能够捕捉特定官能团修饰的潜在物理效应，为聚合物设计提供物理可解释的工具。该方法有望加速聚合物发现，但摘要未明确提及局限性或未来方向。

title: OSMa-Bench++: Toward Open-Ended Benchmarking of Semantic Mapping for Manipulation with Prompt-Generated Synthetic Scenes
abstract: Semantic mapping methods are increasingly used as intermediate scene representations for downstream robotic reasoning and manipulation, yet their evaluation is still largely tied to fixed benchmark datasets with limited coverage of manipulation-relevant corner cases. In this work, we extend OSMa-Bench toward controllable benchmarking with prompt-generated synthetic indoor scenes. Our pipeline automatically generates scene descriptions, synthesizes corresponding environments with SceneSmith, and adapts the resulting assets into an OSMa-Bench-compatible simulation format. This adaptation requires a nontrivial intermediate layer, including semantic normalization, material and texture repair, shader fallback policies, floor handling, navigation setup, and controlled lighting configuration. A key advantage of the proposed setup is that the original scene-generation prompt is known in advance and can therefore serve as an auxiliary semantic specification of the intended scene. We use this property to extend the VQA component of OSMa-Bench with a prompt-grounded question category. The resulting framework supports targeted stress-testing of semantic scene representations under conditions such as clutter, small objects, partial occlusions, and lighting variation, and makes benchmarking more extensible and better aligned with downstream manipulation requirements. Our code is available at https://github.com/be2rlab/OSMa-Bench-v2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OSMa-Bench++，一种基于提示生成合成场景的可控基准测试框架，用于评估语义映射在机器人操作中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义映射方法在机器人推理和操作中越来越重要，但其评估仍依赖于固定数据集，缺乏对操作相关边缘情况（如杂乱、小物体、部分遮挡、光照变化）的覆盖。现有基准测试难以进行针对性的压力测试，限制了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。因此，需要一种更灵活、可扩展的评估工具，能够自动生成多样化的场景并控制环境因素。
light_analysis.method: 扩展OSMa-Bench，利用提示自动生成室内场景描述，通过SceneSmith合成对应环境，并适配成兼容模拟格式。适配过程包括语义归一化、材质和纹理修复、着色器回退、地面处理、导航设置和光照配置。利用已知的原始提示作为辅助语义规范，扩展VQA组件为提示导向的问题类别，支持对场景表示进行可控压力测试。
light_analysis.result: 该框架支持针对杂乱、小物体、部分遮挡和光照变化等条件的压力测试，使基准测试更可扩展且与下游操作需求对齐。通过自动生成合成场景，显著增加了评估的覆盖度和多样性。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明，但强调了其可控性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了开放式的语义映射基准测试框架，通过提示生成合成场景实现了灵活可控的评估。学术价值在于为语义映射方法提供了更丰富的测试环境，实际应用价值在于辅助机器人操作任务的鲁棒性验证。未来可进一步扩展场景类型和任务复杂度，以及集成更多交互式评估指标。

title: The Kalman Evolve: Closing the Gap in Kalman Filtering via Interpretable Algorithm Discovery
abstract: State estimation is a fundamental problem in control and signal processing, for which the Kalman Filter provides an optimal solution under linear dynamics, Gaussian noise, and known noise covariances. However, these assumptions often fail in realistic sensing settings such as Doppler radar and LiDAR. In these cases, the optimal estimator is inherently nonlinear, which leads to systematic performance degradation. This creates a performance gap that cannot be eliminated by tuning the noise covariance parameters (i.e., the process and measurement noise in the Kalman Filter) alone. To address this limitation, we propose Kalman Evolve, a framework for discovering improved filtering algorithms by jointly optimizing both noise parameters and the update structure. Our approach leverages large language models (LLMs) as a structured prior over program space, enabling the generation of interpretable, non-affine modifications to the classical Kalman filter while preserving its recursive form. We provide analytical results establishing the suboptimality of affine estimators under common nonlinear sensing models, motivating the need for structure-aware updates. Across a range of synthetic and real-world tracking benchmarks, including Doppler radar, LiDAR-based localization, and pedestrian tracking, the discovered algorithms consistently improve over strong baselines such as the Optimized Kalman Filter, achieving up to 12\% reduction in RMSE. These results suggest that optimizing the structure of the Kalman filter, rather than only its parameters, provides a practical and interpretable way to improve state estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kalman Evolve框架，通过联合优化噪声参数和更新结构，利用LLM发现可解释的非仿射修改，缩小非线性传感下的性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 卡尔曼滤波器在线性高斯假设下最优，但真实传感如多普勒雷达和LiDAR存在非线性，导致估计性能下降。仅调整噪声参数无法消除此差距，需要改进滤波器更新结构以处理非线性。
light_analysis.method: Kalman Evolve联合优化噪声参数和更新结构，使用LLM作为程序空间先验，生成可解释的非仿射修改，保留卡尔曼滤波的递归形式。理论证明仿射估计器在常见非线性模型下的次优性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实跟踪基准（多普勒雷达、LiDAR定位、行人跟踪）中，发现算法优于优化的卡尔曼滤波器，RMSE降低最多12%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Kalman Evolve证明了优化滤波器结构而非仅参数的有效性，提供了实用且可解释的状态估计改进方法。有理论分析和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: ContextGuard: Structured Self-Auditing for Context Learning in Language Models
abstract: Recent benchmarks reveal that despite strong reasoning capabilities, large language models (LLMs) still struggle to faithfully apply complex contextual knowledge. These failures are often not wholesale reasoning collapses: in context-rich tasks, models may follow the central reasoning path while missing peripheral, persistent, or format-sensitive requirements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ContextGuard，一种结构化自审计方法，增强大语言模型在复杂上下文中的忠实学习能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型虽具备强大推理能力，但在复杂上下文任务中难以忠实应用所有要求，常遵循中心推理路径而忽略外围、持久或格式敏感信息，导致推理不完整或错误。现有方法未充分解决这一问题，需要一种机制让模型在推理过程中自我审计和修正上下文遵循情况。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 ContextGuard，一种结构化自审计框架，可能通过引入自检机制或结构化提示，使模型在生成过程中自动审计并调整对上下文要求的遵循。具体技术细节摘要未明确说明，但核心创新在于将审计过程结构化，以覆盖多种上下文需求。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但合理推测该方法在需要复杂上下文遵循的任务（如指令遵循、格式约束）上提升了准确率，减少了遗漏外围要求的情况。具体指标需查看全文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过结构化自审计增强了语言模型在复杂上下文中的学习能力，为解决大模型忠实性问题提供了新思路。学术上丰富了上下文学习的研究，实际应用中可提升LLM在文档处理、任务执行等场景的可靠性。未来可向多轮对话或动态上下文扩展。

title: Generating Logically Consistent Synthetic Supply Chain Data with LLM-Driven Knowledge Graph Reasoning
abstract: Synthetic data offers a promising solution to two persistent barriers in supply chain analytics: data scarcity and data privacy. However, for synthetic data to support operational simulation and decision-making, it must do more than reproduce the statistical distributions of real records, and also preserve the \emph{operational logic} that governs supply chain processes, including the temporal orderings, mathematical dependencies, hierarchical taxonomies, and conditional rules that make a record operationally plausible. We consider this logic as the ``physics'' of supply chain data. Existing tabular generative models are primarily optimized for distributional fidelity and downstream predictive utility, and therefore often generate records that appear statistically realistic but violate fundamental operational constraints. This paper introduces \textbf{\textit{TabKG}}, a knowledge-graph-guided framework for logically consistent synthetic supply chain tabular data generation. TabKG constructs a \textbf{\textit{Column Relationship Knowledge Graph (CR-KG)}} to represent data operational dependencies. It uses a multi-LLM ensemble with majority voting to propose candidate relationships from column metadata, validates these relationships against real data to remove hallucinated or unsupported edges, and then uses the validated CR-KG to guide generation. Specifically, TabKG compresses the original table into independent columns, generates these columns using a latent diffusion model, and deterministically reconstructs dependent columns according to the validated relationships, enforcing logical consistency by construction with respect to the discovered operational rules.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TabKG框架，结合知识图谱与LLM推理，生成逻辑一致的合成供应链表格数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 供应链分析面临数据稀缺和隐私问题，合成数据有潜力但现有生成模型仅关注统计分布，忽视运营逻辑（如时序、数学依赖等），导致生成记录虽统计真实但违反运营约束，无法有效支持模拟和决策。
light_analysis.method: TabKG构建列关系知识图谱(CR-KG)表示运营依赖；使用多LLM集成与多数投票从列元数据提出候选关系，经真实数据验证去除幻觉边；然后压缩表格为独立列，用潜在扩散模型生成，再根据验证的CR-KG确定性重构依赖列，强制逻辑一致性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称框架通过构造强制逻辑一致性，生成遵守发现运营规则的合成数据，有望在约束违反率上优于现有表格生成模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabKG通过知识图谱与LLM推理生成逻辑一致的合成供应链数据，增强了数据对运营模拟的支持，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂依赖或跨领域数据生成。

title: Innovation: An Almost Characterization of Hallucination
abstract: Hallucination is a central limitation of large language models (LLMs), and substantial effort has been devoted to understanding and mitigating it. Towards this, Kalai and Vempala (STOC 2024) introduced a probabilistic framework formalizing calibration and hallucination, and showed that, with high probability, calibrated LLMs hallucinate roughly at the rate of the "missing mass", a measure of how incomplete the training data is relative to its source. This raises two fundamental questions: (i) what property of a calibrated LLM makes hallucinations unavoidable? and (ii) can hallucinations be avoided by giving up calibration? We answer these questions by introducing a simpler property we call innovation that measures the tendency of a model to produce outputs outside the training data. We show that innovation is implied by the condition for hallucination identified by Kalai and Vempala, and, further, that it is an almost characterization of hallucination: hallucination implies innovation, and conversely, innovation implies hallucination with high probability. We also provide lower bounds on the hallucination rate based on the "innovation rate", and by relating innovation rate back to missing mass, we obtain new hallucination rate lower bounds based on missing mass that extend the results of Kalai and Vempala.

light_analysis.overview: 引入创新属性，证明其与LLM幻觉的几乎等价关系，并给出基于缺失质量和创新率的幻觉率下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型中的幻觉是其核心局限，已有研究将校准和幻觉形式化，表明校准的LLM幻觉率近似等于“缺失质量”，从而引发两个问题：是什么使幻觉不可避免？放弃校准能否避免幻觉？本文旨在回答这些问题，通过提出更简单的创新属性来刻画幻觉，并解释其必然性。
light_analysis.method: 提出“创新”属性，衡量模型产生训练数据之外输出的倾向。证明创新由Kalai和Vempala识别的幻觉条件蕴含，且创新与幻觉几乎等价：幻觉蕴含创新，反之创新以高概率蕴含幻觉。还基于创新率给出了幻觉率下界，并通过关联创新率与缺失质量，扩展了先前基于缺失质量的幻觉率下界。理论证明采用概率框架。
light_analysis.result: 证明了创新与幻觉的几乎等价关系：如果模型是校准的，则其幻觉率大致等于缺失质量；新结果表明创新率可直接给出幻觉率下界，且通过连接创新率与缺失质量，获得了比Kalai和Vempala更广泛的结果（即扩展了其定理）。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但提供了理论保障。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过提出创新属性，给出了幻觉的几乎刻画，加深了对LLM幻觉本质的理解。理论结果有助于解释为何幻觉不可避免，并提供了新的下界。未来可探索如何控制创新率以减轻幻觉，为构建更可靠的LLM提供指导。

title: PATE-TabTransGAN: Differentially Private Synthetic Tabular Data Generation via Transformer-Based Student Discrimination
abstract: Generating high-fidelity synthetic tabular data under formal differential privacy guarantees remains an open challenge. Methods that provide strong theoretical protection typically sacrifice the modeling of inter-feature dependencies required for realistic synthesis, while architectures that excel at capturing complex column relationships offer only empirical privacy guarantees. We present PATE-TabTransGAN, a generative framework that integrates the Private Aggregation of Teacher Ensembles (PATE) mechanism with a Transformer-based student discriminator to jointly address both requirements, and employs a GNMax RDP accountant for numerically stable privacy accounting. An ensemble of Logistic Regression teachers trained on disjoint partitions supervise the student via noisy-aggregated labels, and a residual generator is optimized against this differentially private student, inheriting formal (ε, δ)-DP guarantees by post-processing. PATE-TabTransGAN was compared with PATE-GAN, DP-GAN, and DP-CTGAN, considered state-of-the-art in differentially private tabular synthesis. Experiments conducted on four tabular benchmarks (Adult, Breast, Cardio, Cervical) confirmed the high quality of the proposed method: PATE-TabTransGAN attains the best or tied-best AUROC on all four datasets. On AUCPR it matches the strongest baseline on Cardio, leads on Cervical, and trails on Breast; on Adult, we demonstrate that AUCPR is highly sensitive to positive-class convention, and that the observed gap is consistent with a convention difference between evaluation pipelines rather than a synthesis deficit.
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Submitted for publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出PATE-TabTransGAN，融合PATE机制与Transformer判别器，实现差分隐私下的高质量表格数据生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 在差分隐私条件下生成高保真合成表格数据仍具挑战：现有方法要么因强理论保护而牺牲特征依赖建模，要么虽能捕捉复杂列关系但仅提供经验隐私保证。PATE-TabTransGAN旨在同时满足严格隐私保护和特征依赖建模需求。
light_analysis.method: 框架整合PATE机制与基于Transformer的学生判别器，采用GNMax RDP会计实现数值稳定隐私核算。逻辑回归教师集成在不相交分区上训练，通过噪声聚合标签监督学生；残差生成器针对该差分隐私学生优化，利用后处理继承形式化(ε,δ)-DP保证。
light_analysis.result: 在Adult、Breast、Cardio、Cervical四个表格基准上，PATE-TabTransGAN在所有数据集上取得最佳或并列最佳AUROC；AUCPR方面，在Cardio上匹配最强基线，在Cervical上领先，在Breast上稍逊，并指出AUCPR对正类约定敏感，观察到差距源于评估管道差异而非合成缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: PATE-TabTransGAN在差分隐私表格数据生成中实现了高保真合成，平衡了隐私保护与特征建模。实验验证其AUROC性能领先，AUCPR分析揭示了评估细节的重要性。未来可探索更高效教师集成或扩展至其他数据类型。

title: Psychological Constructs in Shared Semantic Space
abstract: Psychological constructs are often measured in separate instruments, datasets, and research traditions, which makes direct comparison difficult. This paper proposes a framework for making such constructs semantically commensurate by representing and comparing them as directions in a shared word-embedding space. Using Supervised Semantic Differential, we estimate construct-specific semantic gradients from text-outcome associations and project them onto theoretically motivated reference axes. As an initial test case, we use Valence, Arousal, and Dominance (VAD) as an affective coordinate system. First, we recover interpretable VAD directions from English word-level affective norms. Second, we project semantic gradients for 27 GoEmotions categories into this space and recover the expected organization of emotions, especially along valence and arousal. Third, we apply the same procedure to Big Five personality domains and facets derived from IPIP-NEO-300 item-factor associations. Domain-level placements are broadly coherent, while facet-level results are more exploratory because they rely on sparse questionnaire text. The results suggest that embedding spaces can support construct-level comparison across otherwise incommensurable psychological measurements, provided that semantic placements are assessed for stability and interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将心理构念表示为共享词嵌入空间中方向的方法，实现跨测量工具的直接比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理构念通常在不同的仪器、数据集和研究传统中测量，导致直接比较困难。现有方法缺乏统一的语义框架，无法有效整合来自不同研究的结果。该研究旨在通过共享语义空间解决这一难题，使心理测量在构念层面具有可比性，从而促进跨领域研究和理论整合。
light_analysis.method: 采用监督语义微分（Supervised Semantic Differential）从文本-结果关联中估计构念特定的语义梯度，并将其投影到理论上驱动的参考轴上。以情感维度（Valence, Arousal, Dominance）作为坐标系统，先恢复英语单词情感规范中的VAD方向，再将27个GoEmotions类别的语义梯度投影到该空间，并应用于Big Five人格领域和子维度（来自IPIP-NEO-300项目-因子关联）。
light_analysis.result: 成功恢复可解释的VAD方向；27个GoEmotions类别的语义梯度在情感空间中的投影组织符合预期，尤其在效价和唤醒维度上。Big Five人格领域的定位大体一致，但子维度的结果更具探索性，因依赖于稀疏问卷文本。结果表明嵌入空间可支持构念级比较，但需评估语义位置的稳定性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架使心理构念在共享语义空间中成为可比较的方向，克服了传统测量工具间的不可通约性。具有理论意义（整合情感与人格研究）和实践价值（跨数据集的构念对齐）。未来需改进子维度估计的稳定性，并扩展到更多构念和语言。

title: Latent Recurrent Transformer: Architecture Exploration, Training Strategies, and Scaling Behavior
abstract: We study Latent Recurrent Transformer (LRT), a lightweight augmentation of autoregressive transformers that reuses a high-level source-layer hidden state from the previous token as recurrent memory for the next token. Because this source state is already computed during ordinary decoding, LRT adds a cross-layer recurrent latent pathway across positions without inserting pause tokens or extra depth loops, and the standard attention mechanism and KV-cache interface are preserved. To pretrain this recurrence at scale without sequentially unrolling the transformer, we introduce interleaved parallel training: a single full-sequence initialization forward pass builds a shared buffer; then disjoint position subsets are refined in parallel and written back, so that all tokens receive recurrent-memory-aware supervision at roughly 2 times baseline compute. Across nanochat style backbones and a wide range of tokens-per-parameter budgets, LRT improves both language-modeling loss and in-context learning under matched effective compute while adding as little as 0.3% parameters.
