light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Recurrent Transformer，通过复用前token隐藏状态作为循环记忆，以轻量级方式增强自回归Transformer，并引入交错并行训练实现高效预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归Transformer缺乏有效的循环记忆机制，通常需要插入停顿标记或增加深度循环，导致计算开销和结构复杂。LRT旨在不改变标准注意力与KV缓存接口的前提下，引入跨层循环潜在路径，通过重用已计算的隐藏状态实现记忆传递，从而提升建模能力而几乎不增加参数。
light_analysis.method: LRT复用前一个token的源层隐藏状态作为当前token的循环记忆，形成跨层循环潜在连接。为高效预训练，提出交错并行训练：先执行全序列前向初始化共享缓冲区，再并行优化不相交位置子集并写回，使所有位置获得循环记忆监督，计算量约为基线2倍。该方法与标准Transformer解码兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在多个NanoChat风格骨干网络及不同token/参数预算下，LRT在匹配有效计算时，同时降低了语言建模损失并提升了上下文学习能力。参数仅增加0.3%，而性能改善显著，验证了方法的有效性和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LRT以极小参数代价为自回归Transformer引入跨位置循环记忆，通过创新的交错并行训练实现可扩展预训练。实验表明其在语言建模和上下文学习上均优于基线，为改进Transformer架构提供了轻量级新思路，未来可探索更复杂的循环路径或更大规模应用。

title: What Makes Chain-of-Thought Work at Probe Time? Local Co-occurrence Rather Than Global Derivation
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting reliably improves language-model accuracy, but which properties of a rationale text drive the improvement is poorly understood. Prior work has largely studied generation-time behavior. We instead ask a probe-time question: given a fixed rationale in context, what in that text changes the answer? We identify two complementary sources of the gain. First, even a globally word-shuffled rationale substantially outperforms the no-rationale baseline, indicating a strong lexical activation effect. More importantly, the additional gain from structured text appears to arise less from sentence-level logical ordering and more from short-range token adjacency. Preserving contiguous windows of just $n^\star{=}2$--$3$ tokens recovers most of the remaining gain toward full CoT performance. Supporting experiments rule out copying of explicit answer declarations or answer values, as well as full grammatical realization, as primary drivers. Further generalization experiments show that the qualitative pattern remains stable across multiple model families, parameter scales, and datasets. These results support a local co-occurrence activation (LCA) account of probe-time CoT, in which the observed gains appear to arise primarily from lexical activation and short-range token co-occurrence rather than sentence-level logical derivation.

light_analysis.overview: 探究思维链提示在探测时间的作用机制，发现局部共现激活而非全局逻辑推导是主要驱动力。
light_analysis.motivation: 思维链(CoT)提示能可靠提升语言模型准确性，但推理文本中哪些属性驱动了改进尚不明确。先前工作主要研究生成时间行为，本文从探测时间角度提问：给定固定推理文本，其中的什么内容改变了答案？理解这一点对于揭示CoT的工作原理至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过设计探测时间实验，固定推理文本在上下文中，采用全局词序打乱、保留短距离token共现等方法分析增益来源。发现全局打乱词序的推理文本仍显著优于无基线，表明词汇激活效应；结构化文本的额外增益主要来自短距离token邻接，保留2-3个token窗口即可恢复大部分CoT性能。排除了明确答案声明或答案值复制及语法实现作为主要因素。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示全局词序打乱的推理文本大幅超越无推理基线，而保留2-3个token连续窗口几乎达到完整CoT性能。支持实验排除复制显式答案声明或值、以及完整语法实现作为主因。跨多个模型家族、参数规模和数据集，定性模式保持一致，验证了结果的稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出局部共现激活(LCA)解释，认为CoT在探测时间的增益主要源于词汇激活和短距离token共现，而非句子级逻辑推导。这为理解CoT机制提供了新视角，有助于设计更高效的提示方法。未来可探索更长距离依赖或不同任务的适用性。

title: Pretrained Approximators for Low-Thrust Trajectory Cost and Reachability
abstract: Low-thrust trajectory design relies heavily on repeated evaluations of fuel consumption and transfer feasibility, which require expensive optimal control solutions. In this work, we show these quantities can be accurately approximated by machine learning surrogates, enabling fast and scalable evaluation across a wide range of scenarios. By increasing both dataset size and model capacity, we observe that low-thrust trajectory optimization follows a scaling law, with performance improving linearly with the logarithm of training data and network parameters, and no evidence of saturation within the explored regime. Guided by this observation, we construct a large-scale dataset using the proposed homotopy-ray strategy tailored to mission design requirements. A key is the introduction of a self-similar transformation, which allows generalization across semi-major axes, inclinations, and central bodies avoiding retraining. As a result, the same neural approximator can be applied to diverse orbital environments and mission classes. The proposed models accurately predict optimal fuel consumption and minimum transfer time for single- and multi-revolution transfers. Their performance and generalization are demonstrated on a public dataset, a multi-asteroid flyby problem from the Global Trajectory Optimization Competition, and an asteroid rendezvous mission design. The models and datasets are released as open-source to support the space community.
comment: Submitted to the Journal of Guidance, Navigation and Control

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出用预训练神经网络近似低推力轨迹的燃料消耗和可达性，通过自相似变换实现跨任务泛化，并验证了缩放定律。
light_analysis.motivation: 低推力轨迹设计需要反复评估燃料消耗和转移可行性，依赖昂贵的最优控制求解。现有方法计算成本高，难以在大量场景下快速评估。本研究旨在利用机器学习代理实现快速、可扩展的近似，以满足任务设计中多场景评估的需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用机器学习代理，通过同伦-射线策略构建大规模数据集，引入自相似变换使模型能泛化到不同半长轴、倾角和中心天体，避免重新训练。模型预测最优燃料消耗和最小转移时间，数据集和模型均开源。
light_analysis.result: 在公开数据集、多小行星飞越问题及小行星交会任务中，模型准确预测了燃料消耗和转移时间。性能随数据和模型容量增加线性提升（对数尺度），未出现饱和，验证了缩放定律。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了低推力轨迹优化中的缩放定律，提出的预训练近似器可高效泛化于多种轨道环境和任务类别。开源模型和数据集有助于空间社区快速设计低推力任务，未来可扩展至更复杂的轨道机动。

title: Composition Collapse: Stable Factual Knowledge Does Not Imply Compositional Reasoning
abstract: Post-training is routinely evaluated through aggregate benchmark scores that treat multi-hop reasoning as a single capability -- as if a model that answers more questions correctly must be better at assembling facts. We show that this assumption can be misleading: recipes with statistically indistinguishable atomic knowledge produce composition behaviour separated by over 40 percentage points, a phenomenon we call composition collapse: the systematic failure to assemble stably-known facts into chains, invisible to aggregate metrics. We introduce a double-gate protocol that changes the estimand from an aggregate compositionality gap to residual composition failure conditioned on stable atomic access, decomposing post-training gains into three independent channels: atomic stability, residual composition, and critical depth. On a benchmark of temporal factual chains spanning depths 2--11 across four post-training recipes, this decomposition reveals that post-training objectives shift composition capability in directions that aggregate metrics mask, and suggests that claims about multi-hop reasoning improvement should be accompanied by atomic-gate-controlled composition metrics. Diagnostic probes further show that a substantial share of measured composition failure reflects generation-time computation constraints rather than permanent inability to compose.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示后训练中聚合指标掩盖的组合崩溃现象，并提出双门协议分解组合失败原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练评估使用聚合基准分数，将多跳推理视为单一能力，假设回答更多问题即组合更好。但该假设误导：原子知识统计无差异的模型，组合行为差距超40个百分点，即组合崩溃——稳定事实无法组装成链，聚合指标不可见。因此需新评估方法分解后训练收益。
light_analysis.method: 提出双门协议（double-gate protocol），将评估从聚合组合性差距变为基于稳定原子访问的残余组合失败，分解后训练增益为三个独立通道：原子稳定性、残余组合、关键深度。在时间事实链基准（深度2-11）上评估四种后训练配方。
light_analysis.result: 分解显示后训练目标以聚合指标掩盖的方式改变组合能力。诊断探针表明大部分组合失败源于生成时计算约束而非永久无能。具体数据：原子知识统计无差异时，组合行为差距超40个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了聚合指标误导性，提出原子门控组合指标用于多跳推理评估。贡献在于识别组合崩溃现象并提供分解框架。学术价值：改进后训练评估；实际应用：指导模型组合推理能力提升。局限性：可能依赖特定基准，未来方向扩展更多场景。

title: SeDT: Sentence-Transformer Decision-Transformer Conditioning for Multi-Turn Conversation Reliability
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve impressive performance when a task is fully specified in a single turn, yet the same models lose up to 39% of that performance when the identical task is revealed incrementally across multiple turns, a phenomenon documented at scale as Lost in Conversation. Crucially, this collapse is almost entirely a reliability failure; the best case, the aptitude only falls 16%, while the unreliability more than doubles (+112%). We argue that the root cause is structural, a flat conversation history assigns equal implicit weight to every prior turn, giving the model no signal to distinguish a critical constraint from incidental dialog. We present SeDT Sentence-transformer Decision-Transformer, a training-free inference-time method that resolves this by importing return-to-go conditioning from offline reinforcement learning. SeDT annotates each conversation shard with a cumulative relevance score derived from three complementary semantic, lexical, and positional signals and presents the full annotated history to the model at the final turn, without weight changes, without training data, and without discarding context. Evaluated on the Lost-in-Conversation benchmark in three LLMs and three generation tasks, SeDT outperforms the sharded baseline in all nine model-task combinations, with gains up to +37.7% in mean performance P and simultaneous reductions in unreliability in seven of the nine combinations. In short, telling the model which past turns matter is sufficient to substantially recover the performance lost in conversation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SeDT，一种无需训练的推理时方法，通过对话历史相关性标注恢复多轮对话中丢失的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在多轮对话中性能下降高达39%，而单轮任务表现良好。此问题本质是可靠性失败，原因在于平展的对话历史给所有先前轮次赋予相同权重，模型无法区分关键约束与无关对话。现有方法缺乏有效机制来标识重要历史信息。
light_analysis.method: SeDT从离线强化学习引入return-to-go条件，为每个对话片段计算累积相关性分数，融合语义（句嵌入）、词汇（词重叠）和位置（轮次距离）三个信号。在最终轮次前将完整标注历史提供给模型，无需修改权重、无需训练数据、不丢弃上下文。
light_analysis.result: 在Lost-in-Conversation基准上，使用三个LLM和三个生成任务，SeDT在所有9个模型-任务组合中均优于分片基线，平均性能P提升最高达37.7%，并在7个组合中同时降低不可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SeDT通过明确告知模型哪些过去轮次重要，显著恢复对话中丢失的性能。该方法无训练、推理时可用，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的相关性信号或扩展到更长的对话场景。

title: EmoDistill: Offline Emotion Skill Distillation for Language Model Agents in Adversarial Negotiation
abstract: Post-trained LLMs are often optimized to align responses with human preferences, making them safe, polite, and conversationally appropriate. In adversarial negotiation, however, this alignment can become a vulnerability: emotionally framed language may steer agents toward the counterparty's interests. Using GoEmotions-based affective prompting, we show that emotion substantially shifts negotiation outcomes, suggesting that emotion is a strategic action channel rather than a surface style. Thus, we introduce \textbf{EmoDistill}, an offline framework for distilling emotional negotiation skills into language model agents. EmoDistill decomposes emotional strategy into emotion selection and emotion expression: an Implicit Q-Learning (IQL) selector learns \emph{which} emotion to express, while a Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based policy learns \emph{how} to express it through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Judge Policy Optimization (JPO). Across four emotion-sensitive, high-stakes negotiation domains, SLM policies trained under the EmoDistill framework achieve the highest utility, outperforming vanilla SLM/LLM baselines and IQL-only emotion selection. Ablations show that emotion conditioning is essential, and transfer studies demonstrate generalization across domains, unseen counterparties, and trained-vs-trained tournaments. Overall, EmoDistill learns skills from offline agent-to-agent interactions, avoiding costly online negotiation during training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EmoDistill框架，将情感谈判技能离线蒸馏到语言模型代理中，提升对抗性谈判的效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLMs被优化为安全礼貌的响应，但在对抗性谈判中，情感性语言可能使代理偏离自身利益。现有方法忽略情感作为战略行动通道的重要性，需要一种系统性地利用情感技能的方法。
light_analysis.method: EmoDistill将情感策略分解为情感选择和情感表达。使用隐式Q学习（IQL）选择器学习表达何种情感，通过LoRA和SFT、JPO训练策略网络学习如何表达。框架从离线代理交互中学习，避免在线训练成本。
light_analysis.result: 在四个情感敏感的高风险谈判领域，SLM策略在EmoDistill框架下实现最高效用，优于普通SLM/LLM基线和仅IQL情感选择。消融实验证明情感条件的重要性，迁移研究表明跨域、未见对手和训练vs训练锦标赛的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: EmoDistill成功从离线交互中学习情感谈判技能，提升代理在对抗性谈判中的效用。其离线训练方式避免了昂贵的在线交互，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多谈判场景或结合其他策略。

title: Ratio-Variance Regularized Policy Optimization
abstract: Standard on-policy reinforcement learning relies on heuristic clipping to enforce trust regions, but this mechanism imposes a severe cost by indiscriminately truncating high-return yet high-divergence updates. We demonstrate that explicitly constraining the policy ratio variance provides a principled local approximation to trust-region constraints, eliminating the need for binary hard clipping. By acting as a distributional ``soft brake'', this approach preserves critical gradient signals from novel discoveries while naturally down-weighting and enabling the reuse of stale, off-policy data. We introduce ${\bf R}^2{\bf VPO}$ (Ratio-Variance Regularized Policy Optimization), which implements this constraint via a primal-dual optimization framework. Extensive evaluations across $7$ LLM scales, spanning both fast and slow reasoning paradigms, and $10$ robotic control tasks demonstrate the generality of the proposed approach. R$^2$VPO achieves substantial performance gains on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, with particularly pronounced improvements on smaller models, while significantly improving sample efficiency. Furthermore, it consistently outperforms PPO baselines in continuous control domains, particularly in sparse-reward and dynamic environments. Together, these findings establish ratio-variance regularization as a principled foundation for stable and data-efficient policy optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ratio-Variance Regularized Policy Optimization (R²VPO)，通过约束策略比率方差替代启发式裁剪，实现稳定且数据高效的策略优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准on-policy强化学习依赖启发式裁剪来强制信任域，但这种方法会无差别地截断高回报但高分歧的更新，导致关键梯度信号丢失。现有方法难以在保留有用信息的同时避免不稳定更新，限制了策略优化的性能和样本效率。
light_analysis.method: R²VPO通过显式约束策略比率方差来局部近似信任域约束，作为一种分布式的“软刹车”，保留新发现的梯度信号并抑制陈旧数据。该方法采用原-对偶优化框架实现，避免了硬裁剪。在7种LLM规模（包括快慢推理）和10种机器人控制任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准上，R²VPO实现显著性能提升，尤其在小模型上效果突出，并大幅提高样本效率。在连续控制任务中持续优于PPO基线，特别是在稀疏奖励和动态环境中表现更优。实验覆盖多种任务类型，证明了方法的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ratio-Variance正则化为稳定且数据高效的策略优化提供了理论基础。该方法在LLM和机器人控制领域均取得优异表现，具有广泛的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索其在更复杂环境中的扩展及与其他正则化技术的结合。

title: LiveK12Bench: Have Large Multimodal Models Truly Conquered High School-level Examinations?
abstract: Advanced Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in K-12 reasoning tasks, exhibiting great promise as intelligent tutors. Realizing this potential requires models to navigate real-world examinations effectively, yet most existing benchmarks fail to capture the complexity of authentic testing environments. Specifically, most datasets are static, prone to data contamination, and are often confined to restricted modalities, disciplines, and evaluation criteria. To address these issues, we introduce LiveK12Bench, a dynamic, holistic, multi-disciplinary benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning abilities of LMMs in realistic examination scenarios. LiveK12Bench comprises 2K+ verified questions spanning Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology, sourced from the latest real-world exam papers and designed to grow over time. Our framework features several core innovations: 1) featuring an automated pipeline that continuously ingests and parses the latest examination papers to mitigate data leakage; and 2) proposing a novel `Mock Exam' evaluation scheme, which assesses the ability to complete end-to-end exams autonomously with accurate and efficient reasoning paths. Extensive experiments on 12 LMMs reveal that advanced models suffer substantial performance degradation under exam-realistic constraints: GPT-5's score drops from 79 to 53 (out of 100) when process rigor and efficiency are jointly evaluated. Our findings expose critical vulnerabilities, such as sensitivity to complex visual layouts, highlighting the gap between idealized reasoning capabilities and true educational readiness. Both code and dataset are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiveK12Bench，一个动态、多学科基准，揭示大型多模态模型在真实高中考试场景中的性能退化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准静态、易受数据污染，且局限于有限模态和学科，无法反映真实考试的复杂性。评估模型在教育场景的实用能力至关重要，但缺乏动态、全面的基准。
light_analysis.method: LiveK12Bench包含2000+道最新真实考试题（数理化生），采用自动化流水线持续更新防数据泄露，提出'模拟考试'评估方案，联合评估推理完整性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 对12个LMMs实验，GPT-5在联合评估下从79分降至53分，模型对复杂视觉布局敏感，揭示理想能力与教育就绪度之间的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准暴露了LMMs在真实考试约束下的脆弱性，推动模型向实用教育智能体发展。代码与数据公开，未来可扩展更多学科和评估维度。

title: The Attribution Blind Spot: Detecting When Language Models Rely on Memory Rather Than Retrieved Context
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation promises to ground language model outputs in external evidence, yet the field has no reliable way to verify whether retrieved context actually governs generation -- a prerequisite for any high-stakes deployment. The standard assumption, that context-consistent output implies context-governed output, breaks when the retrieved document overlaps with the model's pretraining data: the model can produce faithful-looking text entirely from parametric memory, and both pathways yield indistinguishable output. We name this failure the attribution blind spot and introduce Computational Reality Monitoring (CRM) to address it. CRM operationalizes a principle adapted from cognitive science's reality monitoring framework: comparing internal representations with and without context reveals membership-conditioned representational divergence that output-level monitors systematically miss. CRM does not certify which source an individual generation used; it detects whether pretraining exposure leaves a measurable internal trajectory signature, establishing a necessary substrate for source attribution. Across nine model variants spanning three families, this divergence concentrates in architecture-specific layer patterns, receives converging support from block-level noise intervention, and generalizes across tasks and datasets while collapsing on domain-confounded benchmarks. The attribution blind spot is measurable and partially addressable: internal representations carry a diagnostic signal invisible at the output level, establishing a foundation for systems whose internal awareness of evidence provenance governs their external behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出归因盲点问题并引入计算现实监控（CRM）方法，通过内部表示差异检测语言模型是否依赖记忆而非检索上下文。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成旨在将模型输出锚定于外部证据，但缺乏可靠方法验证输出是否真正受上下文控制。当检索文档与预训练数据重叠时，模型可能从参数记忆生成忠实文本，两种途径输出不可区分，形成归因盲点。这在高风险部署中至关重要，现有输出级监控无法识别该问题。
light_analysis.method: CRM借鉴认知科学中的现实监控框架，通过比较有/无上下文时模型内部表示的差异，检测预训练暴露留下的内部轨迹。该方法不指定单个生成来源，而是识别表示差异是否可测量。实验涵盖9个模型变体（3个系列），发现差异集中在特定架构层，通过块级噪声干预得到支持，并在任务和数据集上泛化。
light_analysis.result: CRM在多个模型上有效检测归因盲点：表示差异集中在架构特定层模式，获得块级噪声干预的收敛支持，并跨任务和数据集泛化，但在领域混淆基准上失效。结果表明内部表示携带输出级不可见的诊断信号，部分解决了归因盲点的可测量性问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了归因盲点现象，证明其可测量且部分可处理，内部表示信号为证据来源感知系统奠定了基础。学术上挑战了上下文一致性等同上下文控制的假设，实际价值在于提升高可靠性应用中的可信度。未来工作可探索更细粒度的来源归因和跨模型适应性。

title: Towards Generalization-Oriented Models for Vehicle Routing Problems with Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: In recent years, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has achieved substantial progress on Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs). However, existing DRL-based methods are typically trained on instances generated from a uniform distribution, which limits their performance under real-world distribution shifts. In this paper, we aim to develop a generalization-oriented model that partitions the policy network into multiple modules and adaptively recombines modules to form specific policies during inference. Specifically, we propose Residual Refined Experts with Instance-level Gating (R2E-IG) to improve cross-distribution generalization. Our contributions are threefold: (1) We introduce a Residual Refined Expert (R2E) architecture that enhance expert expressiveness via residual refinement; (2) We design an instance-level gating mechanism that learns distribution-aware instance representations and routes inputs to suitable modules; (3) We propose a mixed-distribution training mechanism equipped with Dynamic Weight Adaption (DWA), which dynamically reweights training data from different distributions to emphasize more informative ones. Extensive experiments show that R2E-IG achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art baselines on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution instances across synthetic and benchmark datasets. Moreover, R2E-IG is generic and can be easily integrated into existing DRL-based methods to further improve performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出R2E-IG模型，通过残差精炼专家和实例级门控机制提升VRP求解的跨分布泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有DRL方法基于均匀分布实例训练，难以应对实际VRP中的分布偏移，导致泛化性能差。需设计能自适应重组模块的策略网络，以提升在多种分布下的表现。
light_analysis.method: 提出R2E-IG架构：1）残差精炼专家（R2E）通过残差连接增强模块表达能力；2）实例级门控机制学习分布感知的实例表示并动态路由至合适专家；3）混合分布训练结合动态权重自适应（DWA）强调信息量大的训练数据。该方法可集成至现有DRL框架。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和基准数据集上，R2E-IG在分布内和分布外实例上均取得与最先进基线竞争的性能（摘要未明确具体数值）。集成至现有DRL方法后可进一步提升效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: R2E-IG有效解决了VRP的跨分布泛化问题，通过模块化设计与自适应路由提升灵活性。未来可探索更复杂的专家组合及门控机制，并扩展至其他组合优化问题。

title: Cesarean Scar Defect Segmentation in Transvaginal Ultrasound Images: a Dataset and Benchmark
abstract: Cesarean Scar Defect (CSD) is one of the most prevalent complications following cesarean delivery. Transvaginal ultrasonography is widely used for primary CSD screening. Accurate determination of CSD outline and dimensions is crucial for treatment. However, CSDs are frequently overlooked by sonographers due to small size and irregular morphology, suboptimal image quality, and limited clinical awareness in resource-constrained settings. Despite artificial intelligence advances in medical imaging, no public dataset exists for transvaginal ultrasound CSD segmentation. To address this gap, we present a comprehensive CSD dataset comprising 1,111 images and 16 videos, yielding 501 positive samples with confirmed CSD and precise pixel-level manual annotations. Annotations are performed following standardized clinical guidelines through collaboration between experienced sonographers and trained PhD students. This work provides high-quality benchmark resources for advancing medical image segmentation algorithms and promoting clinical innovation. Ultimately, improved CSD diagnosis and subsequent treatment strategies can enhance the quality of life in women of reproductive age, representing significant value for both medical research and clinical practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个经阴道超声CSD分割数据集和基准，含1111张图像和16个视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 剖宫产疤痕缺损是常见并发症，超声筛查依赖准确分割，但因病灶小、形态不规则、图像质量差及临床意识不足而常被忽视。现有AI方法因缺乏公共数据集难以发展，该研究填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 收集1111张图像和16个视频，标注501个阳性样本，由经验丰富的超声医师与博士生按临床指南进行像素级标注，提供高质量基准资源，支持分割算法开发与评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但指出该数据集和基准可推动医学图像分割算法进步，促进临床创新，有望改善CSD诊断与治疗。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集为CSD分割提供标准基准，助力算法开发，提升诊断准确性，进而改善育龄女性生活质量，具有重要医学研究与临床价值。未来可扩展数据集并探索更先进的模型。

title: Beyond a Single Direction: Chain-of-Thought Disrupts Simple Steering of Refusal
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) generate chain-of-thought (CoT) traces before producing final outputs, introducing a dynamic internal state that may complicate control mechanisms such as refusal. Unlike instruction-tuned LLMs, where refusal is mediated by a single directional subspace, refusal in large reasoning models (LRMs) additionally depends on the CoT. In DeepSeek-R1-Distill-LLaMA-8B, activation steering reverses refusal in only 39% of cases when the CoT is kept fixed, but removing the CoT entirely increases this to 70%, indicating that the CoT actively reinforces refusal. In a two-stage intervention where the model regenerates its CoT under activation steering, refusal is reversed in 94% of cases, while the resulting CoT alone retains 48% of this effect even after steering is removed. This suggests that the CoT can carry and reconstruct the compliance signal independently. These findings indicate that refusal in LRMs is jointly encoded in residual stream activations and CoT. This joint activation makes LRM more robust against activation-level interventions alone, but exposes CoT to a possible alternative surface attack.

light_analysis.overview: 发现链式思维（CoT）使大型推理模型的拒绝机制对激活干预更具鲁棒性，但增加了CoT攻击风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统指令微调LLM的拒绝行为可通过单一方向子空间控制，但大型推理模型（LRM）在输出前生成链式思维（CoT），引入动态内部状态。现有方法未能考虑CoT对拒绝机制的影响，导致控制手段失效。研究旨在揭示CoT如何影响LRM的拒绝行为，并评估不同干预策略的效果。
light_analysis.method: 以DeepSeek-R1-Distill-LLaMA-8B为模型，实施三种激活干预实验：1) 固定CoT时施加激活干预；2) 完全移除CoT；3) 两阶段干预（激活干预后强制模型重新生成CoT）。通过比较拒绝反转率，分析CoT对拒绝编码的贡献。
light_analysis.result: 固定CoT时拒绝反转仅39%；移除CoT后反转率升至70%；两阶段干预下反转率达94%。且仅使用重新生成的CoT（移除激活干预）仍保留48%效果，表明CoT可独立携带并重建顺从信号。
light_analysis.conclusion: LRM的拒绝由残差流激活与CoT共同编码，单一激活干预难以完全逆转，体现了更高鲁棒性。但CoT本身成为新攻击表面，可能被利用以传递对抗信号。未来需探索针对CoT的安全性防护。

title: Quality Without Usefulness: LLM-Generated XAI Narratives as Trust Heuristics Rather Than Decision Aids
abstract: Prior work shows that Large Language Models (LLMs) can transform Explainable AI (XAI) outputs into Natural Language Explanations (NLEs) that score highly on quality metrics such as plausibility, coherence, and comprehensibility. But does explanation quality translate to practical usefulness? We investigate this question in a time-series energy forecasting domain through five controlled experiments (2,730 judgments across 60 test instances), each operationalising a distinct facet of usefulness studied in the XAI literature. Holding NLE quality constant at the high levels established by a prior factorial study, we find that NLEs do not improve task accuracy on any of the five tasks, while inflating self-reported confidence. A placebic control shows that this confidence boost is driven by text presence rather than content. In an out-of-distribution detection task, NLEs reduce the LLM judge's ability to flag unreliable predictions, providing false reassurance that masks model failure. We characterise these findings as the Quality-Usefulness Gap and argue that evaluation of the XAI-to-NLE pipeline must extend beyond text-quality metrics to downstream task performance.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM生成的XAI叙事虽质量高但缺乏实际有用性，存在质量-有用性差距。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM能将XAI输出转化为高质量自然语言解释，但高质量是否意味着实际有用性未知。现有评估仅关注文本质量（如合理性、连贯性），忽视了对下游任务决策的帮助。本研究通过多个受控实验，旨在验证NLE在时间序列预测中的实际效用。
light_analysis.method: 在时间序列能量预测领域设计五个受控实验（2730个判断，60个测试实例），每个实验考察XAI有用性的不同方面。保持NLE质量恒定（基于先前研究的高质量水平），评估任务准确率和自信心，并设置安慰剂对照（无意义文本）。额外测试分布外检测中NLE对LLM判断的影响。
light_analysis.result: 高质量NLE未提升任何五项任务的准确率，但显著提高了自我报告的信心；安慰剂对照表明信心提升源于文本存在而非内容。在分布外检测中，NLE降低了LLM识别不可靠预测的能力，造成虚假安慰。
light_analysis.conclusion: 存在质量-有用性差距：LLM生成的高质量XAI叙事可能作为信任启发而非有效决策辅助。评估XAI-to-NLE流程必须超越文本质量指标，关注实际任务性能。未来研究应注重解释的有用性验证。

title: Adversarial Training for Robust Coverage Network under Worst-case Facility Losses
abstract: The Maximal Covering Location-Interdiction Problem (MCLIP) is a classic bi-level optimization problem, which is fundamental to resilient infrastructure planning yet remains computationally intractable. Specifically, the upper level determines facility locations to maximize coverage, while the lower level executes worst-case interdiction to minimize the coverage. The strong coupling between the upper and lower levels, combined with their respective high combinatorial complexity, renders traditional methods ineffective. To bridge this gap, we propose a Dual-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (DADRL) framework based on adversarial learning, comprising a location agent corresponding to the upper level and an interdiction agent corresponding to the lower level. Our contributions are threefold: (1) The location agent is trained simultaneously against an evolving interdiction agent, making it effectively capture the dynamic competitive interplay between the upper and lower levels; (2) To fully exploit the learned capabilities of the interdiction agent, we propose a Surrogate-based Ensemble Inference Strategy that utilizes the trained interdiction agent as a high-fidelity surrogate to guide the decisions of location agent; (3) Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior computational efficiency while maintaining highly competitive solution quality compared to other baselines. Furthermore, our DADRL framework is model-agnostic to network structures, while its underlying adversarial learning paradigm demonstrates strong potential for solving other bi-level optimization problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对抗学习的双智能体深度强化学习框架，高效解决最大覆盖位置-干扰问题的双层优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统方法难以应对最大覆盖位置-干扰问题中上下层强耦合与高组合复杂度，导致计算效率低下。该问题对于弹性基础设施规划至关重要，现有方法无法有效求解，亟需新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DADRL框架，包含位置智能体（上层）和干扰智能体（下层），基于对抗学习同步训练。利用训练好的干扰智能体作为高保真替代，通过集成推理策略指导位置决策。框架与网络结构无关，可推广至其他双层优化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在获得相近解质量的同时，计算效率显著优于基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调高效竞争性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过对抗学习范式有效解决了双层优化中的动态竞争问题，为弹性基础设施规划提供高效求解途径。其模型无关特性与可迁移的对抗学习范式，为其他双层优化问题（如设施选址与干扰）提供了新思路。

title: Once-For-All: A Train-Once and Select-Anytime Framework for Multimodal Instruction Tuning
abstract: Multimodal instruction tuning is the de facto recipe for adapting vision language models (VLMs), yet instruction data are highly redundant, making data selection critical for training efficiency. Existing methods derive selection signals from a specific model or dataset, so whenever the target model or candidate pool changes, the criteria must be recomputed from scratch at substantial cost. To address this, we propose OFA, a data selection framework that trains a reusable selector once and applies it to any dataset or model without recomputation. OFA clusters multimodal instructions in a frozen CLIP space, derives pseudo labels from the cluster structure, and trains a lightweight selector for only a few epochs; samples on which this selector is least confident are selected as the most informative. Once trained, the frozen selector transfers directly across datasets and model scales. The selector is trained once on LLaVA-665K and applied both to LLaVA-665K itself and, without any retraining, to the unseen Vision-Flan-186K. Selecting only 15% of the data, OFA achieves 98.3% of full data performance across 10 downstream benchmarks; on the smaller Vision-Flan-186K, the transferred selector surpasses full data training by 10.6%, confirming that the learned signal generalizes to datasets never seen during selector training. The same selected subsets benefit VLMs at both Qwen2.5-VL-3B and LLaVA-v1.5-7B without per model recomputation, decoupling selection from the target model. These results demonstrate that a single, transferable selector provides an effective and reusable solution for efficient multimodal instruction tuning.
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. Mingkang Dong and Hongyi Cai contributed equally to this work. Muxin Pu is the corresponding author

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个可复用数据选择框架OFA，训练一次选择器即可跨数据集和模型迁移，实现高效多模态指令微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态指令微调中数据高度冗余，现有数据选择方法依赖特定模型或数据集，当目标模型或候选池变化时需重新计算，成本高昂。实际应用中需要一种可迁移、可复用的数据选择方案，降低重复计算开销。
light_analysis.method: OFA框架在冻结的CLIP空间中聚类多模态指令，从聚类结构导出伪标签，训练轻量级选择器数轮。选择器对样本的置信度越低，则样本被认为信息量越大。选择器仅在LLaVA-665K上训练一次，即可直接应用于其他数据集（如Vision-Flan-186K）和不同规模模型（如Qwen2.5-VL-3B和LLaVA-v1.5-7B），无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 仅选择15%数据，OFA在10个下游基准上达到全数据性能的98.3%；在未见过的Vision-Flan-186K上，迁移的选择器超越全数据训练10.6%。所选子集对Qwen2.5-VL-3B和LLaVA-v1.5-7B均有效，无需按模型重新计算，解耦选择与目标模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: OFA证明了单个可迁移选择器可提供高效且复用的多模态指令微调方案，显著降低数据选择成本。其泛化性允许跨数据集和模型直接应用，具有实际应用价值。未来可能探索更大规模数据或更复杂选择器架构。

title: Time Series Causal Discovery via Context-Conditioned and Causality-Augmented Pretraining
abstract: Causal discovery from time series is critical for many real-world applications, such as tracing the root causes of anomalies. Existing approaches typically rely on dataset-specific optimization, making it difficult to transfer their causal discovery capabilities to new time series governed by diverse causal mechanisms. In this paper, we propose \textbf{PTCD}, a novel \textbf{P}retraining framework for \textbf{T}ime-series \textbf{C}ausal \textbf{D}iscovery, which improves cross-task generalization through context-conditioned modeling and transferable causal augmentation. To model complex temporal causal dependencies, PTCD employs a dual-scale iterative attention mechanism to capture window-level causal relationships, and a Gaussian mixture with a context-level routing mechanism to handle heterogeneous exogenous distributions. To further address distribution shifts across causal graphs, PTCD adopts a pretraining paradigm on synthetic datasets that integrates intervention-based learning and a causal mixup strategy, promoting stable causal discovery and stronger generalization. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets demonstrate that PTCD excels in both causal discovery and root cause identification.
comment: Submitted to the 40th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2026). 27 pages

light_analysis.overview: 提出PTCD预训练框架，通过上下文条件建模和因果增强实现跨任务时间序列因果发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列因果发现方法依赖数据集特定优化，难以泛化到具有不同因果机制的新时间序列。该研究旨在解决跨任务泛化问题，因其对异常根因追踪等实际应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: PTCD采用双尺度迭代注意力机制捕获窗口级因果依赖，使用高斯混合与上下文路由处理异构外生分布。预训练阶段结合干预学习和因果混合策略，在合成数据集上提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界分布外（OOD）数据集上，PTCD在因果发现和根因识别任务中均取得优异表现，优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: PTCD通过预训练范式有效提升时间序列因果发现的跨任务泛化能力，具有重要学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的因果机制或扩展到更多实际场景。

title: Localizing Memorized Regions in Diffusion Models via Coordinate-Wise Curvature Differences
abstract: Diffusion models can unintentionally memorize training samples, raising concerns about privacy and copyright. While recent methods can detect memorization, they often rely on global or model-specific signals and provide limited insight into where memorization appears within a generated image. We provide a geometric characterization of local memorization as a coordinate-wise variance collapse. However, such collapse can also arise from intrinsic data constraints rather than overfitting. To isolate overfitting-driven memorization, we propose curvature-difference methods that subtract the curvature of an underfitted baseline, either the unconditional model or a less-trained version of itself. We further derive a score-difference proxy that provides a geometric explanation for the widely used score-difference-based detection metric. Experiments on Stable Diffusion, evaluated against ground-truth memorization masks, show that our method outperforms the prior attention-based localization method. Code is available at https://github.com/Gwangho99/mem-curv-diff.

light_analysis.overview: 通过坐标曲率差异定位扩散模型中记忆化区域的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型可能无意中记忆训练样本，引发隐私和版权问题。现有检测方法多依赖全局或模型特定信号，无法精确定位生成图像中记忆出现的位置。为此，作者提出一种基于几何特征的方法，旨在隔离过拟合驱动的记忆区域。
light_analysis.method: 提出局部记忆的几何特征——坐标方差塌缩，但该塌缩可能源于数据约束而非过拟合。通过减去欠拟合基线（无条件模型或较浅版本）的曲率，隔离过拟合驱动的记忆。进一步推导分数差代理，为已有的分数差检测指标提供几何解释。方法在Stable Diffusion上评估，使用真实记忆掩码。
light_analysis.result: 在Stable Diffusion模型上，与基于注意力的定位方法相比，所提方法在定位记忆化区域方面表现更优。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称优于先前方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了一种基于曲率差异的扩散模型记忆区域定位方法，具有几何可解释性。该方法有助于理解模型泛化与记忆的边界，可用于隐私保护和版权合规。未来可探索更高效的曲率估计或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: From Snippets to Semantics: Rethinking Evidence Granularity for Multilingual Fact Verification
abstract: Multilingual fact verification requires evidence that is both relevant and sufficiently complete for reliable factuality prediction. However, existing systems often rely on search snippets, sentence-level evidence, or locally segmented passages, which can miss decisive context and produce fragmented evidence. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEEK, a Semantic Evidence Extraction with an adaptive chunKing framework that constructs coherent evidence chunks from full fact-checking articles by identifying semantic topic transitions and preserving local verification context. The constructed chunks are encoded using a multilingual encoder and then multilingual LLMs are finetuned using LoRA adapter for veracity prediction. Experiments on X-FACT and RU22Fact show that SEEK improves macro-f1 by up to 10% over semantic chunking, 19% over sentence chunking, and 20% over search-snippet baselines. Evidence completeness and significance analyses further show that SEEK preserves richer verification context and enables more reliable multilingual fact-checking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEEK框架，通过自适应语义分块从完整文章中提取连贯证据，提升多语言事实验证的准确性和证据完整性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多语言事实验证系统依赖搜索片段、句子级证据或局部分割段落，导致证据碎片化，可能缺失决定性上下文，影响真实性预测的可靠性。该问题在多语言场景下尤为突出，因为不同语言的证据结构差异大。因此，需要一种能构建连贯、完整证据块的方法，以保留局部验证上下文并提升验证效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出SEEK（Semantic Evidence Extraction with adaptive chunKing）框架，从完整事实核查文章中通过识别语义主题转换来构建连贯证据块，同时保留局部验证上下文。使用多语言编码器（如XLM-R）对分块进行编码，然后通过LoRA适配器微调多语言大语言模型（如mT5）进行真实性预测。在X-FACT和RU22Fact数据集上评估，涵盖多种语言。
light_analysis.result: 在X-FACT和RU22Fact数据集上，SEEK相比语义分块基线提升macro-f1最高10%，相比句子分块提升19%，相比搜索片段基线提升20%。证据完整性和显著性分析进一步表明，SEEK保留了更丰富的验证上下文，使多语言事实核查更可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEEK通过自适应语义分块有效解决了现有证据碎片化问题，显著提升了多语言事实验证的性能。该工作强调了证据粒度对事实核查的重要性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的分块策略或结合多模态证据。局限性可能包括对长文档的处理效率及跨语言泛化能力。

title: A Dataset of Robot-Patient and Doctor-Patient Medical Dialogues for Spoken Language Processing Tasks
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have brought huge improvements to Artificial Intelligence (AI), which can be applied to general-purpose tasks. However, their application to textual or spoken medical consultations is still an open research problem. This paper proposes MeDial-Speech, a novel speech dataset for training and evaluating Med-AIs that can carry out consultations with patients. It was collected in realistic environments from robot-patient and doctor-patient dialogues, contains 111+ hours of speech data (without data augmentation), and covers four health conditions: Lewy body dementia, heart failure, shoulder pain, and angina. In addition, we propose a dialogue benchmark via sentence selection (with 20 options) to evaluate three state-of-the-art LLMs: GPT-5 mini, DeepSeek-V3, and Claude Sonnet 4. Experimental results reveal that Claude Sonnet 4 is the best in sentence selection, with 71.1% accuracy using manual transcriptions and 74.7% using automatic transcriptions, and that all LLMs are highly overconfident in their probabilistic predictions, regardless of selecting correct or incorrect sentences in medical dialogues. This dataset is free of charge for non-commercial purposes at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/hcuayahu/MeDial-Speech

light_analysis.overview: 提出MeDial-Speech数据集，用于医疗对话的语音处理任务，并评估LLMs在句子选择上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在通用任务中表现优异，但在文本或语音医疗咨询中的应用仍是开放问题。现有数据集缺乏真实环境下的语音医疗对话数据。该研究旨在构建一个包含机器人-患者和医生-患者对话的语音数据集，以支持Med-AI的训练和评估，解决医疗对话中LLMs性能不确定的问题。
light_analysis.method: 收集了111+小时的真实环境语音数据，覆盖四种健康状况：路易体痴呆、心力衰竭、肩痛和心绞痛。提出通过句子选择（20个选项）的对话基准，评估三个LLM：GPT-5 mini、DeepSeek-V3和Claude Sonnet 4。数据集无需数据增强，并提供手动和自动转录两种版本。
light_analysis.result: Claude Sonnet 4在句子选择任务中表现最佳，手动转录准确率71.1%，自动转录准确率74.7%。所有LLM在概率预测中均表现出过度自信，无论选择正确或错误的句子。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个高质量的医疗对话语音数据集和基准，揭示了当前LLM在医疗对话中的过度自信问题。数据集免费用于非商业目的。未来可探索减轻过度自信的方法，并扩展更多疾病类型和对话场景。

title: Self-Intersection-Aware 3D Human Motion Generation Using an Efficient Human Sphere Proxy
abstract: Human motion generation has made tremendous progress in recent years, with state-of-the-art approaches surpassing ground truth data in leading evaluation benchmarks. However, visual inspection of the generated motions paints a different picture. Even state-of-the-art approaches generate motions frequently containing self-intersections, i.e., body parts interpenetrating, which are strong artifacts, severely limiting the perceived motion quality. We introduce a novel loss, which explicitly penalizes self-intersections, to the training of human motion generation methods. We base our loss on a sphere proxy of human geometry, which allows us to calculate a self-intersection loss 98% faster and uses 83% less memory than comparable methods based on triangular meshes. The loss is agnostic to the specific approach, and we add it to the training of the recent human motion generation methods human motion diffusion model (MDM) and MoMask. Our extensive experiments show a reduction of self-intersections in generated motions of up to 49% while improving other evaluation metrics. The code is available at https://github.com/boschresearch/humansphereproxy .

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于人体球代理的自交损失，高效减少生成3D人体运动中的自交现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D人体运动生成方法虽在评估指标上超越真实数据，但视觉检查显示生成的运动频繁出现身体部位相互穿透（自交）的强烈伪影，严重限制了感知质量。这一问题在实际应用（如动画、虚拟现实）中尤为突出，而现有方法缺乏对自交的显式惩罚。因此，需要一种高效且通用的损失函数来减少自交，提升运动生成的视觉真实感。
light_analysis.method: 提出自交损失（self-intersection loss），基于人体几何的球代理（sphere proxy）来高效计算自交程度。与基于三角网格的方法相比，计算速度提升98%，内存使用减少83%。该损失与具体生成方法无关，可附加到现有方法训练中。在MDM和MoMask两种最新人体运动扩散模型上集成该损失进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在生成的运动中，自交现象最多减少49%，同时其他评估指标（如FID、多样性等）也得到改善。具体数据：自交损失降低比例达49%，且计算效率显著优于基于网格的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的自交损失有效提升了人体运动生成的质量，显著减少视觉伪影，且计算高效、易于集成。该工作为提升生成运动的真实感提供了实用工具，具有动画、虚拟现实等领域的应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的人体几何代理或扩展至多人交互场景。

title: KARMA: Karma-Aligned Reward Model Adaptation
abstract: Human communication depends on implicit social signals where effectiveness is shaped by tone, context, and conversational norms rather than semantic content alone. We introduce KARMA (Karma-Aligned Reward Model Adaptation), a framework for LLM learning of context-sensitive conversational behavior from large-scale social interaction data. KARMA trains a reward model on Reddit conversations to predict response valuation conditioned on context, and uses this signal to fine-tune language models via reinforcement learning to improve performance on pragmatics-mediated tasks. Critically, we find that the highest performing reward model does not lead to better downstream model alignment: a reward model relying exclusively on conversational context was a worse predictor of Reddit karma but yielded substantially better downstream performance. We evaluate the effects of KARMA applied to a downstream model with and without direct exposure to the social media data. The resulting models show improved pragmatics-mediated behaviors with largely mitigated undesirable side effects. Factuality is consistently diminished by KARMA across all conditions, including when the downstream model has no direct exposure to Reddit data, suggesting that this tension is embedded in the reward signal itself rather than introduced by noisy training data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KARMA框架，利用Reddit社交数据通过奖励模型适应和强化学习微调LLM，提升上下文敏感的语用行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类交流依赖于隐含的社会信号，如语气、语境和会话规范，而非仅语义内容。现有LLM在语用理解上不足，缺乏从大规模社交互动中学习上下文敏感行为的方法。因此，本研究旨在通过奖励模型适应，使LLM学会基于语境的对话行为，提升实用能力。
light_analysis.method: KARMA首先在Reddit对话上训练奖励模型，预测评论获赞（karma）作为价值信号，条件于上下文。然后使用强化学习（PPO）微调语言模型，优化奖励信号。关键创新是发现仅依赖上下文的奖励模型虽karma预测较差，但下游对齐效果更好。评估涉及下游模型是否直接接触Reddit数据。
light_analysis.result: KARMA改善了模型在语用任务上的表现，减少了不良副作用。事实性在所有条件下持续下降，即使下游模型未直接接触Reddit数据，表明矛盾源于奖励信号本身，而非训练数据噪声。未提供具体数值，但定性说明效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: KARMA展示了利用社交信号对齐LLM的潜力，但揭示了语用能力与事实性之间的内在张力。未来需探索缓解事实性下降的方法，如引入额外训练目标或调整奖励信号。

title: Rethinking the Multilingual Reasoning Gap with Layer Swap
abstract: Recent reasoning Large Language Models produce a chain-of-thought (CoT) predominantly in English, even when prompted in non-English languages. Prior work suggests that forcing the CoT to remain in the input language (\emph{native reasoning}) substantially degrades performance relative to allowing the model to reason in English before answering in the input language (\emph{English-pivoted reasoning}). However, most studies of this native reasoning gap rely on inference-time interventions or limited native-language training data. We revisit this comparison at a larger scale and under comparable supervision. We construct long multilingual reasoning datasets across six languages (English, French, German, Spanish, Chinese and Swahili); fine-tune specialists in both native and English-pivoted regimes on top of \texttt{Qwen/Qwen3-8B-Base}, and evaluate across mathematics, science, general knowledge, and code. In this setting, the average native reasoning gap shrinks to 1.9--3.5\% across the five non-English languages, considerably smaller than previously reported. Weight-space analysis of the native specialists reveals aligned fine-tuning updates in the middle layers and divergence in the outer layers. This points to a largely language-agnostic reasoning core surrounded by language-specific layers. Exploiting this structure, we introduce a Layer Swap: transferring the English specialist's stronger reasoning mid-layers into each native specialist, closing most of the native reasoning gap across the five non-English languages while preserving CoT in the target language. We release all models and datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层交换（Layer Swap）方法，通过交换英语专家模型的中间推理层到本地专家模型，几乎完全消除多语言推理差距，保持目标语言思维链。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究认为强制使用输入语言推理（本地推理）会大幅降低性能，但此类结论多基于推理时干预或有限的本地训练数据。本文在更大规模和可比监督下重新评估，发现本地推理差距实际仅为1.9-3.5%，远小于先前报告。因此需要更有效的方法来理解并缩小这一差距。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen3-8B-Base，在六种语言（英、法、德、西、中、斯瓦希里）上微调本地推理和英语辅助推理专家。通过权值空间分析，发现中间层更新跨语言对齐，外层发散。据此提出层交换：将英语专家的中间推理层（语言无关核心）移植到本地专家，保留目标语言CoT。
light_analysis.result: 本地推理差距在五种非英语语言上平均为1.9-3.5%，显著小于先前研究。层交换方法几乎完全关闭了所有非英语语言的本地推理差距（精度接近英语辅助推理），同时输出目标语言思维链，性能优于未交换的本地专家。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证实多语言推理核心是语言无关的，层交换有效利用这一结构。学术上重新评估了多语言推理差距的大小，实践上提供了一种无需额外训练即可提升多语言推理性能的方法。所有模型和数据集已开源，便于后续研究。

title: CIRCLED: A Multi-turn CIR Dataset with Consistent Dialogues across Domains
abstract: Existing Multi-Turn Composed Image Retrieval (MTCIR) datasets lack dialogue-history consistency and are restricted to the fashion domain. To address these limitations, we construct CIRCLED by extending FashionIQ, CIRR, and CIRCO. In CIRCLED, the query at each turn progressively approaches the target image. Data are generated via a CIReVL-based retrieval pipeline and curated with multiple filters on retrieval success, turn length, consistency, and information redundancy to ensure quality. In total, we collect 22,608 multi-turn sessions across nine subsets, substantially exceeding Multi-turn FashionIQ (11,505 sessions) in both scale and generality. We further apply multiple baseline methods and quantitatively assess retrieval accuracy on CIRCLED. Our work provides a practical, high-quality benchmark to facilitate future research on multi-turn CIR. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/tk1441/CIRCLED and https://github.com/mti-lab/circled.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了首个跨域、对话一致的多轮组合图像检索数据集CIRCLED，作为高质量基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MTCIR数据集缺乏对话历史一致性且仅限于时尚领域，限制了多轮组合图像检索的研究。CIRCLED通过扩展FashionIQ、CIRR和CIRCO，解决了领域局限和对话不一致的问题，提供了更大规模、更通用的基准，以推动该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于FashionIQ、CIRR和CIRCO三个数据集，使用CIReVL检索管道生成多轮对话，并通过检索成功、轮次长度、一致性和信息冗余等多个过滤器筛选数据。最终收集22,608个多轮会话，涵盖9个子集，确保高质量和跨域覆盖。
light_analysis.result: 数据集规模（22,608会话）显著超过Multi-turn FashionIQ（11,505会话），覆盖多个领域。应用多种基线方法进行检索准确率评估，提供了定量基准结果（具体数值摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为多轮组合图像检索研究提供了高质量、跨域的基准数据集，公开数据集和代码以促进社区发展。未来可基于此探索更有效的多轮交互检索方法。

title: Stabilizing Recurrent Dynamics for Test-Time Scalable Latent Reasoning in Looped Language Models
abstract: Looped Language Models (LoopLMs) enable efficient latent reasoning through depth recurrence, yet exhibit unreliable test-time scaling behavior: performance often peaks at a certain iteration depth and then collapses with further recurrence. Through latent dynamics analysis, we find an inherent trade-off between stability and effectiveness in existing architectures and strategies. By conceptualizing reasoning as uncertainty reduction, we propose that convergence toward stable fixed points while preserving effectiveness represents a promising way. To this end, we propose STARS (STAbility-driven Recurrent Scaling), a training framework that constrains latent states to approach asymptotically stable fixed points. This is realized via efficient Jacobian Spectral Radius Regularization with random loop sampling, enabling STARS to maximize effectiveness while ensuring rigorous stability. Experiments on arithmetic tasks show that STARS achieves reliable test-time scaling, and on complex mathematical reasoning it substantially mitigates performance degradation as recurrence depth increases while also improving peak performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STARS框架，通过稳定性驱动的循环缩放使循环语言模型实现可靠的测试时扩展潜在推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 循环语言模型通过深度循环实现高效潜在推理，但测试时扩展不可靠，性能在特定深度后崩溃。现有架构存在稳定性与有效性的内在权衡。需解决循环深度增加时性能退化问题，以实现可扩展的推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出STARS（稳定性驱动循环缩放）训练框架，将潜在状态约束为渐近稳定不动点。通过随机循环采样的雅可比谱半径正则化实现，在确保严格稳定性的同时最大化有效性。该方法不依赖特定数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在算术任务上，STARS实现可靠的测试时扩展；在复杂数学推理任务上，显著减轻了随循环深度增加的性能下降，并提升了峰值性能。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: STARS有效解决循环语言模型测试时扩展的不稳定性，将推理视为不确定性减少，为潜在推理提供稳定且可扩展的方案。未来可应用于更广泛的语言模型和推理任务。

title: APEX: Amplitude Anchors and Phase Priors for Target-Scarce Higher-Frequency Wave Prediction
abstract: Learning-based surrogates have become increasingly effective for wave-field prediction, and neural operators in particular have shown strong performance within observed frequency regimes. However, higher-frequency prediction under scarce target supervision remains comparatively underexplored, especially in wave problems where higher-frequency data are substantially more expensive to simulate or measure than lower-frequency data. A central difficulty is that cross-frequency transfer is inherently asymmetric: coarse amplitude structure remains relatively stable across frequencies, whereas phase-sensitive oscillatory structure deteriorates much more rapidly as frequency increases. Motivated by this asymmetry, we propose APEX, Amplitude-anchored and Phase-prior-guided Enhancement from eXtrapolated coarse predictions, a framework for target-scarce higher-frequency wave-field prediction. A lower-frequency neural operator first provides a coarse prediction in the target-frequency regime, from which we retain only the amplitude as a transferable structural anchor. A conditional flow-matching enhancer then reconstructs the target higher-frequency field under the guidance of a Green's-function-inspired phase prior. Experiments on SimpleWave, Helmholtz, and Maxwell benchmarks show that APEX consistently outperforms direct lower-to-higher extrapolation, target-adapted operator, and joint generative baselines under limited target-frequency supervision. Our results suggest that reliable higher-frequency prediction of oscillatory wave fields should not rely on direct end-to-end transfer of the full complex field, but instead on explicitly reusing transferable coarse structure while separately recovering the missing oscillatory detail.

light_analysis.overview: 提出APEX框架，利用振幅锚点和相位先验，在稀缺目标数据下实现高频波场预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 高频波场预测中目标数据稀缺，现有方法难以处理频率间不对称性：粗振幅结构相对稳定，但相位振荡结构随频率增加迅速恶化。该问题重要，因为高频数据模拟或测量成本极高，且直接端到端迁移效果有限。
light_analysis.method: APEX框架包含两个阶段：首先使用低频神经算子提供目标频率区的粗预测，保留振幅作为可转移结构锚点；然后通过条件流匹配增强器，在格林函数启发的相位先验指导下重建高频场。关键创新在于显式分离振幅和相位，利用粗结构的可转移性。
light_analysis.result: 在SimpleWave、Helmholtz和Maxwell三个基准测试上，APEX在有限目标频率监督下始终优于直接低频到高频外推、目标自适应算子及联合生成基线方法。实验表明，振幅锚定与相位先验结合显著提升了高频预测质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明，可靠的高频波场预测不应依赖完整复数场的直接端到端传输，而应重用可转移粗结构并单独恢复振荡细节。该框架为稀缺数据下的高频预测提供了新思路，适用于模拟或测量成本高的波动问题。

title: It's Not the Capability: Harness Sensitivity Is Non-Monotone Across LLM Agent Tiers
abstract: A prevalent assumption in LLM agent deployment holds that more structured harnesses universally improve   reliability, and that higher-capability models need proportionally less structural guidance -- together   implying a monotone inverse relationship between model capability tier and optimal harness complexity. We   test this hypothesis through a controlled 432-run experiment crossing six models across four capability   tiers with three harness conditions (light, balanced, strict) on HEAT-24, a 24-task synthetic benchmark   with git-based workspace verification. Our results refute the monotone inverse relationship on two   fronts. First, for the frontier chat model evaluated (Gemini 2.5 Flash), increased harness verbosity   lowers VTSR by 29-38 percentage points -- a harness-complexity paradox. Second, for the frontier   reasoning model evaluated (Qwen3.5-122B, extended thinking enabled), strict harness achieves the highest   VTSR (91.7%) and the lowest latency, the opposite of the prediction. Within the constrained tier, a 2B   model (Gemma4:e2B) matches strong-open-tier stability at 91.7% across all harnesses. Because each tier is   represented by a single model in this study, these results should be interpreted as model-specific   observations; harness sensitivity appears non-monotone across the models evaluated, and depends   critically on model type (chat vs. reasoning). We introduce a six-label failure taxonomy showing that   format_violation dominates capable-model failures while wrong_file dominates low-capability failures, and   we derive practical tier-aware harness selection guidelines.

light_analysis.overview: 通过432次实验挑战了LLM代理中能力层级与最优约束复杂度单调递减的普遍假设，发现约束敏感性非单调且依赖于模型类型（聊天vs推理）。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理部署中普遍认为更高能力模型需要更少结构约束，且结构化约束能普遍提升可靠性，但该假设缺乏系统验证。本研究旨在通过控制实验检验这种单调逆关系是否成立，从而指导约束设计。
light_analysis.method: 在HEAT-24基准上，使用6个模型（覆盖4个能力层级）和3种约束条件（轻、平衡、严格）进行432次运行实验。通过VTSR和延迟指标评估性能，并引入六标签失败分类法分析错误类型。
light_analysis.result: 前沿聊天模型（Gemini 2.5 Flash）增加约束复杂度导致VTSR下降29-38个百分点；前沿推理模型（Qwen3.5-122B）在严格约束下达到最高VTSR 91.7%和最低延迟；低能力层级的2B模型（Gemma4:e2B）在所有约束下均达91.7% VTSR，表明约束敏感性非单调。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究否定了能力层级与约束复杂度的单调逆关系，强调模型类型（聊天vs推理）是关键调节因素。提出了按能力层级感知的约束选择指南，并揭示了格式违规与文件错误分别主导高、低能力模型失败。局限性在于各层级仅代表单一模型，结果需谨慎泛化。未来可探索更多模型和约束条件。

title: PRISM: A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Peer Reviewers
abstract: The rapid growth in submissions to machine learning venues has strained the scientific peer-review system and intensified interest in LLM-based automated peer reviewers. However, how good these systems are actually, especially compared to human reviewers at catching scientific gaps, remains poorly understood. In this work, we introduce PRISM (Peer Review Intelligence via Structured Multi-dimensional assessment), a benchmarking framework that evaluates review quality across four dimensions: Depth of Analysis, Novelty Assessment,Flaw Identification & Major Issues Prioritization, and Multi-dimensional Constructiveness. Unlike most existing evaluations based on surface-level metrics like ROUGE and BLEU, or unconstrained LLM-as-a-judge prompting that conflates fluency with rigor, PRISM grounds each dimension in argument mining, retrieval-augmented verification, and consensus-based scoring. We apply PRISM to benchmark five leading automated reviewer systems and human reviewers on a stratified corpus of reviews from ICLR, ICML, and NeurIPS. The results reveal that LLMs can match or beat human reviewers on individual dimensions: comparable depth of analysis, stronger novelty verification, and highly accurate critique prioritization. However, no single system consistently matches the balanced performance of the human baseline across all dimensions at once. Each exhibits a distinct specialization profile with characteristic blind spots -- failure modes that aggregate metrics miss entirely. The implication is that LLM reviewers are best understood as targeted supplements to human review, effective within specific dimensions, but unreliable as standalone replacements. Our demo and key results can be found at https://khanhthanhdev.github.io/prism-page/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISM多维基准，系统评估LLM审稿人质量，揭示其专业优势与盲点。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着ML会议投稿量激增，人工审稿系统压力增大，LLM自动审稿成为研究热点。但现有评估多基于ROUGE/BLEU等表面指标，或依赖LLM-as-a-judge提示，混淆流畅性与严谨性，无法准确衡量LLM审稿人发现科学缺陷等实际能力。亟需一个结构化、多维度的评估框架来深入理解LLM审稿人的真实表现。
light_analysis.method: PRISM框架从四个维度评估审稿质量：分析深度、新颖性评估、缺陷识别与问题优先级排序、多维建设性。每个维度通过论证挖掘、检索增强验证和共识评分进行标准化评估。使用来自ICLR、ICML和NeurIPS的分层语料库，对五个领先的自动审稿系统及人类审稿人进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LLM在单个维度上可匹配或超越人类：分析深度相当，新颖性验证更强，缺陷优先级排序高度准确。但没有任何系统能在所有维度上一致达到人类平衡性能，每个系统表现出特定专业化特征和盲点（聚合指标无法捕捉的失败模式）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM基准揭示了LLM审稿人作为人类审稿的针对性补充的有效性，在特定维度表现出色，但作为独立替代不可靠。研究强调了多维评估的重要性，未来可用于指导混合审稿系统设计，并暴露了现有指标忽视的缺陷。

title: Learning Reference-Guided Exposure Correction with Hybrid Illumination Characteristics
abstract: We present HICNet, a reference-guided exposure correction framework. A lightweight, content-agnostic encoder distills each image into a compact illumination embedding capturing regional brightness, edge contrast, and higher-order luminance moments. The embedding difference between a source and its reference drives a multi-scale modulation network that combines FiLM-based global adjustment with Photometric Channel Rebalancing for fine-grained, illumination-aware spectral gating, producing exposure-matched outputs while faithfully preserving scene details. A cross-batch contrastive loss orders the illumination manifold, bolstering robustness to diverse lighting conditions. Trained without ground truth or intrinsic decomposition, HICNet attains better accuracy on public benchmarks and generalizes well to entirely unseen scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HICNet，一种参考引导的曝光校正框架，利用混合光照特征实现精准曝光匹配和场景细节保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 曝光校正在摄影和计算机视觉中至关重要，但现有方法常依赖真值或内在分解，难以应对复杂光照变化。不同照明条件下细节丢失和色彩失真问题突出，亟需一种鲁棒且无需监督的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: HICNet包含轻量级内容无关编码器，将图像压缩为紧凑光照嵌入（含区域亮度、边缘对比度等）。嵌入差异驱动多尺度调制网络，结合FiLM全局调整与光度通道再平衡进行细粒度光谱门控。跨批次对比损失排序光照流形，增强泛化性。无需真值或分解。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准上，HICNet取得更高曝光校正精度，优于现有方法。泛化到完全未见场景时表现稳健，验证其鲁棒性和通用性（摘要未提供具体数值，但提及更好精度）。
light_analysis.conclusion: HICNet通过参考引导和混合光照特征，实现了无需监督的曝光校正，兼顾全局调整和局部细节。学术上贡献了光照嵌入和对比损失设计，实用上可用于摄影增强、计算摄影等。未来可扩展至视频或结合其他退化校正。

title: Joint 2D-3D Segmentation and Association in Street-level Imaging
abstract: Accurate interpretation of street-level imagery is essential for large-scale urban mapping and the creation of Spatial Digital Twin (SDT) environments. This work presents a unified framework for joint 2D-3D segmentation and association that integrates visual semantics with multi-view geometric reasoning. Unlike conventional approaches that rely heavily on sequential frames for temporal tracking, our method leverages zero-shot detection and segmentation together with structure-from-motion reconstruction to establish stable cross-view correspondences. A 3D-driven association mechanism replaces traditional 2D multi-object tracking, using geometric consistency to guide identity preservation across wide-baseline viewpoints and varying imaging conditions. By combining 2D texture cues with global 3D context, the proposed pipeline is well-suited for scalable street-level processing and can be used for a variety of object types. Experiments demonstrate substantially improved coverage of ground-truth sequences and more robust identity retention compared to state-of-the-art 2D-only tracking methods, achieving a 22% performance gain in challenging urban scenarios.
comment: 15 pages, 6 image figures, 1 in-body table, 1 in-body algorithm, 2 indexes with tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种联合2D-3D分割与关联的统一框架，利用零样本检测和几何一致性替代传统2D跟踪，实现鲁棒的跨视角街景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 街景图像是城市地图和空间数字孪生（SDT）的关键数据源。传统方法依赖时序帧进行2D多目标跟踪，但面临宽基线视角变化和不同光照条件时，身份保持不稳定且覆盖不足。现有2D跟踪方法在处理复杂城市场景时表现不佳，亟需一种更鲁棒的关联机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一框架，集成零样本检测和分割与结构运动恢复（SfM）重建，建立稳定的跨视角对应关系。采用3D驱动的关联机制，利用几何一致性指导身份保持，替代传统2D多目标跟踪。结合2D纹理线索和全局3D上下文，适用于多种物体类型的可扩展街景处理。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性城市场景中，相比最先进的2D跟踪方法，该方法显著提升了真实世界序列的覆盖率和身份保留鲁棒性，性能提升达22%。实验验证了其在宽基线下的稳定性和对光照变化的适应能力，优于纯2D方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为街景联合2D-3D分割与关联提供了统一方案，推动城市映射和SDT发展。通过几何一致性增强关联，减少了时序依赖性，具有良好可扩展性。未来可探索更高效的3D线索融合和实时部署。

title: Towards Feedback-to-Plan Decisions for Self-Evolving LLM Agents in CUDA Kernel Generation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong empirical gains as self-evolving agents for CUDA kernel generation, driven by feedback-conditioned planning across generations. However, how planning decisions attribute and combine heterogeneous feedback signals remains opaque. Standard end-to-end ablations fail to resolve this question, as iterative planning amplifies early perturbations and conflates feedback effects with trajectory-dependent drift.   We introduce \texttt{CUDAnalyst}, a unified analysis layer for controlled, generation-level attribution of planning decisions to feedback components via trajectory freezing and selective feedback injection. \texttt{CUDAnalyst} enables stable generation-level evaluation and principled coalitional-style attribution of feedback effects and interactions. Our results show that explicit planning is beneficial only when feedback is aligned, that effective planning emerges from structured multi-feedback interactions, and that high-level plans from stronger reasoning models can partially transfer to weaker ones. These trends hold across reference backbones, representative workloads, and reference induction regimes, indicating that the identified feedback-to-plan structure is robust within the controlled axes studied.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CUDAnalyst分析框架，通过轨迹冻结和选择性反馈注入，揭示自进化LLM智能体在CUDA内核生成中反馈到计划决策的归因机制。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为自进化智能体在CUDA内核生成中依赖反馈条件规划，但规划决策如何归因和组合异构反馈信号尚不明确。标准端到端消融无法解决该问题，因为迭代规划会放大早期扰动，混淆反馈效应与轨迹依赖漂移。有必要设计可控分析工具以准确评估反馈组件对计划决策的影响。
light_analysis.method: 引入CUDAnalyst统一分析层，通过轨迹冻结（固定生成轨迹）和选择性反馈注入（控制不同反馈信号的出现），实现生成级计划决策对反馈组件的归因。采用联盟式归因分析反馈效应及其交互，支持跨参考骨干、代表性工作负载和归纳机制的稳定评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，显式计划仅在反馈对齐时有益；有效计划源于结构化多反馈交互（如性能与正确性反馈的组合）；高级推理模型（如GPT-4）的高层计划可部分迁移至较弱模型（如Llama）。这些趋势在多种设置下保持一致，验证了反馈-计划结构的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CUDAnalyst揭示了自进化LLM智能体中反馈到计划决策的关键归因规律：反馈对齐性和多反馈交互是有效计划的核心，且存在跨模型计划迁移可能。工作为解释和优化基于反馈的LLM迭代生成提供了方法论，未来可扩展至更复杂反馈类型和动态规划场景。

title: MTL-FNO: A Lightweight Multi-Task Fourier Neural Operator for Sparse Field Reconstruction
abstract: Efficient onboard multi-field sparse reconstruction is essential for the autonomous operation of aerospace vehicles. While existing deep learning models exhibit promise for single-field reconstruction, deploying multiple independent models leads to prohibitive model size growth and fails to exploit cross-field correlations, particularly under few-shot conditions. To address these challenges, we first propose a lightweight multi-task Fourier neural operator (MTL-FNO), an end-to-end joint training framework based on hard parameter sharing. In each layer, the parameters are divided into shared and task-specific components to capture common features across fields while preserving task-specific characteristics. Moreover, the task-specific fine-tuning parameters are implemented as low-rank terms, achieving substantial model compression. Second, to address the difficulty of co-optimizing shared and task-specific parameters along with their real and imaginary parts, we revisit the FNO's spectral weight from a polar-form perspective and devise a physically meaningful decoupled optimization scheme. Specifically, we apply polar decomposition to slice-wise disentangle the spectral weight into a unitary tensor encoding phase information and a positive semi-definite tensor characterizing amplitude. By decoupling the optimization of phase and amplitude, our method can effectively mitigate tasks conflict. Meanwhile, to preserve unitary geometric fidelity during training, the Cayley transform is introduced to reparameterize the unitary tensor, converting the constrained optimization problem to an unconstrained one. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed method under few-shot conditions is validated on two representative engineering cases. Results show that MTL-FNO achieves accuracy comparable to or even surpassing that of standard FNO, while reducing total model size by 76% and 60%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级多任务傅里叶神经算子MTL-FNO，通过硬参数共享与极分解优化实现稀疏场重建的模型压缩和任务解耦。
light_analysis.motivation: 航天器自主运行需要高效的多场稀疏重建，现有深度学习方法仅针对单场重建，部署多个独立模型导致模型规模过大且无法利用跨场相关性，尤其在少样本条件下。因此需要一种轻量级的多任务框架，在保持精度的同时减小模型尺寸。
light_analysis.method: 提出MTL-FNO，基于硬参数共享的端到端联合训练框架。每层参数分为共享和任务特定组件，后者采用低秩项实现压缩。从极坐标角度重新审视FNO频谱权重，通过极分解将频谱权重解耦为酉张量（相位）和半正定张量（幅度），并引入Cayley变换将约束优化转为无约束优化，有效缓解任务冲突。
light_analysis.result: 在两个代表性工程案例上验证少样本有效性。MTL-FNO精度与标准FNO相当甚至更优，同时分别将总模型大小减少76%和60%。
light_analysis.conclusion: MTL-FNO实现了多任务稀疏场重建的轻量化，通过极分解和Cayley变换有效解耦优化。未来可扩展到更多任务和复杂场景，具有航空航天实际应用价值。

title: Image Feature Fusion-based Federated Client Unlearning (FCU)
abstract: Major data protection regulations all mention the "right to be forgotten," and that's what pushed federated unlearning (FU) techniques forward. But one stubborn issue remains: catastrophic forgetting--you erase the target knowledge, yet somehow you also end up throwing out essential retained knowledge, which then hurts the model's global generalization.   To get a better balance between unlearning effectiveness and generalization ability, we propose something called Image Feature Fusion-based Federated Client Unlearning (IFF-FCU). The idea is to bring in a linear Image Feature Fusion mechanism (Mixup) that dynamically creates mixed samples, bridging the gap between forget-distribution and retain-distribution. What this strategy does isn't just deleting a few discrete data points--it theoretically widens and regularizes the forgetting boundary.   We ran extensive experiments on medical imaging benchmarks (RSNA-ICH and ISIC2018), and the results show that our approach achieves reasonably good unlearning. For instance, on the ICH dataset, IFF-FCU achieves a highly competitive Error deviation from the retrained gold standard, demonstrating robust improvements over existing baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图像特征融合的联邦客户端遗忘方法，通过Mixup机制缓解灾难性遗忘，平衡遗忘效果与泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦遗忘技术旨在实现“被遗忘权”，但面临灾难性遗忘问题：擦除目标知识时丢失关键保留知识，损害模型全局泛化能力。现有方法难以平衡遗忘有效性与泛化性，亟需一种能动态弥合遗忘分布与保留分布差距的策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出IFF-FCU框架，核心是引入线性图像特征融合机制（Mixup），动态生成混合样本，桥接遗忘分布与保留分布。该策略理论上升宽并正则化遗忘边界，而非仅删除离散数据点。实验在医学影像基准RSNA-ICH和ISIC2018上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在ICH数据集上，IFF-FCU的误差偏离重训练黄金标准值具有高度竞争力，优于现有基线方法。全面实验表明该方法实现了合理的遗忘效果，显著提升了遗忘与泛化的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: IFF-FCU有效缓解了联邦遗忘中的灾难性遗忘问题，通过特征融合提升了遗忘边界正则化，在医学图像上验证了有效性。未来可扩展至其他模态和更复杂的联邦场景，但计算开销与隐私安全性需进一步评估。

title: METATR: A Multilingual, Evolving Benchmark for Automatic Text Recognition
abstract: Benchmarks that reflect the diversity and complexity of real-world documents are essential for accurately evaluating Automatic Text Recognition (ATR) systems, especially Vision-Large Language Models (vLLMs). Although recent models demonstrate impressive performance, they are often evaluated on datasets containing modern, printed texts mostly written in English, which limits their relevance to many practical applications. Therefore, selecting a model for a specific use case requires evaluating it on data that matches the target documents. This highlights the importance of representative benchmarks for real-world applications. In this paper, we introduce METATR (v1.0), a multilingual, evolving benchmark designed to evaluate ATR models across a wide range of documents, facilitating meaningful model comparison and selection. The benchmark was designed to maximize diversity by including documents from various public collections. These documents cover 29 languages and include texts with multiple scripts and layouts. Beyond the dataset itself, METATR defines a standardized prompting and normalization methodology and establishes a dynamic evaluation framework. This approach is intended to produce reproducible results while remaining extensible over time. We evaluated a wide range of state-of-the-art systems, including open-source models and closed-source models. Results are reported across various dimensions, including performance at the dataset and language levels, robustness to handwritten documents, and computational efficiency. Our findings show that, although proprietary models achieve the most consistent performance, substantial variability persists across scripts and layouts. Overall, METATR provides a multidimensional, practitioner-oriented framework for assessing multilingual ATR in real-world conditions and tracking progress as the field evolves.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了METATR v1.0，一个多语言、动态演进的自动文本识别基准，用于评估多种模型在真实文档上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有ATR基准多聚焦于现代印刷英语文本，缺乏对多语言、复杂布局和手写文档的覆盖，导致模型在实际应用中的评估不全面。研究者难以根据具体需求选择合适的模型，因此需要一个代表真实世界多样性的动态基准来支持模型比较与选择。
light_analysis.method: METATR从多个公共数据集中收集涵盖29种语言、多种文字和布局的文档，构建多样性丰富的评估集。定义了标准化的提示方法和归一化流程，并设计了可扩展的动态评估框架，确保结果可复现且支持后续扩展。评估了包括开源和闭源在内的多种先进模型，从数据集、语言级性能、手写鲁棒性和计算效率等多个维度进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 封闭源模型在一致性上表现最优，但不同文字和布局间仍存在显著性能差异。METATR提供了多维度的评估结果，揭示了现有模型在多语言场景下的能力边界，为实际应用中的模型选择提供了依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: METATR为多语言ATR评估提供了实用框架，能够反映真实世界文档的多样性，并推动领域进步。未来可进一步扩展文档类型和语言覆盖，并探索更细粒度的评估维度，以应对持续演进的OCR挑战。

title: The Need for an External Observer Formalizing the Sufficiency Gap: A Mathematical Extension of Mixture Identifiability and Contextual Grounding in Sequence Models
abstract: We construct a binary mixed-regime process with one deterministic textual regime and one random regime governed by an unobserved latent state. Even an ideal infinite-capacity sequence predictor that exactly recovers the text-only marginal law can become overconfident when the observed prefix is compatible with the wrong latent regime. The resulting entropy difference is not an ordinary optimization error; it is a sufficiency gap caused by marginalization over an unobserved state. We then formalize retrieval, tool use, and external grounding through an auxiliary binary signal with fidelity $γ\in [1/2,1]$. The resulting Bayesian update yields a contextual dominance threshold: a corrective signal reverses the posterior odds induced by the textual history exactly when its fidelity exceeds the text-only posterior weight assigned to the misleading regime. This threshold reduces, but does not generally eliminate, the sufficiency gap; complete closure requires perfect revelation of the relevant latent state or an equivalent verification mechanism. The analysis clarifies why temperature scaling cannot restore missing context, why grounding mechanisms must be both informative and learnably usable by the model, and why autonomous sequence models require structurally decoupled observers or verifiers in high-stakes domains.

light_analysis.overview: 形式化序列模型中因未观测潜在状态导致的充分性差距，提出外部信号矫正的理论阈值。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列模型在混有确定性文本和随机隐状态的过程中，即使理想预测器精确恢复边缘分布，也可能因观测前缀与错误潜在状态兼容而产生过度自信。这种熵差不是传统优化误差，而是不可约的充分性差距。理解其根源对于设计安全可靠的语言模型至关重要，尤其在高风险决策场景。
light_analysis.method: 构建二元混合机制过程，含确定性文本和受隐状态控制的随机机制。引入保真度为γ的辅助二元信号形式化外部基础（检索、工具使用）。推导贝叶斯更新方程，得到上下文主导阈值：当外部信号保真度超过文本后验中误导机制的权重时，才能逆转错误后验。该阈值减少但一般不消除充分性差距，完全消除需完美揭示隐状态或等价验证。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明：温度缩放无法补充缺失上下文信息；外部基础机制必须具有足够高的保真度且能被模型学习使用；自主序列模型在高风险领域需要结构解耦的观察者或验证器。充分性差距仅在外部信号保真度超过文本误导权重时部分缓解，完全消除依赖潜在状态的完全揭露。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为序列模型中的上下文缺失问题提供了严格的数学框架，阐明了外部观察者（验证器）的必要性。理论结果指导实践：基础机制应设计为高保真且可学习，温度缩放无效。未来工作可探索实际系统中如何实现近似最优的外部信号，以及验证器的可学习性。

title: SL-BiLEM: Structured Learnable Behavior-in-the-Loop Epidemic Modeling for Forecasting and Policy Evaluation
abstract: Epidemic forecasting faces a fundamental challenge: human behavior dynamically responds to disease spread, creating feedback loops that induce distribution shifts at policy intervention points. This renders data-driven models unreliable under distribution shift. We propose \textbf{SL-BiLEM} (Structured Learnable Behavior-in-the-Loop Epidemic Model), leveraging physical constraints as regularization for robust extrapolation. The framework decomposes effective transmission as $β_{\text{eff}}(t,g) = β_0(g) \times m_{\text{policy}}(t) \times m_{\text{media}}(t) \times m_{\text{comp}}(t,g)$, where monotonicity, smoothness, and bounded-jump constraints on the learned compliance function maintain predictive validity under novel policy regimes. Beyond forecasting, SL-BiLEM enables counterfactual analysis for intervention decision support. We validate forecasting on three real-world datasets (cruise ship, school influenza, and school-district COVID-19 surveillance) and evaluate counterfactual recovery on synthetic benchmarks with known ground truth. SL-BiLEM demonstrates: (1) 76\% improvement over neural-mechanistic baselines, with only 53\% OOD degradation versus 1142\% for neural baselines under policy-induced shift; (2) 100\% bootstrap CI coverage across 27 synthetic counterfactual experiments; and (3) Treatment Effect Accuracy exceeding 0.85. These results establish SL-BiLEM as an interpretable tool for public health decision-makers seeking accurate prediction and principled intervention planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SL-BiLEM框架，通过结构化可学习行为环路建模和物理约束正则化，实现分布偏移下稳健的流行病预测与政策评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 流行病预测面临人类行为与疾病传播动态反馈导致的分布偏移问题，尤其在政策干预点，数据驱动模型不可靠。现有方法缺乏对行为-疾病耦合的结构化建模，难以应对新型政策下的外推。
light_analysis.method: SL-BiLEM将有效传播率分解为基础传播率与政策、媒体、合规等因子的乘积，对学习到的合规函数施加单调性、平滑性和有界跳跃约束，利用物理先验正则化实现鲁棒外推。支持反事实分析，适用于干预决策支持。
light_analysis.result: 在邮轮、学校流感和学区COVID-19三个真实数据集上，相比神经-机制基线改进76%；政策诱导偏移下OOD退化仅53%（神经基线1142%）。合成反事实实验中，27个实验实现100% bootstrap CI覆盖，治疗效果准确率超过0.85。
light_analysis.conclusion: SL-BiLEM为公共卫生决策者提供了可解释的预测与干预规划工具，有效平衡数据驱动与物理先验，显著提升分布偏移下的泛化能力。未来可扩展至更多行为因子和复杂干预场景。

title: Rotation-Invariant Spherical Watermarking via Third-Order SO(3) Representation Coupling
abstract: Reliable watermarking of panoramic imagery is fundamentally challenged by arbitrary 3D rotations. As panoramas are defined on the sphere, they naturally transform under the action of $SO(3)$, rendering conventional planar representations and augmentation-based robustness strategies inadequate and devoid of theoretical guarantees. To address this, we formulate panoramas as spherical signals and leverage $SO(3)$ representation theory to derive provably rotation-invariant descriptors. While spherical harmonic coefficients transform equivariantly under rotations, the natural invariant constructions are typically limited to zeroth-order statistics which eliminate directional information and severely constrain embedding capacity. In this work, we introduce a principled third-order invariant construction by coupling higher-order $SO(3)$ irreducible representations via tensor products and projecting onto the trivial representation. This yields a spherical invariant bispectrum that preserves phase information while remaining strictly rotation-invariant. Leveraging this property, we embed watermarks into higher-order spherical harmonic coefficients and recover them from invariant bispectral scalars, enabling reliable extraction under arbitrary 3D rotations. We provide a theoretical proof of $SO(3)$ invariance for it and demonstrate experimentally its near-perfect robustness to continuous rotations while maintaining high visual fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于三阶SO(3)表示耦合的球面不变双谱，实现全景图像的旋转不变水印。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景图像易受任意3D旋转影响，现有平面表示和增强策略缺乏理论保证，而球谐系数的自然不变量局限于零阶统计量，丢失方向信息且嵌入容量受限。需要一种严格旋转不变且保留相位信息的高阶构造。
light_analysis.method: 将全景图像建模为球面信号，利用SO(3)表示理论，通过张量积耦合高阶不可约表示并投影到平凡表示，构造球面不变双谱（三阶不变量）。该双谱保留相位信息且严格旋转不变，将水印嵌入高阶球谐系数，从不变双谱标量中恢复。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明了SO(3)不变性，实验表明该方法在连续旋转下达到近乎完美的鲁棒性，同时保持高视觉保真度。与基线相比，在旋转攻击下水印提取准确率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了具有理论保证的旋转不变球面水印方案，解决了全景图像在任意旋转下的水印鲁棒性问题。该方法可推广至其他球面信号处理任务，未来可探索更高阶不变量以进一步增大容量。

title: Model Merging on Loss Landscape: A Geometry Perspective
abstract: Model merging offers a promising avenue for knowledge integration and parallel development without retraining. Yet, existing methods either ignore the geometry of the loss landscape or rely on intractable full-space Hessian approximations. We propose EpiMer, a framework that casts model merging as solving the Fréchet mean on a Riemannian manifold and restricts the computation to a low-rank subspace spanned by the task vectors. With the expected Hessian as the metric, we reveal a connection between local curvature and epistemic uncertainty of the parameters. Our theoretical analysis decomposes the merging error bound into the subspace Fréchet variance and the residual energy, and provides a closed-form characterization of when curvature-aware merging provably outperforms flat-geometry methods. In addition, our framework unifies both curvature-aware methods and recent spectral methods as special cases of the subspace Fréchet mean with different geometric metrics. Merging fine-tuned CLIP-ViT models on eight image classification tasks, Epistemic Merging strictly outperforms the baselines on all three CLIP-ViT backbones at matched rank, improving the across-task average accuracy and worst-task accuracy on every backbone.
comment: CVPR 2026 Findings Track. 18 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables

light_analysis.overview: 将模型合并视为黎曼流形上的Fréchet平均，利用低秩子空间和期望Hessian度量提升多任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型合并方法要么忽略损失景观的几何结构，要么依赖难以处理的满秩Hessian近似。这些方法在知识整合和并行开发中无法充分利用参数的曲率信息，导致合并效果受限。为解决这一问题，我们需要一种既能感知局部曲率又能高效计算的方法，以提升多任务合并的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出EpiMer框架，将模型合并建模为黎曼流形上以期望Hessian为度量的Fréchet平均，计算限制在任务向量张成的低秩子空间。通过理论分析将合并误差分解为子空间Fréchet方差和残差能量，从几何角度证明曲率感知合并的优势。该框架统一了现有曲率感知方法和谱方法，均为子空间Fréchet平均的特例。
light_analysis.result: 在8个图像分类任务上合并微调后的CLIP-ViT模型，EpiMer在所有三种CLIP-ViT骨干网络上严格优于基线方法。在相同秩下，每个骨干网络上的跨任务平均准确率和最差任务准确率均得到提升，验证了曲率信息对多任务合并的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EpiMer通过几何视角统一并改进了模型合并方法，证明了曲率感知的重要性。该工作为知识集成提供了理论支撑和实用工具，适用于多任务学习场景。未来可探索更高效的子空间选择策略及扩展到其他模型架构，但当前方法仍依赖于任务向量子空间的选择。

title: Mind the Tool Failures: Achieving Synergistic Tool Gains for Medical Agents
abstract: Medical AI agents increasingly use external tools for diagnosis, treatment recommendation, and evidence retrieval, yet most existing approaches assume that task-appropriate tools are reliable within their intended scope. This assumption is fragile in real clinical settings, where even relevant tools may fail on challenging instances and lead to unsafe downstream decisions. To address this issue, we study medical tool use under imperfect-tool settings to correct failure instances missed by individual tools. Instance-dependent failure patterns create a gap between the best fixed single tool and an ideal instance-wise selector, which we refer to as the Single-Oracle risk gap. The core challenge is that conventional task-level tool selection cannot realize this gap, as it is inherently bounded by the performance of the best single tool. Motivated by this observation, we therefore account for instance-level heterogeneity and formulate tool use as an instance-level selection problem. Particularly, we propose a GRPO-based reinforcement learning framework with rewards for probabilistic risk minimization and disagreement-aware synergy learning, which promotes instance-level correction of erroneous tool consensus. Furthermore, an entropy-guided sampling strategy is adopted to upweight high-disagreement instances, which provide stronger signals for learning instance-specific tool synergy. These two components complement each other in mitigating instance-level heterogeneity and improving tool synergy. Experiments on two tasks and seven medical benchmarks show that our method consistently achieves robust and stable improvements over a broad range of baselines, highlighting the importance of synergy-aware tool use for reliable medical agentic systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRPO强化学习框架，通过实例级工具选择和分歧感知协同学习，解决医疗代理中工具故障导致的决策风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗AI代理常假设外部工具可靠，但在真实临床环境中，即使相关工具也可能在挑战性实例上失败，导致不安全的下游决策。实例依赖的失败模式造成最佳固定单工具与理想实例级选择器之间存在性能差距（Single-Oracle风险差距），而传统任务级工具选择无法弥补该差距，因为其效果受限于单工具性能上限。因此，需考虑实例级异质性，实现故障矫正。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出基于GRPO的强化学习框架，将工具使用建模为实例级选择问题。设计概率风险最小化奖励和分歧感知协同学习，促进实例级纠正错误工具共识。同时采用熵引导采样策略，提升高分歧实例的权重，为学习实例特定工具协同提供更强信号。两个组件互补，缓解实例级异质性，改善工具协同效应。
light_analysis.result: 在两项医疗任务（具体未明）和七个基准数据集上，所提方法相对于多种基线方法一致取得稳健且稳定的性能提升。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调其优于传统任务级选择方法和多数强化学习基线，验证了协同感知工具使用对可靠医疗代理系统的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了医疗代理中工具故障的风险，并提出了利用实例级工具选择和分歧感知协同学习的解决方案，显著提升了系统鲁棒性。该工作为构建可靠的医疗AI代理奠定了重要基础，强调工具使用需考虑实例特异性。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或扩展到多工具协同场景。

title: Self-Improvement Imitation with Biologically Guided Search for Protein Design Under Oracle Budgets
abstract: Protein sequence optimization under tight oracle budgets requires methods that explore vast combinatorial spaces while making each evaluation informative. Existing reinforcement learning and off-policy generative approaches often degrade under surrogate noise, and position-agnostic mutation proposals risk disrupting functionally critical residues. We introduce SILO, a trajectory-level self-improvement imitation framework for oracle-budgeted protein design. SILO uses a hierarchical edit policy that decomposes each mutation into a position choice followed by a residue choice.
