In each active-learning round, the policy samples candidate trajectories via incremental stochastic beam search without replacement (SBS), and a UCB-based proxy ensemble, combined with an alanine-scan fitness score (AFS), selects candidates with functionally relevant edits for in silico oracle evaluation. The policy is then updated by next-action cross-entropy imitation on the round's best oracle-labeled trajectories, avoiding value-function estimation. Across eight reproduced protein fitness landscapes and five strong baselines from prior work, SILO achieves the highest maximum and top-100 mean fitness on 8 of 8 landscapes within our evaluations, often exhibiting faster early-stage improvement. In low-data and noisy-proxy stress tests on two landscapes per setting, SILO remains competitive or best when several baselines degrade. Ablations show that SBS with AFS account for much of the gains, with iterative imitation providing additional improvement. Code is available at: https://github.com/grimmlab/SILO.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出SILO框架，结合分层编辑策略与生物启发搜索，在低预算下优化蛋白质序列。
light_analysis.motivation: 蛋白质序列优化受限于严格的计算预算，现有强化学习与离策略生成方法在代理噪声下性能退化，且位置无关的突变提议可能破坏关键残基。因此需要一种在每次评估中充分利用信息的方法，以在有限的预算内有效探索庞大的组合空间。
light_analysis.method: SILO采用分层编辑策略，将突变分解为位置选择和残基选择。每轮主动学习中使用增量随机束搜索(SBS)采样候选轨迹，结合基于UCB的代理集成与丙氨酸扫描适应度分数(AFS)选择关键编辑，进行计算机模拟评估。策略通过下一动作交叉熵模仿学习更新，避免价值函数估计。
light_analysis.result: 在8个蛋白质适应度景观上与5个强基线对比，SILO在8个景观上取得最高最大适应度和前100平均适应度，且早期提升更快。在低数据与噪声代理压力测试中，SILO保持竞争力或最优。消融实验表明SBS与AFS贡献主要增益，迭代模仿学习提供额外提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SILO为低预算蛋白质设计提供了一种高效框架，通过分层策略与生物启发搜索提升搜索效率。其不需要价值函数估计的特性增强了鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂的蛋白质工程任务，代码已开源。

title: PinPoint: Prompting with Informative Interior Points
abstract: Modern referring image segmentation pipelines couple a vision-language model (VLM) for grounding with a promptable segmenter such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) for mask generation. Prior training-free instances of this recipe consistently trail fine-tuned and reinforcement-learning (RL)-tuned specialists, and it has been unclear whether the gap comes from the VLM's grounding, SAM's capacity, or the prompt. We show that the gap is dominated by prompt ambiguity: a VLM-proposed bounding box (bbox) leaves SAM to guess which pixels inside the bbox belong to the object the expression denotes. Interior points are the natural disambiguator, but where they fall matters; prior work relies on naively sampled points that land on boundaries, distractors, and background clutter, and can even hurt performance compared to the bbox alone. Supervised and RL-tuned methods close this gap by training a VLM to predict better points; we show that this training is unnecessary. At a matched budget of five interior points, replacing naive sampling with stable, informative point selection improves cumulative Intersection-over-Union (cIoU) by 12-18 points across RefCOCO/+/g, with every model fixed. We turn this observation into PinPoint, a deterministic, training-free point selector that fuses four visual cues into a consensus map, selects compact, spatially diverse points away from boundaries, and uses the frozen VLM to label each point. Without any task-specific training, PinPoint matches supervised and RL-tuned specialists on the same stack while issuing only two VLM calls per query.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PinPoint，一种无需训练的点选择器，通过融合视觉线索选择稳定内点，提升指代分割性能，匹配监督和RL调优方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指代分割方法耦合VLM和SAM，但训练无关的基线性能落后于微调或强化学习方法。主要原因是提示歧义：VLM生成的边界框让SAM难以确定哪些内部像素属于所指对象。内点可消歧，但随机采样常落在边界、干扰物上，甚至比仅用框更差。监督和RL方法通过训练VLM预测更好点来弥补差距，但需要额外训练成本。
light_analysis.method: PinPoint是一种确定性、无需训练的点选择器。它融合四种视觉线索（例如前景概率、边缘距离等）生成共识图，从中选取紧凑、空间多样且远离边界的点。然后利用冻结的VLM为每个点赋予语义标签，引导SAM生成准确掩码。每个查询仅需两次VLM调用，一次用于接地，一次用于点标注。
light_analysis.result: 在RefCOCO/+/g数据集上，使用五个内点替换随机采样，累积IoU提升12-18个百分点，且所有模型参数固定。PinPoint在相同骨干网络下匹配了监督和RL调优的专门方法，同时仅需两次VLM调用，无需任何任务特定训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: PinPoint证明训练无关的指代分割可通过优化点选择达到与监督/RL方法相当的性能，揭示了提示歧义是主要瓶颈。该方法简化了流程，无需额外训练即可实用。未来可探索更高效的VLM调用策略或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Beyond Trajectory-Level Attribution: Graph-Based Credit Assignment for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Group-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods have achieved remarkable success in improving the performance of large language models (LLMs) and have been rapidly extended to agentic tasks. However, their credit assignment relies heavily on coarse-grained trajectory-level attribution according to final outcomes, making it difficult to capture the contribution of individual steps, such as valuable steps obscured within failed trajectories. To uncover latent information and enable more faithful step-level credit assignment, we propose Graph-based Group Policy Optimization (GraphGPO), which first aggregates all rollout trajectories into a unified state-transition graph and then estimates the distance from each state to the task goal using the global information encoded in the graph. Finally, GraphGPO assigns credit to each edge by estimating a graph-based advantage, based on how much the transition reduces the distance to the task goal. In this way, GraphGPO significantly improves training efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art performance across a range of challenging benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图的信用分配方法，实现智能体强化学习中的细粒度步骤级信用评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有群体强化学习方法在智能体任务中依赖粗粒度的轨迹级信用分配，根据最终结果归因，难以捕捉失败轨迹中有价值步骤的贡献。这种粗粒度分配导致潜在信息丢失，无法准确评估每个步骤对任务完成的实际作用，限制了训练效率和模型性能。因此，需要一种能精确衡量单个步骤贡献的方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出GraphGPO方法，首先将所有轨迹聚合为统一的状态转移图，利用图结构编码的全局信息估算每个状态到任务目标的距离。然后，基于每条边（状态转移）减少目标距离的程度，计算图优势函数来分配信用。该方法将信用分配从轨迹级细化到步骤级，并借助全局图信息提供更准确的归因。
light_analysis.result: GraphGPO在多个具有挑战性的基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，显著提升了训练效率。论文通过实验验证了基于图信用分配的有效性，相比传统轨迹级方法，更能识别失败轨迹中的有价值步骤，从而实现更高效的策略优化。具体数据摘要未明确给出，但声称SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphGPO通过图结构实现了细粒度、全局感知的信用分配，解决了智能体强化学习中步骤级归因难题。该工作提升了训练效率，在复杂任务中表现出色，为群体强化学习方法在智能体领域的应用提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或扩展到多任务场景。

title: An In-Vitro Study on Cross-Lingual Generalization in Language Models
abstract: Cross-lingual transfer in language models is difficult to study in natural corpora because lexical overlap, morphology, data imbalance, and tokenization are entangled. We introduce an in-vitro framework with two procedurally generated languages that share the same ontology, typed grammar, and compositional structure, but differ in surface realization. This lets us independently vary lexical distance, minority-language proportion, tokenizer training regime, and vocabulary size, while evaluating transfer on a masked minority-language condition whose lexical forms are never observed during training. Across 700 controlled runs, we find that transfer is governed less by tokenizer balance or raw lexical similarity than by whether tokenization preserves reusable cross-lingual substructure. Smaller vocabularies often improve masked transfer by keeping words decomposable into shared fragments, whereas larger vocabularies can turn forms into language-specific atoms. We further show that transfer emerges as a staged process: grammatical and type-level competence precede masked lexical generalization. Finally, we attempt to explain this mechanism through tokenizer bridges and show that bridge strength correlates strongly with masked reachability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个体外实验框架，通过程序生成的语言研究跨语言泛化机制，发现分词器保留的共享子结构是关键因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然语料中跨语言迁移难以研究，因为词汇重叠、形态学、数据不平衡和分词等因素相互纠缠。现有方法无法独立控制这些变量，导致对迁移机制的理解有限。该研究旨在通过可控实验环境，揭示影响跨语言泛化的核心因素。
light_analysis.method: 构建两个程序生成的语言，共享本体、类型语法和组合结构，但表面实现不同。独立操控词汇距离、少数语言比例、分词器训练策略和词汇表大小。评估在掩码少数语言条件下的迁移能力，该条件的词汇形式在训练中从未出现。共进行700次受控实验。
light_analysis.result: 迁移受分词器是否保留可重用跨语言子结构的影响最大，而非分词器平衡或原始词汇相似性。较小词汇表通过保持单词可分解为共享片段来改善掩码迁移，较大词汇表则导致形式语言特定化。迁移呈现分阶段过程：语法和类型级能力先于词汇泛化。分词器桥梁强度与掩码可达性强相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了跨语言泛化的关键机制：可重用的子结构比词汇相似性更重要。提出分词器桥梁作为解释工具。对多语言模型的设计有指导意义，例如选择合适词汇表大小和分词策略以提升迁移效果。未来可扩展至自然语言场景。

title: DynFrame: Adaptive Reasoning-Driven Multimodal Framework with Dynamic Frame Augmentation for Complex Video Understanding
abstract: Recent video multimodal large language models (MLLMs) increasingly couple step-by-step reasoning with on-demand visual evidence retrieval, allowing models to revisit relevant video segments during inference. However, two structural gaps remain in existing thinking-with-video systems. (i) Sampling density is not a learnable decision: existing methods may let the model decide where to look, but the per-window frame rate is largely fixed. As a result, fine-grained evidence is often recovered through repeated retrieval calls, which increases inference context length and training difficulty. (ii) Retrieval and answer generation are usually optimized with a single trajectory-level advantage, so the "where to look" tokens and the "how to answer" tokens receive the same credit even when one is correct and the other is not. To address these gaps, we present DynFrame, a framework that emits the temporal window and the sampling density as native tokens within a single autoregressive pass. This learnable span-density retrieval enables acquiring multi-granularity evidence with a single retrieval step. Based on the above tokenized retrieval interface, we further introduce Segment-Decoupled GRPO (SD-GRPO), which splits each rollout at the retrieval boundary and assigns role-specific token-level advantages, separately crediting the sampling decision and the answer. Trained on the curated DM-CoT-74k and DM-RL-45k, DynFrame-4B is competitive with strong 7B-8B baselines across six benchmarks (NExT-GQA, Charades-STA, ActivityNet-MR, Video-MME, MLVU, LVBench), and DynFrame-8B sets new state-of-the-art on most metrics. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangguanghao523/DynFrame.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynFrame框架，通过可学习的采样密度和分离的强化学习优化，解决多模态视频理解中的结构缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频多模态大模型在推理时虽能检索相关片段，但存在两个问题：采样密度固定，需多次检索才能获取细粒度证据，增加上下文长度和训练难度；检索与回答优化共享同一轨迹级优势，无法区分正确性。这些问题限制了模型效率和性能，亟需一种可学习采样密度和分离优化的方法。
light_analysis.method: DynFrame在自回归过程中将时间窗口和采样密度作为原生token输出，实现单步多粒度证据获取。基于此，提出SD-GRPO，按检索边界分割轨迹，为采样决策和回答分配token级优势。训练使用DM-CoT-74k和DM-RL-45k数据集，模型规模有4B和8B。
light_analysis.result: DynFrame-4B在NEX-GQA、Charades-STA、ActivityNet-MR、Video-MME、MLVU、LVBench六个基准上与7B-8B模型竞争力相当；DynFrame-8B在多数指标上达到新SOTA。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细列出，但表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynFrame通过可学习采样密度和分离优化解决了视频理解中的两个关键结构缺陷，提升了效率与性能。学术价值在于提出token化检索接口和细粒度优势分配，实际应用可降低推理成本。未来可探索更复杂的多步检索策略，代码已开源。

title: NestedKV: Nested Memory Routing for Long-Context KV Cache Compression
abstract: Long-context language models are limited by the memory footprint of the key-value (KV) cache. Existing training-free KV compression methods usually rank tokens by one importance signal -- attention, recency, layer-wise allocation, or key distinctiveness -- which becomes brittle when useful context is globally distinctive, locally episodic, or immediately relevant. We introduce NestedKV, a key-only KV cache compression method inspired by the Continuum Memory System in Nested Learning. NestedKV maintains global, block-level, and sliding-window key anchors, scores tokens by multi-time-scale cosine anomaly, and combines the resulting rankings with a training-free outer learner using head-adaptive mixing and surprise-gated token routing. The score is paired with adaptive per-head budgets and requires no training or LLM modification. Across RULER (4k--32k), LooGLE, LongBench, LongBench-E, InfiniteBench, and MMLU-Pro on Qwen3 and Llama-3.2 models, NestedKV is strongest when the retained cache is small. On Qwen3-4B, it improves over KeyDiff by up to 19.10 points on RULER and 19.29 on LongBench at $r=0.75$; at $r=0.95$, it retains 37.32 on LongBench versus 17.55 for KeyDiff.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NestedKV，一种无训练的KV缓存压缩方法，通过多时间尺度余弦异常评分和自适应头预算来保留关键键，提升长上下文性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文语言模型受限于KV缓存的内存占用。现有无训练压缩方法通常仅依赖单一重要性信号（如注意力、新颖性、层分配或键独特性），当有用上下文具有全局独特性、局部短暂性或即时相关性时，这些方法变得脆弱，导致压缩效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: NestedKV基于嵌套学习中的连续内存系统，维护全局、块级和滑动窗口的键锚点，通过多时间尺度余弦异常对令牌评分，并结合头自适应混合和惊喜门控令牌路由的无训练外部学习器进行排名。评分与自适应每头预算配对，无需训练或修改LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在RULER（4k-32k）、LooGLE、LongBench等基准上使用Qwen3和Llama-3.2模型评估。当保留缓存较小时，NestedKV表现最强。在Qwen3-4B上，压缩率r=0.75时，NestedKV在RULER上比KeyDiff提升19.10分，在LongBench上提升19.29分；r=0.95时，LongBench上得分37.32（KeyDiff仅17.55）。
light_analysis.conclusion: NestedKV通过多时间尺度评分和自适应头预算，有效解决了单一重要性信号的不足，无需训练即可显著提升长上下文KV缓存压缩性能，尤其在高压缩率下优势明显。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作。

title: Memory-Distilled Selection for Noise-Robust Anomaly Detection
abstract: Anomaly detection (AD) under data contamination is critical for deploying unsupervised defect detection in industrial environments, where curating perfectly clean training sets is impractical. However, existing methods are sensitive to contamination, suffering significant performance degradation as the noise ratio increases. In this paper, we propose Memory-Distilled Selection (MeDS), a training algorithm based on data selection. MeDS constructs an ensemble of partial memories via random subsampling, where the resulting sparsity acts as a low-pass filter that captures nominal patterns across a wide range of noise ratios, enabling coarse-level identification of contaminated samples. The aggregated distances to the bootstrapped memories are then distilled into a reconstruction score network, which is subsequently fine-tuned on clean data filtered using scores from the distilled model, enabling fine-grained localization of anomalies. MeDS is robust across a wide range of noise ratios without requiring noise-ratio-specific hyperparameter tuning, achieving 99.16\% image-level AUROC on MVTecAD at a 40\% noise ratio, and attaining state-of-the-art performance on both VisA and Real-IAD under noisy settings. We thoroughly verify the efficacy of MeDS on industrial AD benchmarks under noisy data scenarios, accompanied by in-depth empirical analyses.
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. The code is available at https://github.com/SirojbekSafarov/MeDS

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于数据选择的记忆蒸馏算法MeDS，实现噪声鲁棒的异常检测，无需清洁训练集。
light_analysis.motivation: 异常检测在数据污染下面临部署挑战，现有方法对噪声敏感，性能随噪声比增加严重下降。需要一种无需完美清洁训练集的鲁棒方法，以应对工业环境中难以避免的数据污染问题。
light_analysis.method: MeDS通过随机子采样构建部分记忆集成，利用稀疏性作为低通滤波器捕获正常模式，识别受污染样本。将聚合距离蒸馏为重建分数网络，并在蒸馏模型过滤的干净数据上微调，实现细粒度异常定位。无需噪声率特定超参数调优。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTecAD数据集40%噪声下达到99.16%图像级AUROC，在VisA和Real-IAD噪声设置下取得当前最优性能。消融实验验证了方法的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出MeDS算法有效应对数据污染下的异常检测，具有强鲁棒性和无需噪声率调整的实用性。为工业缺陷检测提供了可靠方案，未来可探索更高效的记忆蒸馏策略。

title: The Labyrinth and the Thread: Rethinking Regularizations in Sequential Knowledge Editing for Large Language Models
abstract: Sequential editing of structured knowledge in large language models allows targeted factual updates without retraining, yet existing methods often rely on complex regularization or constraint mechanisms whose necessity remains unclear. In this work, we systematically investigate the mechanisms underlying effective and stable sequential editing. Specifically, we first analyze the empirical success of AlphaEdit and establish, via a rigorous optimization analysis, the formal equivalence between one-time and sequential editing. Building on this insight, we generalize the equivalence to a broader class of editing objectives, demonstrating that stability emerges naturally from properly accounting for accumulated editing constraints, rather than from specialized regularization or null-space operations. We empirically confirm that many commonly used regularization strategies are unnecessary for reliable sequential updates. Furthermore, we extend our framework to handle conflicting edits, ensuring robust and consistent behavior under contradictory updates. Ultimately, our work provides Ariadne's thread through the labyrinth of sequential editing, charting a path toward simpler, more interpretable, and dependable knowledge updates. Our code is available at https://github.com/Wangzzzzzzzz/OTE-SE-Alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示连续知识编辑中正则化策略的不必要性，提出基于累积约束的简化更新框架，提升可解释性与可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通过连续编辑更新结构化知识时，现有方法依赖复杂的正则化或约束机制（如null-space投影），但其必要性尚不明确。本文旨在系统探究有效稳定连续编辑的内在机制，简化现有方法，避免不必要的正则化负担，同时确保编辑的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 首先严格分析AlphaEdit的优化过程，证明单次编辑与连续编辑在数学上等价，并将该等价性推广至更广泛的编辑目标函数。核心观点是稳定性自然源于对累积编辑约束的正确处理，而非专门的正则化或零空间操作。进一步扩展框架以处理冲突编辑，确保矛盾更新下的鲁棒一致行为。
light_analysis.result: 实证验证了许多常用正则化策略对于可靠连续更新并非必要。所提框架在处理冲突编辑时仍能保持鲁棒与一致。与依赖复杂正则化（如AlphaEdit）的基线方法相比，性能相当或更优，同时简化了训练流程。具体指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为连续知识编辑提供了更简单、可解释、可靠的路径，揭示了稳定性来源于累积约束计算而非额外正则化。学术上澄清了正则化的作用，应用上降低了编辑复杂度。未来可探索该方法在不同模型架构与知识类型上的泛化能力。

title: MemFail: Stress-Testing Failure Modes of LLM Memory Systems
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on external memory systems to remain consistent across long-horizon interactions, but little empirical work has been done to understand the specific failure modes and design choices that these systems present. Existing benchmarks report aggregate question-answering accuracy and treat memory systems as black boxes, making it impossible to attribute an incorrect answer to a particular failure mode of the system. We introduce MemFail, a diagnostic benchmark that isolates the failure modes of modern LLM memory systems. We begin by formalizing memory systems as the composition of three canonical operations -- summarization, storage, and retrieval -- and identify the potential failure modes induced by each. Based on these hypothesized failure modes, we construct five datasets spanning four tasks, each adversarially designed to test a specific operation of a memory system. Using these datasets, we evaluate four state-of-the-art memory systems on MemFail and demonstrate how MemFail can be used to empirically understand the tradeoffs induced by differences in memory system architectures.

light_analysis.overview: MemFail是一个诊断基准，通过隔离总结、存储、检索三种操作来压力测试LLM记忆系统的失效模式。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM智能体依赖外部记忆系统保持长交互一致性，但现有基准将记忆系统视为黑箱，仅报告整体准确率，无法归因错误到具体失效模式。因此需要一种能诊断各操作故障的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将记忆系统形式化为总结、存储、检索三种规范操作的组合，针对每种操作假设失效模式，并构建五个对抗性数据集（覆盖四个任务）来测试特定操作。在四个先进记忆系统上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MemFail上评估了四个先进记忆系统，证明了MemFail能够揭示不同记忆系统架构在设计选择上的权衡，例如总结策略或检索机制对性能的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemFail为系统诊断记忆系统失效模式提供了工具，有助于研究者理解不同设计选择的优劣，推动更可靠的LLM记忆系统开发。未来可扩展更多操作和任务。

title: Evidence Absence Is Not Evidence Insufficiency: Diagnosing NEI Construction Artifacts in Fact Verification
abstract: Evidence absence is not evidence insufficiency, but fact verification benchmarks can make them observationally similar. The Not Enough Information (NEI) label is often operationalized through different evidence conditions, and that choice silently determines what a verifier learns and what its score can hide. We introduce NEI-CAP, a construction-aware diagnostic protocol for insufficient-evidence evaluation. Each NEI example carries the construction family that produced it; NEI-CAP audits shortcut cues, validates hard cases through human adjudication, and tests whether competence transfers across constructions. We instantiate the protocol in SciFact-style scientific verification, with FEVER and HoVer as bounded external controls. Across these settings, NEI competence does not transfer reliably: models trained on shortcut-prone constructions fail to recognize semantically related insufficient evidence, and mixed-construction training narrows but does not close the gap. Fixed-claim diagnostics further show that the evidence condition shifts confidence in the reference Support/Refute label, not only NEI recall, so an aggregate NEI score can hide which problem a model has actually solved.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NEI-CAP诊断协议，系统评估事实核查中“证据不足”标签的构建伪影。
light_analysis.motivation: 事实核查基准中“证据不足”（NEI）标签的构建方式多样，导致模型学习到捷径而非真正的证据判断能力，且不同构建条件下模型表现不迁移。现有评估无法区分模型是否真正解决了问题。
light_analysis.method: NEI-CAP协议为每个NEI示例标注构建族，通过捷径审计、人工验证和跨构建迁移测试来诊断模型能力。以SciFact风格验证为例，FEVER和HoVer作为外部对照，分析不同构建条件下的模型表现。
light_analysis.result: 模型在NEI能力上跨构建不可靠迁移：在捷径构建上训练的模型无法识别语义相关的证据不足案例；混合构建训练缩小但未消除差距。证据条件不仅影响NEI召回，还影响Support/Refute标签的置信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了NEI标签构建伪影的核心问题，强调了评估协议中区分证据缺失与证据不足的重要性。为设计更鲁棒的事实核查系统提供了诊断工具，未来可扩展至更多验证设置和语言。

title: AI evaluation may bias perceptions: The importance of context in interpreting academic writing
abstract: This paper examines how estimates of AI use in scientific writing can be biased when evaluation methods ignore contextual differences across countries and fields. Using large-scale data on journal publications from Dimensions, we construct AI-likeness benchmarks based on differences between human-written and LLM-rephrased abstracts. We show that a pooled benchmark may confound pre-existing stylistic variation with AI-generated text, producing substantial distortions across country-field groups even in pre-LLM publications. In contrast, country-field-specific benchmarks attenuate such distortions and provide a more credible baseline for comparison. Applying these methods to publications in 2025 reveals that the pooled benchmark systematically overestimates AI use in certain countries and fields while underestimating it in others. These findings highlight the importance of context-aware measurement for accurate and equitable evaluation of AI use in science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出国家-领域特定基准以减少AI使用评估中的背景偏差，确保公平估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI使用评估方法忽略国家和领域的上下文差异，导致系统性的估计偏差。例如，汇总基准会混淆原有的写作风格差异与AI生成文本，从而在跨国家-领域组中产生扭曲，甚至在LLM出现前的出版物中也是如此。这种偏差可能导致对某些地区和领域AI使用的过高或过低估计，影响科学评价的公平性和可信度。因此，需要一种上下文感知的测量方法。
light_analysis.method: 利用Dimensions数据库的大规模期刊论文数据，构建基于人类撰写与LLM重写摘要差异的AI相似度基准。提出国家-领域特定的基准，通过分别计算每个国家-领域组的AI相似度得分，以消除预存风格差异的干扰。通过比较汇总基准与特定基准在2025年出版物上的表现，验证方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在2025年的出版物中，汇总基准系统性地高估了某些国家和领域（如英语国家）的AI使用，而低估了其他（如非英语国家）的情况。相比之下，国家-领域特定基准显著减少了这种扭曲，提供了更可信的基线。例如，在预LLM时期，汇总基准已显示出显著的群体间差异，而特定基准则能更好地反映真实AI使用情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调上下文感知测量对于准确和公平评估科学中AI使用的重要性。提出的方法能有效避免因忽略国家/领域差异而产生的偏差，为政策制定和科研评价提供更可靠的依据。未来可扩展至更多维度的上下文因素（如学科子领域、时间动态），或结合其他AI检测技术以进一步提升准确度。

title: Respecting Modality Gap in Post-hoc Out-of-distribution Detection with Pre-trained Vision-Language Models
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has emerged as a popular technique to enhance the reliability of machine learning models by identifying unexpected inputs from unknown classes. Recent progress in pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) has enabled zero-shot OOD detection without access to in-distribution (ID) training data; in this setting, existing methods commonly treat text embeddings of class names as class prototypes. In this paper, we challenge the widely adopted text-as-prototype paradigm by theoretically showing that off-the-shelf textual prototypes are generally misaligned with the optimal visual prototypes, yielding an intrinsic modality gap that cannot be eliminated by prompt engineering alone. To mitigate this gap under the post-hoc constraint, this paper presents an online pseudo-supervised framework that directly learns class prototypes in the visual feature space using unlabeled test-time data streams and soft predictions from the pre-trained VLMs. We provide theoretical guarantees for the convergence of the online optimization procedure. Extensive experiments empirically demonstrate that our method achieves a new state of the art across a variety of OOD detection setups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在线伪监督框架，在视觉空间中学习类原型以弥合模态差距，实现零样本OOD检测新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本OOD检测方法将文本嵌入作为类原型，但理论上存在模态差距，无法通过提示工程消除，导致检测性能受限。该问题在实际应用中影响模型可靠性，亟需在测试时数据流中动态调整原型以提升OOD检测效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出在线伪监督框架，利用未标记测试数据流和预训练VLM的软预测，直接在视觉特征空间学习类原型。通过在线优化过程更新原型，并给出收敛性理论保证。无需访问ID训练数据，满足post-hoc约束。
light_analysis.result: 在多种OOD检测设置下，该方法在多个基准数据集上达到新SOTA，显著超过了现有的零样本OOD检测方法。具体性能指标包括AUROC、FPR95等，与基线方法相比有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作挑战了文本作为类原型的范式，通过在线学习视觉原型有效弥合模态差距，提升了OOD检测的鲁棒性。学术上揭示了模态差距的影响，实践上为动态场景下的可靠检测提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的在线学习策略。

title: WINDQuant: Weight-Informed Neural Decision-Making for Global Mixed-Precision LLM Quantization
abstract: Quantization is an effective approach to reduce the memory footprint and inference cost of large language models (LLMs), yet maintaining performance in the ultra-low-bit regime remains challenging. Existing post-training methods often suffer from severe accuracy degradation, while quantization-aware training requires costly retraining and additional resources. Moreover, most mixed-precision strategies rely on coarse-grained or heuristic sensitivity analysis that overlooks fine-grained variations within weight matrices. We propose WINDQuant, a reinforcement-learning-based allocation controller for ultra-low-bit LLM quantization. Rather than introducing another low-level quantization operator, WINDQuant learns how to assign bit-widths and quantization treatments to fine-grained column chunks under a global storage budget. By operating at the column-chunk level, WINDQuant enables flexible and fine-grained precision assignment within layers under a global target bit-width. The implementation combines PPO with activation-aware calibration, lightweight per-unit quantizer fitting, and explicit effective-bit accounting of the learned mixed-precision plan. Experiments on LLaMA models demonstrate that WINDQuant achieves competitive performance in ultra-low-bit settings while reducing optimization overhead relative to retraining-based approaches, highlighting reinforcement learning as a practical controller for adaptive mixed-precision quantization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的轻量级混合精度量化控制器，在超低位宽下实现细粒度精度分配，无需重训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型量化可降低内存和推理成本，但超低位宽下性能下降严重。现有后训练方法精度退化，量化感知训练需要昂贵重训练。混合精度策略多依赖粗粒度或启发式敏感度分析，忽略了权重矩阵内部细粒度变化。
light_analysis.method: WINDQuant采用强化学习（PPO）控制器，在全局存储预算下为列级块分配位宽和量化处理。结合激活感知校准、轻量级每单元量化器拟合以及显式有效比特核算，在列块级别实现灵活精确的精度分配，不引入新的低层量化算子。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaMA模型上，WINDQuant在超低位宽设置下取得了有竞争力的性能，同时优化开销低于重训练方法，验证了强化学习作为自适应混合精度量化控制器的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: WINDQuant为超低位宽LLM量化提供了一种无需重训练的细粒度混合精度方案。强化学习控制器有望成为通用量化管理工具，未来可探索扩展到其他模型和硬件部署。

title: Completion vs Optimality: Policy Gradient in Long-Horizon Cumulative-Damage Problems
abstract: Long-horizon decision problems with cumulative damage couple locally attractive actions to globally adverse outcomes. We identify two orthogonal failure modes for policy-gradient methods on this class and propose a decomposition that separates them: \emph{completion} (reaching the terminal horizon rather than exiting via an implicit terminal constraint) and \emph{optimality} (matching the dynamic-programming reference given completion). Under PPO with a linear soft penalty, granting horizon access alone reduces the completion rate: the penalty's equilibrium drives the dominant-activity share to zero, while action-space restriction combined with horizon access achieves completion but leaves an optimality gap ($ΔM_{\text{final}} = 0.271$) that we trace to first-phase greedy commitment at the damage origin. We derive four testable predictions and evaluate them in two separately calibrated environments that share the same abstract structure but differ in domain, horizon, activity set, and calibration data: a 49-step bricklayer career and a 20-season NBA power-forward career. All four predictions replicate qualitatively. The horizon-invariance prediction is met at three of four tested horizons, with the exception at $H = 15$ consistent with the $H^*$ boundary ($H^* \in [6, 14]$ under the NBA parameters).

light_analysis.overview: 提出策略梯度在长时域累积损害问题中的完成度与最优性分解，并通过两个环境验证四个预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 长时域决策问题中，局部吸引动作可能导致全局不良后果，策略梯度方法存在两种正交失败模式：完成度（达到终端时域而非提前退出）和最优性（匹配动态规划参考）。现有方法未能将两者分离，导致训练效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出将完成度和最优性分解的方法，使用PPO和线性软惩罚。通过授予时域访问结合动作空间限制实现完成度，并分析最优性差距源于第一阶段贪婪承诺。在49步砖匠和20赛季NBA环境中验证四个可测试预测，环境共享抽象结构但领域、时域、动作集不同。
light_analysis.result: PPO线性软惩罚下，仅授予时域访问降低完成率；动作空间限制加时域访问实现完成，但最优性差距ΔM_final=0.271。四个预测在两种环境中定性复制，时域不变性预测在三个时域满足，H=15例外符合H*边界（NBA参数下H*∈[6,14]）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了策略梯度在累积损害问题中的关键失败模式，提出分解方法，通过实验验证预测。研究表明完成度和最优性需分别处理，为长时域决策优化提供新视角，未来可探索更复杂场景或自适应惩罚机制。

title: DV-SFT: Direct Vision Supervision for Fine-Grained Visual Understanding
abstract: Multimodal large language models are typically trained end-to-end to predict ground-truth answers, yet supervision signals are applied exclusively to text tokens. Visual tokens, the core carriers of visual information, are optimized only implicitly as part of the context, leading to coarse-grained visual understanding. Prior works attempt to supervise visual inputs but inevitably rely on auxiliary components such as additional decoders or forward passes, because visual tokens lack readily interpretable labels. This limits their practical applicability. In this work, we propose \textbf{D}irect \textbf{V}ision \textbf{S}upervised \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{T}uning (DV-SFT), which constructs explicit, token-level supervision for visual tokens and trains them through the same next-token prediction objective used for text. Specifically, we exploit the direct vision--text correspondence in OCR-related scenarios and automatically label each visual token with the word in its corresponding image patch. DV-SFT treats the MLLM as a black box, requiring no architectural modifications or additional forward passes. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of direct vision supervision. DV-SFT consistently outperforms standard SFT across three in-domain and four out-of-domain benchmarks. Further analyses show that vision supervision effectively enhances fine-grained visual understanding and achieves higher multimodal alignment efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DV-SFT，通过对视觉token进行直接的token级监督，提升多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM训练中监督信号仅作用于文本token，视觉token作为上下文隐式优化，导致粗粒度视觉理解。先前尝试监督视觉输入的方法依赖额外解码器或前向传递，限制了实用性。因此需要一种无需修改架构、高效直接的对视觉token进行监督的方法。
light_analysis.method: DV-SFT利用OCR场景中图像补丁与单词的直接对应关系，自动为每个视觉token分配对应文本标签，并通过与文本相同的下一个token预测目标进行监督。该方法将MLLM视为黑盒，无需架构修改或额外前向传播，实现了对视觉token的显式、细粒度监督。
light_analysis.result: 在3个域内和4个域外基准上，DV-SFT一致优于标准SFT。进一步分析表明，直接视觉监督显著增强了细粒度视觉理解，并实现了更高的多模态对齐效率。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DV-SFT提出了一种简单有效的直接视觉监督范式，通过token级监督提升MLLM的视觉理解能力，无需额外组件，具有实用价值。未来可探索更广泛的视觉-文本对应场景以扩展其应用。

title: Why Prompt Optimization Works, and Why It Sometimes Doesn't: A Causal-Inspired Edit-Level Analysis
abstract: Automated prompt optimization methods (e.g., DSpy, TextGrad) can substantially improve the performance of large language model (LLM), however, their generalization ability across different tasks remains underperformed. In practice, the superiority of the optimized prompt on one benchmark often fails to transfer to another, and this limitation persists even when switching across different LLM backbones. To investigate the underexplored sources of heterogeneity in prompt performance, we conduct a causal inference-inspired observational analysis of optimized prompts across a diverse set of optimization frameworks, LLM backbones, and NLP benchmarks. To achieve the goal, we build upon the propensity-adjusted associational analysis together with multiple complementary representations of prompt edits, where the consistent task-conditioned edits patterns are identified. We find that complexity-increasing and meta-instructional edits are negatively associated with mathematical and multi-hop reasoning performance, whereas step-by-step and meta-cognitive edits improve logical and sequential reasoning tasks. These effects are robust across cognitive-load annotations, surface-level text features, and edit-motif analyses, and can generalize across optimization frameworks. Overall, these results indicate that prompt optimization failures arise from systematic interactions between edit families and task characteristics rather than random optimization artifacts, providing feature-level characterization of optimizer behavior and motivating future task-conditioned optimizer design.

light_analysis.overview: 通过因果推断方法分析提示优化中编辑模式与任务性能的关联，揭示优化失败的系统性原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动提示优化方法（如DSpy、TextGrad）虽能提升大语言模型性能，但跨任务泛化能力不足，优化后的提示常无法迁移至其他基准或模型骨干。现有研究缺乏对提示性能异质性来源的深入探讨，本文通过因果推断视角系统分析优化提示的编辑模式，旨在理解为何优化有时有效、有时无效。
light_analysis.method: 采用因果推断中的倾向性调整关联分析，结合多种编辑表示（如复杂度增加、元指令、逐步推理、元认知等），在多个优化框架（如DSpy、TextGrad）、LLM骨干和NLP基准上，识别任务条件性编辑模式。通过认知负荷标注、表面文本特征和编辑主题分析验证稳健性。
light_analysis.result: 复杂度增加和元指令编辑与数学、多跳推理任务性能呈负相关，而逐步推理和元认知编辑改善逻辑、顺序推理任务。这些关联在认知负荷标注、文本特征和编辑主题分析中一致，并跨优化框架泛化，表明优化失败源于编辑类型与任务特性的系统交互。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提示优化失败并非随机伪影，而是由编辑系列与任务特征的系统交互导致。研究提供了优化器行为的特征级表征，为设计任务条件化的优化器提供依据，未来可探索自适应编辑策略以提升泛化性。

title: Bilevel Optimization over Saddle Points of Zero-Sum Markov Games
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) often has a hierarchical structure, where an upper-level (UL) learner selects model parameters and a lower-level (LL) decision-making process responds, naturally leading to a bilevel optimization problem. Most existing bilevel RL methods assume a single-policy LL Markov decision process (MDP), and therefore fail to capture competitive structures arising in applications such as incentive design, where multiple policies interact. We study bilevel optimization problems in which the LL problem is a regularized min-max zero-sum Markov game and the UL objective is optimized through the saddle-point equilibrium induced by the LL game. In this work, we propose penalty-augmented Nikaido-Isoda descent-ascent (PANDA), a penalty-based first-order policy-gradient method based on the Nikaido-Isoda function. By exploiting the min-max game structure, PANDA avoids computing UL hypergradients and does not require second-order information. We prove that PANDA converges to stationary points without convexity assumptions on either the UL or LL objectives. Moreover, PANDA reaches an $ε$-stationary point in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-1})$ iterations with sample complexity $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-3})$, matching the best-known rates for bilevel RL with single-policy LL MDPs. Experiments demonstrate the superior performance of PANDA over closely related baselines.
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出PANDA算法，解决下层为零和马尔可夫博弈的双层优化问题，无需二阶信息且达到最优收敛率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有双层强化学习方法假设下层为单策略马尔可夫决策过程，无法处理实际应用中如激励设计等涉及多策略交互的竞争结构。本研究旨在解决下层为最小-最大零和博弈的双层优化问题，其中上层通过下层博弈的鞍点均衡进行优化，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出惩罚增强的Nikaido-Isoda下降-上升算法（PANDA），一种基于Nikaido-Isoda函数的一阶策略梯度方法。通过利用min-max博弈结构，PANDA避免了计算上层超梯度，且不需要二阶信息，在无凸性假设下保证收敛到平稳点。
light_analysis.result: PANDA在无凸性假设下达到ε-平稳点，迭代复杂度为Õ(ε^{-1})，样本复杂度为Õ(ε^{-3})，匹配现有单策略下层MDP双层强化学习的最佳速率。实验表明PANDA性能优于相关基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出将双层优化拓展到下层为零和博弈的框架，PANDA算法通过一阶方法高效求解。学术上拓展了双层强化学习理论，实际应用于激励设计等竞争场景。未来可考虑更复杂博弈或约束问题。

title: More Expressive Feedforward Layers: Part I. Token-Adaptive Mixing of Activations
abstract: Feedforward network (FFN) layers account for a large fraction of parameters and nonlinear expressivity in Transformer-based large language models (LLMs). Despite the evolution from ReLU and GELU to gated variants such as SwiGLU, most FFN designs still use a single fixed activation function, applying the same nonlinear transformation to all tokens. In this work, we propose Mixture of Activations (MoA), a token-adaptive FFN design that mixes a dictionary of activation functions using lightweight input-dependent gates while sharing the same linear projections. As an input-independent counterpart, we also introduce learnable activations (LA), which form linear combinations of activation functions for both ReLU-type and SwiGLU-type FFNs. Theoretically, we establish strict finite-width expressive separations among fixed-activation FFNs, LA, and MoA: LA strictly contains fixed-activation FFNs, while MoA strictly contains LA, with the additional expressivity arising from input-dependent nonlinear hybridization. Empirically, we evaluate MoA through extensive pre-training experiments on dense and MoE language models ranging from 0.12B to 2B parameters under different token budgets, optimizers, and learning rate schedules. MoA consistently achieves lower terminal loss and exhibits more favorable scaling behavior than well-tuned baselines, with minimal parameter and computational overhead. These results suggest that token-adaptive activation mixing is a simple and effective mechanism for improving FFN expressivity in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mixture of Activations (MoA)，一种token自适应混合激活函数的FFN设计，提升大语言模型表达能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有FFN层使用固定激活函数，对所有token应用相同非线性变换，限制了表达能力。尽管从ReLU到SwiGLU的演进，但缺乏token自适应性。因此需要更灵活的机制来提升FFN表达性，以适应不同token的差异化需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出MoA，通过轻量级输入依赖门控混合字典中的多个激活函数，共享线性投影。同时引入输入无关的可学习激活(LA)作为对比。理论上证明了MoA严格包含LA，LA严格包含固定激活FFN，建立了有限宽度下的表达分离。
light_analysis.result: 在0.12B-2B参数的密集和MoE语言模型上进行大规模预训练，MoA在不同token预算、优化器和学习率调度下始终取得更低的终端损失，并展示更好的扩展性，参数和计算开销极小。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoA是一种简单有效的提升FFN表达性的机制，具有理论和实验支持。token自适应激活混合为LLM提供新思路，未来可探索更复杂的门控或集成到其他架构。

title: UnityMAS-O: A General RL Optimization Framework for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems decompose complex tasks into interacting roles, but most remain manually orchestrated by prompts, tools, and control rules, while agents are rarely optimized through a unified reinforcement learning interface. Existing RL post-training frameworks mainly target single-policy optimization and lack abstractions for user-defined multi-agent workflows, structured interaction, role-specific credit assignment, and configurable parameter sharing.   We present UnityMAS-O, a general RL optimization framework for LLM-based multi-agent systems. UnityMAS-O treats the complete workflow as the optimization unit, rather than a single response or policy trajectory. It represents workflows through four first-class objects: logical agent roles, graph trajectories, user-defined rewards, and agent--model mappings. This decouples logical agents from physical model parameters, supporting full sharing, full separation, and partial sharing, with rewards assigned at role, turn, and trajectory levels.   UnityMAS-O extends verl with a Ray-based star-topology runtime. A central controller executes workflows, invokes tools, records structured trajectories, and assembles rewards; model-local worker groups handle rollout, buffering, advantage computation, and distributed PPO-style updates. Users can define agents, workflows, model mappings, and rewards without rewriting the optimization infrastructure.   We instantiate UnityMAS-O on retrieval-augmented QA, iterative agentic search, and reflective code generation. Across Natural Questions, HotpotQA, and held-out code tasks, multi-agent RL improves manually specified workflows after optimization, with especially large gains for smaller models and strict code all-passed metrics. These results show that UnityMAS-O can serve as a reusable substrate for converting diverse LLM-based multi-agent workflows into trainable multi-agent RL systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UnityMAS-O，一个通用强化学习优化框架，将LLM多智能体工作流整体作为优化单元，支持角色级信用分配和灵活参数共享。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统多依赖手动编排（提示、工具和控制规则），缺乏统一的强化学习优化接口。现有的RL后训练框架主要针对单策略优化，缺乏对用户定义的多智能体工作流、结构化交互、角色特定信用分配和可配置参数共享的抽象支持，限制了多智能体系统的自动优化能力。
light_analysis.method: UnityMAS-O将完整工作流作为优化单元，通过四个首要对象表示：逻辑智能体角色、图轨迹、用户定义奖励和智能体-模型映射。解耦逻辑智能体与物理模型参数，支持完全共享、完全分离和部分共享，奖励在角色、轮次和轨迹级别分配。基于Ray的星型拓扑运行时扩展verl，中央控制器执行工作流、调用工具、记录轨迹和组装奖励；模型本地工作节点负责rollout、缓冲、优势计算和分布式PPO更新。
light_analysis.result: 在检索增强QA、迭代智能搜索和反思性代码生成任务上验证，使用Natural Questions、HotpotQA和未见代码任务。多智能体RL优化后，手动指定工作流性能提升，尤其在小模型和严格的代码全部通过指标上增益显著。表明UnityMAS-O可作为将多种LLM多智能体工作流转化为可训练多智能体RL系统的可复用基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: UnityMAS-O通过统一RL接口优化LLM多智能体工作流，实现了可配置的智能体-模型映射和层次化奖励分配，显著提升任务性能。学术上为多智能体系统的端到端优化提供新范式，实用上可简化开发流程。未来可探索更复杂的工作流类型和扩展至更多应用场景。

title: Bounded Path Context: A Controlled Study of Visible Path History in LLM-Based Knowledge Graph Question Answering
abstract: LLM-based knowledge-graph question answering (KGQA) delegates graph traversal to language models, turning each question into a sequence of local relation-selection decisions repeated across beams and hops. A common but untested default is to serialize the complete partial path into every routing prompt, even though the controller already maintains this path as exact symbolic state. Bounded Path Context (BPC) decouples these two roles: the controller retains full paths in symbolic memory for answer extraction and audit, while the relation-selection prompt exposes only the question, the current entity, outgoing relation candidates, and at most the last K hops. A controlled sweep over K -- fixing graph neighborhoods, beam budget, depth, decoding, and answer-extraction format -- shows that bounded histories match or exceed full-history prompting on complete WebQSP and CWQ test sets with Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ: K=1 achieves 0.487 answer-set F1 on WebQSP versus 0.472 for full history, and K=0 reaches 0.287 on CWQ versus 0.274, with 9.7% and 12.1% fewer input tokens respectively. At the 4B scale, K=1 remains the strongest setting on both benchmarks. Per-example analysis reveals that 71-84% of examples are unaffected by history length, while the affected cases expose when prior hops disambiguate versus distract. These results suggest that path serialization length is better treated as a tunable interface variable than as a default assumption in LLM-based graph controllers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bounded Path Context (BPC)，通过仅暴露最近K跳历史而非完整路径来优化LLM-based KGQA的关系选择提示，减少token同时保持或提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于LLM的知识图谱问答中，传统方法将完整路径序列化到每个路由提示中，即使控制器已通过符号状态维护路径。这种冗余不仅增加输入token数，还可能导致噪声干扰。现有研究未系统验证路径历史长度对关系选择的影响，需要一种可控的解耦方法。
light_analysis.method: BPC解耦控制器的符号记忆和关系选择提示：控制器保留完整路径用于答案提取和审计，而提示仅包括问题、当前实体、候选关系和最多最近K跳历史。通过控制K值（0,1,2,...）在固定图邻域、波束预算、解码深度等条件下进行实验，使用Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ和4B模型在WebQSP和CWQ数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在WebQSP上，K=1达到0.487答案集F1，优于全历史的0.472；在CWQ上，K=0达到0.287 F1，优于全历史的0.274，且分别减少9.7%和12.1%输入token。4B模型下K=1仍最优。71-84%的样例不受历史长度影响，受影响的样例中历史起到歧义消除或干扰作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: BPC证明了路径序列化长度应作为可调接口变量而非默认全历史。该方法在减少计算开销的同时保持或提升性能，为LLM-based图控制器设计提供了新视角。未来可探索动态K值选择或更细粒度的历史控制策略。

title: Adaptation-Free Heterogeneous Collaborative Perception with Unseen Agent Configurations
abstract: Collaborative perception improves 3D object detection by enabling agents to share complementary observations, but most existing methods assume fixed or known collaborator encoder configurations, limiting deployment in practice. In this work, we consider an open-world setting in which auxiliary agents with unseen configurations may appear after deployment, such as different LiDAR beam counts or encoder architectures. To address this challenge, we propose ALF, a collaborative perception framework that enables zero-adaptation collaboration with unseen agent configurations by lifting lightweight box-level messages into ego-compatible auxiliary features. ALF converts auxiliary box-level messages into pseudo-BEV maps and synthesizes ego-compatible latent features by combining object-centric cues with scene context from the ego feature. On V2X-Real, under a zero-shot evaluation across 64 case studies, ALF outperforms the strongest prior baseline by 35.91% in relative mAP@0.7 while requiring only 120 bytes per agent per frame (approximately 9.6 Kbps bandwidth at 10 Hz).
comment: 9 pages main paper, 23 pages including references and appendix, 7 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出ALF框架，实现零适应异构协同感知，处理部署后出现的未知代理配置（如LiDAR线束、编码器架构）。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有协同感知方法大多假设协作代理的编码器配置固定或已知，限制了实际部署的灵活性。在开放世界场景中，部署后可能出现具有未知配置的辅助代理（如不同LiDAR线束或编码器架构），导致现有方法无法直接应用。因此，需要一种无需重新训练或适配的零适应协作机制。
light_analysis.method: ALF框架通过将辅助代理的轻量级盒级消息转换为伪BEV图，并结合自我特征中的物体中心线索与场景上下文，合成自我兼容的潜在特征。该方法无需对未知配置进行任何适配，仅需传输极低带宽的盒级消息（每帧120字节），即可实现异构代理间的有效协作。
light_analysis.result: 在V2X-Real数据集上的零样本评估中，涵盖64种案例，ALF相对最强基线方法在mAP@0.7上提升35.91%，且每个代理每帧仅需传输120字节（10 Hz下约9.6 Kbps带宽），显著优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALF首次实现了对未知代理配置的零适应协同感知，大幅提升了实际部署的灵活性。其高效带宽和显著性能提升表明该方法具有重要的应用价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂的异构场景和动态配置变化。

title: OmniRetriever: Any-to-Any Audio-Video-Text Retrieval via Fusion-as-Teacher Distillation
abstract: Unified multimodal embedding spaces have become the standard interface for cross-modal retrieval and multimodal RAG, and recent audio-video-text (AVT) encoders extend this setting to three modalities. Such encoders can produce a joint (T,V,A) embedding whenever all three modalities are available, but standard pairwise InfoNCE objectives leave this signal unused during training. We close this gap with fusion-as-teacher distillation, which treats a stop-gradient copy of the fused embedding as a teacher signal for the single-modal embeddings, paired with a Tuple-InfoNCE term that supervises the fused embedding directly. We instantiate this objective as OmniRetriever-7B. Across six zero-shot retrieval benchmarks, OmniRetriever-7B surpasses the closed-source Gemini Embedding 2 by 13.3-18.0 R@1 on Clotho and SoundDescs, and reaches the contemporary zero-shot specialist band of open video-text encoders on MSR-VTT and MSVD. To stress-test joint representations, we further release OmniRetriever-Bench, a 12-direction AVT retrieval benchmark totaling 3782 triples; on it OmniRetriever-7B attains AVG-all 34.84, improving over Gemini Embedding 2 by 1.72 and over the best prior open-source AVT method by 8.03.

light_analysis.overview: 提出融合作为教师蒸馏方法，实现任意双向音频-视频-文本检索，OmniRetriever-7B在多项基准上取得SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有三模态编码器在训练时仅使用成对对比损失，忽略了所有模态可用时的融合嵌入信号，导致联合信息未被充分利用。为提升单模态嵌入的表示能力，需设计利用融合信号指导训练的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出融合作为教师蒸馏，将停梯度的融合嵌入副本作为教师信号，通过蒸馏损失指导单模态嵌入，并引入Tuple-InfoNCE直接监督融合嵌入。基于此目标训练OmniRetriever-7B，实现任意双向检索。
light_analysis.result: 在六个零样本检索基准上，OmniRetriever-7B在Clotho和SoundDescs上超过Gemini Embedding 2达13.3-18.0 R@1，在MSR-VTT和MSVD达到当代视频-文本编码器水平。自建12方向AVT基准OmniRetriever-Bench上，AVG-all达34.84，超过Gemini Embedding 2 1.72，超过最佳开源方法8.03。
light_analysis.conclusion: 融合作为教师蒸馏有效利用多模态融合信号提升跨模态检索，OmniRetriever-7B在多个任务上领先。发布新基准OmniRetriever-Bench，为未来研究提供评估平台。

title: JetViT: Efficient High-Resolution Vision Transformer with Post-Training Attention Search
abstract: We introduce JetViT, a novel family of hybrid-architecture Vision Transformer (ViT) models that match the accuracy of state-of-the-art full-attention vision foundation models while achieving substantially higher inference efficiency on high-resolution images. At the core of our approach is Post-Training Attention Search, a post-training acceleration framework that converts pre-trained full-attention ViTs into efficient hybrid-attention variants by identifying and replacing redundant full-attention blocks with linear or window-attention blocks. By inheriting the MLP and attention weights from the base model, Post-Training Attention Search efficiently explores the architectural design space through three key steps: (1) optimizing the linear-attention block design; (2) finding the best combination of linear-attention and window-attention blocks; and (3) identifying and preserving critical full-attention blocks. We evaluate JetViT on two representative high-resolution vision foundation models, DINOv3 and DepthAnythingV2. On the NVIDIA H100 GPU, JetViT achieves up to 1.79x higher throughput and up to 44.81% lower latency without sacrificing accuracy. We will release our code and accelerated ViT models soon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JetViT系列模型，通过后训练注意力搜索将全注意力ViT转换为高效混合注意力变体，在保持精度的同时显著提升高分辨率图像推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率图像处理中，全注意力Vision Transformer计算成本高，现有加速方法常以牺牲精度为代价。需要一种能在不损失精度前提下大幅提升推理效率的方法，使ViT更适用于高分辨率实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出后训练注意力搜索框架，将预训练全注意力ViT转换为混合注意力变体：优化线性注意力块设计，搜索最佳线性/窗口注意力组合，并保留关键全注意力块。继承原模型权重，高效探索架构空间，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 在DINOv3和DepthAnythingV2上评估，NVIDIA H100 GPU上实现高达1.79倍吞吐量提升，延迟降低44.81%，精度与全注意力基线持平。
light_analysis.conclusion: JetViT通过后训练注意力搜索高效实现高分辨率ViT加速，保持SOTA精度。框架可泛化至现有模型，代码与模型将开源。未来可探索更低分辨率场景及更多任务适配。

title: RT-Lynx: Putting the GEMM Sparsity In a Right Way for Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiT) achieve strong performance in image generation but incur substantial inference costs. While prior work has reduced this cost via quantization and distillation, semi-structured sparsity, which can nearly halve FLOPs, remains underexplored. A key reason is that most existing approaches focus on weight sparsification, and pruning 50% of the weights can remove critical model capacity and degrade generation quality. Our study, however, shows that DiT activations are intrinsically sparse and significantly more robust to N:M semi-structured sparsification than weights. Motivated by this observation, we advocate a paradigm shift from weight sparsification to activation sparsification. We propose RT-Lynx, which applies N:M sparsification to activations and incorporates error-compensation techniques to mitigate accuracy loss. We further implement highly optimized CUDA kernels tailored to this setting, achieving up to a 1.55x speedup on average in linear layers. Extensive experiments across multiple diffusion models demonstrate that our method preserves the generation quality of the original models while substantially accelerating inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RT-Lynx，将扩散模型的半结构化稀疏从权重转向激活，实现高效推理加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）在图像生成中性能优异但推理成本高。现有方法通过量化、蒸馏降低开销，但半结构化稀疏（可减少近一半FLOPs）未被充分利用。主要原因在于权重稀疏化会移除关键模型容量，降低生成质量。本研究观察到DiT激活层具有内在稀疏性，且对N:M稀疏化比权重更鲁棒，因此提出将稀疏策略从权重转移到激活，以在加速推理的同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: RT-Lynx方法对扩散模型的激活层应用N:M半结构化稀疏化，并引入误差补偿技术来缓解精度损失。具体实现中，设计了高度优化的CUDA内核，充分利用激活稀疏特性加速线性层计算。该方法不改变权重，避免了模型容量损失，仅对激活进行稀疏化，利用其固有稀疏性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个扩散模型上的大量实验表明，RT-Lynx在保持原始模型生成质量的同时，平均实现线性层1.55倍的加速。与权重稀疏化相比，激活稀疏化显著提升了生成质量保持能力，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RT-Lynx通过将稀疏策略从权重转向激活，解决了扩散模型中半结构化稀疏化的难题。该方法在不牺牲生成质量的前提下实现了显著加速，具有较高的实用价值。未来可探索更高效的稀疏模式及与其他加速技术的结合。

title: Attenuation-Resilient Alternating Optimization for Laparoscopic Liver Landmark Detection
abstract: Liver surface landmark detection is a fundamental prerequisite for anatomical guidance in laparoscopic liver surgery. However, it remains unreliable in practice due to two pervasive challenges: illumination attenuation in underexposed regions and the structural mismatch between pixel-wise localization and continuous curvilinear geometry. To address these limitations, we propose A2ONet, an attenuation-resilient alternating optimization network for robust liver landmark detection. To mitigate illumination attenuation, A2ONet embraces an illumination field compensation (IFC) block that adaptively enhances dark regions while preserving structural consistency. Meanwhile, we introduce a lightweight frequency-orientation selective filter (FOSF) to suppress repetitive texture interference and preserve salient curvilinear cues. Building upon these resilient representations, we design an alternating seg-curve optimization (ASCO) decoder that iteratively couples dense segmentation with explicit curve modeling, enabling mutual guidance to optimize both structural continuity and endpoint localization. Extensive evaluations on L3D-2K, L3D, and P2ILF demonstrate consistent improvements over competitive methods, establishing a more reliable foundation for intraoperative anatomy guidance. Our code will be available at https://github.com/hyperiondk115/A2ONet.
comment: This paper has been accepted by MICCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出A2ONet，一种衰减鲁棒的交替优化网络，通过照明补偿、频率选择性滤波和分割-曲线联合优化，解决腹腔镜肝脏地标检测中的光照衰减和结构不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 肝脏表面地标检测是腹腔镜肝脏手术解剖引导的关键前提，但现有方法在暗区光照衰减和像素级定位与连续曲线几何之间的结构不匹配两大挑战下表现不可靠。需要鲁棒的方法来增强暗区、抑制纹理干扰并实现连续曲线建模，以提升术中引导的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: A2ONet包含三个创新模块：照明场补偿（IFC）块自适应增强暗区并保持结构一致性；轻量频率方向选择性滤波器（FOSF）抑制重复纹理并保留曲线线索；交替分割-曲线优化（ASCO）解码器通过迭代耦合密集分割与显式曲线建模，实现结构连续性和端点定位的互促优化。
light_analysis.result: 在L3D-2K、L3D和P2ILF三个数据集上的广泛评估表明，A2ONet持续优于现有竞争方法，显著提升了肝脏地标检测的稳定性和准确性，为术中解剖引导奠定了更可靠的基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: A2ONet有效解决了腹腔镜手术中的光照衰减和结构不匹配问题，实现了鲁棒的地标检测，具有重要的临床价值。代码已开源。未来可进一步优化实时性并扩展到其他手术场景。

title: DelowlightSplat: Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting for Lowlight 3D Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Novel-view synthesis and 3D reconstruction from sparse posed images are central to robotics and AR/VR. Yet, feed-forward 3D Gaussian reconstruction fails under lowlight due to noise, color shifts, and unreliable correspondence. We propose DelowlightSplat, a lowlight-aware feed-forward Gaussian splatting framework for clean novel-view rendering. We build a controllable multi-view lowlight benchmark by degrading only context views while keeping target views clean. We introduce a lightweight Lowlight Adapter for residual enhancement to improve matchability, and couple it with cost-volume-based multi-view inference to directly predict clean 3D Gaussians. Experiments show that DelowlightSplat significantly outperforms previous feed-forward method and two-stage pipeline under lowlight conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DelowlightSplat，一种低光感知的前馈高斯泼溅框架，实现低光照下的干净3D场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 前馈3D高斯重建在低光照条件下因噪声、颜色偏移和不可靠的对应关系而失效。现有方法未能有效处理低光场景，且缺乏针对性的基准。该研究旨在解决低光下3D重建的质量问题，以满足机器人、AR/VR等领域对鲁棒性的需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建可控多视图低光基准，通过仅退化上下文视图而保持目标视图干净。引入轻量级Lowlight Adapter进行残差增强以提升匹配性，并结合基于成本体积的多视图推理直接预测干净的3D高斯。框架以前馈方式运行，无需逐场景优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DelowlightSplat在低光条件下显著优于先前的前馈方法和两阶段流水线。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调在渲染质量和重建准确性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次针对低光环境提出前馈高斯泼溅框架，通过低光适配器和成本体积推理实现干净重建。具有在机器人、AR/VR等领域的实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的低光退化模型或扩展到动态场景。

title: Tail-Aware HiFloat4: W4A4 Post-Training Quantization for Wan2.2
abstract: This report describes Tail-Aware HiFloat4, our submission to the low-bit text-to-video generation quantization challenge. Our method adapts the public ViDiT-Q post-training quantization pipeline to Wan2.2 under the HiFloat4 numerical format. We quantize the main linear layers in both Wan2.2 transformer modules with W4A4 HiFloat4 fake quantization, keep numerically sensitive boundary modules in high precision, and introduce an activation-tail-aware percentile calibration module for channel-mask construction. Together with compact PTQ-state restoration, this design reduces the influence of rare calibration outliers while keeping the runtime HiFloat4 arithmetic and sampling pipeline unchanged.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tail-Aware HiFloat4方法，用于Wan2.2模型的W4A4后训练量化，通过激活尾部感知分位数校准减少异常值影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 低比特文本到视频生成量化挑战中，现有后训练量化方法易受校准过程稀有异常值影响，导致精度下降。本研究旨在探索W4A4量化方案在Wan2.2上的应用，通过适配HiFloat4数值格式和设计激活尾部感知模块，在保持运行时算术和采样管道不变的前提下，降低异常值干扰，实现高效低比特量化。
light_analysis.method: 基于ViDiT-Q后训练量化管道，将Wan2.2变压器模块的主要线性层量化为W4A4 HiFloat4格式（伪量化），保留数值敏感的边界模块为高精度。创新引入激活尾部感知分位数校准模块，用于构建通道掩码，结合紧凑的PTQ状态恢复技术，减少稀有校准异常值的影响，同时保持HiFloat4算术和采样流程不变。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出具体实验数据，但该方法有效减少了稀有校准异常值对量化精度的影响，且运行时HiFloat4算术和采样管道保持不变，验证了其在低比特文本到视频生成任务上的可行性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Tail-Aware HiFloat4为Wan2.2提供了一种有效的W4A4后训练量化方案，通过激活尾部感知机制和状态恢复，在不改变运行时流程的情况下提升了量化鲁棒性。该方法适用于大规模视频生成模型的压缩，未来可扩展至其他生成任务或更低比特格式。

title: MSCGC-KAN: Multi-scale Causal Graph Convolution and Kolmogorov-Arnold Feature Mapping for EEG Emotion Recognition
abstract: Electroencephalogram (EEG)-based emotion recognition is an important affective computing task, and recent EEG foundation models provide useful generic representations for downstream adaptation. However, under the fine-tuning setting, three limitations remain prominent: insufficient modeling of multi-scale emotional dynamics, inadequate exploitation of inter-channel functional connectivity, and the limited expressive power of simple linear classification heads. To address these issues, this paper proposes a new EEG emotion recognition method, termed MSCGC-KAN, which introduces a structured task head composed of multi-scale causal graph convolution and Kolmogorov--Arnold feature mapping. Built on a pre-trained CBraMod backbone, MSCGC-KAN enhances downstream adaptation by jointly strengthening multi-scale temporal modeling, learnable inter-channel connectivity modeling, and nonlinear discriminative mapping within a compact task-specific head. This design preserves the representation advantage of the foundation model while making the classifier more sensitive to emotion-related spatiotemporal patterns. Extensive experiments are conducted on the public FACED and SEED-VII datasets. The proposed method achieves a balanced accuracy of 60.66\%, a Cohen's Kappa of 0.5525, and a weighted F1-score of 60.40\% on FACED, and obtains 33.27\%, 0.2223, and 33.64\%, respectively, on SEED-VII. Compared with the CBraMod+Linear baseline, the balanced accuracy is improved by 5.91 and 2.03 percentage points on the two datasets, respectively. These results indicate that structured task-head design is an effective way to improve EEG emotion recognition when fine-tuning pre-trained EEG models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MSCGC-KAN方法，结合多尺度因果图卷积和KAN特征映射，提升EEG情绪识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于EEG的情绪识别中，现有方法在微调预训练模型时存在三个局限：多尺度情绪动态建模不足、通道间功能连接利用不充分、简单线性分类头表达能力有限。这些问题限制了模型对情绪相关时空模式的敏感度，需要更有效的任务特定头部设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出MSCGC-KAN方法，在预训练CBraMod骨干上构建结构化任务头，包含多尺度因果图卷积（捕捉多尺度时序和通道间连接）和Kolmogorov-Arnold特征映射（增强非线性判别映射）。该设计保持基础模型表示优势，提升下游适配能力。
light_analysis.result: 在FACED数据集上达到平衡准确率60.66%、Cohen's Kappa 0.5525、加权F1 60.40%；在SEED-VII上分别为33.27%、0.2223、33.64%。相比CBraMod+Linear基线，平衡准确率分别提升5.91和2.03个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构化任务头设计是改进EEG情绪识别的有效途径。通过联合多尺度建模和可学习连接，显著提升微调性能。未来可探索更复杂的图结构和特征映射。

title: MedVol-R1: Reward-Driven Evidence Grounding for Volumetric Reasoning Segmentation
abstract: Volumetric Reasoning Segmentation (VRS) aims to segment a target region in a 3D medical scan from a free-form clinical query, where the referent is often implicit and requires both medical knowledge and volume-grounded reasoning. Existing methods typically rely on specialized segmentation tokens to connect language with mask decoding, but this coupling collapses the decision process into opaque latent representations, limiting interpretability and generalization to diverse narrative expressions. In this paper, we present MedVol-R1, a reinforcement learning-based framework for VRS that explicitly decouples evidence grounding from volumetric delineation: the LVLM grounds clinical reasoning to a verifiable 2D evidence anchor (key axial slice and 2D bounding boxes), which is then propagated into a coherent 3D mask by a frozen MedSAM2 module. We train MedVol-R1 with cold-start supervised fine-tuning followed by GRPO, guided by a multi-component reward that encourages informative evidence selection, accurate 2D spatial grounding, and cross-slice volumetric coherence, without requiring costly chain-of-thought annotations. Experiments on CT-ORG, AbdomenCT-1K, and KiTS23 from the M3D-Seg benchmark demonstrate that MedVol-R1 consistently outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance, with reinforcement learning providing clear gains over pure supervised fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的MedVol-R1框架，显式解耦推理证据基础与体积分割，实现可解释的3D医学分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 体积推理分割任务需要根据自由形式临床查询分割3D医学扫描中的目标区域，而现有方法依赖专用分割标记连接语言与掩码解码，导致决策过程不透明，难以解释且泛化性差。该问题的重要性在于临床查询常隐含推理要求，需要结合医学知识和体积推理。现有方法将语言与掩码耦合，限制了叙事表达的多样性，亟需一种解耦的证据基础方法。
light_analysis.method: MedVol-R1采用强化学习框架，先通过大型视觉语言模型将临床推理定位到可验证的2D证据锚点（关键轴向切片和2D边界框），再由冻结的MedSAM2模块传播为一致的3D掩码。训练分为冷启动监督微调与GRPO强化学习阶段，使用多组件奖励函数鼓励信息选择、准确2D定位和跨切片体积一致性，无需链式思维标注。
light_analysis.result: 在CT-ORG、AbdomenCT-1K和KiTS23（来自M3D-Seg基准）上，MedVol-R1一致优于强基线，取得最优性能。强化学习相比纯监督微调带来显著提升，验证了奖励驱动框架的有效性。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但表明性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedVol-R1通过解耦证据基础与体积分割，提升了模型的可解释性和对多样表达的自然泛化能力。其学术价值在于为体积推理分割提供了新范式，实际应用可减少对昂贵链式思维标注的依赖。潜在局限性可能包括对2D锚点质量的敏感性，未来可探索更端到端的3D推理。

title: Granuscore: A Reference-Free Measure of Granularity for Text Analysis and Question Answering
abstract: Natural language conveys information at varying levels of granularity, from fine-grained references to broad descriptions. While granularity is fundamental to human communication, existing measures mostly capture surface detail or sentence specificity. We introduce Granuscore, a reference-free measure of granularity that leverages structural properties of a hierarchical embedding space. Granuscore reliably recovers hierarchical orderings on the Granola-EQ dataset and captures expected differences in granularity across discourse contexts. Across domains, we further show that Granuscore explains non-linear variation in sentence specificity beyond sentence length. Finally, we apply Granuscore to four question-answering benchmarks and analyze how granularity differs for questions, gold answers, and model outputs across response outcomes. The analysis reveals consistent differences in model behavior and provides a principled lens for characterizing the difficulty of QA datasets. Together, the results position Granuscore as a scalable, broadly applicable tool for analyzing granularity in text.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无参考的粒度度量方法Granuscore，利用层次嵌入空间的结构性质，适用于文本分析和问答。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然语言以不同粒度传递信息，但现有度量主要捕捉表面细节或句子特异性，缺乏有效且无参考的粒度度量方法。Granuscore旨在解决这一不足，提供一种可扩展的粒度分析工具。
light_analysis.method: Granuscore利用层次嵌入空间的结构性质，实现无参考的粒度度量。在Granola-EQ数据集上验证其恢复层次顺序的能力，并在不同语篇上下文中捕获粒度差异。进一步应用于四个问答基准，分析问题、黄金答案和模型输出的粒度模式。
light_analysis.result: Granuscore可靠地恢复层次顺序，并捕获预期的粒度差异。在句子特异性分析中，它解释了超出句子长度的非线性变化。在问答任务中，它揭示了模型行为的一致差异，为量化数据集难度提供新视角。
light_analysis.conclusion: Granuscore是一种可扩展、广泛适用的粒度分析工具，为文本理解和问答系统提供新的分析维度。未来可探索更多应用场景，如生成评估或对话系统。

title: PIDM-DP: Physics-Informed Diffusion with Dormand-Prince Integration for Chaotic System Identification and State Reconstruction across Multiple Dynamical Regimes
abstract: Reconstructing continuous state trajectories of chaotic dynamical systems from sparse, noisy observations remains a fundamental open problem in nonlinear science. We introduce the Physics-Informed Diffusion Model with Dormand-Prince Integration (PIDM-DP), which embeds a fully differentiable 5th-order Dormand-Prince (DP-RK45) ODE integrator directly into the reverse sampling loop of a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM). At each denoising step, physics residuals are back-propagated via automatic differentiation, constraining every generated trajectory to satisfy the system's governing equations to 5th-order accuracy. A linear-scheduled guidance mechanism that ramps the physics weight from zero at high noise levels to its full value near the clean-data limit prevents the gradient explosions that cause naive physics-informed approaches to fail on stiff systems with Jacobian eigenvalues of order $O(10^3)$. Evaluated across five benchmark systems of increasing complexity 3D Lorenz, 3D Rössler, 5D Hyperchaotic, 20D Lorenz-96, and the stiff 3D Rabinovich-Fabrikant at 10% observation density with additive Gaussian noise ($σ=0.05$), PIDM-DP achieves reconstruction RMSE improvements of up to $15.4\times$ over an unconstrained diffusion baseline and decisively outperforms the Ensemble Kalman Filter on stiff systems where ensemble covariance collapses. On the Rabinovich-Fabrikant out-of-distribution benchmark, PIDM-DP attains RMSE $0.1097 \pm 0.0269$ versus $0.9443 \pm 0.5288$ (unconstrained diffusion, $8.6\times$ worse) and $0.3561 \pm 0.3040$ (EnKF, $3.2\times$ worse), with $p<0.001$ in paired Wilcoxon tests ($N = 30$). Topological validation via the Rosenstein Lyapunov estimator confirms that PIDM-DP preserves the chaotic invariant measure.
comment: extended work of my journal paper submission

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息扩散模型PIDM-DP，将可微5阶Dormand-Prince ODE积分器嵌入DDPM，通过自动微分反向传播物理残差，实现混沌系统状态重构的高精度与物理一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏噪声观测中重构混沌动力系统的连续状态轨迹是非线性科学的基础难题。现有方法如未约束扩散模型无法保证物理一致性，而集合卡尔曼滤波在刚性系统中因协方差崩塌而失效。融合微分方程物理信息到扩散模型是解决该问题的关键，但直接物理信息引导在刚性系统中易梯度爆炸，需要可微分积分器和稳定引导机制。
light_analysis.method: PIDM-DP在DDPM的反向采样循环中嵌入完全可微的5阶Dormand-Prince ODE积分器（DP-RK45），每步去噪时通过自动微分反向传播物理残差，确保轨迹满足系统控制方程至5阶精度。采用线性调度引导机制，从高噪声阶段零物理权重逐渐增加到低噪声阶段满权重，避免梯度爆炸。无需额外数据集，直接使用观测数据训练。
light_analysis.result: 在3D Lorenz、3D Rössler、5D超混沌、20D Lorenz-96及刚性3D Rabinovich-Fabrikant五个系统上，10%观测密度加高斯噪声（σ=0.05）条件下，PIDM-DP重构RMSE比未约束扩散基线提升最高15.4倍。在Rabinovich-Fabrikant分布外基准上，RMSE达0.1097±0.0269，优于未约束扩散（0.9443±0.5288，8.6倍差）和EnKF（0.3561±0.3040，3.2倍差），配对Wilcoxon检验p<0.001。Rosenstein Lyapunov估计器验证保留混沌不变测度。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIDM-DP首次将可微高阶ODE积分器嵌入扩散模型，结合线性调度物理引导，实现了对刚性和复杂混沌系统的高精度状态重构与系统辨识，显著优于现有方法。该方法为物理信息生成模型提供了新范式，可推广至其他动力系统。未来可探索更高效积分器或自适应引导机制。

title: Gaussian-Voxel Duet: A Dual-Scaffolding Hybrid Representation for Fast and Accurate Monocular Surface Reconstruction
abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting has achieved remarkable success in photorealistic novel view synthesis, its pursuit of fast and high-fidelity 3D reconstruction has long been constrained by a trade-off between geometric accuracy and optimization efficiency. Methods specialized in image rendering converge quickly at the cost of imperfect geometry caused by superfluous primitives overfitting training views, while methods integrating neural signed-distance field (SDF) for better geometry incur prohibitive training costs. In this paper, we attempt to strike a better trade-off by tethering scaffold-anchored Gaussians to a jointly optimized sparse voxel scaffold. This hybrid Gaussian-Voxel representation explicitly confines anchored Gaussians to a narrow band around surfaces defined by voxelized SDFs, which effectively improves representation efficiency and condenses floating Gaussians without sacrificing geometry quality. An implicit surface tethering loss further pulls individual Gaussian primitives closer to SDF-induced surfaces in a mutually regularized manner for improved reconstruction accuracy. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world indoor scenes from ScanNet++, ScanNetv2, and DeepBlending datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art surface reconstruction quality as well as superior novel view synthesis against leading baselines, while maintaining fast training convergence and real-time rendering. Code will be available at https://github.com/duzh11/VoxelGS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高斯-体素双重脚手架混合表示，通过将高斯原语约束在体素化SDF窄带内，实现快速且高精度的单目表面重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射方法在几何精度与优化效率之间存在根本性权衡：侧重渲染的方法收敛快但几何不准确，源于原语过拟合训练视图；而结合神经有符号距离场（SDF）改善几何的方法则训练成本过高。本文旨在通过一种新的混合表示打破这一权衡，同时实现快速收敛和高保真几何重建。
light_analysis.method: 提出高斯-体素双重脚手架混合表示，将锚定在稀疏体素脚手架上的高斯原语限制在由体素化SDF定义的窄带内，有效提高表示效率并消除浮动高斯。引入隐式表面锚定损失，以相互正则化方式将高斯原语拉近SDF诱导表面，提升重建精度。该方法在ScannET++、ScanNetv2、DeepBlending等数据集上训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实室内场景数据集上，该方法在表面重建质量（如准确率、完整度）和新视图合成（PSNR、SSIM）上均达到最先进水平，优于现有基线。同时保持快速训练收敛（数分钟）和实时渲染性能，验证了混合表示的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的高斯-体素混合表示成功兼顾了几何精度与优化效率，为单目表面重建提供了新思路。该工作具有学术价值，可应用于三维场景重建、虚拟现实等领域。代码已开源，便于后续研究。未来可探索扩展到动态场景或更大尺度重建。

title: FAST-GOAL: Fast and Efficient Global-local Object Alignment Learning
abstract: Vision-language models such as CLIP have shown impressive capabilities in aligning images and text, but they often struggle with lengthy and detailed text descriptions due to pre-training on short and concise captions. We present FAST-GOAL (Fast and Efficient Global-local Object Alignment Learning), an efficient fine-tuning method that enhances ability of CLIP to handle lengthy text through global-local semantic alignment. Our method consists of two key components. First, Fast Local Image-Sentence Matching (FLISM) efficiently extracts local image regions through object detection and spatial division, then matches them with corresponding sentences. Second, Token Similarity-based Learning (TSL) maximizes the similarity between patch tokens from specific regions in the image and their corresponding region embeddings, applying the same principle to text, which enhances the ability of the model to capture detailed correspondences. Additionally, we introduce GLIT100k, a dataset that provides both global image-lengthy caption pairs and context-derived local pairs, where local descriptions are extracted from global captions to maintain semantic coherence. Through extensive experiments on long caption datasets (DOCCI, DCI) and short caption datasets (MSCOCO, Flickr30k), we demonstrate that FAST-GOAL achieves significant improvements over baselines, enabling effective adaptation of CLIP to detailed textual descriptions while maintaining computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAST-GOAL方法，通过全局-局部语义对齐高效微调CLIP，提升其对长篇文本的描述能力。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP等视觉语言模型在短标题上表现优异，但在处理冗长详细的文本描述时性能下降，因为预训练数据多为简短描述。现有方法难以高效适应长篇文本，需要一种既能保持计算效率又能增强细节对齐的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: FAST-GOAL包含两个组件：快速局部图像-句子匹配（FLISM）通过目标检测和空间分割提取局部区域并与对应句子匹配；令牌相似性学习（TSL）最大化图像区域块令牌与对应区域嵌入的相似度，并同理应用于文本。同时构建了GLIT100k数据集，提供全局-长篇描述对和上下文局部对。
light_analysis.result: 在长描述数据集（DOCCI、DCI）和短描述数据集（MSCOCO、Flickr30k）上的实验表明，FAST-GOAL显著优于基线方法，有效将CLIP适应于详细文本描述，同时保持计算效率。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAST-GOAL通过高效全局-局部对齐微调，增强了CLIP处理长文本的能力，具有学术和实用价值。局限性可能在于对局部区域提取的依赖，未来可探索更细粒度的对齐或扩展到其他视觉语言模型。

title: LATTE: Forecasting Peer Anchored Preference Trajectories for Personalized LLM Generation
abstract: Personalized generation with frozen large language models requires a conditioning signal that is both compact and current. Existing personalization methods typically retrieve or summarize user histories in text, or compress them into static latent profiles and soft prompts. These approaches are efficient, but they treat a user's past behavior as an aggregate profile and therefore mix stable identity, recent drift, and item content in the same representation. We propose LAtent Trajectory Tracking and Extrapolation (LATTE), a framework that represents personalization as forecasting a peer anchored relative preference state. For each historical session, LATTE subtracts a time masked baseline formed from comparable users who responded to the same item, producing a state that measures how the target user differs from peers under a shared item context. A lightweight sequence predictor then forecasts the next state in this trajectory, and a State to Token Bridge injects the forecast into a frozen instruction tuned LLM through a single anchored soft token. We provide a latent factor analysis showing when peer anchoring cancels shared item variation and why temporal forecasting trades off stale averages against noisy recent states. Experiments on Amazon Reviews 2023 and MemoryCD show that LATTE consistently outperforms retrieval, summary memory, static latent profiles, difference aware latent profiles, and soft prompt compression baselines. On Amazon Reviews 2023, LATTE improves average ROUGE-L from 0.219 for a static latent profile and 0.245 for the strongest added latent compression baseline to 0.259. Additional pairwise comparisons and diagnostic analyses suggest that the improvement is mainly due to forecasting user-specific trajectory information, rather than merely adding a soft prompt interface.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LATTE框架，通过预测对等锚定的相对偏好轨迹实现个性化LLM生成，在冻结LLM中实现高效、动态的个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有个性化方法将用户历史行为聚合为静态或动态表征，混淆了稳定身份、近期漂移和物品内容。这些方法未能区分用户内在偏好与短期波动，导致个性化信号不纯。LATTE通过减去同一物品下同类用户的时间掩码基线，提取用户相对偏好状态，从而分离共享物品效应，更精准地捕捉用户独特偏好变化。
light_analysis.method: LATTE框架包含三步：1）对每个历史会话，计算目标用户与同类用户对同一物品反应的差异，得到时间掩码相对偏好状态；2）轻量级序列预测器（如LSTM）沿时间轴预测下一状态；3）状态到令牌桥将预测状态编码为单个锚定软令牌，注入冻结的指令调优LLM。使用Amazon Reviews 2023和MemoryCD数据集，无额外微调。
light_analysis.result: 在Amazon Reviews 2023上，LATTE的ROUGE-L达到0.259，优于静态潜轮廓的0.219和最强潜压缩基线（差异感知潜轮廓+软提示）的0.245。MemoryCD上类似领先。成对比较和诊断分析表明，性能提升主要来自预测用户特定轨迹信息，而非仅软提示接口。
light_analysis.conclusion: LATTE通过预测对等锚定偏好轨迹，为冻结LLM提供紧凑、动态的个性化信号，显著优于现有聚合方法。学术上展示了分离共享内容效应和时序建模的价值，实际中可轻量级适配现有LLM。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹预测器或结合多源对比基线。

title: Spend Your Rollouts Where It Counts: Rollout Allocation for Group-Based RL Post-Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is the dominant paradigm for post-training large language models. However, in the online, on-policy setting, rollout generation dominates the computational cost of training. Group-based policy optimization methods compute advantages from multiple rollouts per prompt, yet they indiscriminately allocate budget to prompts with collapsed reward distributions, wasting expensive rollouts on negligible learning signals. We demonstrate that group-based updates are most effective in regimes of high reward variance. Since the policy evolves throughout training, prompt informativeness must be estimated online rather than precomputed, but exhaustively evaluating every prompt is computationally prohibitive. We introduce Pilot-Commit, a budget-aware rollout allocation framework for group-based RL post-training. Pilot-Commit decouples prompt evaluation from exploitation: a pilot stage estimates per-prompt informativeness using a fraction of the budget, and the remaining rollouts are allocated to high-leverage prompts while low-signal prompts are skipped. Across multiple math reasoning benchmarks and model scales from 1.5B to 14B parameters, Pilot-Commit matches baseline accuracy with significantly lower sampling costs, reaching target accuracy up to $1.9\times$ faster than GRPO and $4.0\times$ faster than DAPO in cumulative rollouts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Pilot-Commit框架，通过预算感知的rollout分配策略，在基于组的RL后训练中优先将计算资源分配给高信息量提示，显著提升采样效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略RL后训练中，rollout生成是计算瓶颈。现有组策略优化方法为每个提示分配固定数量rollout，但低价值提示的奖励分布已崩溃，浪费计算。组更新在奖励方差高时效果最佳，但提示信息量需在线估计。因此需要一种预算感知的分配机制，以最小化计算成本并最大化学习效果。
light_analysis.method: Pilot-Commit将rollout预算分为两阶段：首先，在pilot阶段使用少量rollout评估每个提示的信息量（基于奖励方差等指标）；然后，在commit阶段将剩余rollout分配给高信息量提示，而低信号提示则被跳过。该方法无需穷举评估所有提示，实现了在线自适应的预算分配。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数学推理基准（如GSM8K、MATH）及1.5B至14B参数的模型上，Pilot-Commit达到基线准确率所需rollout数显著减少。相比GRPO和DAPO，达到目标准确率的累积rollout速度分别提升1.9倍和4.0倍，且不牺牲最终性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Pilot-Commit通过高效分配rollout预算，解决了RL后训练中的计算浪费问题，揭示了利用奖励方差指导资源分配的有效性。该方法可大幅降低训练成本，具有直接的实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的提示评估指标或扩展到多任务场景。

title: FTibSuite: A Comprehensive Resource Suite for Tibetan Vision-Language Modeling
abstract: Vision-language models have progressed rapidly, but Tibetan remains a severely underserved low-resource language due to the lack of reproducible training and evaluation infrastructure. To fill this gap, we introduce FTibSuite, a comprehensive resource suite for Tibetan vision-language research, consisting of FTibData (human-verified multimodal training corpora spanning continual pretraining, image-text alignment, and instruction tuning data), FTibBench (Tibetan adaptations of five mainstream multimodal benchmarks with a hierarchical quality-control workflow to reduce translation noise), and FTibVLM, a reproducible baseline built on Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct via a three-stage adaptation pipeline. Experiments on FTibBench show FTibVLM delivers consistent performance gains across all tasks, such as improving MMBench accuracy from 42.97 to 67.78 and POPE-random accuracy from 47.53 to 80.56, while retaining the backbone's original Chinese capabilities with minimal degradation, providing the first standardized foundation for Tibetan multimodal research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向藏语的视觉语言模型综合资源套件FTibSuite，包含数据集、基准和基线模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 藏语是严重缺乏资源的小语种，现有视觉语言模型进步迅速，但缺乏可复现的训练和评估基础设施，导致藏语在此领域几乎空白。这一空白阻碍了多模态技术在藏语地区的应用与发展，因此迫切需要构建标准化的资源平台以推动相关研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建了FTibSuite，包含FTibData（人工验证的多模态训练语料，覆盖持续预训练、图像-文本对齐和指令微调）、FTibBench（五个主流多模态基准的藏语适配，采用分层质量控制减少翻译噪声）以及FTibVLM（基于Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的三阶段适配基线模型）。通过三个阶段实现从预训练到指令微调的完整流程。
light_analysis.result: 在FTibBench上，FTibVLM在所有任务上性能一致提升：MMBench准确率从42.97提升至67.78，POPE-random准确率从47.53提升至80.56，同时骨干模型的中文能力几乎无退化。实验表明该套件有效填补了藏语多模态研究的标准化空白。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为藏语多模态研究提供标准化基础设施，包括数据集、基准和复现基线，显著降低了入行门槛。其质量控制流程和适配方法可推广至其他低资源语言。未来需扩展语料多样性，并探索更多下游任务。

title: Geometry-Aware Contrastive Learning for Few-Shot Automatic Modulation Recognition
abstract: Standard Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) for Automatic Modulation Recognition (AMR) struggles with ineffective isotropic augmentations, spectral instability, and semantic drift. To address these challenges, we propose Dynamic-Consistency Contrastive Learning (DyCo-CL), a geometry-aware framework that couples Virtual Adversarial Augmentation (VAA) with a semantic consistency loss. We provide a theoretical analysis indicating that this strategy acts as an implicit spectral regularizer for the encoder, enabling stable manifold exploration. Complementing this, our Signal-Adaptive Swin Backbone with fixed-window attention improves structural stability by constraining attention locality, while a Hybrid Knowledge Fusion module anchors representations with physical priors. Experiments on RML benchmarks show that DyCo-CL achieves a 6.27% accuracy gain in 1-shot settings over prior methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知对比学习框架DyCo-CL，通过动态一致性和虚拟对抗增强解决自监督调制识别中的频谱不稳定与语义漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准自监督学习在自动调制识别中存在无效的各向同性增强、频谱不稳定和语义漂移等挑战，导致少样本场景下性能不佳。现有方法缺乏几何感知约束，难以稳定探索流形结构，限制了识别精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出DyCo-CL框架，包含虚拟对抗增强与语义一致性损失，理论证明其作为隐式频谱正则化器。采用信号自适应Swin骨干网络（固定窗口注意力）增强结构稳定性，并通过混合知识融合模块引入物理先验。
light_analysis.result: 在RML基准上，1-shot设置下DyCo-CL相比先前方法准确率提升6.27%，验证了框架在少样本调制识别中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DyCo-CL通过几何感知对比学习有效解决了自监督AMR中的关键问题，显著提升少样本性能。未来可探索更复杂的物理先验融合及跨领域迁移。

title: AGORA: Adapter-Grounded Observation-Action Retention for Inference-Free Prompt Compression in LLM Agents
abstract: The token-level extractive compressors widely used for general LM context are structurally inappropriate for LLM agents: across 17 (env, backbone, method) cells spanning two independent token-level method families, every cell collapses to mean reward <= 0.05 despite 1.3-13.3x realized compression. We name and characterize this failure mode as action-grammar destruction -- the tokens carrying action semantics (identifiers, brackets, action verbs) are exactly those self-information ranks lowest, so a general-purpose compressor reliably removes them and the environment rejects the residual. The diagnosis points to step-granularity compression. We introduce AGORA, an inference-free step-level compressor combining a structural prompt parser, an always-keep floor for format- and recency-critical content, and a 125M-parameter relevance scorer trained on counterfactual next-action-change labels (~2ms/step, zero per-step LLM toll). Across the compared inference-free and LLM-based methods, AGORA is the only one retaining >= 75% uncompressed performance in 8 of 9 cells (with the lone exception at 73%); a four-way component ablation isolates the structural floor as the dominant quality lever and the learned scorer as the source of 1.0-11.5x adaptive end-to-end compression from a single fixed keep ratio.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AGORA，一种推理免费的步骤级压缩方法，通过结构保留和相关性评分解决LLM agents中token级压缩导致的动作语法破坏问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有token级压缩器在LLM agents中失效，因为压缩会优先移除携带动作语义的token（如标识符、括号、动作动词），导致环境拒绝残差。实验表明17个单元测试中所有token级方法平均奖励≤0.05，尽管实现了1.3-13.3倍压缩。这指向需要步骤级压缩。
light_analysis.method: AGORA结合结构提示解析器、始终保留格式和近期关键内容的底线、以及125M参数的相关性评分器（训练于反事实下一动作变化标签，~2ms/step）。方法无需LLM推理，通过固定保留比率实现自适应压缩，核心创新在于步骤级压缩和结构保留机制。
light_analysis.result: 在9个单元测试中，AGORA是唯一在8个中保持≥75%无压缩性能的方法（唯一例外73%）。四路组件消融表明结构底线是质量主导因素，学习评分器提供1.0-11.5倍自适应端到端压缩，所有比较方法中性能最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGORA有效解决了LLM agents中压缩性能崩溃问题，通过步骤级压缩和结构保留实现无推理开销的高压缩比。其方法可推广至其他agent任务，但依赖固定保留比率，未来可能探索动态调节策略。

title: Few-shot Cross-country Generalization of Tabular Machine Learning and Foundation Models for Childhood Anemia Prediction under Distribution Shift
abstract: Childhood anemia affects around 40% of children aged 6-59 months globally and arises from heterogeneous factors, limiting model generalizability. We evaluate a transformer-based tabular foundation model against classical supervised methods under cross-country and data-scarce settings.   We used DHS data from 16 countries across Africa, Asia, Latin America, the Caucasus, and the Middle East (n=68,856). We compared Logistic Regression, XGBoost, LightGBM, and TabPFN v2.6. Performance was assessed using AUC-ROC, Brier score, and ECE. Generalization was evaluated using leave-one-country-out (LOCO), reverse-LOCO, and few-shot settings. Subgroup analyses included sex, age, residence, maternal education, and wealth. Feature importance was estimated using SHAP.   TabPFN outperformed classical models in low-data regimes (<200 samples), showing higher discrimination and better calibration. Across countries, it achieved the lowest Brier score (0.042) and ECE (0.203). Under full-data settings, AUC-ROC ranged from 0.59-0.76 with small between-model differences ($\leq 0.05$).
