LOCO performance was stable (0.58-0.69), driven by country context. Reverse-LOCO showed asymmetric transferability. Subgroup performance was consistent with no systematic demographic bias. SHAP identified child age, altitude, and height-for-age z-score as dominant predictors, followed by wealth and maternal education.   Performance in childhood anemia prediction is driven more by population variation than model choice. TabPFN provides advantages in low-resource settings through improved discrimination and calibration, highlighting foundation models as promising tools for data-scarce global health prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 评估表格基础模型TabPFN在跨国家少样本儿童贫血预测中的表现，发现其在低数据场景下优于经典监督方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 儿童贫血影响全球约40%的6-59个月儿童，病因多样化导致模型泛化性差。现有方法在数据稀缺和跨国家分布偏移下表现不足，亟需探索基础模型在低资源环境下的适用性。
light_analysis.method: 使用16个国家的DHS数据（n=68,856），对比逻辑回归、XGBoost、LightGBM和基于Transformer的表格基础模型TabPFN v2.6。通过留一国家、逆向留一国家和少样本设置评估泛化能力，采用AUC-ROC、Brier分数和ECE指标，并用SHAP分析特征重要性。
light_analysis.result: TabPFN在低数据场景（<200样本）下显著优于经典模型，具有更高的区分度和校准性能；跨国家最低Brier分数为0.042，ECE为0.203。完整数据下AUC-ROC介于0.59-0.76，模型间差异≤0.05。LOCO性能稳定（0.58-0.69），主要预测因子为儿童年龄、海拔和身高-年龄Z分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 儿童贫血预测性能主要受人口变异驱动而非模型选择。TabPFN在低资源场景中通过改进区分度和校准提供优势，凸显基础模型在数据稀缺全球健康预测中的潜力。未来可探索更多基础模型并验证其他数据集。

title: Near-Optimal Regret in Adversarial Kernel Bandits
abstract: We study the adversarial kernel bandit problem, in which the loss at each round is induced by an arbitrary bounded element of a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS). We propose an exponential-weights algorithm built on a regularized importance-weighted loss estimator, together with an explicit correction term that cancels the bias introduced by the regularization. Our main result bounds the regret by $\widetilde{O}\big(\sqrt{T\, d_*(λ)\,\log|{X}|}\big)$, where $d_*(λ)$ is a widely-adopted notion of effective dimension that captures the complexity of the kernel. Up to logarithmic factors, this matches the known rate achieved in the related stochastic kernel bandit problem. A notable application is the Matérn$(ν,d)$ kernel with smoothness parameter $ν$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$, for which our bound specializes to $\widetilde{O}\big(T^{(ν+d)/(2ν+d)}\big)$, improving over the best-known prior rate of Chatterji et al. [2019] while simultaneously removing the rank-one adversary assumption required by their analysis. Moreover, this rate is the same as the known optimal rate for stochastic kernel bandits, and also matches a lower bound from concurrent work up to a $\log T$ factor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出逼近最优遗憾的对抗性核老虎机算法，通过正则化估计与偏差校正，首次实现与随机情况匹配的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗性核老虎机问题中，损失由再生核希尔伯特空间中的有界元素任意决定，现有方法在Matérn核等场景下遗憾界不理想（如Chatterji等人需秩一对手假设且率次优）。该问题在在线学习与核方法交叉领域具有基础重要性，亟需更优算法以移除假设、提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出指数权重算法，核心创新包括：1) 采用正则化重要性加权损失估计器估计损失；2) 引入显式校正项消除正则化带来的偏差。算法利用有效维度d_*(λ)刻画核复杂度，无需秩一对手假设。理论分析基于遗憾界上界推导，关键步骤依赖RKHS性质与重要性加权技巧。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果：遗憾界为~O(√(T d_*(λ) log|X|))，与随机核老虎机的已知最优率匹配。针对Matérn(ν,d)核，率提升至~O(T^{(ν+d)/(2ν+d)})，优于Chatterji等人2019年的结果（需秩一假设），且与并行工作的下界仅差log T因子。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现对抗性核老虎机与随机核老虎机最优率匹配，特别在Matérn核上改进了已有上界并去除了假设。理论价值：统一了对抗性与随机场景的遗憾分析。实际价值：提升核方法在线学习鲁棒性。未来方向：探索其他核族的下界匹配或扩展到多臂设置。

title: O-MARC: Omni Memory-Augmented Compression Distillation for Efficient Video Understanding
abstract: Omnimodal large language models enable unified audio video understanding, but long joint token sequences make inference costly, and existing benchmarks do not fully isolate audio visual association in noisy user generated videos. We introduce UGC-AVQA, a public UGC benchmark with 1,000 videos and 4,816 QA pairs, where an audio removal test ensures that benchmark questions require both acoustic and visual evidence. To reduce inference cost, we propose OMAC, a training free plug in compression method that preserves salient visual memory and temporally grounded audio anchors. To further make compact models robust to compressed inputs, we introduce O-MARC, a compression distillation framework for learning with memory compressed multimodal contexts. On Qwen2.5-Omni-3B, O-MARC improves the average score across four benchmarks to 45.8, outperforming full token inference at 44.1 and OmniZip at 41.0. OMAC also keeps inference efficient, reducing latency by 34.6\% (1.53$\times$ speedup) and memory by 34.7\% compared with full token inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出O-MARC框架，通过无训练压缩和蒸馏学习，提升多模态视频理解效率，在保持性能的同时降低推理成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有全模态大模型在处理长联合令牌序列时推理成本高，且缺乏公开基准测试音频-视觉关联。为解决噪声用户生成视频中的多模态理解问题，需要高效压缩方法和专门基准。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建UGC-AVQA基准（1000视频，4816QA对），通过音频移除测试确保问题依赖双模态。提出无训练压缩方法OMAC，保留显著视觉记忆和时间对齐音频锚点。进一步设计O-MARC压缩蒸馏框架，使紧凑模型适应压缩输入。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-Omni-3B上，O-MARC在四个基准平均得分45.8，优于全令牌推理44.1和OmniZip 41.0。OMAC实现延迟降低34.6%（1.53倍加速），内存减少34.7%，同时保持效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: O-MARC通过记忆增强压缩和蒸馏，有效降低多模态视频理解的计算开销，提升效率。未来可探索更复杂的关联建模和扩展至更多模态。

title: On the Error-Correcting Effects of Stochasticity in Discrete Diffusion
abstract: Discrete diffusion models achieve strong performance in text and image generation, but their inference remains slow and must inherently balance sampling efficiency and sample quality. In this work, we present a systematic study of how the \emph{degree of stochasticity} in Markov transitions governs the sampling tradeoff. We show that highly deterministic transitions converge rapidly but suffer from error accumulation, while more stochastic transitions converge more slowly yet can achieve higher final sample quality. Using an information-theoretic analysis, we identify the underlying mechanism as an error-correcting effect induced by \emph{redundant transitions} that symmetrically exchange mass between states, and show that these transitions can provably contract sampling errors. Motivated by this analysis, we propose \emph{Discrete Churn and Restart Sampling} (DCRS), a novel inference algorithm that injects controlled stochasticity by alternating between forward and reverse diffusion processes. Experiments on synthetic datasets and large-scale benchmarks show that DCRS improves the speed-quality tradeoff in the low number of function evaluations regime. On image datasets, DCRS achieves up to a $10\times$ reduction in sampling steps compared to standard samplers while maintaining competitive sample quality, whereas on language benchmarks, we observe more nuanced behavior depending on the corruption process and sampling procedure.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示离散扩散模型中马尔可夫转移随机性程度的误差校正机制，并提出DCRS算法以改善采样速度与质量的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散模型在文本和图像生成中表现优异，但推理速度慢，且采样效率与样本质量之间存在固有权衡。现有方法难以同时兼顾快速收敛和高样本质量，高度确定性转移虽收敛快但易累积误差，而随机性转移则收敛慢但质量更高。论文旨在系统研究随机性程度如何影响采样权衡，并探索利用随机性的误差校正效应来提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过信息论分析，识别出冗余转移对称交换状态间的质量所诱导的误差校正机制，证明其可收缩采样误差。基于此，提出离散扰动重启动采样（DCRS）算法，通过在正向和反向扩散过程间交替注入受控随机性，优化采样轨迹。实验在合成数据集和大规模基准上进行，评估不同函数评估次数下的速度-质量权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在图像数据集上，DCRS相比标准采样器实现高达10倍的采样步数减少，同时保持竞争性的样本质量。在语言基准上，观察到更细微的行为，取决于损坏过程和采样过程。结果表明DCRS在低函数评估次数下显著改善了速度-质量权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统研究了离散扩散中随机性的作用，揭示了误差校正机制，并提出了有效的DCRS算法。该工作为理解扩散模型的采样动力学提供了理论洞见，实用价值在于加速生成推理。未来可探索更灵活的控制随机性策略，以及应用于其他离散数据领域。

title: Focal Reward: Balanced Reinforcement Learning under Rubric-Based Rewards
abstract: The open-ended generation in LLMs usually requires multi-dimensional rubrics to adequately assess quality and guide the improvement of reinforcement learning. However, a critical dilemma inherent in this training paradigm is the imbalanced reward polarization along different rubric dimensions. Under this bottleneck, even if LLMs achieve relatively high rewards after training, they may still exhibit severe deficiencies in certain dimensions, leading to a direct deterioration in user experience. To address this problem, we propose Focal Reward, a novel objective to automatically balance the training of reinforcement learning under rubric-based rewards. Specifically, we first leverage an inverse reward projection mechanism to estimate the saturation degree of each criterion in the rubric, which forms the basis to calibrate the reward direction. Then, the final objective is designed with an automatically reweighting coefficient for each criterion to achieve the fine-grained balancing. Extensive experiments across three model scales and six benchmarks demonstrate that our Focal Reward method outperforms the strongest static aggregation baseline in all 18 model-benchmark comparisons. Rollout, mechanism, and ablation analyses further show that these gains arise from online, saturation-aware reallocation toward rubrics that still have room for improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Focal Reward方法，自动平衡基于评分标准的强化学习训练中的奖励极化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM的开放式生成需要多维评分标准评估质量，但不同维度奖励极化不均衡，导致即使高奖励也可能存在某些维度缺陷，影响用户体验。现有静态聚合方法无法解决此问题，亟需动态平衡机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出Focal Reward目标函数，包含逆奖励投影机制估计每个评分标准的饱和程度，基于此校准奖励方向，并通过自动重新加权系数实现细粒度平衡。关键创新在于在线、饱和感知的奖励重新分配，优先改善未饱和维度。
light_analysis.result: 在三个模型规模和六个基准上，Focal Reward在所有18个模型-基准比较中均优于最强静态聚合基线。展开、机制和消融分析证实收益来自对未饱和维度的在线重新分配，有效提升整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效解决多维度奖励极化问题，提升LLM训练质量和用户体验。具有广泛适用性，未来可探索更复杂的饱和估计方法以进一步优化平衡效果。

title: TrackRef3D: Multi-View Consistent Track-then-Label for Open-World Referring Segmentation in 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Referring 3D Gaussian Splatting (R3DGS), which utilizes natural language for 3D object segmentation, has emerged as a crucial capability for embodied AI. However, existing methods typically rely on expensive per-scene manual annotation and per-view pseudo mask generation, which suffer from multi-view inconsistency and poor generalization to varying query specificities. To address this, we present TrackRef3D, a fully automatic pipeline that achieves open-world referring segmentation in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) without manual annotation by introducing a multi-view consistent track-then-label paradigm that fundamentally decouples object discovery from semantic grounding. Specifically, we propose a Trajectory-Aware Semantic Consensus Module (TSCM) which aggregates cross-view predictions via synonymous clustering and trajectory-aware voting to establish a canonical semantic identity, thereby ensuring multi-view consistency. Furthermore, we employ a visibility-aware description generation strategy to mitigate ambiguity and propose a Hybrid Training Strategy (HTS) that jointly optimizes coarse category semantics and fine-grained referential cues to ensure robustness under varying query specificities using a multi-positive contrastive objective. Extensive experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that TrackRef3D achieves state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TrackRef3D，一种无需人工标注的全自动流水线，通过多视图一致的跟踪-标注范式实现3D高斯泼溅中的开放世界指称分割，解耦目标发现与语义定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D指称分割方法依赖昂贵的逐场景人工标注和逐视角伪掩码生成，导致多视图不一致且对查询特异性泛化差。亟需一种无需人工标注、能处理开集查询且保持多视图一致性的方法，以推动具身AI中3D场景理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出TrackRef3D全自动流水线，核心是轨迹感知语义一致性模块（TSCM），通过同义词聚类和轨迹感知投票聚合跨视角预测，建立规范语义身份。还采用可见性感知描述生成缓解歧义，并设计混合训练策略（HTS），利用多正样本对比目标联合优化粗粒度类别语义和细粒度指称线索。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称显著优于现有方法，在多视图一致性和开放世界泛化方面取得突破。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个无需人工标注的3DGS开放世界指称分割方法，通过解耦目标发现与语义定位，解决了多视图不一致和查询特异性问题。未来可扩展至更复杂的场景理解任务，如3D推理分割。

title: Hubness, Not Anisotropy, Drives Cross-Lingual Retrieval Asymmetry in Multilingual Embedding Models
abstract: Multilingual embedding models are deployed under the assumption that cross-lingual retrieval is symmetric: if a query in language A retrieves its translation in language B, the reverse should also hold. In practice it does not. Using a parallel corpus of 6,518 idiomatic and proverbial expressions in English, Bangla, Hindi, and Arabic, embedded by five production-grade encoders (Gemini, Mistral, OpenAI-L, OpenAI-S, Qwen), we formalise this failure as a deficit in mutual nearest-neighbour reciprocity and test a single mechanistic claim: among the geometric pathologies of multilingual spaces, hubness, not anisotropy, centroid drift, or magnitude, is the dominant causal driver. Across five pre-registered experiments with falsification conditions specified in advance, hub mass dominates a joint regression on reciprocity (49.5% dominance share, 1.68x the next predictor; partial R^2 = 0.302 versus 0.003 for anisotropy), while a hub-aware score correction (CSLS) closes 63.5% of the worst-to-best reciprocity gap and yields a mean within-model effect size 130x larger than surgical hub-vector ablation. The latter contrast pinpoints the mechanism: hubness is a pathology of the similarity metric, not of individual hub vectors. We resolve the well-known anisotropy-hubness paradox by showing the two are statistically dissociable, and we recommend replacing cosine similarity with CSLS as the default retrieval metric for multilingual embedding pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 论文证明多语言嵌入模型中跨语言检索不对称主要由集集性（hubness）驱动，而非各向异性，并推荐使用CSLS替代余弦相似度作为默认检索度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言嵌入模型假设跨语言检索是对称的，但实际检索中存在不对称问题。现有方法未明确其根本原因，而理解这一缺陷对于提升多语言应用的可靠性至关重要。论文旨在从几何病理角度找出主导因素。
light_analysis.method: 使用包含6,518个习语和谚语的平行语料库（英语、孟加拉语、印地语、阿拉伯语），通过五个生产级编码器（Gemini, Mistral, OpenAI-L, OpenAI-S, Qwen）嵌入。通过预注册实验，利用联合回归分析集集性、各向异性、质心漂移和幅度对互近邻互惠性的影响，并采用CSLS进行校正，与集集向量消融对比。
light_analysis.result: 集集性在联合回归中主导（解释份额49.5%，是下一个预测因子的1.68倍；部分R²=0.302，各向异性仅0.003）。CSLS校正关闭了63.5%的最差-最佳互惠差距，其平均模型内效应量比集集向量消融大130倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实集集性是跨语言检索不对称的主要机制，且与各向异性在统计上可分离。推荐用CSLS替代余弦相似度作为默认检索度量，对多语言嵌入管道的实际部署有直接指导意义。

title: Separate Aggregation of Split Network for Personalized Federated Learning
abstract: Federated learning enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data, but its performance can degrade substantially under heterogeneous client data distributions. A single global model often cannot satisfy diverse client requirements, so personalized federated learning has therefore been explored to improve client specific performance while preserving global generalization. Existing PFL methods often face a fundamental tradeoff in which stronger global sharing can undermine local specialization, whereas stronger local adaptation can lead to overfitting under limited data, label imbalance, and missing class scenarios. In this work, we propose PGFedSplit, a personalized federated learning framework that improves both personalization and global generalization under severe client heterogeneity. PGFedSplit adopts a split architecture and performs adaptive aggregation scheduling tailored to the roles of different model components, enabling stable knowledge sharing while maintaining client specific adaptation. Each client further leverages a mixture of locally extracted representations and synthetic representations generated from server side Gaussian statistics, improving robustness under label imbalance and missing class conditions. Extensive experiments on Fashion MNIST, CIFAR 10, CIFAR 100, and Tiny ImageNet demonstrate consistent improvements over state of the art PFL methods, with stable convergence and superior personalization in highly heterogeneous settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PGFedSplit框架，通过分离网络架构和自适应聚合调度，平衡个性化与全局泛化，解决联邦学习中数据异构问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在客户端数据分布异构时性能下降，单一全局模型难以满足多样需求。现有个性化联邦学习方法面临个性化与泛化的权衡：强全局共享削弱本地特化，强本地适应则因数据有限、标签不平衡和缺失类导致过拟合。因此需要一种能同时提升个性化和全局泛化且鲁棒的方法。
light_analysis.method: PGFedSplit采用分裂架构，将模型划分为不同组件并根据角色进行自适应聚合调度，实现稳定知识共享与客户端特化适应。每个客户端混合本地提取表示和服务端高斯统计生成的合成表示，增强在标签不平衡和缺失类场景下的鲁棒性。该方法在多个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet上，PGFedSplit均优于现有SOTA个性化联邦学习方法，在高度异构设置下实现稳定收敛和更优个性化性能，具体改进数据摘要未明确，但声称一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: PGFedSplit有效解决了联邦学习中数据异构导致的个性化与全局泛化权衡问题，通过分裂架构和自适应聚合以及表示混合策略提升了鲁棒性。实验验证了其优越性，未来可探索更复杂的组件划分和合成表示生成方式。

title: Distribution-Aware Conformal Prediction: A Framework for generating efficient prediction intervals for time series
abstract: We present Distribution-aware Conformal Prediction (DCP), a unified framework integrating probabilistic predictors like Monte Carlo dropout, deep ensembles, and quantile regression with score-agnostic conformal calibration to produce valid and efficient prediction intervals. Leveraging a numerical inversion approach to construct interval bounds, DCP accommodates arbitrary combinations of distribution generating predictors and nonconformity scores. Benchmark analysis on synthetic and real-world time series data demonstrate DCP's ability to adaptively calibrate prediction intervals under varying uncertainty regimes. Crucially, DCP's modular design facilitates plug-and-play experimentation with different predictor-score pairings, quantitatively supported by a newly introduced modified Winkler score that balances validity and efficiency by explicitly penalizing undercoverage. While DCP generalizes and extends existing approaches like Conformalized Quantile Regression and Conformalized Monte Carlo, its modular design allows further extensions, setting a foundation for advancing uncertainty quantification in dynamic environments and high-risk applications.
comment: submitted to Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布感知共形预测框架，整合概率预测器与分数无关共形校准，生成有效高效的时间序列预测区间。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测中的不确定性量化对高风险决策至关重要，但现有共形预测方法通常忽略预测器的分布特性，导致区间效率不足。需要一种统一框架，能够自适应不同不确定性环境，灵活组合多种预测器并保证校准的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出DCP框架，融合蒙特卡洛dropout、深度集成和分位数回归等概率预测器，通过数值求逆方法构造区间边界，并采用分数无关共形校准。支持任意预测器与非一致性分数配对，引入修正Winkler评分以平衡区间宽度和覆盖概率。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实时间序列数据上，DCP展示了自适应校准能力，在不同不确定性条件下生成高效预测区间。模块化设计允许即插即用实验不同组合，修正Winkler评分定量验证了其兼顾有效性与效率的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCP统一并扩展了现有共形预测方法，如共形化分位数回归和共形化蒙特卡洛，为动态环境下的不确定性量化提供了灵活框架。其模块化设计便于进一步扩展，适用于高风险应用场景。

title: MedGuideX: Internalizing Decision Logic from Executable Guidelines into Large Language Models for Clinical Reasoning
abstract: Clinical practice guidelines (CPGs) encode evidence-based decision logic that clinicians apply by evaluating patient variables, conditional criteria, and recommendation rules. However, existing methods often use CPGs as free-text training data or retrieval sources, underutilizing their procedural decision structure. To better exploit this structure, we introduce a guideline-derived training pipeline that transforms CPG recommendations into executable clinical decision logic and uses it to generate factual and counterfactual question-answering data. Theses data teach models both guideline-supported decisions and how decisions change under different patient conditions. Post-training a medical LLM on the generated data yields MedGuideX. Across four clinical reasoning benchmarks, MedGuideX achieves a 10.28% relative improvement in average accuracy. Physician evaluation further shows that MedGuideX better recovers clinician authored reasoning steps and produces physician-preferred rationales in faithfulness, validity, completeness, and clarity. Overall, our results show that executable decision logic from CPGs can be transformed into scalable supervision for building reliable medical LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedGuideX，将临床指南转化为可执行决策逻辑并生成训练数据，提升医疗大模型临床推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床实践指南（CPGs）包含循证决策逻辑，但现有方法仅将其作为自由文本训练数据或检索源，未充分利用其程序化决策结构。需更好利用这种结构，使模型学习指南支持的决策及其在不同患者条件下的变化。
light_analysis.method: 提出指南衍生训练流程：将CPG推荐转化为可执行临床决策逻辑，并生成事实性和反事实性问答数据。事实数据教模型指南支持的决策，反事实数据展示决策如何随患者条件改变。基于此数据微调医疗LLM得到MedGuideX。
light_analysis.result: 在四个临床推理基准上，MedGuideX平均准确率相对提升10.28%。医生评估显示，其能更好地恢复临床医生推理步骤，产生的推理解释在忠实性、有效性、完整性和清晰度上更受偏好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 可执行决策逻辑可从CPG转化为可扩展监督信号，用于构建可靠医疗大模型。该方法显著提升临床推理性能，获得医生认可。未来可扩展更多指南和任务。

title: Beyond Holistic Models: Systematic Component-level Benchmarking of Deep Multivariate Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: While previous research in multivariate time series forecasting has focused on developing complex holistic models, this work advocates for a shift toward a granular, component-level understanding of their impacts. We propose TSCOMP, the first large-scale benchmark that systematically deconstructs deep forecasting methods into their core, fine-grained components--spanning series preprocessing, encoding strategies, network architectures including specific and large time-series models, and optimization methods. Using constrained orthogonal experimental design and extensive evaluations, we conduct multi-view analyses that reveal component effectiveness across different backbones, data characteristics, and their interactions. Beyond providing insights, this benchmark establishes a fine-grained performance corpus comprising over 20,000 model-dataset evaluations, which supports the learning of automated component selection, enabling zero-shot model construction on new datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that the corpus-driven approach, despite its simplicity, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, validating the soundness of our evaluation design and confirming that systematic component selection surpasses manually designed complex architectures. All code and the performance corpus are publicly available at https://github.com/SUFE-AILAB/TSCOMP.
comment: accepted by KDD 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出TSCOMP基准，系统分解时间序列预测模型为细粒度组件，通过组件级评估和自动化选择超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多元时间序列预测研究集中于开发复杂的整体模型，缺乏对模型组件影响的细粒度理解。这导致难以系统评估各组件（如预处理、编码、架构、优化）的独立贡献及其交互效应，阻碍了模型设计的科学性和可解释性。因此需要构建大规模、系统性的组件级基准，以揭示组件有效性并指导自动化模型构建。
light_analysis.method: 提出TSCOMP基准，涵盖系列预处理、编码策略、网络架构（包括特定和大规模时间序列模型）及优化方法等核心组件。采用约束正交实验设计进行多视图分析，评估组件在不同骨干网络、数据特征下的效果及交互作用。构建包含超20,000个模型-数据集评估的性能语料库，并基于此学习自动化组件选择，支持在新数据集上的零样本模型构建。
light_analysis.result: 基于语料库驱动的自动化组件选择方法虽简单，但在多个数据集上始终优于现有最先进方法，验证了系统组件选择比手动设计复杂架构更有效。该结果充分证明了TSCOMP评估设计的合理性和性能语料库的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TSCOMP首次实现了对深度时间序列预测方法的细粒度组件级基准评估，揭示了组件在不同条件下的有效性差异。建立的性能语料库支持自动化组件选择，具有重要学术价值（推动可解释模型设计）和实际应用价值（降低模型开发成本）。未来可扩展至更多组件和领域。所有代码和语料库已开源。

title: Reliable Extraction of Clinical Follow-Up Instructions: A Hybrid Neural-Symbolic Pipeline
abstract: Objective. Outpatient notes carry follow-up instructions pairing actions with future times ("MRI brain in two weeks"). Extracting (action, date) pairs supports scheduling and audit, but generative extractors miss the date because linking and arithmetic are implicit in decoding. We test a hybrid neural-symbolic pipeline against direct generation. Methods. We define TestSpecification and TimeSpecification entities and a ScheduledFor relation. BioBERT feeds BIO tagging and a biaffine linker; entities are canonicalized via a 28-action ontology and times normalized to day offsets deterministically. We evaluate on a 2,000-note synthetic outpatient corpus with action-disjoint splits (18 train, 6 OOV-test) against zero-shot GPT-4o-mini and LoRA-fine-tuned LLaMA-3 8B with note-level bootstrap 95% CIs. Results. On 259-note seen and OOV splits the hybrid pipeline achieves Test-Time Pair F1 of 0.997 and 0.986 with 0.00-day MAE. Baselines reach high action F1 (LLaMA-3 0.992; GPT-4o-mini 0.963 seen) but Pair F1 stays at 0.51-0.57 (LLaMA-3) and 0.53 (GPT-4o-mini), CIs non-overlapping with the hybrid. Conclusion. Separating learned entity extraction from deterministic date arithmetic outperforms generation on this benchmark, generalizes to held-out actions, and exposes failure modes. Transfer to real EHR notes is the next validation; a first-pass realism check is in Limitations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合神经符号流水线，通过分离实体抽取与确定性日期计算，可靠提取临床随访指令中的(动作，日期)对。
light_analysis.motivation: 门诊笔记中携带随访指令，将动作与未来时间配对（如“两周内脑部MRI”）。现有生成式抽取器因解码隐式包含链接和算术运算，常遗漏日期。该问题对临床调度和审计至关重要，但现有方法在处理时间和动作关联时性能不佳，尤其是在未见动作上。
light_analysis.method: 定义TestSpecification和TimeSpecification实体及ScheduledFor关系。使用BioBERT进行BIO标注和双仿射链接器抽取实体，通过28动作本体规范化动作，并确定性归一化时间为日偏移量。在2000份笔记的合成门诊语料库上评估，采用动作不相交划分（18训练，6 OOV测试）。
light_analysis.result: 在259份笔记的看见和未见拆分上，混合流水线测试时间对F1达0.997和0.986，平均绝对误差0.00天。基线方法（LLaMA-3 0.992动作F1，GPT-4o-mini 0.963看见）对F1仅0.51-0.57（LLaMA-3）和0.53（GPT-4o-mini），置信区间与混合方法无重叠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将学习的实体抽取与确定性日期计算分离，在基准测试上优于生成方法，泛化到未见动作，并暴露失败模式。下一步需在真实电子健康记录笔记上验证，局限性中包含首次真实性检查。

title: Auditing and Fixing Economic Validity in Tabular Foundation Models for Discrete Choice
abstract: Tabular foundation models achieve strong accuracy on choice prediction tasks, but their predictions often violate the economic logic those tasks require: raising a price sometimes increases predicted demand, and implied willingness-to-pay estimates are frequently negative or implausible. We propose a two-stage adapter that embeds foundation model predictions within a utility-maximization framework. In the first stage, we estimate a standard choice model whose parameters are constrained to obey economic theory. In the second stage, we freeze those parameters and train a correction term that incorporates the foundation model's predictions as additional information. The result is a model that inherits the foundation model's accuracy gains while guaranteeing monotonic price-demand relationships under policy perturbation and producing analytically computable trade-off measures. On two transportation datasets, the adapter recovers up to 13 percentage points of accuracy over a standard logit model while maintaining perfect economic consistency, something neither the raw foundation models nor conventional distillation achieve.
comment: 5 pages, 1 table. Accepted at the FMSD Workshop, ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段适配器，将表格基础模型预测嵌入效用最大化框架，在保持经济一致性的同时提升离散选择预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格基础模型在离散选择预测中准确性高，但常违反经济逻辑，如价格上升导致需求增加或支付意愿为负。现有标准选择模型虽保证经济有效性，但准确性不足；原始基础模型或传统蒸馏无法同时满足两者。因此需要一种方法能继承基础模型的准确性优势，同时确保预测符合经济理论约束。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段适配器：第一阶段估计受经济理论约束的标准选择模型（如logit），参数满足单调性和理性假设；第二阶段冻结这些参数，训练一个修正项，将基础模型的预测作为附加特征纳入，通过最小化预测误差学习修正。该方法保证价格-需求关系在政策扰动下单调，并产生可解析计算的权衡度量。
light_analysis.result: 在两个交通数据集上，适配器相对于标准logit模型恢复了高达13个百分点的预测准确率，同时保持完美的经济一致性（100%满足单调性）。原始基础模型和传统蒸馏方法均无法同时达到这种效果，适配器在准确性和经济有效性上取得了最佳平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次系统解决了表格基础模型在离散选择任务中的经济有效性问题，提出的两阶段适配器通用且高效，可广泛应用于交通、营销等需要决策建模的场景。未来可探索更复杂的经济约束或扩展到其他类型的结构模型，但当前仅验证了两个数据集，泛化性有待进一步验证。

title: Linear and Neural Dueling Bandits with Delayed Feedback
abstract: Contextual dueling bandits form a cornerstone of preference-based decision-making, with critical applications in   recommender systems and large language model alignment. However, standard algorithms rely on the idealized assumption   of immediate feedback, a condition frequently violated in real-world scenarios such as prompt optimization. This   setting introduces a unique theoretical challenge: unlike linear bandits, dueling bandit estimators lack closed-form   solutions, rendering naive adaptations of standard weighting techniques biased. To address this, we formalize the   problem of Contextual Dueling Bandits with Stochastic Delayed Feedback and propose two novel algorithms: Linear   (LDB-DF) and Neural (NDB-DF) Dueling Bandits with Delayed Feedback. Central to our approach is a novel estimator that   integrates an Inverse Probability Weighting (IPW) mechanism directly into the loss function, ensuring unbiased   correction for delayed or missing feedback. We provide comprehensive theoretical analysis, establishing an   O(d*sqrt(T)) regret bound for the linear setting and sub-linear guarantees for the neural setting. Extensive   experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our propose.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了线性与神经决斗强盗算法（LDB-DF/NDB-DF），通过将逆概率加权（IPW）集成到损失函数中，实现延迟反馈下的无偏估计，并给出了理论遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文决斗强盗在推荐系统和大型语言模型对齐中至关重要，但现有算法假设即时反馈，现实场景中反馈常延迟（如提示优化）。延迟导致标准加权方法产生偏差，亟需能处理随机延迟反馈的无偏算法。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义了带随机延迟反馈的上下文决斗强盗问题。提出两类算法：线性（LDB-DF）和神经（NDB-DF）。核心创新是使用逆概率加权（IPW）机制直接修正损失函数，确保对延迟或缺失反馈的无偏校正。线性设置基于线性模型，神经设置基于神经网络，适应不同复杂度需求。
light_analysis.result: 线性设置下实现了O(d√T)的遗憾界（d为上下文维度，T为时间步），神经设置下实现亚线性遗憾界。在模拟和真实数据集上的实验验证了算法有效性，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为延迟反馈环境下的决斗强盗问题提供了首个形式化框架与可行算法，理论分析与实验验证了方法的有效性。未来可探索更复杂的延迟模型或在实际推荐系统、LLM对齐中应用。

title: Aligning Few-Step Generative Models by Amortizing Sample-based Variational Inference
abstract: Aligning a few-step generative model is challenging, since existing alignment frameworks typically rely on restrictive assumptions: a tractable likelihood, a specific ODE/SDE solver, or a particular model family. We introduce FAV, Few-step Generative Models Alignment via Sample-based Variational Inference, a general alignment framework that requires only sample access to the generator and the reference distribution. We cast alignment as sampling from a reward-tilted distribution anchored to a reference distribution. We leverage Stein Variational Gradient Descent as a sample-based variational inference scheme and amortize its particle updates into the generator parameters via fixed-point regression. We evaluate FAV on two domains: robotics manipulation and image generator alignment. On generative policy alignment for robotic manipulation, FAV outperforms prevailing policy extraction baselines across 56 offline and 30 offline-to-online RL tasks. For image generator alignment, FAV fine-tunes diverse few-step backbones, including GAN, drifting model, consistency models, and flow maps, scaling from ImageNet-$256$ to 1024$^2$ text-to-image synthesis. Code is available at https://github.com/Jaewoopudding/FAV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAV，一种基于样本变分推断的通用对齐框架，仅需生成器和参考分布的样本访问，适用于各类少步生成模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对齐框架通常依赖限制性假设，如可处理似然、特定ODE/SDE求解器或模型族，缺乏通用性。FAV旨在通过样本级变分推断，不依赖这些假设，实现对少步生成模型的灵活对齐，拓宽应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 将对齐建模为从奖励倾斜分布中采样，使用Stein变分梯度下降进行样本变分推断，并通过不动点回归将粒子更新摊销到生成器参数中。该方法仅需生成器和参考分布的样本，不依赖特定模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 在机器人操作领域，FAV在56个离线RL和30个离线到在线RL任务中优于现有策略提取基线。在图像生成对齐中，对GAN、漂移模型、一致性模型、流映射等少步模型进行微调，从ImageNet-256扩展到1024^2文本到图像合成。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAV提供了一个通用、高效的对齐框架，无需限制性假设，在机器人操作和图像生成两个领域均取得优越性能。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更多少步生成模型和应用。

title: MobileExplorer: Accelerating On-Device Inference for Mobile GUI Agents via Online Exploration
abstract: Mobile graphical user interface (GUI) agents enable AI models to autonomously operate smartphones on behalf of users. However, most existing systems focus primarily on optimizing task accuracy and rely on cloud-hosted models for inference, which introduces privacy concerns and network-dependent latency. As a result, fully on-device deployment of mobile GUI agents remains underexplored. We propose MobileExplorer, a new framework that accelerates on-device inference for vision-based mobile GUI agents via online exploration. The key idea is to exploit the long per-step reasoning time of vision-language models (VLMs) by performing lightweight, parallel exploration of UI elements. During model inference, the agent proactively probes semantically relevant UI elements and records these exploration traces as structured memory. To ensure reliable execution in live mobile environments, we design a two-level rollback mechanism that robustly restores the initial UI state when a fast but naive backtracking strategy fails. The collected exploration traces are then summarized into concise contextual hints and injected into the prompt to enhance the subsequent reasoning step. We evaluate MobileExplorer on multiple off-the-shelf devices using the AndroidWorld benchmark, as well as newly designed, more complex tasks and dynamic on-device environments. MobileExplorer reduces the average number of reasoning steps and end-to-end latency by 23\%, while maintaining or improving task success rates by up to 5\%. A video demonstration of MobileExplorer performance in the real world is available at https://youtu.be/thK7MJmdlvM .

light_analysis.overview: 提出MobileExplorer框架，通过在线探索加速移动GUI代理的端侧推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有移动GUI代理主要优化任务准确性，依赖云端模型推理，导致隐私问题和网络延迟。完全端侧部署尚未充分探索，因此需要一种能在设备上高效运行的方案，减少推理步骤和延迟。
light_analysis.method: MobileExplorer利用视觉语言模型(VLM)的每步推理时间，并行探索语义相关UI元素，记录探索轨迹为结构化记忆。设计两级回滚机制确保在动态环境中可靠恢复UI状态，并将探索轨迹总结为上下文提示注入下一步推理。
light_analysis.result: 在AndroidWorld基准和新设计的复杂任务上，MobileExplorer将平均推理步骤和端到端延迟降低23%，同时任务成功率保持或提升最多5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: MobileExplorer通过在线探索和记忆机制，实现了端侧GUI代理的高效推理，兼顾了隐私和实时性。未来可扩展至更多设备架构和复杂任务，减少对云端依赖。

title: AuthTrace: Diagnosing Evidence Construction in Thematically Dense Single-Author Corpora
abstract: Evidence construction--the stage that determines which passages reach the language model before generation begins--is evaluated paradigm by paradigm, leaving practitioners with no principled way to diagnose which organization strategy fails, where, or why. We introduce AuthTrace, a diagnostic benchmark built on thematically dense single-author corpora where near-miss distractors share style, topic, and vocabulary with the required evidence. AuthTrace provides explicit quoted evidence, exact fan-in annotation, and a unified pack-level protocol measuring evidence recall, evidence precision, and answer correctness. A fan-in gradient--the number of source documents required to support the answer--serves as the primary diagnostic axis, enabling controlled comparison across retrieval, memory, graph, and structured-evidence paradigms. Evaluating eight systems across two QA models, we find that evidence recall is the strongest observed predictor of answer correctness under the primary reader-judge pair (r = 0.96); most failures stem from missing evidence rather than answer synthesis. Fan-in further exposes paradigm-specific collapse patterns: flat retrieval degrades 2-3x faster than thematically organized evidence construction. These results show fan-in decomposition to be a reusable diagnostic lens for identifying where evidence-construction systems fail and which paradigm best serves a given workload.

light_analysis.overview: 提出诊断基准AuthTrace，通过扇入梯度分析主题密集单作者语料库中证据构建的失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有证据构建方法逐范式评估，缺乏统一诊断框架来识别组织策略失败的位置和原因。主题密集的单作者语料库中，近误干扰项与所需证据共享风格、主题和词汇，使问题更加突出。理解失败模式对于改进检索、记忆、图和结构化证据等范式至关重要。
light_analysis.method: AuthTrace基于主题密集的单作者语料库，提供明确引用证据、精确扇入注释和统一包级协议，度量证据召回、证据精度和答案正确性。以扇入梯度（支持答案所需源文档数量）作为主要诊断轴，实现对检索、记忆、图和结构化证据范式的可比较评估。使用两个QA模型评估八个系统。
light_analysis.result: 在主要读者-法官对下，证据召回是答案正确性的最强预测因子（r=0.96）；大多数失败源于证据缺失而非答案合成。扇入暴露范式特定崩溃模式：平面检索性能随扇入增加下降速度是主题组织证据构建的2-3倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 扇入分解是一种可重用的诊断视角，用于识别证据构建系统失败的位置以及哪种范式最适合特定工作负载。该基准为从业者提供了系统性的评估工具，揭示了证据召回的关键作用，并指出了主题组织的重要性。未来可扩展至多作者或多领域场景。

title: PDEInvBench: A Comprehensive Dataset and Design Space Exploration of Neural Networks for PDE Inverse Problems
abstract: Inverse problems in partial differential equations (PDEs) involve estimating the physical parameters of a system from observed spatiotemporal solution fields. Neural networks are well-suited for PDE parameter estimation due to their capability to model function-to-function space transformations. While existing benchmarks of machine learning methods for PDEs primarily focus on the forward problem, there are no similar comprehensive studies and benchmark datasets on PDE inverse problems, i.e., mapping solution fields to underlying physical parameters. We fill this gap by introducing PDEInvBench, a comprehensive benchmark dataset consisting of numerical simulations for both time-dependent and time-independent PDEs across a wide range of physical behaviors and parameters. Our dataset includes evaluation splits that assess performance in both in-distribution and various out-of-distribution settings. Using our benchmark dataset, we comprehensively explore the design space of neural networks for PDE inverse problems along three key dimensions: (1) optimization procedures, analyzing the role of supervised, self-supervised, and test-time training objectives on performance, (2) problem representations, where we study the value of architectural choices with different inductive biases and various conditioning strategies, and (3) scaling, which we perform with respect to both model and data size. Our experiments reveal several practical insights: 1) neural networks perform best with a two-stage training procedure: initial supervision with PDE parameters followed by test-time fine-tuning using the PDE residual, 2) incorporating PDE derivatives as input features consistently improves accuracy, and 3) increasing the diversity of initial conditions in the training data yields greater performance gains than expanding the range of PDE parameters. We make our dataset and codebase publicly available.
comment: 37 total pages, 13 main pages, 20 figures, 8 tables. Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出了PDEInvBench，一个用于PDE逆问题的综合基准数据集，并系统探索了神经网络的设计空间。
light_analysis.motivation: PDE逆问题从观测解场估计物理参数，神经网络因能建模函数空间变换而适用。现有基准主要关注正问题，缺乏逆问题的综合研究。因此，需要建立全面基准并探索设计空间以推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建PDEInvBench，包含时变和时不变PDE数值模拟，涵盖分布内和多种分布外场景。从三个维度探索神经网络设计：优化过程（监督、自监督、测试时训练）、问题表示（不同归纳偏好架构和条件策略）以及缩放（模型和数据大小）。实验采用两阶段训练、PDE导数特征输入等方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示三个关键洞察：1）两阶段训练（初始监督+测试时PDE残差微调）性能最佳；2）将PDE导数作为输入特征持续提升准确率；3）增加训练数据中初始条件多样性比扩大参数范围带来更大性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PDEInvBench填补了PDE逆问题基准空白，为网络设计提供实用指导。其公开数据集和代码将促进相关研究。未来可扩展至更多PDE类型及复杂逆问题。

title: READER: Reasoning-Enhanced AI-Generated Text Detection
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have made it increasingly difficult to distinguish human-written text from AI-generated content. Many existing detectors train supervised neural classifiers that achieve strong in-distribution performance but are often opaque and can degrade substantially under distribution shift. We present READER, a reasoning-enhanced AI text detector that outputs both a human/AI label and a structured rationale describing the evidence for its decision. A key component of our approach is READ, a curated supervision set of rationales and verdicts. We fine-tune an LLM on READ to build READER, which reasons before detecting at inference time. Despite having only 1.5B parameters, READER consistently outperforms existing detectors as well as prompted, high-capacity LLM baselines (GPT-5.2, Gemini-3-Pro, and DeepSeek-V3.2), which are 100 to 1000 times larger in scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出READER，一种结合结构化推理的AI文本检测方法，通过微调1.5B参数的LLM输出标签和理由，超越千倍规模的大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI文本检测器多采用监督神经分类器，在分布内表现良好但缺乏可解释性，且分布偏移时性能严重下降。需要一种既能保持高检测准确率又能提供决策依据的方法，以增强可信度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 核心是构建推理增强的检测框架，包含两个部分：READ数据集（提供人工标注的理由和判决）和基于LLM的微调模型。在READ上微调一个1.5B参数的LLM，使其在推理时先生成结构化理由再输出标签，实现透明检测。
light_analysis.result: 在多项基准测试中，READER（1.5B参数）一致优于现有检测器以及参数规模大100-1000倍的GPT-5.2、Gemini-3-Pro、DeepSeek-V3.2等模型，展示了小模型通过推理增强即可超越大模型的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: READER证明了推理增强在小模型上的有效性，为可解释AI文本检测提供了新方向。未来可扩展至更多语言和场景，但需注意理由生成的质量和计算成本。

title: FrontierOR: Benchmarking LLMs' Capacity for Efficient Algorithm Design in Large-Scale Optimization
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for optimization modeling and solver-code generation, yet practical operations research and optimization problems often require a harder capability: designing scalable algorithms that exploit problem structure and outperform direct formulation-and-solve baselines. Existing benchmarks are limited to small or simplified examples far below real-world scale and complexity. We introduce FrontierOR, among the first benchmarks to systematically evaluate LLM-based efficient algorithm design for realistic large-scale optimization problems. FrontierOR includes 180 tasks derived from methodologically diverse papers published in top-tier operations research venues, each with standardized instances and a hidden, expert-verified evaluation suite. We evaluate seven LLMs spanning frontier, cost-effective, and open-source models both in one-shot and test-time evolution settings. The results reveal that frontier models still struggle to move from executable formulations to efficient optimization algorithms: the strongest one-shot model outperforms Gurobi in only 31% of cases in both solution quality and computational efficiency, and even strong coding agents with test-time evolution achieve only 50% on selected hard tasks. FrontierOR establishes a practical evaluation platform for LLM-based optimization algorithm design, which enables future LLMs and agents to be systematically tested on whether they can move beyond correct formulation toward a feasible, high-quality, and efficient algorithm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了FrontierOR基准，系统评估大语言模型在真实大规模优化问题中设计高效算法的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM主要用于优化建模和求解器代码生成，但实际运筹学问题需要设计可扩展的算法以利用问题结构并超越直接求解基线。现有基准局限于小规模简化示例，无法反映真实世界的规模和复杂度。FrontierOR首次系统评估LLM在大规模优化中的高效算法设计能力，填补了这一空白。
light_analysis.method: FrontierOR包含180个任务，源自顶级运筹学期刊的方法论文，每个任务有标准化实例和专家验证的隐藏测试集。评估了7个LLM（包括前沿、性价比高和开源模型）在一次性设置和测试时进化设置下的表现。关键在于测试LLM从可执行公式向高效优化算法的转化能力。
light_analysis.result: 最强的一次性模型仅在31%的案例中在求解质量和计算效率上优于Gurobi；即使强大的编码代理在测试时进化下，在选定困难任务上仅达到50%的成功率。这表明前沿模型仍难以从正确公式转向高效算法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FrontierOR为基于LLM的优化算法设计建立了实用评估平台，使未来LLM和代理系统能系统测试是否超越正确公式、实现可行、高质量、高效的算法。该基准有助于推动LLM在运筹学领域的实际应用。

title: GlobalDentBench: A Multinational Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Clinical Reasoning in Dentistry with Expert Calibration
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) hold transformative potential for medicine, their reasoning robustness and safety in real-world clinical scenarios remain critically underexplored, particularly in dentistry. Here we introduce GlobalDentBench, the first multinational dental benchmark, featuring a taxonomy that encompasses 14 dental specialties across 88 countries and regions spanning six continents. The benchmark comprises 8,978 expert-validated questions across three formats (multiple-choice, short-answer, and case-based questions) and assesses three progressive reasoning levels: knowledge recall (L1), routine reasoning (L2), and individualized reasoning (L3). To ensure data quality, the automated construction framework was calibrated by six senior dentists, achieving expert agreement rates of 99.98% for multiple-choice and short-answer questions and 96.78% for the more complex case-based questions. Evaluation of 12 frontier LLMs on GlobalDentBench revealed a sharp, stepwise performance degradation with increasing reasoning complexity. Specifically, accuracy plummeted from 81.34% on multiple-choice to 64.53% on short-answer and 22.34% on case-based questions, while declining markedly from 74.01% at L1 to 55.64% at L2 and 35.71% at L3. More critically, risk analysis of real-world dental cases demonstrated an alarming overall unsafe rate of 31.01% in LLM-generated clinical recommendations, with 4.51% posing risks of irreversible patient harm and risks particularly pronounced in specialties such as orthodontics. These findings expose fundamental limitations in the medical reasoning and safety of current LLMs. Consequently, GlobalDentBench provides a scalable foundation for trustworthy clinical AI evaluation, underscoring the urgent need for rigorous validation before the safe deployment of these models in healthcare.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个跨国牙科基准GlobalDentBench，系统评估LLM临床推理能力，揭示推理复杂度增加时性能急剧下降及高风险问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在医学领域潜力巨大，但在牙科等临床场景中的推理稳健性和安全性尚未充分探索。现有评估缺乏覆盖多国家、多专科的标准化基准，难以全面衡量LLM的实际临床能力。因此，需要构建一个跨国、多格式、多推理层次的基准来系统评估LLM的牙科临床推理能力。
light_analysis.method: GlobalDentBench包含14个牙科专科、88个国家和地区，共8,978个专家验证问题，涵盖选择题、简答题和病例分析三种格式，并定义三个递进推理层次：知识回忆(L1)、常规推理(L2)和个性化推理(L3)。自动构建框架经六名资深牙医校准，选择题和简答题专家一致率99.98%，病例分析达96.78%。
light_analysis.result: 评估12个前沿LLM，性能随推理复杂度显著下降：选择题准确率81.34%，简答题64.53%，病例分析仅22.34%；L1准确率74.01%，L2 55.64%，L3 35.71%。真实牙科病例风险分析显示，LLM生成的临床建议总体不安全率31.01%，其中4.51%可能导致不可逆患者伤害，正畸等专科风险尤为突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: GlobalDentBench揭示了当前LLM在牙科临床推理中的根本局限性，特别是在复杂推理场景下的性能崩溃和高安全风险。该基准为可信赖的临床AI评估提供了可扩展基础，强调了在医疗保健中安全部署这些模型前需进行严格验证的紧迫性。

title: EgoProx: Evaluating MLLMs on Egocentric 3D Proximity Reasoning Across a Cognitive Hierarchy
abstract: Humans constantly reason about 3D proximity, the relations between their body and surrounding objects, to guide perception and action in daily life. Whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can perform such embodied 3D reasoning remains unclear. To this end, we introduce EgoProx, a benchmark for egocentric 3D proximity reasoning. We organize our tasks along a cognitive chain, covering intention, exploration, exploitation, and chain-of-actions reasoning. We also design an agent based data engine that produces diverse and consistent QA pairs at scale. We benchmark prevailing MLLMs on EgoProx and conduct additional analyses with dataset specific and task specific instruction tuning. We observe large cross-domain gains, indicating that current MLLMs contain some spatial knowledge; however, they still struggle to effectively leverage it for spatial reasoning VQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EgoProx基准，系统评估多模态大语言模型在自我中心3D接近推理上的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类日常中不断推理自身与物体的3D接近关系以指导感知和行为，但现有多模态大语言模型是否具备这种具身3D推理能力尚不清楚。缺乏针对性的评估基准和任务设计限制了该方向的研究进展。EgoProx旨在填补这一空白，提供标准化测试。
light_analysis.method: EgoProx沿认知层级组织任务，涵盖意图、探索、利用和动作链推理四个层面。采用基于智能体的数据引擎自动生成大规模、多样且一致的问答对。在多个主流MLLMs上评测，并结合数据集特定与任务特定指令微调进行分析，观察跨域知识迁移效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前MLLMs虽具备一定的空间知识，但在自我中心3D接近推理的视觉问答中难以有效利用这些知识。跨域训练带来了性能提升，说明模型存在泛化潜力，但整体推理准确性仍有限，尤其在复杂层级任务上表现不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoProx揭示了MLLMs在具身3D空间推理上的关键瓶颈，为未来提升模型的空间认知能力提供了评估工具和方向。该基准可推动多模态模型向更接近人类感知与行动推理的方向发展。未来可探索强化空间知识注入或结构化推理模块。

title: Beyond Final Answers: Auditing Trajectory-Level Hallucinations in Multi-Agent Industrial Workflows
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that reason, use tools, and act over multiple steps. Yet most hallucination benchmarks still evaluate only the final output, missing failures that originate in intermediate Thought-Action-Observation steps. We present Trajel, a dataset and evaluation framework for auditing trajectory-level hallucinations in multi-agent industrial workflows. Trajel introduces a five-type hallucination taxonomy (factual, referential, logical, procedural, and scope-based) over expert-annotated agent traces from AssetOpsBench. We benchmark supervised detection models at the subtask, trajectory, and long-context levels. Our results show that the most common failure modes are missed by existing benchmarks, that nearly half of hallucinated trajectories involve multiple types at once, and that automated detectors with high binary accuracy still misclassify the subtlest types. Trajectory-aware detection significantly outperforms standard post-hoc verification, making taxonomy-grounded evaluation necessary for safer agentic deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trajel数据集和评估框架，用于审计多智能体工业工作流中的轨迹级幻觉，填补现有基准仅评估最终输出的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主智能体在多步推理中逐步使用工具和行动，但现有幻觉基准仅评估最终输出，忽视中间步骤的失败。在多智能体工业工作流中，中间步骤的错误会累积导致严重后果。因此需要系统审计轨迹级幻觉，确保安全部署。
light_analysis.method: 构建Trajel数据集，包含专家注释的AssetOpsBench智能体轨迹，定义五种幻觉类型（事实、指称、逻辑、程序、范围）。在子任务、轨迹和长上下文三个级别基准测试监督检测模型，比较轨迹感知检测与标准事后验证方法。
light_analysis.result: 发现最常见失败模式被现有基准遗漏，近半数幻觉轨迹涉及多种类型。高二元准确率的自动检测器仍误判最微妙类型，而轨迹感知检测显著优于标准事后验证，证明分类学评估的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供首个轨迹级幻觉审计框架和数据集，揭示多智能体工作流中幻觉的复杂性和现有检测局限。强调分类学评估对安全部署的重要性，为未来开发更鲁棒的检测方法奠定基础，但未讨论跨领域泛化。

title: Identifying and Mitigating Systemic Measurement Bias in Production LLM Inference Benchmarks
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) transition from research environments to production deployments, evaluating their performance against strict Service Level Objectives (SLOs) has become critical. However, current evaluation methodologies suffer from severe measurement bias at scale. We demonstrate that widely used benchmarking utilities rely on single-process, asyncio-driven architectures that introduce fundamental client-side queuing bottlenecks under high concurrency. By modeling the benchmarking client as an $M/G/1$ queue, we mathematically demonstrate how the Python Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) artificially inflates Time to First Token (TTFT) and Time Per Output Token (TPOT) metrics as request rates scale. To resolve this systematic inaccuracy, we propose an unbiased, multi-process evaluation framework that effectively distributes client-side load, ensuring negligible queuing overhead. Furthermore, we formalize a composite metric, Normalized Time Per Output Token (NTPOT), to robustly amortize end-to-end latency, including prefill and scheduling delays across sequence lengths. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates that this methodology successfully isolates pure serving engine performance, enabling accurate, reproducible profiling of LLMs at production scales exceeding thousands of queries per second.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多进程评估框架和复合指标NTPOT，消除LLM推理基准测试中因GIL导致的系统性测量偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型从研究转向生产部署，需要严格评估其SLO性能。但现有基准测试工具采用单进程异步架构，在高并发下因Python GIL导致客户端排队瓶颈，人为夸大TTFT和TPOT指标，产生系统性测量偏差。这种偏差使得生产环境下的真实性能无法准确评估，亟需一种无偏的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过M/G/1排队论模型数学分析GIL对延迟指标的影响，提出无偏的多进程评估框架，将客户端负载分布到多个进程，消除排队开销。同时形式化复合指标NTPOT，将预填和调度延迟摊销到每个输出令牌，实现端到端延迟的稳健度量，从而隔离纯服务引擎性能。
light_analysis.result: 实证表明，该方法能在每秒数千查询的生产规模下成功隔离纯服务引擎性能，实现准确、可复现的LLM性能分析。与单进程异步方法相比，消除了因排队和GIL导致的人为延迟膨胀，使得TTFT和TPOT指标更接近真实值（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作识别并缓解了LLM推理基准测试中的系统性测量偏差，提出的多进程框架和NTPOT指标为生产级LLM评估提供了可靠工具。有助于学术界和工业界更准确地衡量模型部署性能，指导SLO优化。未来可探索针对不同模型架构和硬件环境的适配。

title: Neuro-Inspired Inverse Learning for Planning and Control
abstract: We present a neuro-inspired framework for embodied planning and control. Building on three principles that enable fast and highly effective goal-directed behavior in the mammalian brain - paired forward/inverse internal models, open-loop multi-step motor commands, and sequential, hierarchical organization of action - our Inverter framework uses learned components, trained end-to-end through Inverse Learning (IL) and supplemented where natural by analytic or algorithmic modules; we formalize IL and delineate it from supervised, reinforcement, and imitation learning. IL bridges Reinforcement Learning (RL)-style amortization, which runs in a single forward pass but emits only one action at a time, and Optimal Control (OC)-style sequence planning over whole trajectories, but with iterative test-time computation. Single Inverters or hierarchical n=2 Inverter stacks match or improve on offline-RL and diffusion-planner baselines on all 3 maze2d and 6 antmaze D4RL variants by an average of +24.2% (range -1.9% to +78.2%), at one-to-two orders of magnitude less inference compute time. Distinctively, optimizing through the Forward Model (FoM) over the entire T-step action sequence - rather than per step - lets Inverters produce smooth, goal-coherent, trajectory-wide structure and reach control policies closer to the analytic optimum than the policy underlying the training data itself. We also identify a failure mode of IL: FoM hacking under narrow training-data coverage, which we mitigate by using random training data with broader coverage. As an application example, a Pulse Inverter synthesizes arbitrary single-qubit quantum gates with fidelity matching the standard iterative numerical baseline (GRAPE), at more than 1000x lower per-gate compute time. In summary, we conclude that IL enables a versatile class of world-interfaces, especially for latency- and resource-critical embodied AI.
comment: Version 2, minor fix in online version of the abstract, pdf unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经启发的逆学习框架Inverter，结合前向/逆向模型、多步动作序列和层次化组织，实现高效规划与控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习（RL）单步运行慢，最优控制（OC）迭代计算成本高，难以平衡效率与规划质量。受哺乳动物大脑快速目标导向行为启发，需要一种既能多步规划又能高效推理的方法。
light_analysis.method: Inverter框架基于逆学习（IL），端到端训练前向模型（FoM）和逆变器，在完整T步动作序列上优化而非逐步，支持层次化堆叠。使用随机训练数据缓解FoM hacking问题。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL的3个maze2d和6个antmaze任务中，Inverter（单层或两层堆叠）平均提升24.2%（范围-1.9%至+78.2%），推理计算时间减少1-2个数量级。量子门合成中保真度媲美标准迭代方法，计算时间降低1000倍以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: IL能生成平滑、目标一致的轨迹，逼近解析最优控制策略，是延迟和资源受限具身AI的有效接口。未来可探索更鲁棒的前向模型训练。

title: How Human-Like Are Large Language Models? A Register-Aware Linguistic Evaluation Framework
abstract: While factual correctness and task-performance have been in focus of Large Language Model (LLM) research for a long time, the fundamental question of how human-like generated texts are on a linguistic level has been underexplored. From a corpus-linguistic perspective, language production is inherently context-dependent, with distinct communicative contexts giving rise to differences in frequencies and co-occurrence patterns of linguistic features. A text failing to adhere to these patterns can be content-wise correct, but still be unfavorable to human readers. In this work, we propose a context-aware evaluation framework in which human-likeness is assessed using a two-sample problem between the linguistic feature distribution of a human reference corpus for a given register and a corresponding LLM-generated corpus. We implement this framework using the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) and the 67 lexico-grammatical features introduced by Biber, which are commonly applied in corpus linguistics. In our experiments, we compare seven instruction-tuned, open-source models across five English-language datasets spanning distinct registers against a human baseline. While across all tested setups, LLMs deviate from the human baseline, which models are closest to human language depends on the register and is not dictated by model size.
comment: 8.5 pages (main) + 31 pages appendix, 29 figures, 10 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/BjoernNieth/Register_Aware_LLMs

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种语境感知的类人性评估框架，利用最大均值差异（MMD）和Biber的词汇语法特征，分析LLM生成文本与人类参考语料库的差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM研究多关注事实正确性和任务性能，忽略了生成文本在语言学层面的类人性。语言使用具有语境依赖性，不同语境下语言特征分布不同，文本不符合这些模式会导致人类读者反感。因此需要一种能捕捉语境差异的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 将类人性评估建模为双样本问题，使用最大均值差异（MMD）比较人类参考语料库与LLM生成语料库的词汇语法特征分布。采用Biber提出的67个特征，覆盖多个语域。实验在5个英语数据集上对比7个指令微调开源模型与人类基线。
light_analysis.result: 所有LLM均与人类基线存在偏差，但哪个模型更接近人类语言取决于具体语域，而非模型规模。这表明类人性评估必须考虑语境因素，模型大小不是决定性因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从语言学角度提出了一种语境感知的LLM类人性评估框架，揭示了模型类人性与语域密切相关。该框架可用于指导生成更自然文本的模型设计，未来可扩展至更多语域和模型类型。

title: GFSR: Geometric Fidelity and Spatial Refinement for Reliable Lane Detection
abstract: Lane detection stands as a crucial perception task in autonomous driving and advanced driver assistance systems. However, existing methods still degrade in complex real scenarios due to two major limitations. First, classification confidence only characterizes the categorical existence of lane priors and has no strong correlation with geometric quality. If threshold filtering and NMS are conducted merely based on this confidence, the model tends to retain lane priors with high confidence while eliminating those with lower confidence but superior geometric representation. Secondly, the regression modules in existing methods weaken correlations among sampling points, hindering fine-grained optimization of distant, high-curvature and complex-topology lanes and causing underfitting. To address these issues, we propose Geometric Fidelity and Spatial Refinement (GFSR), a framework consisting of LaneIoU-guided Confidence Calibration (LCC) and Adaptive Gated Location Refinement (AGLR). Specifically, LCC adopts LaneIoU as soft supervision to explicitly estimate the geometric fidelity of lane priors, which is further fused with classification confidence to construct the Collaborative Reliability Index (CRI). This index guides lane prior filtering, effectively retaining those with high classification confidence and favorable geometric quality. Meanwhile, cooperating with regression heads in each refinement stage, AGLR predicts sampling point lateral offsets and adopts a gating mechanism to adaptively regulate correction magnitude, strengthen inter-point correlations and boost model adaptability as well as robustness toward complex lane scenarios. Extensive experiments on CULane and CurveLanes demonstrate that our GFSR achieves state-of-the-art performance on CULane, with F1_50 and F1_75 scores of 81.46% and 65.01%, and reaches 87.35% F1_50 on CurveLanes.
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems. 12 pages, 6 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出GFSR框架，通过LaneIoU引导的置信度校准和自适应门控位置细化，提升车道检测的几何保真度和空间细化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有车道检测方法在复杂场景中性能下降，原因有二：一是分类置信度无法反映几何质量，导致高置信度但几何差的检测被保留，而低置信度但几何好的被过滤；二是回归模块削弱采样点间相关性，难以优化远距离、高曲率等复杂车道。
light_analysis.method: GFSR包含LaneIoU引导的置信度校准（LCC）和自适应门控位置细化（AGLR）。LCC以LaneIoU为软监督估计几何保真度，融合分类置信度形成协作可靠性指数（CRI），指导先验过滤。AGLR在每阶段回归中预测采样点横向偏移，通过门控机制自适应调节校正幅度，增强点间相关性与模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在CULane上F1_50和F1_75分别达81.46%和65.01%，在CurveLanes上F1_50达87.35%，均超越现有方法，实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: GFSR通过解决几何保真度和空间细化问题，显著提升车道检测的可靠性。实验验证其有效性，为自动驾驶感知任务提供新思路。

title: Iterative Refinement Neural Operators are Learned Fixed-Point Solvers: A Principled Approach to Spectral Bias Mitigation
abstract: Neural operators serve as fast, data-driven surrogates for scientific modeling but typically rely on a monolithic, single-pass inference procedure that struggles to resolve high-frequency details, a limitation known as spectral bias. We introduce the Iterative Refinement Neural Operator (IRNO), which augments pre-trained operators with a learned refinement module iteratively applied via fixed-point iteration. IRNO decomposes the prediction into a coarse initialization followed by successive residual corrections, paralleling classical numerical solvers. Under local assumptions, we establish contraction of the induced operator, ensuring convergence to a unique fixed point. To explicitly target high-frequency errors, we propose a progressive spectral loss that adaptively increases penalty on high-frequency components over refinement steps during training. Across physical systems, IRNO consistently lowers error, with up to 56.05% improvement on turbulent flow. On Active Matter, spectral analysis reveals that, relative to base operator, the normalized error ratios decrease to 27.72-36.10% in low-, 5.07-6.68% in mid-, and 1.48-2.04% in high-frequencies, remaining stable beyond the trained iteration count. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaotianliu-dartmouth/Iterative_Refinement_Neural_Operator
comment: 47 pages; accepted to ICML 2026 as a Spotlight

light_analysis.overview: 提出迭代精炼神经算子（IRNO），通过固定点迭代与渐进频谱损失缓解光谱偏差，显著提升高频细节预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子作为科学建模的快速数据驱动代理，却因单次推理难以解析高频细节而受限于光谱偏差。现有方法多采用单一前向过程，缺乏对高频误差的显式校正，导致复杂物理系统模拟中的细节失真。该问题限制了神经算子在高精度科学计算中的应用，亟需能够系统性地逐步修正高频误差的框架。
light_analysis.method: IRNO在预训练算子上附加可学习精炼模块，通过固定点迭代将预测分解为粗初始化与残差校正，仿照经典数值求解器。理论分析证明在局部假设下算子收敛到唯一不动点。为针对性抑制高频误差，提出渐进频谱损失，在训练中逐步增加高频分量惩罚权重，使模型逐步学习高频特征，兼容多种基算子架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个物理系统上，IRNO持续降低误差：湍流流动中误差降低56.05%；在Active Matter系统中，归一化误差比在低频降至27.72-36.10%，中频降至5.07-6.68%，高频降至1.48-2.04%，且超出训练迭代次数后误差保持稳定，表明模型具备良好的泛化性与收敛稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: IRNO通过迭代精炼与渐进频谱损失有效缓解神经算子的光谱偏差，显著增强了对高频细节的解析能力，在湍流和活性物质等复杂系统中验证了有效性，为科学计算的高精度代理建模提供了新范式。未来可探索自适应迭代步数及跨任务迁移，进一步拓展其应用范围。

title: $\textit{BlockFormer}$ : Transformer-based inference from interaction maps
abstract: Inference from interaction maps, such as centromere identification from genome-wide chromosome conformation capture techniques -- notably Hi-C -- can be formulated as a generic inverse problem: infer a set of parameters given a map summarizing pairwise interactions between entities through blocks of variable numbers and sizes. In this work, we introduce a data-driven approach that leverages shared structure between these maps, such as global alignment between localized patterns, while handling the variability in number and size of entities arising in real-world data. Our approach relies on a transformer architecture capable of handling such variability and a custom simulator to generate abundant, yet computationally cheap synthetic data for training. Applied to the problem of centromere localization, the method accurately recovers their genomic positions across a wide range of species of various genome sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BlockFormer，一种基于Transformer的架构，能够处理交互图中实体数量和大小可变性，用于从Hi-C数据推断着丝粒位置。
light_analysis.motivation: 从交互图（如Hi-C数据）推断参数是通用逆问题，现有方法难以处理实体数量和大小可变性。着丝粒识别对基因组研究关键，但传统方法扩展性差，无法适应不同物种。
light_analysis.method: 采用Transformer架构处理可变性，并设计自定义模拟器生成丰富合成数据用于训练。核心创新在于利用交互图中共享结构（如局部模式全局对齐）处理可变实体，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 应用于着丝粒定位，能准确恢复多种物种的基因组位置，覆盖不同基因组大小。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但表明跨物种有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出数据驱动方法，利用共享结构处理可变性，具有通用性。可用于其他交互图逆问题，但依赖合成数据训练，实际数据差异可能需要调整。

title: Declarative Data Services: Structured Agentic Discovery for Composing Data Systems
abstract: Agentic discovery has shown that LLM-driven search can find novel algorithms, designs, and code under benchmark conditions. Translating the paradigm to multi-system data backends surfaces a harder problem: the search space is heterogeneous, the verifier is whether a deployed stack actually runs, and composition knowledge is unevenly captured in pretraining. Unbounded agentic discovery, a coding agent iterating on failure-log feedback, fails to converge consistently on a working stack even when iteration and explicit composition knowledge are added. We propose Declarative Data Services (DDS), an architecture for structured agentic discovery of data-system compositions from declarative user intent. The framework owns four typed contracts at successive layers (intent, operator DAG, per-system skills, runtime attribution) that decompose the global search into bounded sub-searches; sub-agents search each typed space, while the framework provides the channels by which knowledge flows forward as inline skill citations and errors route backward as typed signals. As a proof of life on a trading-backend workload, DDS converges where unbounded discovery does not; runtime failures become skill patches that the next deployment cites inline. We position this as an early prototype reporting lessons from real-world data-system composition.
comment: Accepted at AI Agents for Discovery in the Wild (AID-Wild), Workshop at ACM CAIS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Declarative Data Services (DDS)架构，通过分层类型合约将异构数据系统组合的智能体发现分解为有界子搜索，解决无界发现无法收敛的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM驱动的智能体发现在基准测试中有效，但移植到多系统数据后端时面临搜索空间异构、验证器为实际部署运行、组合知识在预训练中不均衡等挑战。无界智能体发现（编码器基于失败日志迭代）即使增加迭代和显式组合知识也无法一致收敛于工作栈，亟需结构化方法。
light_analysis.method: DDS架构拥有四个层次的有类型合约：意图、算子DAG、每系统技能、运行时归因，将全局搜索分解为有界子搜索。子智能体搜索各类型空间，框架提供知识前向流动（内联技能引用）和错误反向传播（类型化信号）。在交易后端工作负载上进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 作为生存证明，DDS在无界发现无法收敛的交易后端任务上成功收敛；运行时失败转化为技能补丁，被下次部署内联引用。摘要未提供具体量化对比数据，但表明收敛性显著改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出DDS架构，实现了结构化智能体发现数据系统组合，学术价值在于解决了异构系统组合的搜索难题；实际应用在交易后端工作负载中展示可行性。作为早期原型，报告了从现实世界数据系统组合中获得的经验教训，未来可扩展至更多系统。

title: Matryoshka Concept Bottleneck Models
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) have emerged as a prominent paradigm for interpretable deep learning, learning by grounding predictions in human-understandable concepts. However, their practical deployment is hindered by the high cost of test-time intervention, as correcting model errors typically requires human experts to manually inspect and verify a large set of predicted concepts. Existing approaches suffer from a fundamental structural limitation: they either adopt a single static concept set, forcing experts to exhaustively annotate concepts and incurring prohibitive intervention costs, or train multiple models tailored to different concept budgets, resulting in substantial computational and maintenance overhead. To address this challenge, we propose the Matryoshka Concept Bottleneck Model (MCBM), a unified architecture that enables adaptive concept utilization within a single model. Inspired by Matryoshka Representation Learning, MCBM organizes concepts into a nested hierarchy based on maximum relevance and minimum redundancy, allowing inference at multiple levels of conceptual granularity without retraining. Theoretically, we show that MCBM reduces the expected intervention costs from linear to logarithmic order, $O(\log K)$, while guaranteeing monotonic performance improvement. Empirically, extensive experiments demonstrate that MCBM matches the performance of independently trained models while enabling dynamic and efficient expert interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Matryoshka概念瓶颈模型（MCBM），通过嵌套概念层次实现单个模型内自适应概念利用，将干预成本降至对数阶。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）以可理解概念进行预测，但部署时测试时间干预成本高，需专家手动验证大量概念。现有方法要么使用单一静态概念集导致专家需详尽标注，要么为不同概念预算训练多个模型造成巨大计算和维护开销，缺乏高效自适应机制。
light_analysis.method: 受Matryoshka表示学习启发，MCBM基于最大相关最小冗余原则将概念组织成嵌套层次结构，使单个模型支持不同粒度推理而无需重新训练。理论上证明预期干预成本从线性降至对数阶O(log K)，并保证单调性能改进。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，MCBM在性能上与独立训练的基线模型相当，同时实现动态专家交互，显著降低干预成本。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但验证了理论优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MCBM通过统一架构解决了CBM部署的干预成本瓶颈，理论上降低至对数阶并保证性能，具有高学术和实用价值。未来可探索更优的层次结构或扩展至其他解释性模型。

title: Mind Your Margin and Boundary: Are Your Distilled Datasets Truly Robust?
abstract: Dataset distillation (DD) compresses a large training set into a small synthetic set for efficient training, but most DD methods optimize only clean accuracy and leave robustness uncontrolled. Recent robust DD methods improve robustness, yet they often suffer from a poor accuracy-robustness trade-off because they (i) treat all adversarially perturbed examples uniformly, despite robust risk being dominated by near-zero robust margins, and (ii) do not explicitly increase inter-class separation in the decision boundary where attacks concentrate. We present Contrastive Curriculum for Robust Dataset Distillation (C$^2$R), a framework that couples an attack-aware curriculum with a contrastive robustness objective. From a robust-margin perspective, we derive a perturbation score that approximates each sample's robust hinge, enabling a curriculum that prioritizes the smallest-margin adversaries that most directly drive robust error. In parallel, a class-balanced contrastive robustness loss enforces adversarial invariance while explicitly widening boundary separation across classes. Experiments on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and multiple ImageNet-1K subsets under six attacks show that C$^2$R achieves the best robust accuracy, outperforming prior robust DD by $2.8$% on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出C²R框架，通过对抗性感知课程和对比鲁棒性目标，提升蒸馏数据集的鲁棒性，实现更优的准确率-鲁棒性权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据集蒸馏方法主要优化干净准确率，忽略鲁棒性；现有鲁棒蒸馏方法因统一处理对抗样本且未增大类间决策边界间隔，导致准确率-鲁棒性权衡不佳。本文从鲁棒边际角度出发，旨在解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出C²R框架，包含两个核心组件：基于鲁棒边际的扰动评分，优先选择最小边际的对抗样本进行课程学习；以及类别平衡的对比鲁棒性损失，强制对抗不变性并扩大类间边界分离。在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet和ImageNet-1K子集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet和多个ImageNet-1K子集上，在六种对抗攻击下，C²R达到最佳鲁棒准确率，平均优于先前鲁棒蒸馏方法2.8%。
light_analysis.conclusion: C²R框架显著提升了蒸馏数据集的鲁棒性，有效改善了准确率-鲁棒性权衡，具有重要实用价值。未来可探索更大规模数据集或更多攻击场景。

title: AgentAtlas: Beyond Outcome Leaderboards for LLM Agents
abstract: Large language model agents now act on codebases, browsers, operating systems, calendars, files, and tool ecosystems, but their evaluations often collapse behavior into final task success. AgentAtlas reframes agent evaluation as a diagnostic vocabulary and audit protocol for separating outcome success from control-decision quality and trajectory quality. The paper contributes: (i) a six-state control-decision taxonomy (Act / Ask / Refuse / Stop / Confirm / Recover); (ii) a trajectory-failure vocabulary with primary error source and downstream impact; (iii) a 0/1/2 benchmark-coverage audit over fifteen agent benchmarks; and (iv) an illustrative protocol study on a synthetic 1,342-item set evaluated with eight models under taxonomy-aware and taxonomy-blind prompt formats. The synthetic demonstration is not a public benchmark release and should not be read as a definitive model comparison. Instead, it illustrates two measurement risks: mapped label agreement can change substantially when the explicit label menu is removed, and axis choice can change apparent rankings. AgentAtlas is intended to help benchmark designers state what behavior they cover, and to help evaluators diagnose failures that outcome-only leaderboards hide.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentAtlas评估框架，通过控制决策分类和轨迹失败词汇表，超越仅关注结果成功率的LLM代理评估方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理评估仅以最终任务成功率为指标，忽视了控制决策质量和轨迹质量，无法诊断失败原因。这种单一结果导向的排行榜隐藏了行为缺陷，导致评估不全面。AgentAtlas旨在提供诊断性评估方法，帮助识别和分类代理行为中的具体问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括：（i）六状态控制决策分类（Act/Ask/Refuse/Stop/Confirm/Recover）；（ii）轨迹失败词汇表，包含主要错误源和下游影响；（iii）0/1/2基准覆盖审计，覆盖15个代理基准；（iv）使用8个模型在1342个合成样本上进行协议研究，比较标签感知与标签盲提示格式。
light_analysis.result: 合成研究表明，移除显式标签菜单后，标签一致性发生显著变化；评估轴选择会改变代理排名。该演示并非公开基准，而是展示结果排行榜可能隐藏的风险，强调测量透明度的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentAtlas框架帮助基准设计者明确评估覆盖的行为维度，并帮助评估者诊断仅靠结果排行榜无法发现的失败模式。未来的工作可扩展到更广泛的代理环境和真实场景，以验证其诊断有效性。

title: Your Neighbors Know: Leveraging Local Neighborhoods for Backdoor Detection in Decentralized Learning
abstract: Decentralized learning (DL) is an emerging machine learning paradigm where nodes collaboratively train models without a central server. However, the collaborative nature of DL makes it vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where a model is taught to behave normally on standard inputs while executing hidden, malicious actions when encountering data with specific triggers. Backdoor attacks in DL remain understudied and existing defenses often overlook DL constraints. We introduce Argus, a novel backdoor detection framework native to DL that requires neither a central coordinator nor prior knowledge of the trigger. In Argus, honest nodes locally analyze received model updates to identify potential backdoor triggers. Nodes then collectively share their triggers with their neighbors and use a structural similarity metric to separate true backdoors from false alarms induced by data heterogeneity. A key insight is that false positive triggers exhibit inconsistencies across participants while true positive ones show consistent patterns. Model updates that fail this collaborative test are rejected, and persistently malicious senders are eventually evicted. We provide the first theoretical convergence guarantees for a DL-specific backdoor detection mechanism, showing that filtering out suspicious model updates with high probability preserves a convergence rate comparable to standard DL. We implement and evaluate Argus on three standard datasets and against three state-of-the-art baselines. Across settings, Argus reduces attack success rates by up to 90 points compared to no defense, while preserving model utility within 5 percentage points of an omniscient oracle. Furthermore, the effectiveness of Argus compared to baselines improves as data heterogeneity increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Argus，一个针对去中心化学习的去中心化后门检测框架，利用局部邻居结构相似性度量区分后门攻击与数据异构性导致的假阳性。
light_analysis.motivation: 去中心化学习（DL）易受后门攻击，现有防御多针对集中式场景，忽略了DL无中心服务器、数据异构等约束。本文旨在设计一个原生适配DL的、无需先验触发知识的后门检测方法，解决数据异构性导致的假阳性问题。
light_analysis.method: Argus中，诚实节点本地分析接收到的模型更新以识别潜在后门触发器；然后节点与邻居共享触发器，使用结构相似性度量区分真假后门。关键洞察：假阳性触发器在节点间不一致，真阳性一致。通过的更新被接受，持续恶意发送者被驱逐。提供首次理论收敛保证。
light_analysis.result: 在三个标准数据集上与三个基线对比，Argus将攻击成功率降低高达90个百分点（相比无防御），模型效用保持在神谕基准的5个百分点内。数据异构性越高，Argus相对基线的有效性提升越显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Argus是首个专为去中心化学习设计的后门检测方法，无需中央协调器，有效应对数据异构性。理论保证收敛效率。未来可扩展至更复杂的攻击场景，提升实际部署鲁棒性。

title: How Do Document Parsers Break? Auditing Structural Vulnerability in Document Intelligence
abstract: Document Layout Analysis (DLA) pipelines provide structured page representations for retrieval-augmented generation, long-document question answering, and other document intelligence systems, yet their robustness evaluation remains largely area-centric. We identify this Footprint Bias and propose ProSA, a lightweight output-level auditing framework that decouples controlled probing, policy-driven targeting, and structure-aware diagnosis. ProSA combines Block-level Structural Loss Rate (B-SLR), granularity-aware exposure descriptors, and pathway attribution to analyze where structural identity is lost, at what exposure granularity failures emerge, and how failures propagate. Across MinerU and PP-StructureV3 on 1,000 pages, affected area weakly tracks perturbation-induced OCR instability (R^2=0.384/0.110), whereas B-SLR aligns much more closely with it (R^2=0.727/0.916). Exposure descriptors further separate occlusion- and topology-dominant pathways, while matched-footprint structural probes cause much larger downstream QA/retrieval degradation compared to area-matched erasure. These results shift DLA robustness evaluation from footprint-based stress testing toward structure-aware vulnerability auditing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProSA框架，用于结构感知的文档布局分析鲁棒性审计，揭示足迹偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文档布局分析（DLA）管道的鲁棒性评估过度依赖区域中心（area-centric）指标，忽略了结构完整性，导致足迹偏差（Footprint Bias）。这种评估方式无法准确反映扰动对结构身份的影响，阻碍了对文档解析器脆性根源的理解。为此，需要一种轻量级、输出级别的审计框架，从结构角度诊断脆弱性。
light_analysis.method: ProSA框架包含三个组件：块级结构损失率（B-SLR）量化结构丢失程度，粒度感知暴露描述符区分曝光粒度，路径归因追踪失效传播。通过解耦控制探测、策略定位和结构诊断，实现结构脆弱性的系统性审计。在MinerU和PP-StructureV3上使用1000页面进行评估。
light_analysis.result: B-SLR与扰动引起的OCR不稳定性高度相关（R²=0.727/0.916），而传统受影响面积指标相关性弱（R²=0.384/0.110）。暴露描述符可分离遮挡和拓扑主导路径。匹配足迹的结构探针导致下游QA/检索任务性能下降远大于面积匹配的擦除，表明结构脆弱性的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProSA将DLA鲁棒性评估从足迹压力测试转向结构感知脆弱性审计，揭示了结构损失而非面积受损是性能退化的主因。该工作为文档智能系统的安全部署提供了新视角，未来可扩展至更多解析器和复杂干扰模式。

title: RSD: A Local Triangulation Audit Primitive for Learned Vector Blocks
abstract: Local XAI audits compare a finite block of learned vectors with a weak side signal. Baselines such as nearest-neighbor lookup, low-rank coordinate models, and relation factorization expose different parts of this audit. We introduce Relational Semantic Decomposition, abbreviated as RSD, as a local triangulation audit for learned vector blocks. Given coordinates X and a declared bounded weak affinity proxy A, RSD fits simplex memberships S and coordinate poles C. It reuses S in a relation decoder for A and reports the coordinate residual R=X-SC. This yields a scoped audit unit: compatibility for the chosen block, proxy, decoder class, and loss budget, plus component mass and residual readouts. Synthetic controls check simplex reconstruction, proxy decoding, and fixed-S residual decomposition. The theorem-statement, month, and dog/wolf blocks illustrate why low proxy loss should be read with component mass, residual readouts, and block size.
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure. Revised version with clarified scope, experiments, and limitations

light_analysis.overview: 提出关系语义分解（RSD），一种局部三角审计原语，通过拟合单纯形成员关系和坐标极点并分解残差，对学习向量块进行可解释性审计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有局部XAI审计方法如最近邻查找、低秩坐标模型和关系分解仅能暴露部分审计信号，缺乏全面的三角审计能力。RSD旨在结合弱侧信号和坐标信息，提供更完整的审计单元，避免仅依赖低代理损失的误导。
light_analysis.method: RSD以坐标X和声明有界弱亲和代理A为输入，拟合单纯形成员S和坐标极点C；利用S作为关系解码器重建A，计算坐标残差R=X-SC。输出包括兼容性、组件质量、残差读数和块大小限制，并通过合成控制检查单纯形重建、代理解码和固定S残差分解。
light_analysis.result: 通过定理陈述、月份和狗/狼向量块的案例说明，低代理损失需结合组件质量、残差读数和块大小来正确解读，否则可能产生误导。摘要未提供具体数值指标，强调定性分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: RSD作为一种新的局部审计原语，能够更全面地分析学习向量块，揭示代理损失之外的结构信息，有助于提升XAI审计的可靠性。未来可扩展至更多类型的弱信号和块结构。

title: FLUIDSPLAT: Reconstructing Physical Fields from Sparse Sensors via Gaussian Primitives
abstract: Reconstructing continuous flow fields from sparse surface-mounted sensors is central to aerodynamic design, flow control, and digital-twin instrumentation. Existing neural methods for this task typically encode sensor readings into implicit latent codes with little spatial interpretability and limited formal guidance on how representational capacity should scale with observation count. Inspired by 3D Gaussian Splatting, we introduce FLUIDSPLAT, a sensor-conditioned model that predicts K anisotropic Gaussian primitives forming a partition-of-unity scaffold, a spatially explicit and interpretable intermediate representation of the flow. For an idealized Gaussian primitive estimator, we prove an $O(K^{-s/d})$ approximation rate for fields with Sobolev smoothness $s$; incorporating $N$ noisy observations yields a squared-risk decomposition with bias $O(K^{-2s/d})$ and variance $O(σ^{2}K/N)$.Balancing the two yields $K^{*}\!\sim\!(N/σ^{2})^{d/(2s+d)}$: primitive count cannot grow freely under sparse sensing, revealing a variance bottleneck that motivates complementing the scaffold with a state-conditioned residual decoder. Across four benchmarks spanning 2D and 3D, FLUIDSPLAT achieves 11-28% error reduction over several strong baselines on cylinder flow, AirfRANS, FlowBench LDC-3D, and PhySense-Car 3D benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLUIDSPLAT，利用高斯基元构建显式可解释的中间表示，从稀疏传感器重建物理场，并理论指导最优基元数量。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏传感器重建连续流场对气动设计、流控和数字孪生至关重要。现有神经方法将传感器读数编码为隐式潜码，缺乏空间可解释性，且代表容量与观测数量的关系缺乏理论指导。因此需要一种可解释且容量可控的方法。
light_analysis.method: 受3D高斯泼溅启发，FLUIDSPLAT预测K个各向异性高斯基元形成单位分割支架，作为显式中间表示。理论证明近似率，并推导偏差和方差分解，平衡两者得到最优K*。为缓解方差瓶颈，补充状态条件残差解码器。
light_analysis.result: 在2D和3D四个基准（圆柱绕流、AirfRANS、FlowBench LDC-3D、PhySense-Car 3D）上，与多个强基线相比，FLUIDSPLAT实现11-28%误差降低。理论分析也验证了基元数量的最优性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLUIDSPLAT通过高斯基元实现空间可解释的流场重建，理论指导稀疏传感下的容量选择，显著提升重建精度。未来可扩展至更复杂物理场和动态场景，但当前方法可能受限于高斯基元的表达能力。

title: Can Visual Mamba Improve AI-Generated Image Detection? An In-Depth Investigation
abstract: In recent years, computer vision has witnessed remarkable progress, fueled by the development of innovative architectures such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), diffusion-based architectures, Vision Transformers (ViTs), and, more recently, Vision-Language Models (VLMs). This progress has undeniably contributed to creating increasingly realistic and diverse visual content. However, such advancements in image generation also raise concerns about potential misuse in areas such as misinformation, identity theft, and threats to privacy and security. In parallel, Mamba-based architectures have emerged as versatile tools for a range of image analysis tasks, including classification, segmentation, medical imaging, object detection, and image restoration, in this rapidly evolving field. However, their potential for identifying AI-generated images remains relatively unexplored compared to established techniques. This study provides a systematic evaluation and comparative analysis of Vision Mamba models for AI-generated image detection. We benchmark multiple Vision Mamba variants against representative CNNs, ViTs, and VLM-based detectors across diverse datasets and synthetic image sources, focusing on key metrics such as accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability across diverse image types and generative models. Through this comprehensive analysis, we aim to elucidate Vision Mamba's strengths and limitations relative to established methodologies in terms of applicability, accuracy, and efficiency in detecting AI-generated images. Overall, our findings highlight both the promise and current limitations of Vision Mamba as a component in systems designed to distinguish authentic from AI-generated visual content. This research is crucial for enhancing detection in an age where distinguishing between real and AI-generated content is a major challenge.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估Vision Mamba模型在AI生成图像检测中的性能，并与CNN、ViT和VLM方法进行对比分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像生成技术的飞速发展带来了虚假信息、身份盗窃等滥用风险，亟需有效的检测方法。Mamba架构在多个图像分析任务中表现出色，但用于AI生成图像检测的潜力尚未被充分探索。现有检测方法主要基于CNN、ViT和VLM，缺乏对Mamba架构的系统评估，因此需要进行全面的比较研究以揭示其优势与不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究对多种Vision Mamba变体进行基准测试，包括其在不同配置下的检测能力。与代表性的CNN（如ResNet）、ViT（如DeiT）和VLM（如CLIP）检测器进行对比。使用多个公开数据集和合成图像来源（如GAN、扩散模型生成的图像），评估指标涵盖检测准确性、推理效率以及跨不同生成模型和图像类型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Vision Mamba在检测AI生成图像方面展现出一定的潜力，在某些数据集上取得了与CNN和ViT相当甚至更优的准确性，但在跨域泛化方面存在局限，且推理效率低于轻量级CNN模型。与VLM检测器相比，Vision Mamba在细粒度识别上仍有差距。具体性能数据因模型变体和数据集而异，摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统评估了Vision Mamba在AI生成图像检测中的适用性，揭示了其作为检测组件的潜力与当前局限性。该工作有助于推动检测技术的发展，以应对真实与AI生成内容日益难以区分的挑战。未来可探索改进Mamba架构的泛化能力或将其与VLM结合以提升检测性能。

title: Does RAG Know When Retrieval Is Wrong? Diagnosing Context Compliance under Knowledge Conflict
abstract: The Context-Compliance Regime in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) occurs when retrieved context dominates the final answer even when it conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Accuracy alone does not reveal how retrieved context causally shapes answers under such conflict. We introduce Context-Driven Decomposition (CDD), a belief-decomposition probe that operates at inference time and serves as an intervention mechanism for controlled retrieval conflict. Across Epi-Scale stress tests, TruthfulQA misconception injection, and cross-model reruns, CDD exposes three patterns. P1: context compliance is measurable in an upper-bound adversarial setting, where Standard RAG reaches 15.0% accuracy on TruthfulQA misconception injection (N=500).
