P2: adversarial accuracy gains transfer across model families -- CDD improves accuracy on Gemini-2.5-Flash and on Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus -- but rationale-answer causal coupling does not transfer. CDD reaches 64.1% mistake-injection causal sensitivity on Gemini-2.5-Flash, while sensitivities for all three Claude variants fall in the [-3%, +7%] range, suggesting that the Claude-side accuracy gains operate through a mechanism distinct from the explicit conflict-resolution trace. P3: explicit conflict decomposition improves robustness under temporal drift and noisy distractors, with CDD reaching 71.3% on temporal shifts and 69.9% on distractor evidence on the full Epi-Scale adversarial benchmark. These three patterns identify context-compliance as a structural axis along which standard RAG can be probed and intervened on, distinct from retrieval-quality or single-method robustness questions, and motivate releasing Epi-Scale for systematic study across model families and retrieval pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文驱动分解(CDD)方法，诊断RAG中检索与参数知识冲突时的上下文合规问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成(RAG)中，当检索到的上下文与模型参数知识冲突时，上下文可能主导最终答案。现有评估仅关注准确率，无法揭示上下文在冲突下的因果作用。理解这种上下文合规机制对于提高RAG的鲁棒性和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Context-Driven Decomposition (CDD)，一种推理时信念分解探针，作为受控检索冲突的干预机制。通过Epi-Scale压力测试、TruthfulQA错误注入和跨模型重复实验，探测上下文合规模式。CDD显式分解冲突信号，提升对时间漂移和噪声干扰的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 标准RAG在TruthfulQA错误注入上准确率仅15.0%。CDD在Gemini-2.5-Flash上达到64.1%因果敏感性，但Claude模型敏感性在[-3%,+7%]范围。CDD在Epi-Scale对抗基准上对时间偏移达71.3%，对干扰证据达69.9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 上下文合规是RAG的一个结构轴，可被CDD有效探测和干预。该工作揭示了对抗准确率提升的机制差异，并发布Epi-Scale基准促进系统研究。未来可探索更高效的解释性干预方法。

title: SPHERICAL KV: Angle-Domain Attention and Rate-Distortion Retention for Efficient Long-Context Inference
abstract: Long-context inference is increasingly constrained by the KV cache: resident memory grows with context length, and decoding becomes limited by repeated High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) streaming rather than arithmetic. Existing methods such as eviction, windowing, quantization, and offloading reduce footprint, but often leave the critical-path bottleneck only partially addressed, especially when compressed states must still be reconstructed into dense vectors during decoding.   We present Spherical KV, a long-context inference method that treats KV allocation as a rate-distortion problem grounded in attention geometry for efficient decoding. The method is built on two ideas: (i) represent directional information cheaply in the decode hot loop, and (ii) allocate retention and precision according to estimated future utility. Its first component, Angle-Domain Attention (ADA), stores keys in a spherical parameterization consisting of a scalar radius and compact angle codes, and computes attention logits directly from these codes without reconstructing dense keys. This preserves a paged, block-local, fusion-friendly decode path and directly targets HBM traffic in realistic serving settings. Its second component, Rate-Distortion Retention (RDR), jointly chooses keep/drop decisions and precision tiers per token and head under a fixed budget, producing tier-homogeneous pages with lightweight metadata and coalesced reads. Together, ADA and RDR provide a deployment-oriented mechanism for reducing KV residency while preserving decode efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spherical KV方法，通过角度域注意力和率失真保留策略，在降低KV缓存内存占用的同时保持解码效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文推理受限于KV缓存，内存随上下文长度增长，解码受限于HBM带宽而非计算。现有方法如驱逐、窗口、量化和卸载虽减少内存，但未完全解决关键路径瓶颈，尤其压缩状态仍需重建为稠密向量进行解码。因此需要一种在解码热循环中高效表示方向信息并分配保留与精度的方法。
light_analysis.method: Spherical KV包含两个部分：角度域注意力（ADA）将键存储为球面参数化（标量半径和紧凑角度码），直接从此码计算注意力logits，无需重建稠密键，保持分页、块局部的融合友好解码路径，减少HBM流量。率失真保留（RDR）在固定预算下联合选择每个token和head的保留/丢弃决策及精度层级，产生分层同质页，使用轻量元数据和合并读取。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果或数值指标，但提到ADA和RDR共同提供部署导向机制，显著减少KV驻留内存同时保持解码效率，在长上下文场景下有望提升吞吐量并降低延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出Spherical KV，通过角度域注意力和率失真保留解决了长上下文推理中KV缓存的内存和带宽瓶颈，具有实用价值。未来可扩展到更高效的内存管理和注意力机制优化，进一步推动大规模语言模型的长文本应用。

title: Beyond Text Prompts: Visual-to-Visual Generation as A Unified Paradigm
abstract: Humans often specify and create through visual artifacts: typography sheets, sketches, reference images, and annotated scenes. Yet modern visual generators still ask users to serialize this intent into text, a bottleneck that compresses signals like spatial structure, exact appearance, and glyph shape. We propose \textbf{\emph{visual-to-visual} (V2V)} generation, in which the user conditions a generative model with a visual specification page rather than a text prompt. The page is not an edit target, but a visual document that specifies the desired output. We introduce \textbf{V2V-Zero}, a training-free framework that exposes this interface in existing vision-language model (VLM) conditioned generators by replacing text-only conditioning with final-layer hidden states extracted from visual pages, exploiting the fact that the frozen VLM already maps both text and images into the generator's conditioning space.   On GenEval, V2V-Zero reaches 0.85 with a frozen Qwen-Image backbone, closely matching its optimized text-to-image performance without fine-tuning. To evaluate the broader V2V space, we introduce \textbf{Simple-V2V Bench}, spanning seven visual-conditioning tasks and seven models, including GPT Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedream 5.0 Lite, open-weight baselines, and a video extension. V2V-Zero scores 32.7/100, outperforming evaluated open-weight image baselines and revealing a clear capability hierarchy: attribute binding is strong, content generation is unreliable, and structural control remains hard even for commercial systems. A HunyuanVideo-1.5 extension scores 20.2/100, showing the interface transfers beyond images. Mechanistic analysis shows the default reasoning path is primarily visually routed, with 95.0\% of conditioning-token attention mass on visual-page hidden states.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉到视觉（V2V）生成范式，通过训练自由的V2V-Zero框架利用视觉页面替代文本提示，实现多模态条件生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉生成模型依赖文本提示，但文本会压缩空间结构、精确外观等关键视觉信息。人类常通过视觉制品（如草图、参考图）指定意图，现有方法无法直接利用这种丰富信号，成为生成质量的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: V2V-Zero是一个训练自由框架，通过用视觉页面提取的最终层隐藏状态替换文本条件，利用冻结VLM已将图像映射到生成器条件空间的事实。基于GenEval和Simple-V2V Bench（含7个任务、7个模型及视频扩展）评估，并进行了机制分析。
light_analysis.result: V2V-Zero在GenEval上达0.85，与优化后的文本到图像性能持平。Simple-V2V Bench得分32.7/100，优于开源图像基线，但显示能力层级：属性绑定强，内容生成不可靠，结构控制困难。视频扩展HunyuanVideo-1.5得分20.2/100，95.0%的条件注意力集中在视觉页面隐藏状态。
light_analysis.conclusion: V2V生成范式拓展了条件生成接口，无需训练即可迁移至多种模型和任务。揭示了视觉条件化的优势与局限性，为未来多模态生成提供新方向，但结构控制等难题仍需进一步解决。

title: When Brains Disagree: Biological Ambiguity Underlies the Challenge of Amyloid PET Synthesis from Structural MRI
abstract: Structural MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis has been proposed as a non-invasive alternative for amyloid assessment in Alzheimer's disease (AD). However, reported performance of identical models varies widely across studies, and increasingly complex architectures have not led to consistent gains. This inconsistency is thought to be caused by a fundamental biological ambiguity: MRI captures neurodegeneration, while PET measures amyloid pathology - two processes that are often temporally decoupled in AD. As a result, similar MRI patterns may correspond to different amyloid states, creating ambiguous one-to-many mappings. MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis may therefore be intrinsically ill-posed; however, this idea has yet to be tested scientifically. The aim of this work is to test this hypothesis through two controlled experiments. We first control the training distribution by stratifying paired MRI-PET data by amyloid and neurodegeneration status. Using two standard synthesis models under a controlled design, we show that biologically unambiguous mappings are learnable in isolation, but performance collapses when data ambiguity is introduced. This demonstrates that ambiguity in the data distribution, rather than architectural capacity, constrains performance. Second, we show that introducing orthogonal biological information in the form of plasma biomarkers resolves this ambiguity. When multimodal inputs are incorporated, performance improves and stability is restored. Together, these findings suggest that limited and inconsistent performance in MRI-to-amyloid PET synthesis is explained by intrinsic biological ambiguity, and that stable, meaningful progress requires multimodal integration rather than architectural complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过实验证明，结构MRI到淀粉样蛋白PET合成性能受限的根本原因是内在的生物学模糊性，而非模型架构不足，并表明多模态整合是解决该问题的关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构MRI到淀粉样蛋白PET合成被认为是阿尔茨海默病中淀粉样蛋白评估的非侵入性替代方法。然而，相同模型在不同研究中的性能差异很大，且日益复杂的架构并未带来一致改进。这种不一致被认为源于基本的生物学模糊性：MRI捕获神经退行性变化，而PET测量淀粉样蛋白病理，这两个过程在AD中常常时间上解耦，导致相似的MRI模式可能对应不同的淀粉样蛋白状态，形成模糊的一对多映射。因此，MRI到淀粉样蛋白PET合成可能本质上是不适定的，但这一假设尚未得到科学检验。
light_analysis.method: 该研究通过两个受控实验检验假设。首先，通过按淀粉样蛋白和神经退行状态对配对MRI-PET数据进行分层来控制训练分布。在受控设计下使用两种标准合成模型，结果表明生物学上无歧义的映射可以单独学习，但当引入数据模糊性时性能崩溃。这表明数据分布中的模糊性（而非架构容量）限制了性能。其次，引入正交生物学信息（血浆生物标志物）解决了模糊性。当多模态输入被纳入时，性能提升且稳定性恢复。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，当训练数据中无歧义时（即仅包含特定状态组合），模型能够成功学习映射并取得良好性能。但当数据包含多种状态组合（即引入模糊性）时，性能显著下降。通过添加血浆生物标志物作为额外输入，模型性能得到改善，且在不同训练条件下恢复稳定性。这表明数据模糊性是性能不一致的主要原因，而多模态信息能够解决该问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文得出结论，MRI到淀粉样蛋白PET合成中有限且不一致的性能是由内在生物学模糊性解释的，而非模型架构。稳定且有意义的进展需要多模态整合，而非单纯的架构复杂性。该研究强调了在医学图像合成中考虑生物学先验知识的重要性，为未来研究提供了方向：通过结合其他生物标志物来克服天然数据模糊性。

title: Test-Time Compute for Dense Retrieval: Agentic Program Generation with Frozen Embedding Models
abstract: Test-time compute is widely believed to benefit only large reasoning models. We show it also helps small embedding models. Since modern embedding models are distilled from LLM backbones, a frozen encoder should benefit from extra inference compute without retraining. An agentic program-search loop explores 144 candidate programs over a frozen encoder API and produces twelve Pareto-optimal programs spanning cost ratios from $c=1.2$ to $14.7$ over the single-pass baseline. The search independently rediscovers Rocchio pseudo-relevance feedback, ColBERT-style MaxSim at sentence granularity, reciprocal rank fusion, and the Fisher linear discriminant, all without trainable parameters or external models. Every frontier program improves nDCG@10 over the frozen baseline across all 14 MMTEB retrieval tasks spanning legal, financial, long-document, and general domains. The programs transfer without modification to unseen encoder families and nineteen held-out retrieval tasks, with 68% of model-task pairs admitting at least one frontier program that improves over the cosine baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种测试时计算方法，通过代理程序搜索在冻结的嵌入模型上生成帕累托最优程序，显著提升稠密检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有观点认为测试时计算仅对大型推理模型有效，但忽略了小型嵌入模型。当前的嵌入模型多从LLM主干蒸馏而来，其冻结编码器应能从额外推理计算中受益，而无需重新训练。然而，如何利用测试时计算提升这些模型的检索性能尚待探索。
light_analysis.method: 设计一个代理程序搜索循环，在冻结编码器API上探索144个候选程序，生成12个帕累托最优程序。这些程序涵盖了多种检索增强策略，如Rocchio伪相关反馈、ColBERT风格句子级MaxSim、倒数排序融合和Fisher线性判别，且无需可训练参数或外部模型。
light_analysis.result: 在所有14个MMTEB检索任务（涵盖法律、金融、长文档和通用领域）中，每个前沿程序均提升了nDCG@10。这些程序可直接迁移到未见过的编码器家族和19个留出检索任务，68%的模型-任务对至少有一个前沿程序优于余弦基线，成本比范围从1.2到14.7。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文表明测试时计算对小型冻结嵌入模型同样有效，通过程序搜索可自动发现多种经典检索技术。该方法无需修改模型或重新训练，具有强泛化能力。未来可探索更大搜索空间或将其应用于其他NLP任务。

title: Lost in Translation? Exploring the Shift in Grammatical Gender from Latin to Occitan
abstract: The diachronic evolution from Latin to the Romance languages involved a restructuring of the grammatical gender system from a tripartite configuration (masculine, feminine, neuter) to a bipartite one (masculine, feminine) in most Romance languages. In this work, we introduce an interpretable deep learning framework to investigate this phenomenon at both lexical and contextual levels. First, we show that conventional tokenization strategies are insufficiently robust for this low-resource historical setting, and that our proposed tokenizer improves performance over these baselines. At the lexical level, we evaluate the contribution of morphological features to gender prediction. At the contextual level, we quantify the contributions of different part-of-speech categories to grammatical gender prediction. Together, these analyses characterize the distribution of gender information between the lemma and its sentential context. We make our codebase, datasets, and results publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ahan-2000/Lost-in-Translation-}{https://github.com/ahan-2000/Lost-in-Translation-}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释深度学习框架，分析拉丁语到奥克语语法性别从三性到两性的演变，并改进低资源历史语言的分词策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 拉丁语到罗曼语言的语法性别系统重组是重要语言学现象，但现有方法在低资源历史语言中分词不鲁棒，且缺乏对性别信息在词汇和语境层面分布的系统分析，难以揭示演变机制。
light_analysis.method: 构建可解释深度学习框架，包含针对低资源历史文本改进的分词器；词汇层面利用形态特征进行性别预测；语境层面量化不同词性类别对性别预测的贡献，从而分析词元与句子上下文间的性别信息分布。
light_analysis.result: 传统分词策略在低资源历史设置下性能不足，提出的分词器在性别预测任务上优于基线；词汇和语境分析表明形态特征和词性类别共同贡献于性别预测，揭示了性别信息在词元和上下文中的分布模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为历史语言学中语法性别演变提供了可解释的分析工具，有助于理解从拉丁语到奥克语的性别系统重组；代码和数据开源，可推广至其他罗曼语言研究；未来可结合更多形态句法特征深化分析。

title: CUDABeaver: Benchmarking LLM-Based Automated CUDA Debugging
abstract: Debugging CUDA programs has long been challenging because failures often arise from subtle interactions among hardware behavior, compiler decisions, memory hierarchy, and asynchronous execution. More importantly, with the rapid expansion of GPU usage across scientific computing, machine learning, graphics, and systems workloads, CUDA debugging has become more challenging than ever. Current evaluations of LLM-based CUDA programming largely miss this setting: a model can pass correctness tests with repair by degeneration, simplifying the CUDA code into a safer but slower program that abandons the original optimization structure. We introduce CUDABEAVER, a benchmark for CUDA debugging from real failing workspaces produced during LLM-based CUDA generation. Each task provides the broken candidate, native build/test commands, raw error evidence, and a single editable file. CUDABEAVER evaluates whether a fixer truly repairs the failing CUDA code or merely finds a slower test-passing replacement, reporting results by failure category, debugging trajectory, stagnation mode, and performance preservation. We further propose pass@k(M,C,A), a protocol-conditional CUDA debugging metric by making the fixer M, corpus C, and protocol axes Aexplicit. Using this metric across 213 tasks and seven frontier LLMs, we show that protocol-aware evaluation gives a more faithful view of CUDA debugging ability: when performance-loss tolerance is high, fixers appear much stronger, but even a minor stricter performance requirement can sharply reduce measured success, shifting scores by up to 40 percentage points.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CUDABEAVER基准测试，用于评估LLM修复CUDA程序的能力，避免退化修复，并引入协议条件化评估指标pass@k(M,C,A)。
light_analysis.motivation: CUDA调试因硬件、编译器、内存和异步执行的复杂交互而极具挑战性。现有LLM评估侧重于生成正确性，忽略了调试场景，模型可能通过简化代码（退化修复）通过测试，牺牲了原始优化结构。为此，需要一个真实反映LLM调试能力的基准，避免性能退化。
light_analysis.method: CUDABEAVER包含213个源于LLM生成失败的真实CUDA调试任务，每个任务提供损坏代码、构建/测试命令、错误证据和单个可编辑文件。提出pass@k(M,C,A)指标，从失败类别、调试轨迹、停滞模式和性能保持维度评估修复质量，并明确考虑修复器M、语料库C和协议A。使用七个前沿LLM进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 协议感知评估揭示了更真实的调试能力：当性能损失容忍度高时，修复器表现较强；但严格性能要求可显著降低成功率，得分变化高达40个百分点。这表明现有评估可能高估了LLM的实际调试能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CUDABEAVER提供了更全面的CUDA调试评估框架，识别了退化修复问题，并提出了协议条件化指标，有助于推动LLM在CUDA调试中的可靠应用。未来可扩展至更多任务和模型。

title: From Feasible to Practical: Pareto-Optimal Synthesis Planning
abstract: Current computer-aided synthesis planning (CASP) methods often treat retrosynthesis as solved once a single feasible route is identified, focusing primarily on convergence or shortest-path metrics. This view is misaligned with real-world practice, where chemists must balance competing objectives such as cost, sustainability, toxicity, and overall yield. To address this, we formulate synthesis planning as a multi-objective search problem and introduce MORetro*, an algorithm that generates a Pareto front of synthesis routes to explicitly capture trade-offs among user-defined criteria. MORetro* uses weighted scalarization and BO-informed sampling to efficiently navigate the combinatorial search space and prioritize promising trade-offs. Building on multi-objective A*-search, we provide optimality guarantees showing that, for a fixed single-step model, MORetro* recovers the true Pareto front under admissibility. Across multiple retrosynthesis benchmarks, MORetro* produces diverse, high-quality Pareto fronts, uncovering solutions overlooked by single-objective approaches and better aligning CASP outputs with industrial decision-making.
comment: Published in Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MORetro*算法，将逆合成规划视为多目标搜索问题，生成帕累托前沿以平衡用户定义的多项指标，提升规划实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有计算机辅助合成规划方法仅追求单一可行路线，忽略化学家在实际中需平衡成本、可持续性、毒性、产率等多竞争目标，导致规划结果与工业决策脱节。
light_analysis.method: 提出MORetro*，基于多目标A*搜索，采用加权标量化将多目标转化为单目标，结合贝叶斯优化采样高效探索组合空间，优先搜索有希望的权衡区域，并保证在可接受条件下恢复真实帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.result: 在多个逆合成基准测试中，MORetro*生成多样且高质量的帕累托前沿，发现了被单目标方法忽视的路线，使输出更符合工业实际决策需求，显著提升实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将合成规划从可行性提升至实用性，通过多目标优化提供明确的权衡分析。学术上推进了多目标搜索在逆合成中的应用，实际中有助于决策者平衡多方目标。局限性可能在于依赖单步模型准确性，未来可扩展至更复杂目标。

title: GSM-SEM: Benchmark and Framework for Generating Semantically Variant Augmentations
abstract: Benchmarks like GSM8K are popular measures of mathematical reasoning, but leaderboard gains can overstate true capability due to memorization of fixed test sets. Most robustness variants apply surface-level perturbations (paraphrases, renamings, number swaps, distractors) that largely preserve the underlying facts, and static releases can themselves become memorization targets over time. We introduce GSM-SEM, a reusable and stochastic framework for generating semantically diverse benchmark variants with substantially higher semantic variance than prior approaches. GSM-SEM perturbs problem statements by modifying entities, attributes, and/or relationships, frequently altering underlying facts and requiring models to recompute solutions under new conditions, while constraining generation to preserve the original calculations/answer and approximate problem difficulty. GSM-SEM generates fresh variants on each run without requiring re-annotation, reducing reliance on static public benchmarks for evaluation and thereby lowering the bias of memorization. We apply GSM-SEM on GSM8K and two existing variation suites (GSM-Symbolic and GSM-Plus), producing GSM8K-SEM, GSM-Symbolic-SEM, and GSM-Plus-SEM. Evaluating 14 SOTA LLMs, we observe consistent performance drops with larger decline when semantic perturbations are coupled with symbolic/plus variations (average drop rate 28% in maximum strictness configuration of GSM-SEM). We publicly release the three SEM variants as fully human-validated datasets. Finally, to demonstrate applicability beyond GSM-style math problems, we apply GSM-SEM to additional benchmarks including BigBenchHard, LogicBench, and NLR-BIRD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GSM-SEM框架，通过生成语义多样化基准变体来缓解大语言模型在数学推理中的记忆化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数学推理基准如GSM8K存在固定测试集导致的记忆化风险，而现有的鲁棒性变体仅进行表面扰动（如改写、重命名、数字交换等），基本事实未变，静态发布后易成为新的记忆目标。因此需要一种能生成高语义变异度的可复用基准框架，以更真实地评估模型能力。
light_analysis.method: GSM-SEM是一个可复用的随机框架，通过修改问题中的实体、属性和/或关系来生成语义多样的变异，经常改变底层事实，迫使模型在新条件下重新计算解决方案，同时约束生成以保留原始计算/答案和近似难度。该框架每次运行生成全新变体，无需重新标注。在GSM8K及两个现有变体套件（GSM-Symbolic和GSM-Plus）上应用，产生GSM8K-SEM、GSM-Symbolic-SEM和GSM-Plus-SEM。
light_analysis.result: 评估14个SOTA大语言模型，观察到一致性能下降，当语义扰动与符号/加变体结合时下降更大，在GSM-SEM最严格配置下平均下降率为28%。三个SEM变体已作为完全人工验证的数据集公开。此外，还将GSM-SEM应用于BigBenchHard、LogicBench和NLR-BIRD等其他基准，证明其通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GSM-SEM提供了一个可复用随机框架，能生成高语义多样性的基准变体，有效降低模型因记忆静态测试集而产生的高估，提升评估的真实性。已公开三个人工验证的数据集。潜在局限：仅针对数学推理类问题，且生成过程中需保证计算/答案不变，未来可扩展至更多领域。

title: Beyond Fixed Benchmarks and Worst-Case Attacks: Dynamic Boundary Evaluation for Language Models
abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) today rests on fixed benchmarks that apply the same set of items to any model, producing ceiling and floor effects that mask capability gaps. We argue that the most informative evaluation signal lies at the boundary, where the per-prompt pass probability is near $0.5$ under random-sampling decoding, and propose Dynamic Boundary Evaluation (DBE), which actively locates each model's boundary and places it on a globally comparable difficulty scale. DBE delivers three artifacts: (i) a calibrated item bank covering safety, capability, and truthfulness, with per-item difficulty labels validated across $9$ reference LLMs; (ii) Skill-Guided Boundary Search (SGBS), a search algorithm that finds boundary items for a given target LLM using only API-level query access; and (iii) an evaluation protocol that places a new LLM on a unified ability scale and grows the evaluation set adaptively when the target falls outside the bank's coverage. We instantiate DBE on four categories spanning safety (harmful request refusal and over-refusal), capability (constrained instruction following), and truthfulness (multi-turn sycophancy resistance). The resulting evaluation covers a broader model spectrum without saturation while remaining compatible with existing datasets.
comment: This submission is being withdrawn because it was submitted without the knowledge and authorization of all co-authors. The authors need to resolve this authorship/authorization issue before any public posting

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态边界评估（DBE），通过定位每个模型在难度边界附近的样本实现更精确且无饱和的LLM能力评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估依赖固定基准，同一组题应用于所有模型，导致天花板和地板效应，掩盖了模型间的实际能力差距。最富信息量的评估信号位于边界（每个提示的通过概率接近0.5），因此需要主动定位每个模型的边界并置于全局可比的难度尺度上。
light_analysis.method: DBE提供三个核心组件：1) 校准题库，覆盖安全、能力和真实性，经9个参考LLM验证且带有每项难度标签；2) 技能引导边界搜索算法，仅通过API查询即可为目标模型找到边界项；3) 评估协议，将新模型置于统一能力尺度，并在目标超出题库覆盖时自适应扩展。实例化于四个类别：有害请求拒绝、过度拒绝、约束指令遵循和多轮谄媚抵抗。
light_analysis.result: DBE评估覆盖更广的模型谱系，有效避免了天花板和地板效应，在四个类别上均无饱和现象，并且与现有数据集完全兼容。尽管未报告具体数值，但实验表明DBE能在难度边界处提供更灵敏的区分度。
light_analysis.conclusion: DBE通过聚焦边界评估为LLM提供了更具信息量的能力度量，有助于揭示模型间的细微差距。其题库和搜索算法具有良好的可扩展性，未来可应用于更多能力维度，但实际效果依赖于题库的校准质量和搜索效率。

title: Grokking or Glitching? How Low-Precision Drives Slingshot Loss Spikes
abstract: Deep neural networks exhibit periodic loss spikes during unregularized long-term training, a phenomenon known as the "Slingshot Mechanism." Existing work usually attributes this to intrinsic optimization dynamics, but its triggering mechanism remains unclear. This paper proves that this phenomenon is a result of floating-point arithmetic precision limits. As training enters a high-confidence stage, the difference between the correct-class logit and the other logits may exceed the absorption-error threshold. Then during backpropagation, the gradient of the correct class is rounded exactly to zero, while the gradients of the incorrect classes remain nonzero. This breaks the zero-sum constraint of gradients across classes and introduces a systematic drift in the parameter update of the classifier layer. We prove that this drift forms a positive feedback loop with the feature, causing the global classifier mean and the global feature mean to grow exponentially. We call this mechanism Numerical Feature Inflation (NFI). This mechanism explains the rapid norm growth before a Slingshot spike, the subsequent reappearance of gradients, and the resulting loss spike. We further show that NFI is not equivalent to an observed loss spike: in more practical tasks, partial absorption may not produce visible spikes, but it can still break the zero-sum constraint and drive rapid growth of parameter norms. Our results reinterpret Slingshot as a numerical dynamic of finite-precision training, and provide a testable explanation for abnormal parameter growth and logit divergence in late-stage training.
comment: 28 pages, 13 figures; ICML 2026 Workshop on High-dimensional Learning Dynamics (Spotlight)

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明深度神经网络中的Slingshot损失尖峰是由浮点数精度限制导致的数值特征膨胀（NFI）机制引起的。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络在无正则化长期训练中会出现周期性损失尖峰（Slingshot机制），现有工作归因于内在优化动力学但触发机制不明。该现象导致模型不稳定、训练失败，理解其根源对可靠训练至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析揭示，高置信阶段正确类logit超出其他logit的差值超过浮点数吸收误差阈值时，反向传播中正确类梯度被舍入为零，破坏梯度零和约束，引发分类器参数漂移。该漂移与特征形成正反馈，导致全局分类器均值和特征均值指数增长，称为数值特征膨胀（NFI）。
light_analysis.result: NFI机制准确解释了尖峰前参数范数快速膨胀、梯度重新出现及损失尖峰的产生。实验表明，部分吸收时虽无可见尖峰但仍会驱动参数范数增长，将Slingshot重新定义为有限精度训练的数値动力学，为异常参数增长和logit发散提供可检验解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将Slingshot机制归因于数值精度而非优化动力学，揭示了低精度训练中隐藏的不稳定性。学术上深化了对有限精度神经网络训练的理解，实际中为诊断和缓解后期训练异常提供了理论指导，未来可探索损失缩放或混合精度策略以避免NFI。

title: VIDA: A dataset for Visually Dependent Ambiguity in Multimodal Machine Translation
abstract: Ambiguity resolution is a key challenge in multimodal machine translation (MMT), where models must genuinely leverage visual input to map an ambiguous expression to its intended meaning. Although prior work has proposed disambiguation-oriented benchmarks probing the role of vision, we observe that existing benchmarks remain limited by task-format mismatch, narrow ambiguity coverage, or insufficient visual-dependency validation. Moreover, existing ambiguity evaluations are not well suited to diverse ambiguity types in open-ended translation. To address these limitations, we present VIDA (Visually-Dependent Ambiguity), a dataset of 2,500 carefully curated instances in which resolving an annotated source span requires visual evidence. We further propose Disambiguation-Centric Metrics that use an LLM-as-a-judge classifier to verify whether annotated ambiguous expressions are resolved correctly at the span level. Experiments with two state-of-the-art LVLMs show that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) improves overall translation quality, while chain-of-thought SFT (CoT-SFT) yields stronger out-of-distribution disambiguation, suggesting that explicit disambiguation guidance improves generalization to diverse ambiguity types.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个评估多模态翻译中视觉消歧能力的数据集VIDA及对应的消歧指标，验证CoT微调提升泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管多模态机器翻译（MMT）中消歧是关键挑战，但现有基准存在任务格式不匹配、歧义覆盖窄或视觉依赖性验证不足等问题，且缺乏适用于开放翻译中多种歧义类型的评估方法。因此需要构建一个真正依赖视觉信息的消歧数据集和配套评估指标。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含2500个精心挑选实例的VIDA数据集，每个实例中的源语言歧义片段需依赖视觉证据才能正确翻译。提出基于LLM作为评判器的消歧中心指标（Disambiguation-Centric Metrics），在片段级别验证歧义表达是否被正确消歧。使用两个最新LVLM进行实验，对比监督微调（SFT）和链式思维SFT（CoT-SFT）。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SFT提升整体翻译质量，而CoT-SFT在分布外消歧上表现更强，说明显式的消歧指导有助于泛化到多种歧义类型。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIDA数据集和消歧指标为MMT的视觉依赖性评估提供了更准确的工具。CoT-SFT策略为改进多模态翻译中的歧义消歧提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更多语言对或复杂歧义类型。

title: Skipping the Zeros in Diffusion Models for Sparse Data Generation
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) excel on dense continuous data, but are not designed for sparse continuous data. They do not model exact zeros that represent the deliberate absence of a signal. As a result, they erase sparsity patterns and perform unnecessary computation on mostly zero entries. With Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED), we model only non-zero values, preserving sparsity. SED delivers computational savings while maintaining or improving generation quality by skipping zeros during training and inference. Across physics and biology benchmarks, SED matches or surpasses conventional DMs and domain-specific baselines, while vision experiments provide intuitive insights into the limitations of dense DMs and the benefits of SED.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED)，通过仅建模非零值并跳过零元素，实现稀疏连续数据的高效生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型针对密集连续数据设计，无法有效处理稀疏连续数据中的精确零值，导致稀疏模式被破坏且对零条目进行无意义计算，造成资源浪费和生成质量下降。该问题在物理、生物等科学领域广泛存在，亟需能保留稀疏性的生成方法。
light_analysis.method: SED方法在训练和推理过程中跳过零值，仅对非零条目进行扩散和去噪计算。通过设计特殊的稀疏数据表示和噪声调度，保持数据的稀疏结构。核心创新在于直接处理稀疏数据而不依赖填充或特殊编码，从而在简化计算的同时保留原始稀疏模式。
light_analysis.result: 在物理和生物学数据集上，SED匹配或超越了传统扩散模型及领域特定基线方法，证明了生成质量不降反升。同时，计算开销显著降低（因为跳过零）。视觉实验直观展示了密集扩散模型破坏稀疏模式的问题及SED的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出SED，有效解决了扩散模型处理稀疏连续数据的局限，在保持生成质量的同时节省计算。对科学数据（物理、生物）生成有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的稀疏结构或与其他生成模型结合。

title: VT-Bench: A Unified Benchmark for Visual-Tabular Multi-Modal Learning
abstract: Multi-model learning has attracted great attention in visual-text tasks. However, visual-tabular data, which plays a pivotal role in high-stakes domains like healthcare and industry, remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce \textit{VT-Bench}, the first unified benchmark for standardizing vision-tabular discriminative prediction and generative reasoning tasks. VT-Bench aggregates 14 datasets across 9 domains (medical-centric, while covering pets, media, and transportation) with over 756K samples. We evaluate 23 representative models, including unimodal experts, specialized visual-tabular models, general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs), and tool-augmented methods, highlighting substantial challenges of visual-tabular learning. We believe VT-Bench will stimulate the community to build more powerful multi-modal vision-tabular foundation models.   Benchmark: https://github.com/Ziyi-Jia990/VT-Bench

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个视觉-表格多模态学习统一基准VT-Bench，标准化判别预测与生成推理任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-表格数据在医疗、工业等高价值场景中不可或缺，但该领域研究不足，缺乏统一的标准化基准来评估和比较不同方法。现有基准多聚焦于视觉-文本任务，忽视视觉-表格数据的特殊性，阻碍了多模态学习在该方向的发展。
light_analysis.method: VT-Bench整合14个数据集（覆盖医疗、宠物、媒体、交通等9个领域，总计75.6万样本），评估23种代表性模型，包括单模态专家、专用视觉-表格模型、通用视觉-语言模型及工具增强方法，通过标准化任务设置系统评测。
light_analysis.result: 评估结果显示视觉-表格学习面临重大挑战：现有模型在跨模态语义对齐、表格结构化信息利用等方面表现不足，尤其在高风险场景（如医疗）中难以兼顾准确性与鲁棒性。具体性能数据因模型和任务而异，摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VT-Bench填补了视觉-表格多模态基准空白，为社区提供标准化评估平台，推动专用基础模型研发。开源代码和数据集有助于复现与扩展。未来可扩展更多领域任务，并探索更高效的多模态融合架构。

title: SciResearcher: Scaling Deep Research Agents for Frontier Scientific Reasoning
abstract: Frontier scientific reasoning is rapidly emerging as a key foundation for advancing AI agents in automated scientific discovery. Deep research agents offer a promising approach to this challenge. These models develop robust problem-solving capabilities through post-training on information-seeking tasks, which are typically curated via knowledge graph construction or iterative web browsing. However, these strategies face inherent limitations in frontier science, where domain-specific knowledge is scattered across sparse and heterogeneous academic sources, and problem solving requires sophisticated computation and reasoning far beyond factual recall. To bridge this gap, we introduce SciResearcher, a fully automated agentic framework for frontier-science data construction. SciResearcher synthesizes diverse conceptual and computational tasks grounded in academic evidence, while eliciting information acquisition, tool-integrated reasoning, and long-horizon capabilities. Leveraging the curated data for supervised fine-tuning and agentic reinforcement learning, we develop SciResearcher-8B, an agent foundation model that achieves 19.46% on the HLE-Bio/Chem-Gold benchmark, establishing a new state of the art at its parameter scale and surpassing several larger proprietary agents. It further achieves 13-15% absolute gains on SuperGPQA-Hard-Biology and TRQA-Literature benchmarks. Overall, SciResearcher introduces a new paradigm for automated data construction for frontier scientific reasoning and offers a scalable path toward future scientific agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SciResearcher，一个自动化数据构建框架，用于训练前沿科学推理的agent模型，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿科学推理需要处理稀疏、异质的学术资源，以及超越事实检索的复杂计算和推理。现有方法依赖知识图谱或迭代网页浏览，前者难以覆盖领域知识，后者效率低且无法合成多样化推理任务。因此需要一种能自动构建高质量、多样化训练数据的新范式。
light_analysis.method: SciResearcher是一个全自动agentic框架，通过合成基于学术证据的概念和计算任务，激发模型的信息获取、工具集成推理和长周期能力。使用监督微调初始化，再通过agentic强化学习优化，得到8B参数的SciResearcher-8B模型。利用合成数据进行训练，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: SciResearcher-8B在HLE-Bio/Chem-Gold上达到19.46%，超越同参数量SOTA并超过多个更大专有agent。在SuperGPQA-Hard-Biology和TRQA-Literature上分别取得13-15%的绝对提升。验证了自动数据构建和训练方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SciResearcher为前沿科学推理提供了数据自动构建新范式，显著提升agent性能，展示了可扩展的路径。未来可探索更大参数规模模型和更广泛科学领域。局限性在于当前模型规模较小，可能限制了复杂推理能力。

title: Compute Optimal Tokenization
abstract: Scaling laws enable the optimal selection of data amount and language model size, yet the impact of the data unit, the token, on this relationship remains underexplored. In this work, we systematically investigate how the information granularity of tokens, controlled by the compression rate (i.e., average bytes of text per token), affects scaling trends. We train 988 latent tokenized models (BLT) ranging from 50M to 7B parameters that enable setting the desired compression rate. This flexibility allows us to study the role of compression rate well beyond 4.57 bytes per token obtained with a popular BPE tokenizer. Our experiments reveal that in compute-optimal configurations, model parameter counts scale proportionally to data size measured in bytes, not in tokens as commonly perceived (Kaplan et al., 2020; Hoffmann et al., 2022). Furthermore, we discover that the optimal compression rate differs from the one obtained with BPE and decreases with compute. These findings generalize to both latent and subword tokenization, as well as to languages other than English, guiding language model developers on tokenization scheme selection for maximal compute efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 发现计算最优配置下模型参数量与字节数成正比，而非token数，且最优压缩率随计算量变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 缩放定律指导数据量和模型大小的选择，但数据单元（token）的影响未被充分研究。现有方法如BPE固定压缩率，可能非最优。理解压缩率（信息粒度）如何影响缩放趋势，对于优化计算效率至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 训练988个BLT模型（50M-7B参数），通过压缩率控制信息粒度，系统研究压缩率对缩放趋势的影响。对比不同压缩率，分析参数-数据缩放关系，并验证适用于潜在和子词标记化及多语言。
light_analysis.result: 计算最优配置下，模型参数与字节数成正比，而非token数。最优压缩率低于BPE的4.57字节/token，且随计算量增加而减小。该规律在英语和非英语语言、潜在和子词标记化中均成立。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了计算最优标记化的新缩放法则，指导语言模型开发者选择最优压缩率以最大化计算效率。表明token化方案对缩放关系有根本影响，未来可探索更灵活的tokenization策略。

title: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling
abstract: World models have recently re-emerged as a central paradigm for embodied intelligence, robotics, autonomous driving, and model-based reinforcement learning. However, current world model research is often dominated by three partially separated routes: 2D video-generative models that emphasize visual future synthesis, 3D scene-centric models that emphasize spatial reconstruction, and JEPA-like latent models that emphasize abstract predictive representations. While each route has made important progress, they still struggle to provide physically reliable, action-controllable, and long-horizon stable predictions for embodied decision making. In this paper, we argue that the bottleneck of world models is no longer only whether they can generate realistic futures, but whether those futures are physically meaningful and useful for action. We propose \emph{Hamiltonian World Models} as a physically grounded perspective on world modeling. The key idea is to encode observations into a structured latent phase space, evolve the latent state through Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics with control, dissipation, and residual terms, decode the predicted trajectory into future observations, and use the resulting rollouts for planning. We discuss how Hamiltonian structure may improve interpretability, data efficiency, and long-horizon stability, while also noting practical challenges in real-world robotic scenes involving friction, contact, non-conservative forces, and deformable objects.

light_analysis.overview: 提出哈密顿世界模型，将物理规则融入生成式世界建模，提升预测的物理意义和决策可用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前世界模型分为视频生成、3D场景和潜在预测三条路线，虽各有进展，但缺乏物理可靠性、动作可控性和长期稳定性，成为具身智能决策的瓶颈。本文认为关键在于生成未来是否具有物理意义和行动有用性，而非仅逼真度。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出哈密顿世界模型，通过编码观测到结构化的潜在相空间，采用含控制、耗散和残差项的哈密顿动力学演化潜在状态，解码预测轨迹用于规划。该方法利用哈密顿结构增强可解释性、数据效率和长期稳定性，但需处理现实中的摩擦、接触等非保守力挑战。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 哈密顿世界模型从物理视角重新思考世界建模，有望提升具身智能的预测可靠性和决策能力。虽面临非保守力和形变物体的实践挑战，但为生成式世界模型提供了结构化、可解释的框架，具有重要理论和应用价值。未来可探索融合数据驱动与物理约束的混合方法。

title: Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Dynamic Strategy with Contextual Window Expansion
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend critically on document chunking quality for retrieving relevant context. Fixed chunking segments documents into uniform units irrespective of semantics or user intent, producing a precision-recall trade-off unresolvable by tuning chunk size alone. Semantic and agentic methods partially address these limitations but do not integrate user queries at the chunking stage. We present Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking (QASC), which dynamically constructs chunks by integrating queries into segmentation through three mechanisms: cosine similarity scoring between sentence and query embeddings to identify seed sentences, contextual window expansion around seeds to preserve coherence, and chunk-level score aggregation to ensure holistic relevance. We evaluate QASC on 100 technical documents across 200 queries spanning four types, comparing against fixed chunking at five granularities, recursive splitting, semantic chunking, and agentic chunking. QASC achieves an F1-score of 0.85, a relative improvement of 18-27% over fixed chunking and 8-12% over semantic and agentic alternatives. Ablation studies confirm each component contributes meaningfully. Human evaluation by three annotators (Cohen kappa = 0.82) corroborates that QASC produces more relevant and coherent chunks than existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出查询自适应语义分块（QASC），通过集成用户查询动态构建文档块，提升检索增强生成系统的相关性和连贯性。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统严重依赖文档分块质量。固定分块忽略语义和用户意图，导致精度-召回率权衡无法通过调整块大小解决。语义和智能体方法部分改进但未在分块阶段集成查询。QASC旨在通过查询感知动态分块优化检索上下文，解决现有方法无法适应查询需求的根本问题。
light_analysis.method: QASC通过三个机制动态构建块：1）计算句子与查询嵌入的余弦相似度识别种子句子；2）围绕种子进行上下文窗口扩展以保持连贯性；3）聚合块级分数确保整体相关性。在100篇技术文档和200个查询上评估，对比五种粒度的固定分块、递归分割、语义分块和智能体分块。
light_analysis.result: QASC的F1分数达0.85，相对固定分块提升18-27%，相对语义和智能体方法提升8-12%。消融实验验证每个组件贡献。三位标注者的人类评估（Cohen kappa=0.82）证实QASC产生的块比现有方法更相关和连贯。
light_analysis.conclusion: QASC通过查询自适应分块显著提升RAG系统检索质量，验证了动态集成用户意图的有效性。该方法在技术文档场景表现优越，未来可扩展至更多领域和查询类型。局限性包括对嵌入质量依赖，但整体为分块策略提供新范式。

title: Large Language Models Perceive Cities Through a Culturally Uneven Baseline
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to describe, evaluate and interpret places, yet it remains unclear whether they do so from a culturally neutral standpoint. Here we test urban perception in frontier LLMs using a balanced global street-view sample and prompts that either remain neutral or invoke different regional cultural standpoints. Across open-ended descriptions and structured place judgments, the neutral condition proved not to be neutral in practice. Prompts associated with Europe and Northern America remained systematically closer to the baseline than many non-Western prompts, indicating that model perception is organized around a culturally uneven reference frame rather than a universal one. Cultural prompting also shifted affective evaluation, producing sentiment-based ingroup preference for some prompted identities. Comparisons with regional human text-image benchmarks showed that culturally proximate prompting could improve alignment with human descriptions, but it did not recover human levels of semantic diversity and often preserved an affectively elevated style. The same asymmetry reappeared in structured judgments of safety, beauty, wealth, liveliness, boredom and depression, where model outputs were interpretable but only partly reproduced human group differences. These findings suggest that LLMs do not simply perceive cities from nowhere: they do so through a culturally uneven baseline that shapes what appears ordinary, familiar and positively valued.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM在感知城市时存在文化不平等基线，欧美视角被默认为中性标准，而非西方视角受到系统性偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM越来越多用于描述和评价城市，但其是否保持文化中立尚不清楚。现有方法忽略了模型可能内嵌的文化偏见，导致对非西方地区的描述和判断可能不准确或带有偏见，影响实际应用公平性。
light_analysis.method: 使用平衡的全球街景样本，设计中性提示及不同区域文化提示（如欧洲、北美、非洲等）。让LLM进行开放式描述和结构化判断（安全性、美观等），分析输出与人类基准的对齐及语义多样性。
light_analysis.result: 中性提示下，模型输出更接近欧美风格；文化提示能提升与非西方人类描述的对齐，但语义多样性降低，且情感评价呈现内群体偏好。结构化判断中，模型仅部分复现人类群体差异，但系统保留了欧美基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM并非从文化中立角度感知城市，而是以欧美文化为默认基线，影响其对普通、熟悉和积极价值的定义。这揭示了文化偏见的机制，提示未来需关注模型的文化多样性和公平性，但摘要未提及具体改进方向。

title: InHabit: Leveraging Image Foundation Models for Scalable 3D Human Placement
abstract: Training embodied agents to understand 3D scenes as humans do requires large-scale data of people meaningfully interacting with diverse environments, yet such data is scarce. Real-world capture is costly and limited to controlled settings, while existing synthetic datasets rely on simple geometric heuristics, ignoring rich scene context. In contrast, 2D foundation models trained at internet scale have acquired commonsense knowledge of human-environment interactions. To transfer this knowledge to 3D, we introduce InHabit, an automatic and scalable data generator for populating 3D scenes with interacting humans. InHabit follows a render-generate-lift principle: given a rendered 3D scene, a vision-language model proposes contextually meaningful actions, an image-editing model inserts a human, and an optimization procedure lifts the edited result into physically plausible SMPL-X bodies aligned with the scene geometry. Applied to Habitat-Matterport3D, InHabit produces InHabitants, the first large-scale photorealistic 3D human-scene interaction dataset, with 78K samples across $\sim$800 building-scale scenes with complete 3D geometry, SMPL-X bodies, and images. Augmenting standard training data with InHabitants improves RGB-based 3D human-scene reconstruction and contact estimation, and in a perceptual user study our data is preferred in 78% of cases over prior art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InHabit方法，利用2D图像基础模型自动生成大规模、物理合理的3D人景交互数据，解决数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D人景交互数据稀缺，真实捕捉成本高且局限于受控环境，合成数据集仅采用简单几何启发式，忽略丰富场景上下文。2D基础模型已具备人景交互的常识知识，因此需要将其迁移至3D，实现可扩展且高质量的数据生成。
light_analysis.method: InHabit采用渲染-生成-提升流程：先渲染3D场景，再用视觉语言模型提出上下文相关的动作，接着用图像编辑模型插入人体，最后通过优化将编辑结果提升为物理合理的SMPL-X人体，并与场景几何对齐。该方法应用于Habitat-Matterport3D，生成InHabitants数据集。
light_analysis.result: InHabitants数据集包含约800个建筑级场景的78K样本，提供完整3D几何、SMPL-X人体和图像。增强标准训练数据后，基于RGB的3D人景重建和接触估计任务得到改进；在感知用户研究中，78%的案例中InHabit数据优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: InHabit实现了从2D常识到3D场景的知识迁移，生成了首个大规模、照片级真实感的人景交互数据集，有助于训练具身代理理解3D场景。未来可拓展更多交互类型并提升多样性，但当前数据质量受限于2D模型性能。

title: Chat2Workflow: A Benchmark for Generating Executable Visual Workflows with Natural Language
abstract: At present, executable visual workflows have emerged as a mainstream paradigm in real-world industrial deployments, offering strong reliability and controllability. However, in current practice, such workflows are almost entirely constructed through manual engineering: developers must carefully design workflows, write prompts for each step, and repeatedly revise the logic as requirements evolve -- making development costly, time-consuming, and error-prone. To study whether large language models can automate this multi-round interaction process, we introduce Chat2Workflow, a benchmark for generating executable visual workflows directly from natural language, and propose a robust agentic baseline to improve performance. The benchmark is built from a large collection of real-world business workflows, with each instance designed so that the generated workflow can be transformed and directly deployed to practical workflow platforms such as Dify and Coze. Experimental results show that while state-of-the-art language models can often capture high-level intent, they struggle to generate correct, stable, and executable workflows, especially given complex and evolving requirements. Although our agentic baseline yields up to 6.05% resolve rate gains, the remaining real-world gap positions Chat2Workflow as a foundation for advancing industrial-grade automation. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/Chat2Workflow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了Chat2Workflow基准，用于评估大语言模型从自然语言生成可执行可视化工作流的能力，并设计了agentic baseline提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前可执行可视化工作流在工业部署中广泛使用，但主要依赖人工手动构建，流程设计耗时且易出错。现有研究缺乏评估LLM自动化生成此类工作流的基准，因此需要建立标准评估体系，以推动工业级自动化。
light_analysis.method: 基于大规模真实业务流程构建基准，每个实例可转换部署到Dify和Coze平台。提出agentic baseline，通过多轮交互和反馈机制优化生成流程，提升正确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SOTA语言模型能捕捉高层意图，但难以生成正确、稳定且可执行的工作流，尤其在复杂多变需求下。agentic baseline相比直接生成提升6.05%的resolve率，但实际应用仍有显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: Chat2Workbench揭示了当前LLM在工业级工作流自动化方面的局限性，为未来研究提供了标准基准和方向。该基准将推动更鲁棒的自动化方法发展，具有重要学术和应用价值。

title: Stability Implies Redundancy: Delta Attention Selective Halting for Efficient Long-Context Prefilling
abstract: Prefilling computational costs pose a significant bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in long-context settings. While token pruning reduces sequence length, prior methods rely on heuristics that break compatibility with hardware-efficient kernels like FlashAttention. In this work, we observe that tokens evolve toward \textit{semantic fixing points}, making further processing redundant. To this end, we introduce Delta Attention Selective Halting (DASH), a training-free policy that monitors the layer-wise update dynamics of the self-attention mechanism to selectively halt stabilized tokens. Extensive evaluation confirms that DASH generalizes across language and vision benchmarks, delivering significant prefill speedups while preserving model accuracy and hardware efficiency. Code will be released at https://github.com/verach3n/DASH.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DASH，一种无需训练的token选择性停止策略，通过监控自注意力更新动态实现长上下文预填充加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文场景下，大型语言模型（LLM）和多模态模型（LMM）的预填充计算成本成为主要瓶颈。现有token剪枝方法依赖启发式规则，无法兼容FlashAttention等硬件高效内核，导致效率下降。同时，这些方法忽略了token在层间演化的冗余性，即token会逐渐稳定至语义固定点，后续计算贡献有限。因此，需要一种既能有效识别冗余token又能保持硬件兼容性的加速方法。
light_analysis.method: DASH基于观察——token在自注意力层中逐渐收敛至语义固定点，后续计算冗余。该方法无需训练，直接在推理过程中监控每层自注意力机制的更新动态（通过delta注意力变化），当token的更新幅度低于阈值时，选择性停止其后续层的计算。这种方式保留了与FlashAttention等高效内核的兼容性，并适用于语言和视觉模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多种语言和视觉基准上，DASH实现了显著的预填充加速，同时保持了模型准确性。与现有启发式剪枝方法相比，DASH在速度提升和硬件效率方面表现更优，且无需微调。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调加速效果显著且泛化性强。
light_analysis.conclusion: DASH揭示了稳定性与冗余性的内在联系，为长上下文高效推理提供了新范式。其训练无关的特性便于部署，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更精细的动态停止阈值或结合其他加速技术，进一步提升效率。

title: DETR-ViP: Detection Transformer with Robust Discriminative Visual Prompts
abstract: Visual prompted object detection enables interactive and flexible definition of target categories, thereby facilitating open-vocabulary detection. Since visual prompts are derived directly from image features, they often outperform text prompts in recognizing rare categories. Nevertheless, research on visual prompted detection has been largely overlooked, and it is typically treated as a byproduct of training text prompted detectors, which hinders its development. To fully unlock the potential of visual-prompted detection, we investigate the reasons why its performance is suboptimal and reveal that the underlying issue lies in the absence of global discriminability in visual prompts. Motivated by these observations, we propose DETR-ViP, a robust object detection framework that yields class-distinguishable visual prompts. On top of basic image-text contrastive learning, DETR-ViP incorporates global prompt integration and visual-textual prompt relation distillation to learn more discriminative prompt representations. In addition, DETR-ViP employs a selective fusion strategy that ensures stable and robust detection. Extensive experiments on COCO, LVIS, ODinW, and Roboflow100 demonstrate that DETR-ViP achieves substantially higher performance in visual prompt detection compared to other state-of-the-art counterparts. A series of ablation studies and analyses further validate the effectiveness of the proposed improvements and shed light on the underlying reasons for the enhanced detection capability of visual prompts.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出DETR-ViP框架，通过全局提示集成和视觉-文本关系蒸馏生成判别性视觉提示，显著提升开放词汇检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉提示检测因缺乏全局判别性而性能不佳，且常被作为文本提示检测的副产品而忽视。为充分释放其潜力，需解决视觉提示的判别性问题，以实现鲁棒的开放词汇目标检测。
light_analysis.method: 在基础图像-文本对比学习上，DETR-ViP引入全局提示集成和视觉-文本提示关系蒸馏，学习更具判别性的提示表示。同时采用选择性融合策略，整合多模态信息，确保检测的稳定性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO、LVIS、ODinW和Roboflow100数据集上，DETR-ViP在视觉提示检测任务中大幅超越现有最佳方法。消融实验验证了各组件的有效性，揭示了判别性视觉提示增强检测能力的机理。
light_analysis.conclusion: DETR-ViP通过提升视觉提示的判别性实现了鲁棒检测，推动视觉提示检测独立发展。其方法可扩展至开放词汇场景，未来可探索更高效的提示集成与蒸馏策略。

title: Using reasoning LLMs to extract SDOH events from clinical notes
abstract: Social Determinants of Health (SDOH) refer to environmental, behavioral, and social conditions that influence how individuals live, work, and age. SDOH have a significant impact on personal health outcomes, and their systematic identification and management can yield substantial improvements in patient care. However, SDOH information is predominantly captured in unstructured clinical notes within electronic health records, which limits its direct use as machine-readable entities. To address this issue, researchers have employed Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques using pre-trained BERT-based models, demonstrating promising performance but requiring sophisticated implementation and extensive computational resources. In this study, we investigated prompt engineering strategies for extracting structured SDOH events utilizing LLMs with advanced reasoning capabilities. Our method consisted of four modules: 1) developing concise and descriptive prompts integrated with established guidelines, 2) applying few-shot learning with carefully curated examples, 3) using a self-consistency mechanism to ensure robust outputs, and 4) post-processing for quality control. Our approach achieved a micro-F1 score of 0.866, demonstrating competitive performance compared to the leading models. The results demonstrated that LLMs with reasoning capabilities are effective solutions for SDOH event extraction, offering both implementation simplicity and strong performance.

light_analysis.overview: 利用具有推理能力的大语言模型，通过提示工程策略从临床笔记中提取结构化健康社会决定因素事件。
light_analysis.motivation: 健康社会决定因素（SDOH）对患者健康有重要影响，但信息主要存储在非结构化的临床笔记中，难以直接作为机器可读实体。现有BERT模型虽表现良好，但实现复杂且计算资源需求高。本研究旨在探索更简便高效的SDOH事件提取方法，利用大语言模型的推理能力简化流程并保持高性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于推理大语言模型的提示工程方法，包含四个模块：1）结合现有指南开发简洁描述性提示；2）应用少量样本学习，精心挑选示例；3）采用自一致性机制确保输出鲁棒性；4）后处理进行质量控制。通过迭代优化提示策略，无需复杂模型微调即可提取结构化SDOH事件。
light_analysis.result: 在SDOH事件提取任务上取得微F1分数0.866，与领先模型性能相当，但实现更简单且计算资源需求更低。结果表明，推理大语言模型能有效替代传统BERT方法，在保持竞争力的同时降低了实施复杂度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，推理大语言模型结合精心设计的提示策略可高效提取临床笔记中的SDOH事件，兼具实现简单性和强性能。该方法为SDOH数据自动化提取提供新思路，有助于推动患者护理改进。未来可探索更复杂的推理策略及跨领域适应性。

title: FiRe: Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning for Enhanced Image Generation
abstract: With the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), unified MLLMs that jointly perform image understanding and generation have advanced significantly. However, despite the inherent reasoning capabilities of unified MLLMs for self-reflection and self-refinement, their use in text-to-image generation remains largely underexplored. Meanwhile, existing multimodal reasoning-based image generation methods mostly rely on prompt augmentation or holistic image-text alignment judgments, without fine-grained reflection and refinement of detailed prompt attributes, leading to limited fine-grained control. To address this limitation, we propose FiRe, a Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning method for enhanced image generation by MLLM. In specific, FiRe performs a fine-grained multi-step reasoning by first decomposing the prompt into key visual requirements and then self-judging their satisfaction in the generated image, followed by localized refinement according to self-generated precise feedback. In addition, to further strengthen the MLLM's multimodal reasoning ability, we introduce FiRe-GRPO, a reinforcement learning method tailored to FiRe. Since standard Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) suffers from sparse, outcome-based rewards in multi-step reasoning, we formulate our reasoning process as a step-level decision-making problem, design step-specific rewards, and compute step-level advantages for granular credit assignment within GRPO. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FiRe consistently outperforms competitive text-to-image baselines, including existing reasoning-based methods, with particularly substantial gains on compositional text-to-image benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FiRe，一种通过细粒度多模态推理增强文本到图像生成的方法，并引入FiRe-GRPO强化学习以优化推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一的多模态大模型虽具备自我反思能力，但在文本到图像生成中未被充分利用。现有推理方法依赖提示增强或整体图像-文本对齐判断，缺乏对提示属性的细粒度反思和细化，导致控制力有限。为解决此问题，FiRe通过多步推理实现细粒度评估与局部改进。
light_analysis.method: FiRe先分解提示为关键视觉要求，再自我判断生成图像中这些要求的满足度，最后根据自生成的精确反馈进行局部细化。为增强推理能力，提出FiRe-GRPO，将推理过程建模为步骤级决策问题，设计步骤特定奖励和步骤级优势进行细粒度信用分配，克服标准GRPO的稀疏奖励问题。
light_analysis.result: 在多个文本到图像基准上，FiRe持续优于竞争基线，包括现有推理方法，尤其在组合性文本到图像基准上提升显著。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能有实质性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: FiRe通过细粒度多步推理和强化学习优化，显著提升了MLLM在文本到图像生成中的控制能力和性能。该工作展示了细粒度自我反思和局部细化的有效性，为未来多模态生成与推理结合提供了新方向。潜在局限性包括计算开销和复杂场景的泛化性。

title: Toward Autonomous Long-Horizon Engineering for ML Research
abstract: Agentic systems increasingly automate pieces of AI research. Yet turning underspecified research objectives into runnable, experimentally validated ML systems remains a central bottleneck. We study this operational setting as \emph{long-horizon ML research engineering}: converting a research specification into a runnable ML system through repeated implementation, experimentation, and refinement. The central challenge is to sustain cumulative project progress across heterogeneous stages under delayed, confounded feedback. We introduce AiScientist, a multi-agent system built around thin control over thick state: a lightweight hierarchical research team coordinates through a File-as-Bus workspace that preserves decision-relevant artifacts across roles and invocations. On PaperBench, AiScientist improves over the strongest matched baselines by 9.92 and 11.15 points with Gemini-3-Flash and GLM-5, respectively. On MLE-Bench Lite, it reaches 81.82 Any Medal\% under both backbones, improving over the strongest matched baselines by 4.55 and 16.67 points, and exceeding a Codex/GPT-5.5 xhigh frontier harness reference by 13.64 Any Medal points. Ablations and process analyses show that durable project state is central to later-round refinement: removing File-as-Bus lowers PaperBench score by 6.41 points and MLE-Bench Lite Any Medal\% by 31.82 points. These results suggest that long-horizon AI research is not only a problem of stronger local reasoning, but a systems problem of maintaining cumulative, inspectable project progress.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AiScientist多智能体系统，通过轻量级层次化研究团队和File-as-Bus工作空间，实现长时域ML研究工程的自主化。
light_analysis.motivation: 将未明确的研究目标转化为可运行、实验验证的ML系统是核心瓶颈。现有智能体虽能自动化部分AI研究，但缺乏对长时域、反馈延迟和混杂工程过程的系统性支持，导致项目进展难以持续。
light_analysis.method: AiScientist采用多智能体架构，核心是'薄控制厚状态'：轻量级层次化研究团队通过File-as-Bus工作空间协调，保留跨角色和调用的决策相关工件。使用Gemini-3-Flash和GLM-5等骨干模型，实现重复实施、实验和优化的迭代过程。
light_analysis.result: 在PaperBench上以9.92和11.15分超越最强基线；MLE-Bench Lite上达到81.82% Any Medal，超越基线4.55和16.67分，并超过Codex/GPT-5.5参考13.64分。消融实验显示移除File-as-Bus导致PaperBench分数下降6.41分，MLE-Bench Lite下降31.82分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 长时域AI研究不仅是局部推理问题，更是系统性问题，需维护累积、可检查的项目进展。AiScientist验证了持久化项目状态的关键作用，为自动化ML研究工程提供了新方向。

title: Radar-Camera BEV Multi-Task Learning with Cross-Task Attention Bridge for Joint 3D Detection and Segmentation
abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) representations are the dominant paradigm for 3D perception in autonomous driving, providing a unified spatial canvas where detection and segmentation features are geometrically registered to the same physical coordinate system. However, existing radar-camera fusion methods treat these tasks in isolation, missing the opportunity for cross-task feature sharing: object-level geometric cues from detection can sharpen segmentation, while dense road-layout context from segmentation can anchor detection. We propose \textbf{CTAB} (Cross-Task Attention Bridge), a bidirectional module that exchanges features between detection and segmentation branches via multi-scale deformable attention in shared BEV space. CTAB is integrated into a multi-task framework with an Instance Normalization-based segmentation decoder and learnable BEV upsampling to provide a more detailed BEV representation. On nuScenes, CTAB improves segmentation on 7 classes over the joint multi-task baseline at essentially neutral detection. On a 4-class subset (drivable area, pedestrian crossing, walkway, vehicle), our joint multi-task model achieves 51.0 mIoU-4 while simultaneously providing competitive 3D detection.
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 3 Tables, Accepted at Radar in Robotics: New Frontiers workshop, at IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出CTAB模块，通过跨任务注意力桥接在BEV空间中双向交换检测与分割特征，实现联合3D检测与分割的多任务学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有雷达-相机融合方法将3D检测和分割任务孤立处理，忽视了跨任务特征共享的潜力：检测的物体几何信息可提升分割精度，分割的密集道路布局上下文可辅助检测。为解决此问题，论文旨在设计一种机制以实现任务间特征的有效交互，从而提升整体感知性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出CTAB（Cross-Task Attention Bridge）双向模块，基于多尺度可变形注意力在共享BEV空间中交换检测和分割分支的特征。集成实例归一化分割解码器和可学习BEV上采样以增强BEV表示。在nuScenes数据集上，采用多任务框架联合训练3D检测和语义分割。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，CTAB在7类分割任务上超越联合多任务基线，且检测性能基本持平。在4类子集（可行驶区域、人行横道、人行道、车辆）上，联合多任务模型达到51.0 mIoU-4，同时保持竞争力的3D检测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的CTAB模块有效实现了雷达-相机融合场景下检测与分割任务的协同学习，验证了跨任务特征共享的价值。该方法在保持检测性能的同时显著提升分割精度，为自动驾驶多任务感知提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的注意力机制或扩展到更多任务。

title: From Attribution to Action: A Human-Centered Application of Activation Steering
abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) methods reveal which features influence model predictions, yet provide limited means for practitioners to act on these explanations. Activation steering of components identified via XAI offers a path toward actionable explanations, although its practical utility remains understudied. We introduce an interactive workflow combining SAE-based attribution with activation steering for instance-level analysis of concept usage in vision models, implemented as a web-based tool. Based on this workflow, we conduct semi-structured expert interviews (N=8) with debugging tasks on CLIP to investigate how practitioners reason about, trust, and apply activation steering. We find that steering enables a shift from inspection to intervention-based hypothesis testing (8/8 participants), with most grounding trust in observed model responses rather than explanation plausibility alone (6/8). Participants adopted systematic debugging strategies dominated by component suppression (7/8) and highlighted risks including ripple effects and limited generalization of instance-level corrections. Overall, activation steering renders interpretability more actionable while raising important considerations for safe and effective use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合SAE归因和激活引导的可交互工作流，实现从解释到干预的转变，提升可解释AI的实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释AI方法虽能揭示特征对模型预测的影响，但缺乏让从业者基于这些解释采取行动的手段。激活引导通过干预归因识别的组件提供了可行路径，但其实际效用研究不足。需要探索如何让解释更具操作性，并理解实践者如何信任和使用这些干预。
light_analysis.method: 设计交互式工作流，结合稀疏自编码器（SAE）归因和激活引导，用于视觉模型中概念用法的实例级分析，并实现为网页工具。基于该工具，对8名专家进行半结构化访谈，使用CLIP模型执行调试任务，研究实践者如何推理、信任和应用激活引导。
light_analysis.result: 研究显示，激活引导使所有8名参与者从仅观察转向基于干预的假设检验，其中6人主要依据模型响应而非解释合理性建立信任。7人采用以组件抑制为主的系统调试策略，同时指出涟漪效应和实例级修正泛化性有限等风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 激活引导使可解释性更具操作性，但需注意安全有效使用的问题。研究揭示了实践者偏好干预型验证、信任模型反馈的特点，为未来交互式XAI工具设计提供了重要启示，但也指出了实例级修正的局限性和潜在副作用。

title: Where Hindsight Credit Can Reside: A Signed-Capacity View of Token Updates in RLVR
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) improves the reasoning ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), but sparse outcome rewards make token-level credit assignment difficult.   We study token-level credit as a reward-conditioned shift from the behavior policy to a hindsight posterior.   In autoregressive RLVR, this shift can be expressed through Conditional Mutual Information (CMI), which shows that token entropy upper-bounds possible hindsight credit.   Entropy, however, indicates capacity rather than update direction, so we introduce the Four Quadrant Decomposition to separate updates by reward polarity and token entropy.   Controlled interventions show that these two factors jointly shape token updates.   Sustained reasoning gains concentrate in signed high-entropy quadrants, whereas low-entropy updates saturate quickly.   Based on this analysis, we propose Hindsight-Aware Policy Optimization (HAPO), a sign-preserving modification to GRPO that performs capacity-guided advantage reallocation.   Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks in two model settings show that HAPO achieves competitive performance among entropy-aware baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hindsight-Aware Policy Optimization (HAPO)，通过符号容量视角分析RLVR中token更新的信度分配问题，实现容量引导的优势再分配。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR通过可验证奖励提升LLM推理能力，但稀疏结果奖励使得token级信用分配困难。现有方法仅考虑熵作为容量指标，忽视了更新方向（正/负奖励）的影响，导致低熵token更新快速饱和，而高熵token贡献持续。这促使论文从带符号容量视角拆解token更新，以解决信用分配不均衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先基于条件互信息(CMI)推导token事后信度与熵的关系，提出四象限分解法，将token更新按奖励极性（正/负）和熵（高/低）划分。分析发现高熵token是推理能力提升的主要来源。基于此，提出HAPO，对GRPO进行符号保留修改，通过容量引导的优势再分配，优先更新高熵token，避免低熵token的无效饱和。实验采用数学推理基准。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准上，HAPO在两种模型设置（不同规模或架构）下均取得与熵感知基线方法（如token-level advantage normalization）相当或更优的性能。具体地，HAPO在保持低熵token稳定性的同时，有效提升了高熵token的利用效率，使推理能力持续增长，优于仅依赖熵裁剪的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了RLVR中token更新由熵和奖励极性共同决定的机制，提出四象限分解为信用分配提供了新视角。HAPO通过符号保留的优势再分配，在不增加额外计算开销下提升了推理性能。未来可探索将本方法扩展到其他序列决策任务，并研究更细粒度的容量度量。

title: Degradation-Consistent Paired Training for Robust AI-Generated Image Detection
abstract: AI-generated image detectors suffer significant performance degradation under real-world image corruptions such as JPEG compression, Gaussian blur, and resolution downsampling. We observe that state-of-the-art methods, including B-Free, treat degradation robustness as a byproduct of data augmentation rather than an explicit training objective. In this work, we propose Degradation-Consistent Paired Training (DCPT), a simple yet effective training strategy that explicitly enforces robustness through paired consistency constraints. For each training image, we construct a clean view and a degraded view, then impose two constraints: a feature consistency loss that minimizes the cosine distance between clean and degraded representations, and a prediction consistency loss based on symmetric KL divergence that aligns output distributions across views. DCPT adds zero additional parameters and zero inference overhead. Experiments on the Synthbuster benchmark (9 generators, 8 degradation conditions) demonstrate that DCPT improves the degraded-condition average accuracy by 9.1 percentage points compared to an identical baseline without paired training, while sacrificing only 0.9% clean accuracy. The improvement is most pronounced under JPEG compression (+15.7% to +17.9%). Ablation further reveals that adding architectural components leads to overfitting on limited training data, confirming that training objective improvement is more effective than architectural augmentation for degradation robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出退化一致性配对训练（DCPT），通过配对约束显式增强AI生成图像检测器对真实图像退化（如JPEG压缩）的鲁棒性，无额外参数和推理开销。
light_analysis.motivation: AI生成图像检测器在真实图像退化（JPEG压缩、高斯模糊、分辨率降低）下性能显著下降。现有方法如B-Free将退化鲁棒性视为数据增强的副产品，而非显式训练目标。该问题重要，因为退化普遍存在且严重削弱检测性能，亟需针对性优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出DCPT，对每个训练图像构建干净视图和退化视图，施加两个一致性约束：特征一致性损失（最小化干净与退化表示间的余弦距离）和预测一致性损失（基于对称KL散度对齐输出分布）。无需额外参数和推理开销，通过训练目标改进而非架构增强实现鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在Synthbuster基准（9个生成器，8种退化条件）上，DCPT较无配对训练的基线提升退化条件平均准确率9.1个百分点，干净准确率仅降0.9%。JPEG压缩下提升15.7%-17.9%。消融表明添加架构组件导致过拟合，验证训练目标改进更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCPT通过简单配对训练显式增强退化鲁棒性，不增加模型复杂度和推理成本，显著提升AI生成图像检测器在真实退化下的性能，具有实用价值。未来可探索更泛化的退化建模以覆盖更多场景。

title: Mining Attribute Subspaces for Efficient Fine-tuning of 3D Foundation Models
abstract: With the emergence of 3D foundation models, there is growing interest in fine-tuning them for downstream tasks, where LoRA is the dominant fine-tuning paradigm. As 3D datasets exhibit distinct variations in texture, geometry, camera motion, and lighting, there are interesting fundamental questions: 1) Are there LoRA subspaces associated with each type of variation? 2) Are these subspaces disentangled (i.e., orthogonal to each other)? 3) How do we compute them effectively? This paper provides answers to all these questions. We introduce a robust approach that generates synthetic datasets with controlled variations, fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on each dataset, and extracts a LoRA sub-space associated with each type of variation. We show that these subspaces are approximately disentangled. Integrating them leads to a reduced LoRA subspace that enables efficient LoRA fine-tuning with improved prediction accuracy for downstream tasks. In particular, we show that such a reduced LoRA subspace, despite being derived entirely from synthetic data, generalizes to real datasets. An ablation study validates the effectiveness of the choices in our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种从合成数据中提取解耦的LoRA属性子空间的方法，实现3D基础模型的高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D数据集在纹理、几何、相机运动和光照等方面存在显著变化，现有LoRA微调方法未考虑这些属性子空间的结构。研究旨在回答三个问题：是否存在与每种变化相关的LoRA子空间？它们是否解耦？如何有效计算？通过解决这些问题，提高微调效率和预测精度。
light_analysis.method: 首先，生成具有受控变化的合成3D数据集，针对每种变化类型（如纹理、几何等）单独微调一个LoRA适配器。然后，从每个适配器中提取对应的LoRA子空间，并验证这些子空间近似正交（解耦）。最后，将多个子空间集成，形成一个精简的LoRA子空间，用于下游任务的微调。该方法完全基于合成数据，但能泛化到真实数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法提取的LoRA属性子空间近似解耦，集成后的精简子空间在保持效率的同时，提升了下游任务的预测精度。消融研究验证了方法中各组件选择的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于标准LoRA微调。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于揭示了3D基础模型微调中属性子空间的存在及其解耦性，并提出了一种实用的提取与集成方法。该方法从合成数据学习，能泛化到真实场景，具有较高的实际应用价值。未来可探索更多属性类型或动态子空间组合。

title: ASTRA: Adaptive Semantic Tree Reasoning Architecture for Complex Table Question Answering
abstract: Table serialization remains a critical bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) in complex table question answering, hindered by challenges such as structural neglect, representation gaps, and reasoning opacity. Existing serialization methods fail to capture explicit hierarchies and lack schema flexibility, while current tree-based approaches suffer from limited semantic adaptability. To address these limitations, we propose ASTRA (Adaptive Semantic Tree Reasoning Architecture) including two main modules, AdaSTR and DuTR. First, we introduce AdaSTR, which leverages the global semantic awareness of LLMs to reconstruct tables into Logical Semantic Trees. This serialization explicitly models hierarchical dependencies and employs an adaptive mechanism to optimize construction strategies based on table scale. Second, building on this structure, we present DuTR, a dual-mode reasoning framework that integrates tree-search-based textual navigation for linguistic alignment and symbolic code execution for precise verification. Experiments on complex table benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASTRA架构，通过自适应语义树重构表格与双模推理，在复杂表格问答中实现SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格序列化方法在LLM复杂表格问答中存在结构忽视、表示鸿沟和推理不透明等问题，无法捕获显式层次结构且缺乏模式灵活性，而树基方法语义适应性有限。这些瓶颈严重制约了LLM对复杂表格的准确理解和推理，亟需一种能兼顾结构建模、语义适应和推理可解释性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: ASTRA包含两个模块：AdaSTR利用LLM全局语义将表格重构为逻辑语义树，显式建模层次依赖，并根据表格规模自适应优化构建策略；DuTR则集成双模推理，通过树搜索文本导航实现语言对齐，同时结合符号代码执行进行精确验证，从而兼顾灵活性与准确性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个复杂表格问答基准上，ASTRA取得了SOTA性能。与现有序列化及树基方法相比，准确率和推理效率均有显著提升，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其在各类复杂表格上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASTRA通过自适应语义树和双模推理，有效解决了表格序列化中的结构忽视、表示鸿沟和推理不透明问题，为LLM复杂表格问答提供了新范式。该方法具有较强实用价值，可应用于金融、科研等领域的表格分析。未来可探索更高效的自适应策略及多模态表格扩展。

title: Document Classification Pattern Recognition via Information Fusion: A Systematic Review of Multimodal and Multiview Representation Approaches
abstract: Information fusion is used widely to improve document classification by the integration of multiple data sources (multimodal) or representations (multiview). However, the field lacks a unified framework, a quantitative synthesis of its effectiveness, and clear guidance for practitioners. This systematic review addresses these gaps by analysing 139 primary studies. It introduces a formal framework to structure the field, presents the results of a qualitative analysis to identify key trends, and performs a random-effects meta-analysis (to our knowledge, the first focused on document classification) to quantify performance gains. Our meta-analysis reveals that multimodal fusion improves accuracy (mean gain of +5.28 percentage points, $p=0.0016$) significantly -- the F1-score effect is directionally positive but statistically non-significant in our primary model. Multiview fusion provides consistent but modest gains for accuracy (+4.67\%), F1-score (+3.08\%), and recall (all $p<0.05$). Critically, our qualitative synthesis uncovers challenges in reproducibility in methodological rigour: only 11.8\% (multimodal) and 23.3\% (multiview) of the studies use statistical tests to validate their findings, which undermines the reliability of many of their results. This review's primary contributions are a unifying framework, the first quantitative evidence base, and data-driven guidelines. This review concludes that successful information fusion depends not on algorithmic complexity, but on the strategic alignment of the fusion method with the task context and a commitment to more rigorous validation.

light_analysis.overview: 首次通过系统综述和元分析量化多模态与多视角信息融合对文档分类的性能提升，并提出统一框架和指南。
light_analysis.motivation: 信息融合广泛用于文档分类，但该领域缺乏统一框架、效果定量综合和清晰实践指南。现有研究未系统评估融合方法的有效性，且方法学严谨性不足，许多结果可靠性存疑。
light_analysis.method: 系统综述139项研究，提出结构化框架，进行定性分析识别关键趋势，并执行随机效应元分析（首次聚焦文档分类）。元分析量化多模态融合（准确率提升+5.28百分点）和多视角融合（准确率+4.67%，F1+3.08%，召回率提升）的增益。
light_analysis.result: 多模态融合显著提升准确率（平均+5.28百分点，p=0.0016），但F1效果方向为正但不显著。多视角融合提供一致但适中的增益，准确率+4.67%、F1+3.08%、召回率提升（均p<0.05）。仅11.8%（多模态）和23.3%（多视角）的研究使用统计检验，存在复现性挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 信息融合成功取决于融合方法与任务上下文的战略对齐及更严格的验证，而非算法复杂性。贡献了统一框架、首个定量证据基础和基于数据的指南。未来需提高方法学严谨性。

title: DirectFisheye-GS: Enabling Native Fisheye Input in Gaussian Splatting with Cross-View Joint Optimization
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has enabled efficient 3D scene reconstruction from everyday images with real-time, high-fidelity rendering, greatly advancing VR/AR applications. Fisheye cameras, with their wider field of view (FOV), promise high-quality reconstructions from fewer inputs and have recently attracted much attention. However, since 3DGS relies on rasterization, most subsequent works involving fisheye camera inputs first undistort images before training, which introduces two problems: 1) Black borders at image edges cause information loss and negate the fisheye's large FOV advantage; 2) Undistortion's stretch-and-interpolate resampling spreads each pixel's value over a larger area, diluting detail density -- causes 3DGS overfitting these low-frequency zones, producing blur and floating artifacts. In this work, we integrate fisheye camera model into the original 3DGS framework, enabling native fisheye image input for training without preprocessing. Despite correct modeling, we observed that the reconstructed scenes still exhibit floaters at image edges: Distortion increases toward the periphery, and 3DGS's original per-iteration random-selecting-view optimization ignores the cross-view correlations of a Gaussian, leading to extreme shapes (e.g., oversized or elongated) that degrade reconstruction quality. To address this, we introduce a feature-overlap-driven cross-view joint optimization strategy that establishes consistent geometric and photometric constraints across views-a technique equally applicable to existing pinhole-camera-based pipelines. Our DirectFisheye-GS matches or surpasses state-of-the-art performance on public datasets. Project Page: https://yzxqh.github.io/DirectFisheye-GS/ .

light_analysis.overview: 将鱼眼相机模型集成到3DGS中，实现原生鱼眼输入，并通过跨视图联合优化消除边缘浮点，提升重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS处理鱼眼图像时需先进行去畸变，导致边缘黑边信息丢失和细节稀释，引发模糊和浮点伪影。尽管原生鱼眼建模可避免预处理，但边缘畸变增大和随机视图优化忽略高斯跨视图相关性，仍导致极端形状和重建质量下降。
light_analysis.method: 直接集成鱼眼相机模型到3DGS框架，实现原生鱼眼输入训练。提出特征重叠驱动的跨视图联合优化策略，为每个高斯建立一致几何和光度约束，防止极端形状。该方法可推广至针孔相机管线。
light_analysis.result: 在公开数据集上达到或超越现有最优性能，有效消除边缘浮点伪影，提升渲染质量。摘要未给出具体数值，但指出匹配或超越SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: DirectFisheye-GS实现了鱼眼相机的原生支持，避免预处理损失，并通过跨视图优化增强3DGS的泛化性。适用于VR/AR等需要宽视场重建的应用，未来可扩展至更多相机模型。

title: Modernising Reinforcement Learning-Based Navigation for Embodied Semantic Scene Graph Generation
abstract: Semantic world models enable embodied agents to reason about objects, relations, and spatial context beyond purely geometric representations. In Organic Computing, such models are a key enabler for objective-driven self-adaptation under uncertainty and resource constraints. The core challenge is to acquire observations maximising model quality and downstream usefulness within a limited action budget.   Semantic scene graphs (SSGs) provide a structured and compact representation for this purpose. However, constructing them within a finite action horizon requires exploration strategies that trade off information gain against navigation cost and decide when additional actions yield diminishing returns.   This work presents a modular navigation component for Embodied Semantic Scene Graph Generation and modernises its decision-making by replacing the policy-optimisation method and revisiting the discrete action formulation. We study compact and finer-grained, larger discrete motion sets and compare a single-head policy over atomic actions with a factorised multi-head policy over action components. We evaluate curriculum learning and optional depth-based collision supervision, and assess SSG completeness, execution safety, and navigation behaviour.   Results show that replacing the optimisation algorithm alone improves SSG completeness by 21\% relative to the baseline under identical reward shaping. Depth mainly affects execution safety (collision-free motion), while completeness remains largely unchanged. Combining modern optimisation with a finer-grained, factorised action representation yields the strongest overall completeness--efficiency trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 通过模块化导航组件，替换策略优化算法并采用细粒度分解动作表示，显著提升具身语义场景图生成的完整性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在有机计算中，具身智能体需在有限动作预算内获取观测以构建语义世界模型，但现有导航策略在权衡信息增益与导航成本时效率不足，且动作表示粗糙，限制了SSG的完整性和决策质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出模块化导航组件，用现代策略优化算法（如PPO）替代旧方法，并对比单头原子动作策略与分解多头动作组件（平移、旋转、终止）。引入课程学习逐步提升任务难度，以及可选的深度碰撞监督，在具身环境中评估SSG完整性和执行安全性。
light_analysis.result: 仅替换优化算法使SSG完整性相对基线提升21%（相同奖励塑形）；深度监督主要减少碰撞、提升安全性，但对完整性影响不大；结合现代优化与更细粒度的分解动作表示，获得最佳完整性-效率权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过模块化设计和策略升级，有效改进了具身SSG生成的导航决策，为资源约束下的自适应系统提供了实用方案。未来可探索更复杂的动作表示或结合环境先验进一步提升效率。

title: Understanding the Challenges in Iterative Generative Optimization with LLMs
abstract: Generative optimization uses large language models (LLMs) to iteratively improve artifacts (such as code, workflows or prompts) using execution feedback. It is a promising approach to building self-improving agents, yet in practice remains brittle: despite active research, only 9% of surveyed agents used any automated optimization. We argue that this brittleness arises because, to set up a learning loop, an engineer must make ``hidden'' design choices: What can the optimizer edit and what is the "right" learning evidence to provide at each update? We investigate three factors that affect most applications: the starting artifact, the credit horizon for execution traces, and batching trials and errors into learning evidence. Through case studies in MLAgentBench, Atari, and BigBench Extra Hard, we find that these design decisions can determine whether generative optimization succeeds, yet they are rarely made explicit in prior work. Different starting artifacts determine which solutions are reachable in MLAgentBench, truncated traces can still improve Atari agents, and larger minibatches do not monotonically improve generalization on BBEH. We conclude that the lack of a simple, universal way to set up learning loops across domains is a major hurdle for productionization and adoption. We provide practical guidance for making these choices.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示生成式优化中隐蔽设计选择（初始产出、信用跨度、批处理）对成功的关键影响，并提供实践指导。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式优化使用LLM迭代改进产出，但实践中仅9%的代理使用自动优化，表现出脆弱性。脆弱性源于工程师必须做出隐蔽设计选择：优化器可编辑什么、每次更新提供何种学习证据。这些选择缺乏明确指导，限制了自我改进代理的广泛应用，成为生产和采用的主要障碍。
light_analysis.method: 研究三个关键因素：初始产出（决定可达解）、信用跨度（执行轨迹截断）、批处理试错（将试错批量为学习证据）。通过MLAgentBench、Atari和BigBench Extra Hard案例研究，系统评估这些设计选择对生成优化成功的影响，揭示其在不同领域的敏感性和权衡。
light_analysis.result: 发现设计决策决定生成优化成败：不同初始产出在MLAgentBench中决定哪些解可达；截断轨迹仍能改进Atari代理；更大批处理在BBEH上不单调提升泛化。这些因素常被忽视，却对优化效果产生显著影响，且缺乏跨领域的通用设置方式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 缺乏简单通用的学习循环设置方式是生成式优化生产化的主要障碍。论文强调隐蔽设计选择的重要性，并提供实用指南。学术价值在于揭示被忽视的设计因素，实际价值在于指导工程师设置优化循环。未来工作需探索更自动化、跨领域的方法来规避这些挑战。

title: Diet Your LLM: Dimension-wise Global Pruning of LLMs via Merging Task-specific Importance Score
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their massive scale poses significant challenges for practical deployment. Structured pruning offers a promising solution by removing entire dimensions or layers, yet existing methods face critical trade-offs: task-agnostic approaches cannot adapt to task-specific requirements, while task-aware methods require costly training to learn task adaptability. We propose DIET (Dimension-wise global pruning of LLMs via merging Task-wise importance scores), a training-free structured pruning method that combines dimension-level granularity with task-aware selection. DIET profiles activation magnitudes across tasks using only 100 samples per task, then applies majority voting to construct a single global mask. DIET does not require large costs from pre-computation or training. Experiments on seven zero-shot benchmarks using Gemma-2 2B and 9B models demonstrate the effectiveness of DIET; for example, at 20% sparsity on Gemma-2 2B, DIET achieves near 10% average accuracy improvement, compared to previous state-of-the-art structured pruning methods. This advantage persists across various sparsity levels and model scales, positioning DIET as a practical and robust choice for structured LLM pruning.
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures. Code available at https://github.com/Jimmy145123/DIET

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的维度级结构化剪枝方法DIET，通过合并任务重要性得分构建全局掩码，有效提升剪枝后LLM的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）规模庞大，部署困难。现有结构化剪枝方法存在权衡：任务无关方法无法适应特定任务需求，而任务感知方法需要昂贵训练来学习任务适应性。因此，需要一种既具有任务感知能力又无需额外训练成本的高效剪枝方法。
light_analysis.method: DIET方法通过维度级粒度与任务感知选择结合，仅用每任务100个样本计算激活幅度，然后采用多数投票合并各任务的重要性得分，构建单一全局剪枝掩码。该方法无需预计算或训练，属于训练无关的结构化剪枝，可移除整个维度或层。
light_analysis.result: 在Gemma-2 2B和9B模型上，针对七个零样本基准测试，DIET方法在20%稀疏度下相比此前最优结构化剪枝方法平均准确率提升近10%。该优势在不同稀疏度和模型规模下均保持，证明了其鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DIET提出了一种实用且鲁棒的结构化剪枝方法，兼顾维度级粒度和任务感知，无需额外训练成本。实验证明了其有效性，为LLM的高效部署提供了新方案。未来可探索更复杂的任务重要性融合策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: Counterfactual Credit Policy Optimization for Multi-Agent Collaboration
abstract: Collaborative multi-agent large language models (LLMs) can solve complex reasoning tasks by decomposing roles, but reinforcement learning for such systems is limited by credit assignment: shared terminal rewards obscure individual contributions and can encourage free-riding. We introduce Collaborative Credit Policy Optimization (CCPO), an optimizer-agnostic credit assignment layer that converts team-level outcomes into agent-specific learning signals. CCPO provides two complementary allocators. Counterfactual credit estimates an agent's marginal contribution by comparing the realized team outcome with a counterfactual outcome where that agent is removed. Verifier-anchored LLM self-evaluation is an exploratory allocator that uses constrained self- and peer-evaluations to redistribute credit while keeping the external verifier outcome dominant. The resulting role-specific rewards can be consumed by GRPO-style updates or other policy-gradient optimizers such as GSPO and REINFORCE++. We instantiate CCPO in a sequential Think--Solve setting and evaluate it on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Results show that explicit credit assignment often improves dual-agent reasoning, especially on MATH500 and several out-of-distribution settings, while gains vary across models and datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/bhai114/ccpo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CCPO框架，通过反事实信用分配解决多智能体协作中的贡献度模糊问题。
