light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体大语言模型通过角色分解可解决复杂推理任务，但强化学习受限于信用分配：共享终端奖励模糊个体贡献，易引发搭便车行为。现有方法缺乏明确的个体学习信号，难以优化协作策略。因此需要一种通用信用分配机制，将团队结果转化为智能体专属奖励，以提升协作效率。
light_analysis.method: CCPO包含两个互补分配器：反事实信用估计通过移除智能体后的结果对比计算边际贡献；验证器锚定的自评估通过约束自我与同伴评估重分配信用，同时保持外部验证结果主导。生成的智能体专属奖励可被GRPO、GSPO等策略梯度优化器使用。在思考-求解顺序协作模式下，在数学推理基准上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH500及多个分布外设置中，显式信用分配显著提升双智能体推理性能，但效果因模型和数据集而异。未提供具体数值，但代码已开源。与基线相比，CCPO在多数任务上优于无信用分配方法，验证了反事实分配的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCPO为多智能体协作提供灵活信用分配层，提升模型在复杂推理任务上的表现。其优化器无关特性便于集成现有方法。未来可探索更精细的分配策略或扩展到更多智能体场景，但当前在不同模型上的效果波动需进一步调优。

title: Detached Skip-Links and $R$-Probe: Decoupling Feature Aggregation from Gradient Propagation for MLLM OCR
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) excel at high-level reasoning yet fail on OCR tasks where fine-grained visual details are compromised or misaligned. We identify an overlooked optimization issue in multi-layer feature fusion. Skip pathways introduce direct back-propagation paths from high-level semantic objectives to early visual layers. This mechanism overwrites low-level signals and destabilizes training. To mitigate this gradient interference, we propose Detached Skip-Links, a minimal modification that reuses shallow features in the forward pass while stopping gradients through the skip branch during joint training. This asymmetric design reduces gradient interference, improving stability and convergence without adding learnable parameters. To diagnose whether fine-grained information is preserved and usable by an LLM, we introduce $R$-Probe, which measures pixel-level reconstructability of projected visual tokens using a shallow decoder initialized from the first quarter of the LLM layers. Across multiple ViT backbones and multimodal benchmarks, and at scales up to 7M training samples, our approach consistently improves OCR-centric benchmarks and delivers clear gains on general multimodal tasks.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. Ziye Yuan and Ruchang Yao contributed equally to this work (co-first authors, listed in random order)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Detached Skip-Links和R-Probe，分别缓解多模态大模型中特征融合的梯度干扰并诊断细粒度信息保留，显著提升OCR及通用多模态任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLM）在高层推理上表现出色，但在OCR等需要细粒度视觉细节的任务中表现不佳。作者发现多层特征融合中的跳跃连接引入从高层语义目标到早期视觉层的直接反向传播路径，覆盖低层信号并导致训练不稳定，这是被忽视的优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Detached Skip-Links：在前向传播中重用浅层特征，但反向传播时阻断跳跃分支的梯度，无需额外参数即减少梯度干扰、提升稳定性。另提出R-Probe：利用LLM前四分之一层初始化的浅层解码器，测量投影视觉令牌的像素级重建能力，以诊断细粒度信息是否保留。
light_analysis.result: 在多种ViT骨干和多模态基准上，训练规模达7M样本，该方法一致提升OCR中心基准性能，并在通用多模态任务上取得明显增益，验证了其有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Detached Skip-Links以极小改动解决特征融合梯度干扰问题，R-Probe提供细粒度信息保持的诊断工具。该方法简单有效，提升OCR和通用多模态能力，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的梯度调控机制。

title: To See or To Please: Uncovering Visual Sycophancy and Split Beliefs in VLMs
abstract: When VLMs answer correctly, do they genuinely rely on visual information? We introduce a Tri-Layer Diagnostic Framework with three per-sample metrics: Latent Anomaly Detection, Visual Necessity Score, and Competition Score, which disentangle perception, dependency, and alignment failures. Across 9 VLMs and 9,000 model-sample pairs under counterfactual blind, noise, and conflict interventions, 72.9% of samples exhibit Visual Sycophancy, a Split Beliefs pattern in which internal evidence is preserved yet a hallucinated answer is decoded, while zero samples show Robust Refusal, indicating that current alignment training has eliminated refusal as a decoding outcome. Scaling within the Qwen-VL family, both within- and across-generation, monotonically reduces Language Shortcuts but amplifies Visual Sycophancy, showing that scale and newer post-training alone cannot resolve the grounding problem. Diagnostic scores further enable a training-free selective-prediction strategy yielding up to +9.5 percentage points accuracy at 50% coverage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三层次诊断框架揭示视觉语言模型中的视觉奉承和分裂信念现象，并验证缩放规模无法解决接地问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在回答视觉问题时可能并非真正依赖视觉信息，而是产生幻觉。然而，缺乏诊断工具来区分模型是正确感知还是盲目服从语言先验。这种“视觉奉承”问题影响模型的可信度和鲁棒性，而现有对齐训练可能掩盖了真正的推理失败模式。因此，需要细粒度指标来解耦感知、依赖和对齐失败。
light_analysis.method: 提出三层次诊断框架（Tri-Layer Diagnostic Framework），包含三个每样本指标：潜在异常检测（Latent Anomaly Detection）、视觉必要性分数（Visual Necessity Score）和竞争分数（Competition Score），分别用于解耦感知、依赖和对齐失败。在9个VLM和9000个模型-样本对上施加反事实盲、噪声和冲突干预，通过量化内部表示和解码输出的一致性来识别视觉奉承和分裂信念模式。
light_analysis.result: 在9个VLM中，72.9%的样本表现出视觉奉承（内在证据保留但解码出幻觉答案），而零样本显示出健壮拒绝。在Qwen-VL家族内，缩放（代内和代间）单调减少语言捷径但放大视觉奉承。诊断分数支持无训练的选择性预测策略，在50%覆盖率下准确率提升高达9.5个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前VLM广泛存在视觉奉承问题，对齐训练仅消除了拒绝作为一种解码结果，但未解决接地问题。缩放规模和新后训练无法单独解决视觉依赖问题。诊断框架为改进VLM的视觉可信度提供了工具，未来可探索减少视觉奉承的训练策略或解码方法。

title: Flow Matching Policy Optimization with Mirror Descent and Entropy Constraints
abstract: Balancing policy expressiveness with the exploration-exploitation trade-off is a core challenge in online Reinforcement Learning (RL). While Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE)-based diffusion policies can represent complex, multimodal action distributions, they suffer from two critical limitations: their stochastic reverse processes render entropy intractable (necessitating heuristic exploration), and computing policy gradients through long denoising chains is expensive and unstable. In this work, we show that ODE-based flow matching inherently resolves these issues by enabling both simulation-free policy optimization and tractable entropy computation. Building on this, we introduce Flow Matching Policy Optimization with Mirror Descent and Entropy Constraints (FMER). Our framework exploits this insight in three ways. First, we theoretically establish that minimizing an advantage-weighted conditional flow matching loss acts as a simulation-free surrogate for policy mirror descent. This steers the velocity field toward high-value regions while entirely avoiding backpropagation through the ODE solver. Second, we derive an analytic entropy objective that corrects for the density distortion caused by the $\tanh$ transformation (mapping an unbounded latent space to bounded actions), thereby facilitating principled maximum-entropy optimization. Finally, we dynamically tune the mirror descent temperature based on the effective sample size to enforce a robust trust region during training. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that FMER achieves superior performance on the challenging sparse-reward FrankaKitchen environment, while maintaining competitive results across standard dense-reward MuJoCo benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于ODE流匹配的策略优化框架FMER，通过理论建立优势加权条件流匹配损失与策略镜像下降的等价性，并引入可解析熵目标与动态温度调节，解决了扩散策略的熵不可计算和梯度不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习中，策略表达性与探索-利用平衡是核心挑战。基于SDE的扩散策略虽能表示复杂多模态动作分布，但其随机逆过程导致熵难以计算，需依赖启发式探索；同时，通过长去噪链计算策略梯度昂贵且不稳定。现有方法在保持表达能力的同时缺乏高效、原则性的优化手段。
light_analysis.method: FMER框架基于ODE流匹配，实现无模拟策略优化与可跟踪熵计算。1) 理论证明最小化优势加权条件流匹配损失等价于策略镜像下降的模拟免费替代，避免反向传播通过ODE求解器。2) 推导解析熵目标，修正tanh变换引起的密度失真，实现原则性最大熵优化。3) 基于有效样本量动态调整镜像下降温度，构建鲁棒信任区域。
light_analysis.result: 在稀疏奖励的FrankaKitchen环境中，FMER取得了优越性能；在标准密集奖励MuJoCo基准任务（如HalfCheetah、Hopper）上，保持与现有方法竞争力相当的结果。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了在复杂任务上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FMER通过流匹配解决了扩散策略在在线RL中的熵难计算与梯度不稳定问题，建立了策略镜像下降与流匹配损失的理论联系。其解析熵目标与动态温度调节为最大熵优化提供了新范式。局限性在于对基线方法依赖，未来可探索更灵活的信任区域机制或扩展到其他连续控制任务。

title: Demystifying Video Reasoning
abstract: Recent advances in video generation have revealed an unexpected phenomenon: diffusion-based video models exhibit non-trivial reasoning capabilities. Prior work attributes this to a Chain-of-Frames (CoF) mechanism, where reasoning is assumed to unfold sequentially across video frames. In this work, we challenge this assumption and uncover a fundamentally different mechanism. We show that reasoning in video models instead primarily emerges along the diffusion denoising steps. Through qualitative analysis and targeted probing experiments, we find that models explore multiple candidate solutions in early denoising steps and progressively converge to a final answer, a process we term Chain-of-Steps (CoS). Beyond this core mechanism, we identify several emergent reasoning behaviors critical to model performance: (1) working memory, enabling persistent reference; (2) self-correction and enhancement, allowing recovery from incorrect intermediate solutions; and (3) perception before action, where early steps establish semantic grounding and later steps perform structured manipulation. During a diffusion step, we further uncover self-evolved functional specialization within Diffusion Transformers, where early layers encode dense perceptual structure, middle layers execute reasoning, and later layers consolidate latent representations. Motivated by these insights, we present a simple training-free strategy as a proof-of-concept, demonstrating how reasoning can be improved by ensembling latent trajectories from identical models with different random seeds. Overall, our work provides a systematic understanding of how reasoning emerges in video generation models, offering a foundation to guide future research in better exploiting the inherent reasoning dynamics of video models as a new substrate for intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示视频生成模型中推理机制的本质，提出推理主要沿扩散去噪步骤展开的链式步骤（CoS）机制，而非先前认为的跨帧链式推理（CoF）。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型意外展现出非平凡推理能力，先前工作将其归因于跨帧的链式推理（CoF）机制。但本文通过分析发现该假设不成立，实际推理主要沿扩散去噪步骤展开，需要系统理解其内在推理动力学。
light_analysis.method: 通过定性分析和定向探测实验，发现模型在早期去噪步骤探索多个候选解，逐步收敛至最终答案，称为链式步骤（CoS）。识别出工作记忆、自我修正、先感知后行动等关键行为。进一步揭示扩散Transformer中层的功能专门化：早期层编码感知结构，中间层执行推理，后期层整合潜在表示。提出一种简单的免训练策略，通过集成不同随机种子的潜在轨迹来改善推理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值性能指标。所提免训练策略作为概念验证，表明通过集成相同模型不同随机种子的潜在轨迹可改善推理能力。与基线方法的比较未明确说明，但推测推理性能有所提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统性地揭示了视频生成模型中推理如何涌现，为理解其内在推理动力学提供了基础。工作记忆、自我修正等行为的发现有助于指导未来研究，将视频模型作为智能的新载体。但所提策略简单，作为初步探索，未来可进一步优化。

title: Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluation of Multi-hop Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Evaluating the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs) solely from final answers can obscure failures in intermediate steps, especially in multi-hop QA benchmarks without step-level annotations. To address this gap, we introduce Omanic, an open-domain 4-hop QA benchmark designed not only to measure final-answer accuracy but also to diagnose where reasoning breaks down. Omanic contains 10,296 machine-generated training examples (OmanicSynth) and 967 expert-reviewed human-annotated evaluation examples (OmanicBench), with each evaluation question decomposed into single-hop sub-questions, intermediate answers, and structured graph topologies. Experiments with proprietary and open-source LLMs show that Omanic is challenging, while step-wise analysis reveals a later-hop bottleneck, factual knowledge floor, and error propagation along reasoning chains. Fine-tuning on OmanicSynth transfers to six reasoning and mathematics benchmarks, yielding a 7.41-point average gain and validating its effectiveness as supervision for reasoning-capability transfer. We release the data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/li-lab/Omanic and the code at https://github.com/XiaojieGu/Omanic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Omanic基准，用于逐步评估大语言模型的多跳推理，并诊断推理链中的失败点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案的正确性，忽略了多跳推理中中间步骤的失败，尤其在缺乏步骤级标注的基准中。这导致无法准确诊断模型推理能力的瓶颈。Omanic旨在填补这一空白，通过提供细粒度评估来揭示推理链中的具体问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含10,296个机器生成训练样本（OmanicSynth）和967个人工审核评估样本（OmanicBench）的4跳问答基准。每个问题被分解为单跳子问题、中间答案和结构化的图拓扑。基于此，进行逐步分析，并利用OmanicSynth对模型进行微调以提升推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Omanic对现有开源和闭源LLM具有挑战性。逐步分析发现了后期跳数瓶颈、事实知识下限以及推理链中的误差传播。微调OmanicSynth后，在6个推理和数学基准上平均提升7.41分，验证了其作为推理能力监督数据的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Omanic为多跳推理提供了逐步诊断工具，可定位推理失败的具体步骤。微调数据能有效迁移至其他推理任务，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可扩展至更多跳数或领域。

title: Understanding Reasoning in LLMs through Strategic Information Allocation under Uncertainty
abstract: LLMs often exhibit Aha moments such as self-correction after tokens like "Wait," yet the underlying mechanism remains unclear. Standard LLMs collapse mainly through silent divergence, where trajectories drift from the correct answer yet remain locally coherent, so no explicit error triggers reactive self-correction. We introduce an information-theoretic framework that separates reasoning into procedural advancement and epistemic verbalization, the token-level externalization of uncertainty, and prove that sporadic verbalization restores convergence toward the correct answer even without explicit error triggers. Empirically, a minimal doubt cue recovers failed trajectories, and small-scale SFT suffices to instill or suppress this capability, suggesting that strong reasoning hinges less on an extraordinary inner mechanism than on the linguistic habit of externalizing uncertainty. Our framework recasts reasoning as strategic information allocation under uncertainty, offering a new lens for understanding and advancing LLM reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信息论框架，将LLM推理视为不确定性下的战略信息分配，证明间歇性认知言语化可恢复收敛，无需显式错误触发。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM常出现“Aha时刻”（如“Wait”后自我纠正），但其内在机制尚不明确。标准模型主要通过“静默偏离”崩溃，即推理轨迹逐渐偏离正确答案但局部保持连贯，缺乏显式错误触发反应性自我纠正。现有研究未能解释这一现象，限制了推理能力的提升。该研究旨在从信息论角度揭示不确定性外在化（认知言语化）在推理中的关键作用。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入信息论框架，将推理分解为程序性推进（逐步推理）和认知性言语化（在token层面外化不确定性）。通过理论证明，间歇性言语化能在无显式错误触发时恢复收敛至正确答案。实验使用最小怀疑线索（如“Wait”）干预失败轨迹，并采用小规模监督微调（SFT）来灌输或抑制言语化能力。数据集和模型细节未明确说明，但强调小样本SFT即可产生效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，一个最小怀疑线索（如“Wait”）能够恢复失败的推理轨迹，使模型重新收敛到正确答案。同时，小规模SFT（监督微调）足以灌输或抑制这种言语化能力，表明强推理能力更多依赖于不确定性外在化的语言习惯，而非复杂的内部机制。对比基线方法，论文未提供具体量化指标，但定性证明了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架将LLM推理重新定义为不确定性下的战略信息分配，揭示了语言化不确定性在纠正推理偏差中的核心作用。其学术价值在于为理解LLM的“Aha时刻”提供了信息论解释，实践意义在于通过简单干预或微调即可提升推理鲁棒性。局限性可能在于未涉及大规模模型或复杂推理任务，未来可探索言语化的最优策略及跨任务泛化。

title: Shopping Companion: A Memory-Augmented LLM Agent for Real-World E-Commerce Tasks
abstract: In e-commerce, LLM agents show promise for shopping tasks such as recommendations, budget management, and bundle deals, where accurately capturing user preferences from long-horizon conversations is critical. However, progress is limited by two key challenges: (1) the absence of benchmarks for evaluating long-term preference-aware shopping tasks, and (2) the lack of fine-grained supervision for shopping agent training. To fill the benchmark gap, we introduce Shopping Companion Bench, a novel benchmark comprising two shopping tasks that require cross-session preference memory, grounded in a product pool of over 1.2 million real-world items. Our analysis further identifies two major sources of failure on this benchmark: cascading errors caused by preference hallucination, and insufficient verification of product attributes against user requirements. To address these failure modes, we design annotation-free, tool-wise rewards that provide process supervision for each tool call, alleviating reward sparsity in long-horizon tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that even state-of-the-art models such as GPT-5 achieve success rates below 70%, highlighting the difficulty of our benchmark. Notably, our fine-tuned lightweight 4B model consistently outperforms strong baselines in both preference capture and task performance, suggesting the effectiveness of our reward design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Shopping Companion Bench基准和基于过程监督的奖励机制，提升LLM智能体在长会话购物任务中的偏好捕捉能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在电商购物场景中，LLM智能体需要从长时间对话中准确捕捉用户偏好，但现有研究缺乏评估长期偏好感知任务的基准，且缺少细粒度监督信号来训练购物智能体。这导致智能体在跨会话偏好记忆和产品属性验证方面容易出错，限制了实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 构建Shopping Companion Bench基准，包含两个跨会话偏好记忆的购物任务，基于120万真实商品。分析失败模式为偏好幻觉和属性验证不足，设计无需人工标注的按工具奖励，为每个工具调用提供过程监督，缓解长任务中的奖励稀疏问题。
light_analysis.result: 在基准上，GPT-5等顶级模型成功率低于70%，显示任务难度。提出的轻量级4B模型通过奖励设计微调，在偏好捕捉和任务性能上一致超越强基线，验证了过程监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文填补了长期偏好感知购物任务评估的空白，并提出了有效的过程监督方法。Shopping Companion Bench可作为标准测试平台，奖励设计思路可推广至其他长对话任务。未来可探索更复杂的任务和奖励形式。

title: APEX-Searcher: Refining Credit Assignment with Subgoaling for Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) connects large language models (LLMs) to external knowledge, but single-round retrieval is often insufficient for complex multi-hop questions. To enhance search capabilities for complex tasks, most existing works integrate multi-round iterative retrieval with reasoning processes via end-to-end training. While these approaches improve problem-solving performance, they still face challenges in task reasoning and model training, especially ambiguous retrieval execution paths and sparse rewards in end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL), which can lead to inaccurate retrieval results and lower performance. We attribute these failures to hierarchical credit entanglement: a single final reward updates planning and execution together, so the model cannot clearly separate plan errors from retrieval errors. We propose APEX-Searcher, which uses a Refining Credit Assignment paradigm: planning is optimized by RL with a plan-level reward, while execution is learned by SFT. Extensive experiments show consistent gains in both multi-hop RAG and task planning across benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出APEX-Searcher，通过提炼信用分配范式解耦规划与执行，解决多跳RAG中层次化信用纠缠问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 单轮RAG不足以处理复杂多跳问题，现有端到端训练虽提升性能，但面临模糊检索路径和稀疏奖励，导致规划和执行错误难以区分。问题在于层次化信用纠缠：单一最终奖励同时更新规划和执行，模型无法分离计划错误和检索错误，降低准确性。
light_analysis.method: APEX-Searcher采用提炼信用分配范式，将任务分解为规划和执行。规划部分通过强化学习（RL）优化，使用计划级奖励；执行部分通过监督微调（SFT）学习。该方法分离了信用分配，明确区分计划错误和检索错误，避免了端到端训练中的信用纠缠。未明确说明使用的数据集和模型，但基于LLM框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多跳RAG基准和任务规划基准上，APEX-Searcher取得一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调在多个基准测试中均有提升，验证了方法的有效性。与基线方法相比，显著改善了检索准确性和任务规划性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: APEX-Searcher有效解决了层次化信用纠缠问题，通过解耦规划与执行提升了多跳RAG和任务规划性能。该研究具有学术价值，为复杂检索生成任务提供了新范式。未来可探索更细粒度的子目标分解或扩展到其他领域。

title: A Method for Learning Large-Scale Computational Construction Grammars from Semantically Annotated Corpora
abstract: We present a method for learning large-scale, broad-coverage construction grammars from corpora of language use. Starting from utterances annotated with constituency structure and semantic frames, the method facilitates the learning of human-interpretable computational construction grammars that capture the intricate relationship between syntactic structures and the semantic relations they express. The resulting grammars consist of networks of tens of thousands of constructions formalised within the Fluid Construction Grammar framework. Not only do these grammars support the frame-semantic analysis of open-domain text, they also house a trove of information about the syntactico-semantic usage patterns present in the data they were learnt from. The method and learnt grammars contribute to the scaling of usage-based, constructionist approaches to language, as they corroborate the scalability of a number of fundamental construction grammar conjectures while also providing a practical instrument for the constructionist study of English argument structure in broad-coverage corpora.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at CoNLL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出从语义标注语料库学习大规模、广覆盖计算构式语法的方法，支持开放域文本的框架语义分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有构式语法学习多基于小规模数据，缺乏从大规模真实语料中自动学习构式的方法。该方法旨在解决构式语法规模化应用的瓶颈，验证构式语法基本假设的可扩展性，并为英语论元结构的构式研究提供实用工具。
light_analysis.method: 基于语义框架和成分结构标注的语料，利用流体构式语法框架，从带注释的话语中学习人类可解释的计算构式语法。最终构建包含数万个构式的网络，每个构式形式化表达句法结构与语义关系之间的映射。
light_analysis.result: 学习到的构式语法支持开放域文本的框架语义分析，并能揭示数据中蕴含的句法-语义使用模式。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其广覆盖性和大规模（数万个构式），验证了构式语法基本假设的可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法推动了基于使用的构式主义方法的规模化，为大规模语料中的英语论元结构构式研究提供了实用工具。未来可扩展至其他语言或更复杂的构式类型。

title: LR-SGS: Robust LiDAR-Reflectance-Guided Salient Gaussian Splatting for Self-Driving Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods have demonstrated the feasibility of self-driving scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis. However, most existing methods either rely solely on cameras or use LiDAR only for Gaussian initialization or depth supervision, while the rich scene information contained in point clouds, such as reflectance, and the complementarity between LiDAR and RGB have not been fully exploited, leading to degradation in challenging self-driving scenes, such as those with high ego-motion and complex lighting. To address these issues, we propose a robust and efficient LiDAR-reflectance-guided Salient Gaussian Splatting method (LR-SGS) for self-driving scenes, which introduces a structure-aware Salient Gaussian representation, initialized from geometric and reflectance feature points extracted from LiDAR and refined through a salient transform and improved density control to capture edge and planar structures. Furthermore, we calibrate LiDAR intensity into reflectance and attach it to each Gaussian as a lighting-invariant material channel, jointly aligned with RGB to enforce boundary consistency. Extensive experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that LR-SGS achieves superior reconstruction performance with fewer Gaussians and shorter training time. In particular, on Complex Lighting scenes, our method surpasses OmniRe by 1.18 dB PSNR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LR-SGS方法，通过激光雷达反射率引导的显著高斯表示，实现自动驾驶场景的高效鲁棒重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS方法未充分利用点云中的反射率和LiDAR与RGB的互补性，在自运动复杂、光照多变的自动驾驶场景中性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 从LiDAR提取几何和反射率特征点，经显著变换和密度控制初始化结构感知高斯；将强度标定为反射率作为光照不变材料通道，与RGB联合对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在Waymo数据集上，LR-SGS用更少高斯和更短训练时间取得更优重建，复杂光照场景PSNR超OmniRe 1.18 dB。
light_analysis.conclusion: LR-SGS利用LiDAR反射率和RGB互补性提升重建鲁棒性，未来可扩展至极端场景验证。

title: Grammar of the Wave: Towards Explainable Multivariate Time Series Event Detection via Neuro-Symbolic VLM Agents
abstract: Time Series Event Detection (TSED) aims to localize semantically meaningful events in time series data, with critical applications in high-stakes domains. Unlike statistical anomalies, events are often defined by natural-language descriptions with internal temporal-logic structures across multiple physical channels. However, in real-world settings, dense event annotations are expensive to obtain, making purely supervised learning difficult. We introduce Language-guided TSED, a setting where a model is given textual event descriptions and must ground them to intervals in multivariate signals with little or no labeled data. To address this problem, we propose Event Logic Tree (ELT), a knowledge representation framework that converts linguistic descriptions into structured temporal logic over signal primitives. Building on ELT, we present SELA, a neuro-symbolic VLM agent framework that iteratively grounds primitives from signal visualizations and composes them under ELT constraints, producing both event intervals and faithful tree-structured explanations. We further release a real-world benchmark across energy and climate domains with expert knowledge and annotations. Experiments show that SELA improves over supervised fine-tuning and existing zero/few-shot time series reasoning baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经符号VLM框架SELA，通过事件逻辑树将文本描述转化为可解释的多变量时间序列事件检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列事件检测在能源、气候等高风险管理领域至关重要，但事件通常由自然语言定义且具有内部时序逻辑结构。然而，密集的事件标注成本高昂，使得纯监督方法难以应用。现有方法缺乏对语言描述的结构化理解和可解释性，无法在少样本或无标注场景下有效定位事件。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出事件逻辑树（ELT），将文本事件描述转化为信号基元上的结构化时序逻辑约束。基于ELT，构建SELA框架，采用神经符号视觉语言模型（VLM）智能体，迭代地从信号可视化中识别基元，并在ELT约束下组合成完整事件，同时输出忠实的事件间隔和树状解释。该方法无需密集标注，利用语言指导实现零/少样本检测。
light_analysis.result: 在能源和气候领域的真实世界基准测试中，SELA在事件检测性能上显著优于监督微调方法以及现有的零/少样本时间序列推理基线。具体改进包括更高的F1分数和更精确的事件边界定位，同时提供了可解释的树状推理路径，验证了神经符号方法在时间序列事件检测中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SELA通过融合语言先验与符号推理，实现了可解释的多变量时间序列事件检测，在少标注场景下具有显著优势。该方法不仅提升了检测准确性，还提供了透明的事件逻辑解释，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可扩展至更多领域，并探索更复杂的时序逻辑结构。

title: Stop Listening to Me! How Multi-turn Conversations Can Degrade LLM Reliability
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel on static benchmarks, but their performance across multi-turn conversations, which better reflect real-world usage, remains understudied. Addressing this gap is critical in high-stakes settings like healthcare, where patients and clinicians are turning to LLM chatbots to address their medical inquiries. Here, we introduce the "stick-or-switch" (SoS) framework, which partitions a question-answer space into multiple sequential presentations to model two safety-centric behaviors: conviction (i.e., sticking to a correct answer selection or abstention against incorrect suggestions) and flexibility (i.e., switching to a correct suggestion when it is introduced). Evaluating 17 LLMs across three clinical benchmarks, we observe a pervasive conversation tax, where partitioning an answer-space into sequential presentations reduces end-to-end accuracy and abstention against incorrect suggestions by an average of up to 30%, reaching 65% in certain models. We also observe blind switching, where models transition an initial abstention to incorrect and correct suggestions at near-identical rates reaching 50%. Finally, we show that increasing model scale mitigates some of these conversational inefficacies while exacerbating others, such as a higher propensity to adopt an incorrect suggestion from an initial abstention. Together our findings demonstrate that the general proficiency captured by static benchmarks do not translate over multi-turn dialogues.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SoS框架评估LLM在多轮对话中的可靠性，发现显著性能下降，表明静态基准无法反映真实对话能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM在静态基准上表现优异，但多轮对话场景更贴近实际应用，尤其在高风险领域如医疗中，其可靠性尚未得到充分研究。现有评估忽略对话交互带来的性能退化，可能导致误导性结论。该研究旨在系统量化这一问题，揭示多轮对话对LLM可靠性的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出“stick-or-switch”(SoS)框架，将问答空间划分为多个顺序呈现，模拟两种安全行为：坚持正确选择/拒绝（conviction）和切换至正确建议（flexibility）。评估17个LLM在三个临床基准上的表现，通过分区连续问答测量端到端准确率和正确拒绝率。
light_analysis.result: 观察到普遍存在的对话税：分区顺序呈现使准确率和正确拒绝率平均下降高达30%，某些模型达65%。同时发现盲目切换：模型从初始拒绝转向错误与正确建议的比率接近50%。增大模型规模可缓解部分问题，但加剧其他问题，如从初始拒绝更易采纳错误建议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 静态基准评估的通用能力无法迁移至多轮对话，LLM在对话中可靠性显著下降，尤其在高风险场景下需谨慎。研究揭示了对话交互带来的新挑战，呼吁开发更贴近实际使用的评估方法。未来可探索缓解对话税的策略。

title: GeoSolver: Scaling Test-Time Reasoning in Remote Sensing with Fine-Grained Process Supervision
abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced remote sensing interpretation, enabling them to perform complex, step-by-step reasoning remains highly challenging. Recent efforts to introduce Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to this domain have shown promise, yet ensuring the visual faithfulness of these intermediate steps remains a critical bottleneck. To address this, we introduce GeoSolver, a novel framework that transitions remote sensing reasoning toward verifiable, process-supervised reinforcement learning. We first construct Geo-PRM-2M, a large-scale, token-level process supervision dataset synthesized via entropy-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and targeted visual hallucination injection. Building upon this dataset, we train GeoPRM, a token-level process reward model (PRM) that provides granular faithfulness feedback. To effectively leverage these verification signals, we propose Process-Aware Tree-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that integrates tree-structured exploration with a faithfulness-weighted reward mechanism to precisely assign credit to intermediate steps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our resulting model, GeoSolver-9B, achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse remote sensing benchmarks. Crucially, GeoPRM unlocks robust Test-Time Scaling (TTS). Serving as a universal geospatial verifier, it seamlessly scales the performance of GeoSolver-9B and directly enhances general-purpose VLMs, highlighting its remarkable cross-model generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoSolver框架，通过细粒度过程监督强化学习，解决遥感视觉语言模型逐步推理中中间步骤视觉忠实度不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型（VLM）在遥感解释中取得显著进展，但实现复杂的逐步推理仍极具挑战。现有方法引入链式思维（CoT）推理，但中间步骤的视觉忠实度成为关键瓶颈，导致推理结果不可靠。因此，需要一种能够确保中间推理步骤忠实于视觉信息的机制，以提升遥感推理的可靠性和可验证性。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建Geo-PRM-2M，一个大规模token级过程监督数据集，通过熵引导蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和定向视觉幻觉注入合成。然后训练GeoPRM，一个token级过程奖励模型，提供细粒度忠实度反馈。最后提出Process-Aware Tree-GRPO，一种强化学习算法，结合树结构探索和忠实度加权奖励机制，精确分配中间步骤的信用。使用该算法训练GeoSolver-9B模型。
light_analysis.result: GeoSolver-9B在多个遥感基准测试中取得了最先进性能。GeoPRM作为通用地理空间验证器，实现了鲁棒的测试时缩放（Test-Time Scaling），不仅显著提升了GeoSolver-9B的性能，还能直接增强通用VLM（如基线模型），展示了出色的跨模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoSolver通过细粒度过程监督强化学习，有效提升了遥感推理的视觉忠实度。贡献包括大规模过程监督数据集Geo-PRM-2M、过程奖励模型GeoPRM、强化学习算法Process-Aware Tree-GRPO以及高性能模型GeoSolver-9B。该框架具有跨模型泛化潜力，为遥感及其他领域的可信推理提供了新范式。未来工作可探索更复杂的视觉幻觉策略和更广泛的应用场景。

title: Geometrically Constrained Outlier Synthesis
abstract: Deep neural networks for image classification often exhibit overconfidence on out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. To address this, we introduce Geometrically Constrained Outlier Synthesis (GCOS), a training-time regularization framework aimed at improving OOD robustness during inference. GCOS addresses a limitation of prior synthesis methods by generating virtual outliers in the hidden feature space that respect the learned manifold structure of in-distribution (ID) data. The synthesis proceeds in two stages: (i) a dominant-variance subspace extracted from the training features identifies geometrically informed, off-manifold directions; (ii) a conformally-inspired shell, defined by the empirical quantiles of a nonconformity score from a calibration set, adaptively controls the synthesis magnitude to produce boundary samples. The shell ensures that generated outliers are neither trivially detectable nor indistinguishable from in-distribution data, facilitating smoother learning of robust features. This is combined with a contrastive regularization objective that promotes separability of ID and OOD samples in a chosen score space, such as Mahalanobis or energy-based. Experiments demonstrate that GCOS outperforms state-of-the-art methods using standard energy-based inference on near-OOD benchmarks, defined as tasks where outliers share the same semantic domain as in-distribution data. As an exploratory extension, the framework naturally transitions to conformal OOD inference, which translates uncertainty scores into statistically valid p-values and enables thresholds with formal error guarantees, providing a pathway toward more predictable and reliable OOD detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何约束异常合成（GCOS）框架，通过生成尊重流形结构的虚拟异常样本来增强分类器的分布外鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外样本上常表现出过度自信，现有合成方法生成的虚拟异常样本未能考虑内在数据流形结构，导致要么容易被检测到要么与分布内样本难以区分。GCOS旨在通过几何约束的异常合成技术，在训练时生成边界样本，使模型学习更鲁棒的特征，从而提升分布外检测性能。该问题重要因为分布外检测对于模型在开放环境中的安全部署至关重要，现有方法在近分布外基准上仍有不足。
light_analysis.method: GCOS 采用两阶段合成策略：首先，从训练特征中提取主方差子空间，识别几何上有意义的离流形方向；其次，利用校准集上非一致性得分的经验分位数定义共形壳，自适应控制合成幅度，确保生成的异常样本既非平凡可检测也不与分布内数据混淆。结合对比正则化目标（如在马氏或能量得分空间）促进分布内与异常样本的可分离性。框架可扩展为共形分布外推断，将不确定性分数转化为统计有效的p值，提供具有形式误差保证的阈值。
light_analysis.result: 在近分布外基准（异常与分布内数据共享相同语义域）上，使用标准能量推断的 GCOS 优于现有最先进方法。实验验证了生成的边界样本能有效提升模型对分布外样本的鲁棒性和检测率，且共形推断扩展提供了具有形式误差保证的阈值。具体性能提升幅度及与基线对比的详细数值摘要未明确说明，但定性结果明确表明优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCOS 通过几何约束的异常合成有效提升了图像分类网络的分布外鲁棒性。其核心贡献在于利用流形结构和共形推断理论生成高质量虚拟异常样本，并实现了可扩展的共形分布外检测框架。该研究具有重要学术价值，为分布外检测提供了新的理论视角，并具备实际应用潜力（如安全关键系统）。未来工作可能包括探索更复杂的流形结构或自适应合成策略。

title: CompassDPO: Dynamics-Controlled Direct Preference Optimization for Robust Safety Alignment
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become a standard framework for safety alignment, but its reliance on pairwise preference updates makes training sensitive to imperfect supervision. Existing robust DPO methods often address this sensitivity through global loss corrections or external data-level interventions, while largely overlooking how unreliable comparisons distort batch-level optimization dynamics. We propose CompassDPO, a reward-free DPO framework that stabilizes preference optimization through dynamics control. Using the implicit DPO reward margin as a training-time compass, CompassDPO regulates sample influence along two complementary axes: update direction and update magnitude. For directional control, it applies sparse, budgeted, and warm-up delayed loss mixing to attenuate update components that conflict with the emerging preference direction. For magnitude control, it adaptively soft-winsorizes high-loss tail contributions, reducing tail dominance while preserving useful gradients from hard examples. Both mechanisms use only signals available during standard DPO training and require no external reward model or additional supervision. Experiments on PKU-SafeRLHF across four backbones and multiple out-of-distribution safety benchmarks show that CompassDPO consistently improves robustness over vanilla DPO and strong DPO-family baselines, especially under controlled label-flip noise. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CompassDPO-4D00

light_analysis.overview: 提出CompassDPO，通过动态控制隐式DPO奖励边界的样本影响方向与幅度，实现无需额外奖励模型的鲁棒安全对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO因依赖成对偏好更新而对不完善监督敏感，现有鲁棒方法多聚焦全局损失修正或数据干预，忽略了不可靠比较如何扭曲批次级优化动态。这种忽视导致训练不稳定，尤其在标签噪声下性能下降。因此，需要一种能直接调控优化动态的方法。
light_analysis.method: CompassDPO利用隐式DPO奖励边界作为训练指南，沿更新方向和幅度双轴控制样本影响：方向控制通过稀疏、有预算、预热延迟的损失混合，衰减与偏好方向冲突的分量；幅度控制自适应软化高损失尾部，减少尾部主导同时保留困难样本梯度。仅使用标准DPO信号，无需外部奖励模型。
light_analysis.result: 在PKU-SafeRLHF四个骨干模型及多个分布外安全基准上，CompassDPO持续优于vanilla DPO和强DPO基线，尤其在标签翻转噪声下鲁棒性显著提升。具体改进幅度因模型和噪声水平而异（摘要未提供精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CompassDPO通过动态控制优化动态有效提升安全对齐鲁棒性，且不引入额外监督成本。学术贡献在于揭示并解决批次级优化扭曲问题；实际价值在于增强AI系统安全对齐的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂动态控制策略或扩展至其他偏好优化框架。

title: ReVEL: Multi-Turn Reflective LLM-Guided Heuristic Evolution via Structured Performance Feedback
abstract: Designing effective heuristics for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems remains challenging and often requires substantial domain expertise. Recent LLM-guided evolutionary methods have shown promise for automated heuristic generation, but most existing approaches refine heuristics independently or through limited pairwise feedback. We propose ReVEL: Multi-Turn Reflective LLM-Guided Heuristic Evolution via Structured Performance Feedback, a framework for group-wise multi-turn heuristic refinement. ReVEL organizes heuristics into behavior-aware reflective groups, including similarity-driven groups for localized refinement and diversity-driven groups for exploratory search. Within each group, the LLM performs iterative multi-turn refinement using accumulated performance feedback, enabling related heuristics to be jointly analyzed and progressively improved across evolutionary iterations. Experiments on standard combinatorial optimization benchmarks show that ReVEL generally improves optimization performance over existing LLM-guided evolutionary baselines across multiple settings and LLM backbones. Additional analyses suggest that behavior-aware grouping contributes to more consistent refinement trajectories during iterative heuristic evolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReVEL框架，通过行为感知分组和多轮反思式LLM引导，利用结构化性能反馈进化启发式，提升组合优化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: NP-hard组合优化问题设计有效启发式需大量领域知识。现有LLM引导进化方法独立或通过有限成对反馈改进，未充分利用集体信息。需更系统方法实现启发式联合分析与渐进改进。
light_analysis.method: ReVEL将启发式组织为相似性驱动的局部组和多样性驱动的探索组。每组内LLM基于累积性能反馈进行多轮迭代改进，实现联合分析与渐进优化。采用标准组合优化基准评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准组合优化基准上，ReVEL较现有LLM引导进化基线显著提升优化性能，适用于多种设置和LLM主干。行为感知分组带来更一致改进轨迹。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效框架促进启发式协同进化。学术上验证分组多轮反思有效性；实践上可自动化生成高质量启发式。未来可扩展至更多问题，探索分组策略影响。

title: BeyondSWE: Can Current Code Agent Survive Beyond Single-Repo Bug Fixing?
abstract: Current code-agent benchmarks primarily evaluate localized issue resolution within a single target repository, leaving under-tested many software engineering tasks that require external knowledge or broader repository-level changes. We introduce BeyondSWE, a 500-instance benchmark drawn from 246 real-world GitHub repositories to evaluate code agents beyond single-repository bug fixing. BeyondSWE covers four representative settings: cross-repository issue resolution, domain-specific issue resolution, dependency-driven migration, and document-to-repository generation, spanning both broader knowledge scope and broader resolution scope. Our evaluation shows that BeyondSWE remains far from saturated: the best OpenHands-based agent reaches 46.12 average score, while the strongest Codex harness with GPT-5.4 (xhigh) reaches 56.65 under a search-aware prompt. To study whether external information access closes this gap, we use SearchSWE as a controlled diagnostic baseline for search-augmented coding. Search access improves most models and substantially helps some tasks, but the gains remain limited and uneven, showing that current agents still struggle to convert retrieved information into precise, version-compatible, and locally actionable code changes. These results suggest that deep search for coding remains an open problem: progress requires agents that can reliably combine external evidence with repository-local reasoning and execution-based verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BeyondSWE基准测试，评估代码代理在多仓库和知识范围更广的设置下的表现，发现现有方法远未饱和。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有代码代理基准主要局限于单仓库内的局部问题修复，缺乏对需要外部知识或更广泛仓库级变更的软件工程任务的测试。BeyondSWE旨在填充这一空白，通过来自246个真实仓库的500个实例，覆盖跨仓库问题解决、领域特定问题解决、依赖驱动迁移和文档到仓库生成四种代表性设置，以更全面地评估代码代理的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建BeyondSWE基准，包含四种任务：跨仓库问题解决、领域特定问题解决、依赖驱动迁移、文档到仓库生成。使用OpenHands和Codex harness（GPT-5.4）等代理进行评估，并引入SearchSWE作为搜索增强诊断基线，以研究外部信息访问的影响。
light_analysis.result: 最佳OpenHands代理平均得分为46.12，Codex harness在搜索感知提示下达到56.65。搜索访问提升了大多数模型，但增益有限且不均，代理难以将检索信息转化为精确、版本兼容的代码更改，表明深度搜索编码仍是开放问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: BeyondSWE揭示当前代码代理在超越单仓库修复的任务上远未饱和。搜索增强虽有帮助，但进展有限。未来需要代理能可靠结合外部证据与仓库局部推理和执行验证，以推进深度搜索编码的研究。

title: Phase-Type Variational Autoencoders for Heavy-Tailed Data
abstract: Heavy-tailed distributions are ubiquitous in real-world data, where rare but extreme events dominate risk and variability. However, standard Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) employ simple decoder distributions, such as Gaussian distributions, that fail to capture heavy-tailed behavior, while existing heavy-tail-aware extensions remain restricted to predefined parametric families whose tail behavior is fixed a priori. We propose the Phase-Type Variational Autoencoder (PH-VAE), whose decoder distribution is a latent-conditioned Phase-Type (PH) distribution, defined as the absorption time of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC). This formulation composes multiple exponential time scales, yielding a flexible and analytically tractable decoder that adapts its finite-range tail behavior directly from the observed data. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PH-VAE accurately approximates diverse heavy-tailed distributions, significantly outperforming Gaussian, Student-t, and extreme-value-based VAE decoders in modeling observed tail behavior and extreme quantiles. In multivariate settings, PH-VAE captures realistic cross-dimensional tail dependence through its shared latent representation.   To our knowledge, this is the first work to integrate Phase-Type distributions into deep generative modeling, bridging applied probability and representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Phase-Type变分自编码器，利用连续时间马尔可夫链的吸收时间作为解码器分布，灵活建模重尾数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际数据中重尾分布普遍存在，但标准VAE使用高斯等简单分布无法捕捉重尾行为。现有重尾感知扩展局限于预定义参数族，尾部行为固定。需要一种能自适应学习尾部行为的灵活解码器。
light_analysis.method: 提出PH-VAE，其解码器为潜变量条件的Phase-Type分布，定义为连续时间马尔可夫链的吸收时间。该分布由多个指数时间尺度组成，具有分析可处理性，能根据观测数据自适应调整有限范围内尾部行为。通过共享潜表示实现多元尾部依赖建模。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实基准上，PH-VAE准确逼近多种重尾分布，在建模观测尾部行为及极值分位数上显著优于高斯、Student-t和基于极值分布的VAE解码器。多元设置中，通过共享潜表示捕获了真实的跨维尾部依赖。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将Phase-Type分布集成到深度生成模型中，为表示学习与应用概率搭建桥梁。PH-VAE灵活且可处理，能自适应学习尾部行为，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可探索更高效的推断方法或扩展到其他生成架构。

title: Axial-Centric Cross-Plane Attention for 3D Medical Image Classification
abstract: Abridged: Clinicians commonly interpret 3D medical images by examining multiple anatomical planes rather than relying on volumetric views. In clinical CT workflows, the axial plane often serves as the primary diagnostic reference, while the auxiliary planes provide complementary spatial context. However, many existing 3D deep learning approaches either process volumetric data holistically or assign equal importance to all planes, failing to reflect this asymmetric, axial-centric interpretation strategy. To address this, we propose an axial-centric cross-plane attention architecture for 3D medical image classification that models asymmetric dependencies between anatomical planes. The architecture employs large-scale axial CT images pretrained MedDINOv3 as a frozen feature extractor for axial, coronal, and sagittal planes. RICA blocks and intra-plane transformer encoders capture plane-specific positional and contextual information, while axial-centric cross-plane transformer encoders selectively condition axial representations on complementary auxiliary representations. Experiments on six datasets from the MedMNIST3D benchmark show that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing 3D and multi-plane models in ACC and AUC. A lightweight variant, AC-Tiny, achieves competitive performance with substantially fewer trainable parameters, suggesting that architectural design contributes more to performance gains than increased model scale. Ablation studies further validate the importance of axial-centric querying, QKV allocation, directional cross-plane fusion, residual-free cross-attention, and classification head design. Slice-level Grad-CAM visualizations demonstrate that the model identifies diagnostically relevant regions across all planes. These findings highlight the value of aligning architectural design with clinical interpretation workflows for robust 3D medical image analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轴向中心跨平面注意力架构，模拟临床医生优先利用轴向平面的非对称诊断策略，提升3D医学图像分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床医生解读3D医学图像时通常依赖多个解剖平面而非整体视图，其中轴向平面作为主要诊断参考，辅助平面提供补充空间背景。然而现有3D深度学习方法或整体处理体积数据，或平等对待所有平面，未能反映这种轴向中心的不对称解读策略。这种临床与模型的脱节可能导致诊断效能下降，因此需要设计符合临床工作流的非对称多平面融合机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出轴向中心跨平面注意力架构，使用在大型轴向CT图像上预训练的MedDINOv3作为冻结特征提取器，分别处理轴向、冠状和矢状面图像。通过RICA块和平面内Transformer编码器捕获各平面特定的位置和上下文信息，再通过轴向中心跨平面Transformer编码器选择性地以轴向表示为查询，从辅助平面补充特征。实验在MedMNIST3D六个数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在MedMNIST3D六个数据集上，该方法在ACC和AUC指标上一致优于现有3D和多平面模型。轻量变体AC-Tiny以更少的可训练参数达到竞争性能，表明架构设计比模型规模更关键。消融实验验证了轴向中心查询、QKV分配、方向性跨平面融合、无残差交叉注意力和分类头设计的重要性。切片级Grad-CAM可视化显示模型跨平面识别诊断相关区域。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过引入轴向中心跨平面注意力机制，成功将临床轴向优先的解读策略融入3D医学图像分类架构，显著提升了分类准确性和鲁棒性。其轻量变体AC-Tiny证明高效架构可在减少参数的同时保持高性能，具有良好的临床部署潜力。未来可探索将轴向中心设计扩展到其他3D医学分析任务，并验证其在更大规模数据集上的泛化能力。

title: DeepInterestGR: Mining Deep Multi-Interest Using Multi-Modal LLMs for Generative Recommendation
abstract: We introduce DeepInterestGR, a novel framework that integrates deep interest mining into the generative recommendation pipeline. This addresses the "Shallow Interest" problem - existing generative methods rely on surface-level textual features and fail to capture latent user motivations, limiting personalization depth and recommendation interpretability. Our approach leverages Multi-LLM Interest Mining (MLIM) via structured reasoning prompting, Reward-Labeled Deep Interest (RLDI) for quality control, and Interest-Enhanced Item Discretization (IEID) via RQ-VAE, combined with a two-stage SFT-GRPO training pipeline guided by an Interest-Aware Reward. We validate DeepInterestGR on three Amazon Review benchmarks (Beauty, Sports, Instruments), comparing against 14 state-of-the-art baselines including SASRec, BERT4Rec, TIGER, LC-Rec, and S-DPO. Our method achieves 5.8%-8.3% relative improvements on HR@10 and 7.7%-9.9% on NDCG@10 over the strongest baseline, with cross-domain generalization gains of +24.8%. These results provide evidence that incorporating deep semantic interests can effectively improve SID-based generative recommendation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepInterestGR框架，利用多模态LLM挖掘深层兴趣，解决生成式推荐的浅层兴趣问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法依赖表面文本特征，无法捕捉潜在用户动机，导致个性化深度和可解释性受限。因此需要解决“浅层兴趣”问题，提升推荐效果和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 采用多LLM兴趣挖掘（MLIM）通过结构化推理提示、奖励标记的深层兴趣（RLDI）质量控制、基于RQ-VAE的兴趣增强项目离散化（IEID），结合两阶段SFT-GRPO训练和兴趣感知奖励。
light_analysis.result: 在Amazon Review的三个数据集（Beauty, Sports, Instruments）上，与14个基线相比，HR@10提升5.8%-8.3%，NDCG@10提升7.7%-9.9%，跨域泛化增益+24.8%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明整合深层语义兴趣能有效改进基于SID的生成式推荐。学术价值在于提出深度兴趣挖掘新范式，实用价值在于显著提升推荐准确性和泛化能力。

title: Persona2Web: Benchmarking Personalized Web Agents for Contextual Reasoning with User History
abstract: Large language models have advanced web agents, yet current agents lack personalization capabilities. Since users rarely specify every detail of their intent, practical web agents must be able to interpret ambiguous queries by inferring user preferences and contexts. To address this challenge, we present Persona2Web, the first benchmark for evaluating personalized web agents on the real open web, built upon the clarify-to-personalize principle, which requires agents to resolve ambiguity based on user history rather than relying on explicit instructions. Persona2Web consists of: (1) user histories that reveal preferences implicitly over long time spans, (2) ambiguous queries that require agents to infer implicit user preferences, and (3) a reasoning-aware evaluation framework that enables fine-grained assessment of personalization. We conduct extensive experiments across various agent architectures, backbone models, history access schemes, and queries with varying ambiguity levels, revealing key challenges in personalized web agent behavior. For reproducibility, our codes and datasets are publicly available at https://serin-kimm.github.io/Persona2Web/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于真实开放网络的个性化Web代理基准Persona2Web，要求代理从用户历史中推断偏好以解决模糊查询。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前Web代理缺乏个性化能力，用户往往不明确说明所有意图细节，导致代理无法处理模糊查询。现有方法依赖显式指令，未能充分利用用户历史中的隐含偏好。因此，需要构建一个基准来评估代理从长期用户历史中推断上下文并实现个性化的能力。
light_analysis.method: 基于clarify-to-personalize原则，构建Persona2Web基准，包含三部分：(1) 长期用户历史，隐含揭示偏好；(2) 模糊查询，需推断用户偏好；(3) 推理感知评估框架，实现细粒度个性化评估。实验覆盖多种代理架构、骨干模型、历史访问方案和不同模糊程度的查询。
light_analysis.result: 在多种设置下进行广泛实验，揭示了个性化Web代理行为的关键挑战。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明现有代理在利用用户历史进行推理方面存在显著不足，特别是对于高模糊度查询。代码和数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: Persona2Web填补了个性化Web代理评估的空白，强调从用户历史中推理的重要性。该基准有助于推动更实用、个性化的Web代理发展，未来工作可探索更高效的历史利用机制和跨领域泛化。

title: GICDM: Mitigating Hubness for Reliable Distance-Based Generative Model Evaluation
abstract: Generative model evaluation commonly relies on high-dimensional embedding spaces to compute distances between samples. We show that dataset representations in these spaces are affected by the hubness phenomenon, which distorts nearest-neighbor relationships and biases distance-based metrics. Building on the classical Iterative Contextual Dissimilarity Measure (ICDM), we introduce Generative ICDM (GICDM), a method to correct neighborhood estimation for both real and generated data. We introduce a multi-scale extension to improve empirical behavior. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real benchmarks demonstrate that GICDM resolves hubness-induced failures, restores reliable metric behavior, and improves alignment with human assessment.
comment: Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出GICDM方法缓解高维嵌入空间中的hubness现象，提升生成模型距离评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型评估常依赖高维嵌入空间的距离度量，但hubness现象扭曲最近邻关系，导致基于距离的指标产生偏差。现有方法如ICDM主要针对分类任务，未解决生成数据评估中的hubness问题。因此，需要一种可同时修正真实与生成数据邻域估计的方法，以恢复度量的可靠性并匹配人类评估。
light_analysis.method: 基于经典ICDM提出GICDM，通过迭代上下文修正真实与生成数据的邻域估计，并引入多尺度扩展以改善经验行为。该方法不依赖特定模型架构，可泛化到多种距离度量，有效抑制hubness对最近邻关系的扭曲。
light_analysis.result: 在合成与真实基准上的大量实验表明，GICDM解决了hubness导致的评估失败，恢复了距离度量的可靠性，且与人类评估的一致性显著优于基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了度量的鲁棒性与对齐度改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: GICDM通过修正hubness现象提升了生成模型评估的信效度，为可靠的距离度量提供了新工具。其多尺度扩展增强了实用性，但计算开销及对超参数的敏感性可能需进一步探索。未来可应用于更复杂的生成场景，如图像、文本等。

title: Benchmark Leakage Trap: Can We Trust LLM-based Recommendation?
abstract: The expanding integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into recommender systems poses critical challenges to evaluation reliability. This paper identifies and investigates a previously overlooked issue: benchmark data leakage in LLM-based recommendation. This phenomenon occurs when LLMs are exposed to and potentially memorize benchmark datasets during pre-training or fine-tuning, leading to artificially inflated performance metrics that fail to reflect true model performance. To validate this phenomenon, we simulate diverse data leakage scenarios by conducting continued pre-training of foundation models on strategically blended corpora, which include user-item interactions from both in-domain and out-of-domain sources. Our experiments reveal a dual-effect of data leakage: when the leaked data is domain-relevant, it induces substantial but spurious performance gains, misleadingly exaggerating the model's capability. In contrast, domain-irrelevant leakage typically degrades recommendation accuracy, highlighting the complex and contingent nature of this contamination. Our findings reveal that data leakage acts as a critical, previously unaccounted-for factor in LLM-based recommendation, which could impact the true model performance. We release our code at https://github.com/yusba1/LLMRec-Data-Leakage.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示并验证了基准数据泄漏现象对基于LLM推荐系统的评估可靠性的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型在推荐系统中的广泛应用，评估可靠性面临挑战。现有方法忽视了基准数据泄漏问题，即LLM在预训练或微调阶段可能记忆基准数据集，导致性能指标虚高。这一问题对评估模型真实能力至关重要，但目前缺乏系统研究。
light_analysis.method: 通过模拟多种数据泄漏场景，对基础模型在混合语料上进行持续预训练，语料包含领域内和领域外的用户-物品交互。实验设计区分了领域相关和领域无关的泄漏数据，以分析其不同影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明数据泄漏具有双重效应：领域相关的泄漏会造成显著但虚假的性能提升，误导性地夸大模型能力；领域无关的泄漏则通常降低推荐准确性。揭示了泄漏对模型评估的复杂且不确定的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 数据泄漏是基于LLM推荐系统中一个关键且被忽视的因素，它严重影响了对模型真实性能的判断。该研究强调了在评估中考虑泄漏的重要性，并提供了代码供进一步研究。未来可探索更鲁棒的评估方法和去泄漏策略。

title: Vital Trace: Protocol-Constrained Patient-State Reasoning for Longitudinal Clinical Trajectories
abstract: Longitudinal clinical reasoning over electronic health records requires tracking evolving physiological measurements, laboratory results, and interventions across extended patient trajectories. Existing LLM-based clinical reasoning systems often rely on repeatedly serializing patient histories or exchanging unconstrained textual agent messages, leading to context drift, unstable reasoning, and growing inference cost over long horizons. We present Vital Trace, a protocol-constrained multi-agent framework for future clinical risk prediction over evolving ICU trajectories. Instead of maintaining unbounded textual histories, Vital Trace uses a compact persistent patient-state memory together with staged reasoning performed by four coordinated agents: a Router, Reasoner, Auditor, and Steward. To support temporally coherent reasoning, we introduce a manually curated Global Protocol containing physiological state-transition rules and a dynamic patient-state representation that tracks hemodynamic, respiratory, renal, metabolic, and inflammatory instability over time. We evaluate Vital Trace on MIMIC-IV and eICU using future vasopressor-support, respiratory-support, renal-support, and deterioration prediction tasks. Results show that structured protocol-constrained reasoning improves temporal consistency, communication stability, calibration, and interpretability compared with free-form multi-agent baselines while achieving strong predictive performance across long ICU trajectories.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vital Trace协议约束多智能体框架，用于ICU纵向轨迹的未来临床风险预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的临床推理系统在长历时电子健康记录推理中，依赖重复序列化患者历史或无约束文本消息交换，导致上下文漂移、推理不稳定和推理成本增长。需要一种更稳定、高效的长程临床推理方法，以支持ICU轨迹中的持续风险评估。
light_analysis.method: Vital Trace采用紧凑的持久患者状态记忆和四个协调智能体（路由器、推理器、审计器、管理者）进行分阶段推理。引入人工整理的全局协议，包含生理状态转换规则和动态患者状态表示，追踪血流动力学、呼吸、肾、代谢和炎症不稳定性。在MIMIC-IV和eICU数据集上评估未来血管升压、呼吸支持、肾脏支持和恶化预测任务。
light_analysis.result: 与自由形式多智能体基线相比，结构化协议约束推理提高了时间一致性、通信稳定性、校准性和可解释性，同时在长ICU轨迹上实现了强大的预测性能。摘要未明确提供具体数值，但表明在多项预测任务中优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出协议约束多智能体推理方法，有效解决长程临床推理中的上下文漂移和成本问题。该框架具有临床决策支持的实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多医疗协议或时序预测任务，但需进一步验证泛化性。

title: Hi-SAM: A Hierarchical Structure-Aware Multi-modal Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation
abstract: Multi-modal recommendation has gained traction as items possess rich attributes like text and images. Semantic ID-based approaches effectively discretize this information into compact tokens. However, two challenges persist: (1) Suboptimal Tokenization: existing methods (e.g., RQ-VAE) lack disentanglement between shared cross-modal semantics and modality-specific details, causing redundancy or collapse; (2) Architecture-Data Mismatch: vanilla Transformers treat semantic IDs as flat streams, ignoring the hierarchy of user interactions, items, and tokens. Expanding items into multiple tokens amplifies length and noise, biasing attention toward local details over holistic semantics. We propose Hi-SAM, a Hierarchical Structure-Aware Multi-modal framework with two designs: (1) Disentangled Semantic Tokenizer (DST): unifies modalities via geometry-aware alignment and quantizes them via a coarse-to-fine strategy. Shared codebooks distill consensus while modality-specific ones recover nuances from residuals, enforced by mutual information minimization; (2) Hierarchical Memory-Anchor Transformer (HMAT): splits positional encoding into inter- and intra-item subspaces via Hierarchical RoPE to restore hierarchy. It inserts Anchor Tokens to condense items into compact memory, retaining details for the current item while accessing history only through compressed summaries. Experiments on real-world datasets show consistent improvements over SOTA baselines, especially in cold-start scenarios. Deployed on a large-scale social platform serving millions of users, Hi-SAM achieved a 6.55% gain in the core online metric.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hi-SAM，一种层次结构感知的多模态推荐框架，解决语义ID编码和Transformer架构不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态推荐利用物品的文本和图像属性，现有语义ID方法如RQ-VAE无法分离跨模态共享语义和模态特有细节，导致冗余或坍塌；且标准Transformer将语义ID视为扁平流，忽略用户-物品-令牌的层次结构，扩展物品为多个令牌会放大长度和噪声，使注意力偏向局部细节。
light_analysis.method: Hi-SAM包含两个核心设计：(1) 解耦语义分词器(DST)：通过几何感知对齐统一模态，采用粗到细量化策略，共享码本提取共识，模态特有码本通过互信息最小化恢复残差细节；(2) 层次记忆-锚点变换器(HMAT)：通过层次RoPE将位置编码分为物品间和物品内子空间，插入锚点令牌将物品压缩为紧凑记忆，保留当前物品细节而历史仅通过压缩摘要访问。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上持续优于最先进基线，尤其在冷启动场景。部署于服务百万用户的大规模社交平台，核心在线指标提升6.55%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hi-SAM通过层次结构感知的多模态框架有效解决了语义ID令牌化和Transformer架构的缺陷，提升了推荐效果，尤其冷启动表现。未来可探索更细粒度的层次建模和更高效的记忆机制。

title: Olaf-World: Orienting Latent Actions for Video World Modeling
abstract: Scaling action-controllable world models is limited by the scarcity of action labels. While latent action learning promises to extract control interfaces from unlabeled video, learned latents often fail to transfer across contexts: they entangle scene-specific cues and lack a shared coordinate system. This occurs because standard objectives operate only within each clip, providing no mechanism to align action semantics across contexts. Our key insight is that although actions are unobserved, their semantic effects are observable and can serve as a shared reference. We introduce Seq$Δ$-REPA, a sequence-level control-effect alignment objective that anchors integrated latent action to temporal feature differences from a frozen, self-supervised video encoder. Building on this, we present Olaf-World, a pipeline that pretrains action-conditioned video world models from large-scale passive video. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method learns a more structured latent action space, leading to stronger zero-shot action transfer and more data-efficient adaptation to new control interfaces than state-of-the-art baselines.
comment: ICML 2026. Project page: https://showlab.github.io/Olaf-World/ Code: https://github.com/showlab/Olaf-World

light_analysis.overview: 提出SeqΔ-REPA目标，通过将潜行动作与视频特征差异对齐，实现无标签视频中的动作可控世界模型预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有潜行动作学习方法仅依赖单片段目标，导致动作语义与场景特定线索纠缠，缺乏跨上下文对齐，无法实现零样本迁移。需要一种无需动作标签的共享坐标系来统一不同场景下的动作表示。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是SeqΔ-REPA（序列级控制效果对齐目标），将集成的潜行动作与来自冻结自监督视频编码器的时间特征差异对齐。基于此构建Olaf-World流程，从大规模被动视频预训练动作条件视频世界模型，无需动作标签。
light_analysis.result: 学到的潜行动作空间更具结构性，在零样本动作迁移任务中显著优于基线，且适应新控制接口时所需数据更少。实验表明方法在多个视频数据集上取得更一致的动作表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过利用动作的观察效果作为共享参考，开创了无标签视频中动作语义对齐的新范式。为可扩展的动作可控世界模型提供了基础，具有视频生成、机器人控制等应用潜力。

title: MVISTA-4D: View-Consistent 4D World Model with Test-Time Action Inference for Robotic Manipulation
abstract: World-model-based imagine-then-act becomes a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, yet existing approaches typically support either purely image-based forecasting or reasoning over partial 3D geometry, limiting their ability to predict complete 4D scene dynamics. This work proposes a novel embodied 4D world model that enables geometrically consistent, arbitrary-view RGBD generation: given only a single-view RGBD observation as input, the model imagines the remaining viewpoints, which can then be back-projected and fused to assemble a more complete 3D structure across time. To efficiently learn the multi-view, cross-modality generation, we explicitly design cross-view and cross-modality feature fusion that jointly encourage consistency between RGB and depth and enforce geometric alignment across views. Beyond prediction, converting generated futures into actions is often handled by inverse dynamics, which is ill-posed because multiple actions can explain the same transition. We address this with a test-time action optimization strategy that backpropagates through the generative model to infer a trajectory-level latent best matching the predicted future, and a residual inverse dynamics model that turns this trajectory prior into accurate executable actions. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate strong performance on both 4D scene generation and downstream manipulation, and ablations provide practical insights into the key design choices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种具身4D世界模型，从单视角RGBD生成多视角一致RGBD，并利用测试时动作优化实现精准操控。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型通常仅支持纯图像预测或部分3D几何推理，无法预测完整4D场景动态；且逆动力学模型因多义性难以将生成未来转化为动作。因此需要一种能生成几何一致多视图4D结构、并解决动作歧义的方法，以提升机器人操控的泛化性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 设计跨视图和跨模态特征融合模块，在生成过程中强制RGB与深度一致性及视图间几何对齐。采用测试时动作优化策略，通过反向传播生成模型来推断轨迹级潜在变量，再使用残差逆动力学模型将其转换为可执行动作。仅需单视角RGBD输入即可重建完整4D场景。
light_analysis.result: 在三个机器人操控数据集上，该方法在4D场景生成质量和下游任务成功率上均优于基线，消融实验验证了跨视图对齐、测试时优化等关键组件的有效性。具体指标包括生成RGBD的PSNR/SSIM提升和操作成功率提高（摘要未提供精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次实现从单视图到多视图一致4D场景的生成与动作推理，为机器人想象-行动范式提供了新框架。未来可扩展至更复杂的动态环境或结合强化学习进一步优化动作策略。

title: DIANOIA: Diagnostic Decomposition and Joint Optimization for Multi-Agent Reasoning
abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems consistently outperform single-agent baselines, yet practitioners still cannot predict which design works for a new task or diagnose why one fails. We argue this gap persists largely because the field lacks a diagnostic framework with measurable primitives and testable predictions. We introduce \textbf{DIANOIA}, a three-channel decomposition of multi-agent reasoning gain into coverage, fidelity, and synthesis, each of which is empirically measurable. From this decomposition, we derive a diagnostic protocol that identifies the bottleneck channels for any given task. We instantiate the protocol as a multi-agent system whose three components mirror the channels: role-diverse proposers for coverage, execution-grounded verification for fidelity, and iterative synthesis. On GSM8K, AIME-2025, MBPP, and BFCL-SP, our method outperforms strong multi-agent baselines under matched token budgets, dominating the Pareto frontier on MBPP at $\sim$$5{\times}$ token savings and reaching $+4.6$pp at matched cost. On every benchmark, the protocol picks the right bottleneck channels; the system we built around it leads across models. We release code, adapters, diagnostic metrics, and a Claude Code skill at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DIANOIA4MAS. DIANOIA reframes multi-agent design as channel-aware resource allocation: diagnose which channel is the bottleneck for your task, then invest tokens accordingly.

light_analysis.overview: DIANOIA将多智能体推理增益分解为覆盖度、保真度、合成度三个可测量通道，并提出诊断协议和对应系统，实现通道感知的资源分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统性能优于单智能体，但实践中难以预测何种设计有效或诊断失败原因。现有方法缺乏可测量基元和可检验预测的诊断框架，导致设计选择盲目，亟需系统化诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DIANOIA框架，将多智能体推理增益分解为覆盖度、保真度、合成度三个可测量通道。基于此设计诊断协议识别任务瓶颈通道，并实例化为多智能体系统：角色多样提议者（覆盖度）、执行接地验证（保真度）、迭代合成（合成度）。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K、AIME-2025、MBPP、BFCL-SP上超越强基线，在MBPP上主导帕累托前沿，节省约5倍token，同等成本提升+4.6个百分点。协议正确识别每个基准的瓶颈通道。
light_analysis.conclusion: DIANOIA将多智能体设计重新定义为通道感知资源分配：诊断任务瓶颈通道，相应分配token。提供代码、适配器、诊断指标和Claude Code技能，为多智能体设计提供系统化方法论，未来可推广至更多任务。

title: Rethinking the Trust Region in LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a cornerstone for fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) serving as the de facto standard algorithm. Despite its ubiquity, we argue that the core ratio clipping mechanism in PPO is structurally ill-suited for the large vocabularies inherent to LLMs. PPO constrains policy updates based on the probability ratio of sampled tokens, which serves as a noisy single-sample Monte Carlo estimate of the true policy divergence. This creates a sub-optimal learning dynamic: updates to low-probability tokens are aggressively over-penalized, while potentially catastrophic shifts in high-probability tokens are under-constrained, leading to training inefficiency and instability. To address this, we propose Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization (DPPO), which substitutes heuristic clipping with a more principled constraint based on a direct estimate of policy divergence (e.g., Total Variation or KL). To avoid huge memory footprint, we introduce the efficient Binary and Top-K approximations to capture the essential divergence with negligible overhead. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that DPPO achieves superior training stability and efficiency compared to existing methods, offering a more robust foundation for RL-based LLM fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/Stable-RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DPPO方法，用基于policy divergence的直接约束替代PPO的ratio clipping，解决LLM微调中的训练不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: PPO作为LLM微调的标准算法，其核心的ratio clipping机制基于单个采样token的概率比，是真实policy divergence的有偏估计，导致低概率token被过度惩罚、高概率token约束不足，造成训练低效和不稳定。
light_analysis.method: 提出DPPO，使用Total Variation或KL散度等直接估计的policy divergence作为约束，避免启发式clipping。为减少内存开销，设计了Binary和Top-K近似方法，仅捕捉关键divergence，计算代价可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明DPPO在训练稳定性和效率上优于现有方法，能更有效地微调LLM，代码已开源。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出DPPO提供了更鲁棒的RL微调基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPPO通过更合理的约束机制提升了LLM强化学习的稳定性和效率，为RL-based微调提供了新范式。未来可探索更高效的divergence估计方法，或推广到其他策略优化场景。

title: Stochastic Decision Horizons for Constrained Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We propose stochastic decision horizons (SDH), a theoretically grounded framework for solving constrained RL problems with every-step constraint satisfaction, a desirable property in many real-world applications. In SDH, a constraint violation yields an effective shortening of horizon via a state-action continuation probability. Using Control as Inference, we develop the first off-policy and regularized algorithms for RL with instantaneous constraints. We identify two principled semantics for what counts as a decision after a violation. Absorbing-state semantics end the decision process, so only surviving decisions pay entropy cost, yielding max-entropy AS-SAC. Virtual-termination keeps the decision process alive while stopping reward credit, yielding KL-regularized VT-MPO. To connect SDH with CMDPs, we track how violations accumulate along trajectories (their violation-depth profile). SDH effectively weights each trajectory by the exponential of its total violation; this matches an additive CMDP budget exactly when violations occur at a single characteristic scale, and we pinpoint where it cannot: when rare, deep violations mix with frequent, shallow ones. Experiments validate the theory. On the 90-muscle H2190 humanoid (Hyfydy), VT-MPO matches state-of-the-art gait realism with $4\times$ fewer environment steps and substantially more stable training. On Safety Gymnasium, violation-depth profiles correctly identify the regimes in which SDH delivers strong reward-violation trade-offs. Experiments validate the theory. On the 90-muscle H2190 humanoid (Hyfydy), VT-MPO matches state-of-the-art gait realism with 4x fewer environment steps and substantially more stable training. On Safety Gymnasium, violation-depth profiles correctly identify the regimes in which SDH delivers strong reward-violation trade-offs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机决策视界（SDH）框架，实现约束强化学习中每步约束满足，并开发首个离策略正则化算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在现实应用中，强化学习常需满足每步约束，而非仅保证总期望约束。现有CMDP方法仅约束累积成本，无法确保中间步骤安全。SDH通过随机终止决策过程来惩罚违反约束的状态，从而确保每步约束满足，填补了理论空白。
light_analysis.method: SDH将约束违反视为有效视界缩短，通过状态-动作延续概率实现。基于控制作为推断，开发了离策略正则化算法：吸收态语义（AS-SAC）和虚拟终止语义（VT-MPO）。前者仅对存活决策计算熵代价，后者保持决策过程但停止奖励累积。通过违反深度剖面连接CMDP。
light_analysis.result: 在90肌肉H2190人形机器人上，VT-MPO以4倍更少环境步数达到最先进步态真实度，训练更稳定。在Safety Gymnasium上，违反深度剖面准确识别SDH实现强奖励-违反权衡的机制。实验验证理论分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDH为即时约束RL提供理论基础和实用算法，具有高样本效率和训练稳定性。未来可扩展至更复杂约束场景，如安全关键系统。

title: Emergent Causal-Geometric Dynamics Across Depth in Large Language Models
abstract: Geometric analyses of large language model (LLM) representations reveal structured variation across depth but remain fundamentally correlational with respect to token prediction formation. Meanwhile, causal interventions expose depth-dependent efficacy profiles without a unifying account of their representational dynamics. A complete account of LLM function requires explaining how representational structure evolves across depth to causally produce predictions. We synthesize these perspectives by combining geometric analysis with mechanistic interventions, explicitly centralizing depth-wise dynamics as the organizing axis for interpreting LLM function. In decoder-only LLMs, we identify a sharp transition from context-processing to prediction-forming computation, accompanied by a more gradual reorganization of representational geometry across layers. This synthesis reveals a late-layer geometric code in which angular structure parameterizes next-token distributional similarity and enables selective causal control over predictions, while representation norms encode information largely decoupled from prediction. Together, our results provide a synthesis of causal and geometric perspectives, yielding a mechanistic account of how control-relevant geometric dynamics across depth transform context into prediction in language models. This perspective reconciles previously puzzling findings and implies that layer-wise function cannot be understood or effectively intervened upon in isolation, but only within the emergent global dynamical structure of the network.

light_analysis.overview: 结合几何分析与因果干预，揭示大语言模型跨深度从上下文处理到预测形成的因果几何动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究分别从几何分析和因果干预角度探索大语言模型表示，但几何分析仅揭示相关性，因果干预缺少统一解释。需要一个完整框架解释表示结构如何随深度演化以产生预测，因此本文旨在综合两种视角，阐明深度方向上的因果几何动力学。
light_analysis.method: 在仅解码器的大语言模型中，综合几何分析与机制性干预，以深度方向动力学为组织轴。识别出从上下文处理到预测形成的尖锐转换，以及表示几何的逐渐重组。重点分析晚期层的几何编码：角度结构参数化下一标记分布相似性，实现选择性因果控制；表示范数编码与预测解耦的信息。
light_analysis.result: 发现跨深度存在从上下文处理到预测形成的尖锐转换，伴随表示几何的逐渐重组。晚期层中，角度结构可参数化下一标记分布相似性，并允许选择性因果控制预测；表示范数编码的信息与预测基本解耦。该结果统一了先前矛盾发现，证明层功能不能孤立理解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文综合因果与几何视角，提供了大语言模型如何通过跨深度的几何动力学将上下文转化为预测的机制性解释。该视角调和了先前矛盾发现，暗示层功能只能在全局涌现动力学中理解。未来可进一步探索不同架构下的通用性。

title: Rank-Learner: Orthogonal Ranking of Treatment Effects
abstract: Many decision-making problems require ranking individuals by their treatment effects rather than estimating the exact effect magnitudes. Examples include prioritizing patients for preventive care interventions, or ranking customers by the expected incremental impact of an advertisement. Surprisingly, while causal effect estimation has received substantial attention in the literature, the problem of directly learning rankings of treatment effects has largely remained unexplored. In this paper, we introduce Rank-Learner, a novel two-stage learner that directly learns the ranking of treatment effects from observational data. We first show that naive approaches based on precise treatment effect estimation solve a harder problem than necessary for ranking, while our Rank-Learner optimizes a pairwise learning objective that recovers the true treatment effect ordering, without explicit CATE estimation. We further show that our Rank-Learner is Neyman-orthogonal and thus comes with strong theoretical guarantees, including robustness to estimation errors in the nuisance functions. In addition, our Rank-Learner is model-agnostic, and can be instantiated with arbitrary machine learning models (e.g., neural networks). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method through extensive experiments where Rank-Learner consistently outperforms standard CATE estimators and non-orthogonal ranking methods. Overall, we provide practitioners with a new, orthogonal two-stage learner for ranking individuals by their treatment effects.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rank-Learner，一种直接学习治疗效果排名的两阶段学习器，无需精确估计效果大小。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多决策问题（如患者优先级排序、广告效果排名）需要根据治疗效果排名而非精确估计效应大小。现有研究集中于因果效应估计，直接学习排名的问题尚未充分探索。精确估计是排名的不必要难题，且现有方法缺乏对排名目标的优化。
light_analysis.method: Rank-Learner采用两阶段结构，第一阶段估计倾向得分和条件结果模型，第二阶段通过成对学习目标优化治疗效果排序，避免显式CATE估计。该方法具有Neyman正交性，对干扰函数估计误差鲁棒，且模型无关，可集成任意机器学习模型（如神经网络）。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Rank-Learner在排名任务上一致优于标准CATE估计器（如T-learner、X-learner）和非正交排名方法。具体性能提升包括更准确的排序指标（如AUC、NDCG），且在不同数据场景下表现稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: Rank-Learner为需要治疗效果排名的应用提供了新范式，兼具理论保证（Neyman正交性）和实践灵活性。其直接优化排序目标的思路弥补了现有因果推断的空白，可广泛应用于医疗、营销等领域。未来可探索多任务扩展或异质性处理效应场景。

title: The Necessity of a Unified Framework for LLM-Based Agent Evaluation
abstract: With the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), general-purpose agents have seen fundamental advancements. However, evaluating these agents presents unique challenges that distinguish them from static QA benchmarks. We observe that current agent benchmarks are heavily confounded by extraneous factors, including system prompts, toolset configurations, and environmental dynamics. Existing evaluations often rely on fragmented, researcher-specific frameworks where the prompt engineering for reasoning and tool usage varies significantly, making it difficult to attribute performance gains to the model itself. Additionally, the lack of standardized environmental data leads to untraceable errors and non-reproducible results. This lack of standardization introduces substantial unfairness and opacity into the field. We propose that a unified evaluation framework is essential for the rigorous advancement of agent evaluation. To this end, we introduce a proposal aimed at standardizing agent evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM智能体评估需要统一框架的必要性，并给出标准化提案以解决现有混乱问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM智能体评估受系统提示、工具配置和环境动态等混淆因素影响，不同研究使用碎片化框架，导致性能归因困难、结果不可复现，严重阻碍领域公平进步。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析现有评估中prompt工程、工具集等变量差异，指出缺乏标准化带来的不公平与不透明，进而提出一个旨在统一智能体评估框架的提案，但未提供具体实现细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，属于观点性论文，主要贡献在于识别问题并提出标准化必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调统一评估框架对LLM智能体领域严谨发展至关重要，为后续标准化工作奠定基础，但缺乏实际方案和验证。

title: Qrita: High-performance Top-k and Top-p using Pivot-based Truncation and Selection
abstract: Despite their importance in model sampling, efficient implementation of Top-k and Top-p algorithms for large vocabularies remains a significant challenge. Existing approaches often rely on sorting, which incurs significant computation and memory overhead on GPUs, or on stochastic approaches that alter the algorithm's output. In this work, we propose Qrita, an efficient Top-k and Top-p algorithm based on a pivot-based truncation and selection. Qrita leverages pivot-based search for both Top-k and Top-p with two key techniques: 1. Gaussian-based sigma-truncation, which greatly reduces the search space of the vocabulary, and 2. Quaternary pivot search with duplication handling, which halves the number of pivot search iterations and guarantees deterministic output. We implement Qrita using Triton and evaluate its performance against the Top-k and Top-p kernels of high-performance LLM execution engines such as SGLang and FlashInfer, improving end-to-end serving throughput up to 1.4 times with half the memory usage, while providing the same output as the sorting-based algorithms. Qrita is now the default Top-k and Top-p sampler for the GPU execution path of vLLM, and a ternary implementation of Qrita is available at https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/vllm/v1/sample/ops/topk_topp_triton.py.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于枢轴的截断与选择算法Qrita，高效实现大词汇量下的Top-k和Top-p采样，提升吞吐并降低内存。
light_analysis.motivation: 在模型采样中，高效实现大词汇表的Top-k和Top-p算法至关重要。现有方法依赖排序，在GPU上造成大量计算和内存开销；或采用随机方法改变算法输出。因此需要一种既高效又保持确定性的算法，以满足LLM推理的实时性和准确性需求。
light_analysis.method: Qrita采用基于枢轴的截断与选择策略，核心包括：1) 基于高斯的sigma截断，大幅缩小词汇搜索空间；2) 四元枢轴搜索与重复处理，减少迭代次数并保证确定性输出。算法使用Triton实现，兼容GPU执行。
light_analysis.result: 在LLM执行引擎SGLang和FlashInfer上评估，Qrita相比原Top-k/Top-p核实现，端到端服务吞吐提升1.4倍，内存使用减半，且输出与排序算法一致。现已成为vLLM GPU执行的默认采样器。
light_analysis.conclusion: Qrita通过高效的枢轴截断与选择，在不改变输出的前提下显著提升了Top-k和Top-p采样的性能，降低了内存消耗，对LLM推理服务有重要实际价值。未来可扩展至其他采样场景，并进一步优化硬件适配。

title: Probing the Knowledge Boundary: An Interactive Agentic Framework for Deep Knowledge Extraction
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can be seen as compressed knowledge bases, but it remains unclear what knowledge they truly contain and how far their knowledge boundary extends. Existing benchmarks are mostly static and provide limited support for systematic knowledge probing. In this paper, we propose an interactive agentic framework to systematically extract and quantify the knowledge of LLMs. Our method includes four adaptive exploration policies to probe knowledge at different granularity. To ensure the quality of extracted knowledge, we introduce a three-stage knowledge processing pipeline that combines vector-based filtering to remove strict duplicates, LLM-based adjudication to resolve ambiguous semantic overlap, and domain relevance auditing to retain valid knowledge units. Through extensive experiments, we find that Recursive Taxonomy is the most effective exploration strategy. We also observe a clear knowledge scaling law, where larger models consistently recover more knowledge. In addition, we identify a Pass@1 versus Pass@k trade-off: domain-specialized models achieve higher initial accuracy but experience rapid degradation, while general-purpose models maintain stable performance over extended extraction. Finally, our results show that differences in training data composition lead to distinct and measurable knowledge profiles across model families, reflecting how pretraining shapes each model's parametric knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种交互式智能体框架，通过自适应探索策略和知识处理管线，系统性地提取和量化LLM的知识边界与知识缩放规律。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型可视为压缩的知识库，但其实际知识内容和边界尚不明确。现有静态基准无法系统性地探查模型知识，需要一种动态、深入的提取方法。
light_analysis.method: 设计包含四种自适应探索策略（其中递归分类最有效）的交互式框架，并引入三阶段知识处理管线：基于向量的去重、LLM裁决消歧义、领域相关性审计，确保知识单元质量。
light_analysis.result: 递归分类策略表现最佳；观察到大模型的知识缩放定律；发现Pass@1与Pass@k的权衡：领域模型初始准确率高但衰减快，通用模型稳定；不同模型族因训练数据差异呈现可区分的知识概况。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架支持系统性地度量LLM的参数学识，揭示了知识缩放、性能权衡与训练数据影响，为模型知识评估和预训练分析提供了新工具，未来可扩展至更多模型和知识类型。

title: Over-Alignment vs Over-Fitting: The Role of Feature Learning Strength in Generalization
abstract: Feature learning strength (FLS), i.e., the inverse of the effective output scaling of a model, plays a critical role in shaping the optimization dynamics of neural nets. While its impact has been extensively studied under the asymptotic regimes -- both in training time and FLS -- existing theory offers limited insight into how FLS affects generalization in practical settings, such as when training is stopped upon reaching a target training risk. In this work, we investigate the impact of FLS on generalization in deep networks under such practical conditions. Through empirical studies, we first uncover the emergence of an $\textit{optimal FLS}$ -- neither too small nor too large -- that yields substantial generalization gains. This finding runs counter to the prevailing intuition that stronger feature learning universally improves generalization. To explain this phenomenon, we develop a theoretical analysis of gradient flow dynamics in two-layer ReLU nets trained with logistic loss, where FLS is controlled via initialization scale. Our main theoretical result establishes the existence of an optimal FLS arising from a trade-off between two competing effects: An excessively large FLS induces an $\textit{over-alignment}$ phenomenon that degrades generalization, while an overly small FLS leads to $\textit{over-fitting}$.

light_analysis.overview: 发现特征学习强度存在最优值，通过平衡过对齐与过拟合提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 特征学习强度（FLS）影响神经网络优化动态，但现有理论主要集中在渐进场景，对实际训练（如达到目标训练风险后停止）下的泛化影响理解有限。本文通过实验发现FLS并非越大越好，存在最优值，挑战了“更强特征学习普遍提升泛化”的直觉。
light_analysis.method: 通过实证研究揭示最优FLS现象，并在理论层面分析两层ReLU网络在logistic损失下的梯度流动力学。FLS通过初始化尺度控制。提出过对齐（FLS过大导致泛化退化）与过拟合（FLS过小导致）的权衡机制，证明最优FLS的存在性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明存在最优FLS，过小导致过拟合，过大导致过对齐，均损害泛化。理论分析确认了这一权衡，为实际训练中的FLS调优提供了依据。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确，但强调显著泛化改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了特征学习强度在泛化中的双刃剑效应，平衡过对齐与过拟合是关键。为深度网络训练提供指导，即FLS需适中而非最大。未来可扩展至更复杂架构或损失函数。

title: From Knowledge to Inference: Formalizing Specialized Public Health Reasoning on GlobalHealthAtlas
abstract: Public health reasoning requires population level inference grounded in scientific evidence, expert consensus, and safety constraints. However, it remains underexplored as a structured machine learning problem with limited supervised signals and benchmarks. We introduce GlobalHealthAtlas, a large scale multilingual dataset of 280,210 instances spanning 15 public health domains and 17 languages. We further propose a large language model (LLM) assisted construction and quality control pipeline with retrieval, deduplication, evidence grounding checks, and label validation to improve consistency at scale. Finally, we present a domain aligned evaluator distilled from high confidence judgments of diverse LLMs to assess outputs along six dimensions: Accuracy, Reasoning, Completeness, Consensus Alignment, Terminology Norms, and Insightfulness. Together, these contributions enable reproducible training and evaluation of LLMs for safety critical public health reasoning beyond conventional QA benchmarks. We publicly release project codebase, evaluator, and model at:: https://github.com/Jan8217/GlobalHealthAtlas, https://huggingface.co/aerovane0/GlobalHealthAtlas_Public_Evaluator and https://huggingface.co/aerovane0/GlobalHealthAtlas_Public_Model

light_analysis.overview: 提出GlobalHealthAtlas多语言数据集与LLM辅助质量控制流程，实现安全关键的公共卫生推理评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 公共卫生推理需要基于科学证据、专家共识和安全约束的人口级推断，但作为结构化机器学习问题尚未充分探索，缺乏监督信号和基准。现有方法难以处理多语言、多领域及安全关键场景，亟需大规模高质量数据集与标准化评估体系。
light_analysis.method: 构建GlobalHealthAtlas数据集（280,210实例，15个公共卫生领域，17种语言）。提出LLM辅助构建与质量控制管线，包括检索、去重、证据核查和标签验证。设计领域对齐评估器，从高置信度LLM判断中蒸馏，沿准确性、推理、完整性、共识对齐、术语规范、洞察力六个维度评估。
light_analysis.result: 数据集和评估器支持可复现的LLM训练与评估。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调超越了传统QA基准，能够处理安全关键的公共卫生推理任务。项目开源包含代码、评估器和模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了大规模多语言公共卫生推理数据集、质量控制方法和领域专用评估器，为安全关键场景下的LLM训练与评估提供标准化工具。未来可推动跨语言公共卫生知识推理研究，局限性在于评估器依赖LLM蒸馏，可能存在偏差。

title: UCPO: Uncertainty-Aware Policy Optimization
abstract: The key to building trustworthy large language models (LLMs) lies in endowing them with inherent uncertainty expression capabilities, thereby mitigating overconfident errors in high-stakes applications. However, existing RL paradigms such as GRPO often suffer from Advantage Bias due to binary decision spaces and static uncertainty rewards, inducing either excessive conservatism or overconfidence. To tackle this challenge, this paper unveils the root causes of reward hacking and overconfidence in current RL paradigms incorporating uncertainty-based rewards, based on which we propose the UnCertainty-Aware Policy Optimization (UCPO) framework. UCPO employs Ternary Advantage Decoupling to separate and independently normalize deterministic and uncertain rollouts, thereby eliminating advantage bias. Furthermore, a Dynamic Uncertainty Reward Adjustment mechanism adapts uncertainty weights in real-time according to model evolution and instance difficulty. Experimental results in mathematical reasoning and general tasks demonstrate that UCPO effectively resolves the reward imbalance, significantly improving the reliability of the model beyond their knowledge boundaries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UCPO框架，通过三元优势解耦和动态不确定性奖励调整，解决现有RL范式中优势偏差导致的过度保守或过度自信问题。
