We further introduce token-level Spectral Energy Patterns (SEP) and find an architecture-invariant encoding law: tokens spread energy broadly across channel modes even when they live in low-rank subspace, creating a bandwidth mismatch. We refer to this combined phenomenon as an encoding mismatch. We propose two minimal remedies, Lift or WideLast: (i) Lift retains a lightweight lifting projector at inference to provide wider channel, or (ii) WideLast widens only the student's last block, enabling an input-dependent expansion. On ImageNet-1K, these fixes revive feature KD for ViT compression, improving DeiT-Tiny distilled from CaiT-S24 from 74.86% to 77.53%/78.23% top-1 accuracy, and they also strengthen students trained without distillation. Our analyses clarify when and why feature-map KD fails and then how to fix it. Code and raw data are provided in https://github.com/thy960112/From-Per-Image-Low-Rank-to-Encoding-Mismatch.
comment: 22 pages, 22 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示特征图知识蒸馏在ViT压缩中的编码错配问题并提出两种简单修复方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 特征图知识蒸馏在相近大小的ViT间有效，但在压缩场景中常失败。研究发现一个悖论：单张图像高度可压缩，但数据集层面教师模型是低秩子空间的并集，且输入间子空间旋转显著，导致编码错配。现有方法未解决此问题，因此需要分析原因并设计修复方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出token级光谱能量模式（SEP），发现架构不变的编码规律：即使处于低秩子空间，token在通道模式上广泛分布能量，造成带宽错配。提出两种最小修复：Lift（推理时保留轻量提升投影提供更宽通道）和WideLast（仅加宽学生最后一个块实现输入相关扩展）。在ImageNet-1K上验证。
light_analysis.result: 修复方法显著提升ViT压缩中特征知识蒸馏效果。将CaiT-S24蒸馏DeiT-Tiny的top-1准确率从74.86%提升至77.53%（Lift）和78.23%（WideLast），且对无蒸馏训练的学生也有增强。揭示了特征图KD失败的原因及修复方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文阐明特征图KD在ViT压缩中失败的编码错配机制，提供两种轻量修复方法，显著提升性能。研究深化了对知识蒸馏的理解，具有实用价值。未来可探索更高效或通用的修复策略。

title: Kandinsky 5.0: A Family of Foundation Models for Image and Video Generation
abstract: This report introduces Kandinsky 5.0, a family of state-of-the-art foundation models for high-resolution image and 10-second video synthesis. The framework comprises three core line-up of models: Kandinsky 5.0 Image Lite - a line-up of 6B parameter image generation models, Kandinsky 5.0 Video Lite - a fast and lightweight 2B parameter text-to-video and image-to-video models, and Kandinsky 5.0 Video Pro - 19B parameter models that achieves superior video generation quality. We provide a comprehensive review of the data curation lifecycle - including collection, processing, filtering and clustering - for the multi-stage training pipeline that involves extensive pre-training and incorporates quality-enhancement techniques such as self-supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training. We also present novel architectural, training, and inference optimizations that enable Kandinsky 5.0 to achieve high generation speeds and state-of-the-art performance across various tasks, as demonstrated by human evaluation. As a large-scale, publicly available generative framework, Kandinsky 5.0 leverages the full potential of its pre-training and subsequent stages to be adapted for a wide range of generative applications. We hope that this report, together with the release of our open-source code and training checkpoints, will substantially advance the development and accessibility of high-quality generative models for the research community.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kandinsky 5.0系列基础模型，涵盖6B参数图像生成和2B/19B参数视频生成模型，采用多阶段训练和强化学习优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像和视频生成模型在分辨率、时长和质量上存在局限，且缺乏公开可用的高效大规模模型。Kandinsky 5.0旨在通过优化数据策展、多阶段训练和推理流程，提供高性能、开源的生成框架，以推动高质量生成模型的研究与应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出三个模型：6B参数图像生成模型、2B参数轻量级视频模型和19B参数高质量视频模型。采用多阶段训练流程，包括预训练、自监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）后训练。数据策展涵盖收集、处理、过滤和聚类，并引入架构与推理优化以实现高速生成。
light_analysis.result: 通过人类评估，Kandinsky 5.0在多种图像和视频生成任务上达到最先进性能，实现高分辨率图像和10秒视频的高质量合成。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但强调速度和质量优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 作为大规模开源生成框架，Kandinsky 5.0的公开代码和检查点将促进研究社区发展。学术价值在于提出了高效的生成模型家族和优化方法，实际应用潜力显著。未来工作可进一步优化模型效率和扩展性。

title: CFG-OEC: Classifier Free Guidance with Orthogonal Error Correction
abstract: Classifier free guidance is a standard method for conditional sampling in diffusion models, but its sampling rule is not aligned with the objective used in training. This mismatch induces a structural sampling error through the interaction of conditional and unconditional prediction errors. We analyze this issue by decomposing the sampling error into a base term and a cross term determined by the alignment of the two errors. Based on this analysis we propose CFG with orthogonal error correction (CFG-OEC), a structural modification that reduces the interaction term. For practical settings where ground truth noise is not observable, we introduce a proxy computed from model predictions and a dynamic method that stabilizes correction across diffusion timesteps. Experiments in a controlled environment validate our theoretical error decomposition and proxy construction. Image generation on Stable Diffusion v1.5 and Stable Diffusion XL show that CFG-OEC improves FID and CLIP scores over CFG and CFG++ across multiple samplers and guidance regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CFG-OEC方法，通过正交误差校正改进扩散模型的条件采样，减少结构误差，提升图像生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准CFG采样规则与训练目标不匹配，条件和无条件预测误差的交互产生结构性采样误差，影响生成质量。现有方法未有效解决对齐问题，需要减少误差交互项以提高引导准确性。
light_analysis.method: 将采样误差分解为基项和交叉项，交叉项由两种误差的对齐决定。提出正交误差校正（OEC）减少交互项，因真实噪声不可观测，使用模型预测代理并设计动态方法稳定各时间步的校正，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Stable Diffusion v1.5和XL上，CFG-OEC在多个采样器和引导尺度下均优于CFG和CFG++，显著改进FID和CLIP分数。控制实验验证了误差分解和代理构建的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 分析了CFG的结构性误差并提出CFG-OEC，有效减少误差交互，提升条件生成质量。具有理论价值与实践意义，未来可探索更通用的校正策略。

title: AI-Driven Contribution Evaluation and Conflict Resolution: A Framework & Design for Group Workload Investigation
abstract: The equitable assessment of individual contribution in teams remains a persistent challenge, where conflict and disparity in workload can result in unfair performance evaluation, often requiring manual intervention - a costly and challenging process. We survey existing tool features and identify a gap in conflict resolution methods and AI integration. To address this, we propose a framework and implementation design for a novel AI-enhanced tool that assists in dispute investigation. The framework organises heterogeneous artefacts - submissions (code, text, media), communications (chat, email), coordination records (meeting logs, tasks), peer assessments, and contextual information - into three dimensions with nine benchmarks: Contribution, Interaction, and Role. Objective measures are normalised, aggregated per dimension, and paired with inequality measures (Gini index) to surface conflict markers. A Large Language Model (LLM) architecture performs validated and contextual analysis over these measures to generate interpretable and transparent advisory judgments. We argue for feasibility under current statutory and institutional policy, and outline practical analytics (sentimental, task fidelity, word/line count, etc.), bias safeguards, limitations, and practical challenges.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个AI增强的框架和设计，用于团队工作量调查中的贡献评估和冲突解决。
light_analysis.motivation: 团队中个人贡献的公平评估长期存在挑战，工作量的冲突和差异导致不公正的性能评价，通常需要昂贵且困难的人工干预。现有工具在冲突解决方法和AI集成方面存在空白，因此需要开发自动化辅助工具。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个框架，将异构工件（代码、文本、媒体、聊天、邮件、会议日志、任务、同行评估等）组织成三个维度（贡献、交互、角色）和九个基准。使用Gini指数等不平等指标识别冲突标记，利用大型语言模型（LLM）进行验证和上下文分析，生成可解释且透明的咨询判断。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但论证了在现行法规和政策下的可行性，并概述了情感分析、任务保真度、字数统计等分析功能，以及偏见保障、局限性和实际挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的AI辅助框架用于团队工作量调查，整合多种数据源，利用LLM提供可解释的判断。具有学术价值，可改进团队协作评估工具，但需进一步验证效果并解决实际挑战。

title: An End-to-End Learning Approach for Solving Capacitated Location-Routing Problems
abstract: The capacitated location-routing problems (CLRPs) are classical problems in combinatorial optimization, which require simultaneously making location and routing decisions. In CLRPs, the complex constraints and the intricate relationships between various decisions make the problem challenging to solve. With the emergence of deep reinforcement learning (DRL), it has been extensively applied to address the vehicle routing problem and its variants, while the research related to CLRPs still needs to be explored. In this paper, we propose the DRL with heterogeneous query (DRLHQ) to solve CLRP and open CLRP (OCLRP), respectively. We are the first to propose an end-to-end learning approach for CLRPs, following the encoder-decoder structure. In particular, we reformulate the CLRPs as a markov decision process tailored to various decisions, a general modeling framework that can be adapted to other DRL-based methods. To better handle the interdependency across location and routing decisions, we also introduce a novel heterogeneous querying attention mechanism designed to adapt dynamically to various decision-making stages. Experimental results on both synthetic and benchmark datasets demonstrate superior solution quality and better generalization performance of our proposed approach over representative traditional and DRL-based baselines in solving both CLRP and OCLRP.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出端到端深度强化学习方法求解容量选址路径问题，引入异构查询注意力机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 容量选址路径问题（CLRPs）是组合优化中的经典问题，需同时做出选址和路径决策，复杂约束和决策间的相互依赖使其求解困难。现有深度强化学习主要应用于车辆路径问题（VRP）及其变体，对CLRPs的研究尚不充分，缺乏端到端的学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于异构查询的深度强化学习（DRLHQ），采用编码器-解码器结构。将CLRPs重新建模为适合多种决策的马尔可夫决策过程，提供通用框架。引入新颖的异构查询注意力机制，动态适应不同决策阶段，更好地处理选址与路径决策间的相互依赖关系。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集和基准数据集上进行实验，所提方法在求解CLRP和开放CLRP（OCLRP）时，解质量和泛化性能均优于代表性传统方法和基于DRL的基线方法。实验验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文为CLRPs提供了首个端到端学习方案，提出的通用建模框架和异构查询注意力机制具有创新性，推动了DRL在组合优化问题中的应用。未来可进一步扩展至其他选址-路径变体问题。

title: LaRe: Latent Refocusing for Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Chain of Thought (CoT) reasoning enhances logical performance by decomposing complex tasks, yet its multimodal extension faces a trade-off. The prevailing Thinking with Images paradigm achieves visual refocusing by explicitly cropping image regions, yet incurs rapidly growing computational overhead. The emerging line of latent-space reasoning reduces token consumption, but lacks the capacity for dynamic refocusing. We argue that this trade-off stems from a tacitly accepted premise that effective visual refocusing must occur in the form of explicit tokens. Building on this, we propose Latent Refocusing (LaRe), a new multimodal reasoning paradigm in which visual refocusing takes place entirely within the latent space. We further design a semantic augmentation training strategy that ensures the semantic structure of the latent space through visual reconstruction objective. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that LaRe improves average accuracy by 7.6% compared to existing baselines while reducing the number of tokens required for inference by 59.7%. When scaled to a 8B-parameter Vision-Language Model backbone, LaRe achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the efficacy of our proposed latent refocusing paradigm for multimodal reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaRe范式，在潜在空间进行视觉重聚焦，提升多模态推理效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Thinking with Images范式通过显式裁剪图像区域实现视觉重聚焦，但带来快速增长的计算开销；而潜在空间推理虽降低token消耗，但缺乏动态重聚焦能力。两者之间存在权衡，源自默认显式token形式有效重聚焦的假设。本研究旨在突破此限制，实现高效且动态的视觉重聚焦。
light_analysis.method: LaRe将视觉重聚焦完全置于潜在空间，通过语义增强训练策略（含视觉重建目标）确保潜在空间的语义结构。该范式避免了显式token操作，在8B参数视觉语言模型上实现高效推理，显著减少计算资源消耗。
light_analysis.result: 相比基线方法，LaRe平均准确率提升7.6%，推理所需token数减少59.7%。在8B VLM骨干上扩展时，性能可媲美最先进方法，验证了潜在空间重聚焦范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaRe成功解决了多模态推理中效率与动态重聚焦的权衡，通过完全潜在空间操作实现了高性能与低开销。该范式为多模态推理提供了新方向，未来可探索更大规模模型的应用。

title: PRBench: A Standardized Probabilistic Robustness Benchmark
abstract: Deep learning models are notoriously vulnerable to imperceptible perturbations. Most existing research centers on adversarial robustness (AR), which evaluates models under worst-case scenarios by examining the existence of deterministic adversarial examples (AEs). In contrast, probabilistic robustness (PR) adopts a statistical perspective, measuring the probability that predictions remain correct under stochastic perturbations. While PR is widely regarded as a practical complement to AR, dedicated training methods for improving PR are still relatively underexplored, albeit with emerging progress. Among the few PR-targeted training methods, we identify three limitations: i non-comparable evaluation protocols; ii limited comparisons to strong AT baselines despite anecdotal PR gains from AT; and iii no unified framework to compare the generalization of these methods. Thus, we introduce PRBench, the first benchmark dedicated to evaluating improvements in PR achieved by different robustness training methods. PRBench empirically compares most common AT and PR-targeted training methods using a comprehensive set of metrics, including clean accuracy, PR and AR performance, training efficiency, and generalization error (GE). We also provide theoretical analysis on the GE of PR performance across different training methods. Main findings revealed by PRBench include: AT methods are more versatile than PR-targeted training methods in terms of improving both AR and PR performance across diverse hyperparameter settings, while PR-targeted training methods consistently yield lower GE and higher clean accuracy. A leaderboard comprising 229 trained models across 7 datasets and 10 model architectures is publicly available at https://wellzline.github.io/PRBenchLeaderboard/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个概率鲁棒性基准PRBench，系统评估AT和PR训练方法，揭示两者在不同指标上的优劣。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒性研究多聚焦对抗鲁棒性(AR)，而概率鲁棒性(PR)作为统计视角的补充尚缺乏标准化评估。PR训练方法存在评估协议不可比、与强AT基线比较有限、缺乏统一框架三个局限。这些问题阻碍了PR方法的比较和发展，因此需要建立专门基准来推动该领域研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出PRBench基准，统一评估多种AT和PR训练方法。使用包括干净准确率、PR性能、AR性能、训练效率和泛化误差等综合指标。对7个数据集、10种模型架构、229个训练模型进行实证比较，并提供PR泛化误差的理论分析。关键创新是标准化评估框架和全面比较。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现：AT方法在多样超参数设置下同时提升AR和PR更通用；PR训练方法泛化误差更低、干净准确率更高。基准包含229个模型，排行榜公开。这些结论基于广泛的实验对比，为方法选择提供了依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRBench为PR研究提供首个标准化基准，通过系统比较揭示AT和PR方法各自的优势。具有学术价值（理论分析）和实践价值（排行榜）。未来可推动PR训练方法的发展，并促进鲁棒性研究的更全面评估。

title: Learning to Reason Efficiently with Discounted Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often consume excessive tokens, inflating computational cost and latency. More broadly, in goal reaching sequential decision problems we often want to reach the goal quickly, and LRM reasoning can be viewed through this lens. We challenge the assumption that longer responses improve accuracy. By penalizing reasoning tokens using a discounted reinforcement learning setup (interpretable as a small token cost) and analyzing Blackwell optimality in restricted policy classes, we encourage concise yet accurate reasoning, analogous to preferring shorter successful trajectories in a stochastic shortest path problem. Experiments confirm our theoretical results that this approach shortens chains of thought while preserving accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 通过折扣强化学习惩罚推理token，促进大型推理模型高效推理，缩短思维链并保持准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型在生成推理链时消耗过多token，导致计算成本高和延迟大。现有方法通常假设更长响应提高准确性，但忽略了效率。需要一种方法在保持准确性的同时缩短推理链，以降低实际部署中的资源消耗。
light_analysis.method: 提出折扣强化学习方法：将推理视为目标到达序列决策问题，在策略优化中引入token成本（折扣因子），通过Blackwell最优性分析在受限策略类中寻找最优策略，鼓励简洁推理。该方法可解释为在随机最短路径问题中偏好更短成功轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该方法显著缩短了思维链长度，同时保持了任务准确性，验证了理论分析中关于折扣因子调控效率与准确性的平衡。与基线相比，在推理任务上实现了更高效的推理过程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文挑战了长响应提高准确性的假设，通过折扣强化学习实现了高效推理。该方法在降低计算成本的同时保持性能，为大型模型的实际部署提供了可行方案。未来可探索更复杂推理场景及折扣因子的自适应调整。

title: Prototyping an End-to-End Multi-Modal Tiny-CNN for Cardiovascular Sensor Patches
abstract: The vast majority of cardiovascular diseases may be preventable if early signs and risk factors are detected. Cardiovascular monitoring with body-worn sensor devices like sensor patches allows for the detection of such signs while preserving the freedom and comfort of patients. However, the analysis of the sensor data must be robust, reliable, efficient, and highly accurate. Deep learning methods can automate data interpretation, reducing the workload of clinicians. In this work, we analyze the feasibility of applying deep learning models to the classification of synchronized electrocardiogram (ECG) and phonocardiogram (PCG) recordings on resource-constrained medical edge devices. We propose a convolutional neural network with early fusion of data to solve a binary classification problem. The model is trained and validated on the synchronized ECG and PCG recordings from the Physionet Challenge 2016 dataset. Our approach reduces memory footprint and compute cost by approximately three orders of magnitude compared with the state-of-the-art while maintaining competitive accuracy. We further demonstrate the applicability of the proposed model on medical edge devices by measuring its energy consumption on a microcontroller equipped with a neural processing unit (NPU) and benchmarking the energy of Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) communication on a representative BLE evaluation kit across a range of payload sizes. The comparison confirms that on-device inference can be more energy efficient than continuous data streaming.
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures. Extended version of our 2024 IEEE PerCom paper, with direct on-device energy measurements, a BLE communication benchmark, architecture comparisons, and an extended evaluation. Submitted to Biomedical Signal Processing and Control

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种端到端多模态小型CNN，用于心血管传感器贴片的ECG和PCG信号分类，在资源受限的边缘设备上实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 心血管疾病早期检测至关重要，可穿戴传感器贴片能持续监测，但传感器数据分析需高效准确。现有深度学习方法计算成本高，难以部署在资源受限的医疗边缘设备上。本研究旨在探索在边缘设备上高效运行深度学习模型的可能性，通过早期融合多模态数据（ECG和PCG），降低计算和内存开销，同时保持诊断准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种早期融合的卷积神经网络（CNN），将同步的ECG和PCG信号作为双通道输入，通过卷积层提取特征后融合，解决二分类问题（如正常/异常）。模型在Physionet Challenge 2016数据集上训练和验证。关键创新在于大幅减少参数和计算量：相比现有技术，内存占用和计算成本降低约三个数量级。此外，在配备神经处理单元（NPU）的微控制器上评估能耗，并与蓝牙低功耗（BLE）传输能耗对比。
light_analysis.result: 该模型在保持竞争性准确率的同时，内存占用和计算成本比现有技术降低约三个数量级。在微控制器上实测发现，设备上推理比连续数据流（通过BLE传输原始数据）更节能。具体能耗数据需参考原文，但摘要明确表明推理能效优于传输。模型在Physionet Challenge 2016数据集上实现接近SOTA的精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了在资源受限的医疗边缘设备上部署深度学习模型进行多模态心血管信号分类的可行性。通过极端压缩模型，实现了三个数量级的资源节省，且能效优于远程数据处理。未来可扩展至更多类别分类，或优化其他传感器模态。该工作为可穿戴健康监测系统提供了低功耗、实时推理的解决方案。

title: UltraCUA: A Foundation Model for Computer Use Agents with Hybrid Action
abstract: Computer-use agents face a fundamental limitation. They rely exclusively on primitive GUI actions (click, type, scroll), creating brittle execution chains prone to cascading failures. While API-driven agents harness rich capabilities through structured interfaces and tools, computer-use agents remain constrained to low-level visual interactions. We present UltraCUA, a foundation model that transcends this limitation through hybrid action-seamlessly unifying primitive GUI operations with high-level tool execution. Our innovation rests on four critical advances. First, an automated pipeline extracts and scales tool capabilities from software documentation and code repositories. Second, a synthetic data engine produces 17,000+ verifiable tasks capturing real-world computer-use complexity. Third, comprehensive hybrid action trajectory collection incorporates both GUI primitives and strategic tool calls. Fourth, a two-stage training methodology combines supervised fine-tuning with online reinforcement learning, enabling intelligent action selection between GUI and API. Evaluation with our 7B and 32B UltraCUA models reveals transformative performance gains. On OSWorld, UltraCUA achieves 22% relative improvement while executing 11% faster than existing approaches, averagely. Cross-domain validation on WindowsAgentArena demonstrates robust generalization with 21.7% success rate, surpassing Windows-trained baselines. The hybrid action paradigm proves essential, reducing error propagation while improving execution efficiency. This work establishes a scalable paradigm bridging primitive GUI interactions and high-level tool intelligence, enabling more resilient and adaptable computer use agents for diverse environments and complex real-world tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UltraCUA，一种通过混合基本GUI操作与高级工具执行的基础模型，显著提升计算机使用智能体的性能和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体仅依赖基本GUI动作（点击、输入、滚动），导致执行链脆弱并易发生级联失败。而API驱动的智能体可通过结构化接口调用丰富工具能力，但计算机使用智能体受限于低层视觉交互，无法利用高层工具智能。因此需要一种能无缝融合两者优势的方法。
light_analysis.method: UltraCUA采用四项关键技术：自动从软件文档和代码仓库提取工具能力的管道；合成数据引擎生成超过17,000个可验证的真实世界任务；收集包含GUI原语和战略工具调用的混合动作轨迹；两阶段训练方法结合监督微调与在线强化学习，实现GUI与API间的智能动作选择。
light_analysis.result: 在OSWorld基准上，UltraCUA（7B和32B）平均实现22%的相对性能提升，执行速度比现有方法快11%。跨域WindowsAgentArena测试中达到21.7%成功率，超过在Windows上训练的传统基线。混合动作范式有效减少了错误传播，同时提高了执行效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: UltraCUA建立了连接基本GUI交互与高级工具智能的可扩展范式，使计算机使用智能体在多样环境和复杂任务中更具鲁棒性和适应性。该工作为未来结合视觉和结构化接口的智能体研究提供了新方向，但更大规模模型和更多工具类型的扩展仍有待探索。

title: SpaceVista: All-Scale Visual Spatial Reasoning from mm to km
abstract: With the current surge in spatial reasoning explorations, researchers have made significant progress in understanding indoor scenes, but still struggle with diverse applications such as robotics and autonomous driving. This paper aims to advance all-scale spatial reasoning across diverse scenarios by tackling two key challenges: 1) the heavy reliance on indoor 3D scans and labor-intensive manual annotations for dataset curation; 2) the absence of effective all-scale scene modeling, which often leads to overfitting to individual scenes. In this paper, we introduce a holistic solution that integrates a structured spatial reasoning knowledge system, scale-aware modeling, and a progressive training paradigm, as the first attempt to broaden the all-scale spatial intelligence of MLLMs to the best of our knowledge. Using a task-specific, specialist-driven automated pipeline, we curate over 38K video scenes across 5 spatial scales to create SpaceVista-1M, a dataset comprising approximately 1M spatial QA pairs spanning 19 diverse task types. While specialist models can inject useful domain knowledge, they are not reliable for evaluation. We then build an all-scale benchmark with precise annotations by manually recording, retrieving, and assembling video-based data. However, naive training with SpaceVista-1M often yields suboptimal results due to the potential knowledge conflict. Accordingly, we introduce SpaceVista-7B, a spatial reasoning model that accepts dense inputs beyond semantics and uses scale as an anchor for scale-aware experts and progressive rewards. Finally, extensive evaluations across 5 benchmarks, including our SpaceVista-Bench, demonstrate competitive performance, showcasing strong generalization across all scales and scenarios. Our dataset, model, and benchmark will be released on https://peiwensun2000.github.io/mm2km .

light_analysis.overview: 提出全尺度空间推理解决方案SpaceVista，包含数据集、模型和基准，首次尝试拓展多模态大语言模型的全尺度空间智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前空间推理研究主要聚焦室内场景，但机器人、自动驾驶等应用需要全尺度（毫米到千米）理解。现有方法依赖室内3D扫描和人工标注，数据集构建成本高，且缺乏有效的全尺度场景建模，导致模型易过拟合于单一场景。因此，需要一种自动化的数据集构建方法和尺度感知的模型训练范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化空间推理知识系统、尺度感知建模和渐进训练范式。通过任务驱动的自动化管道，从5个空间尺度收集超过3.8万视频场景，构建SpaceVista-1M数据集（约100万空间问答对，涵盖19种任务类型）。引入SpaceVista-7B模型，接受密集输入，以尺度为锚点激活尺度感知专家，并结合渐进奖励训练。
light_analysis.result: 在5个基准（包括自建的SpaceVista-Bench）上评估，SpaceVista-7B展现出竞争性能，在所有尺度（毫米到千米）和各种场景中均具有较强的泛化能力。具体性能指标未明确提及，但摘要表明其超越了仅使用SpaceVista-1M朴素训练的次优结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地解决多模态大语言模型的全尺度空间推理问题，通过数据集、模型和基准的完整方案，推动了机器人、自动驾驶等领域的空间智能发展。数据集、模型和基准将开源，促进后续研究。未来工作可进一步优化尺度感知机制和自动化标注质量。

title: Cross-Receiver Generalization for RF Fingerprint Identification via Feature Disentanglement and Adversarial Training
abstract: Radio frequency fingerprint identification (RFFI) is a key technique for wireless network security, leveraging intrinsic hardware imperfections to enable transmitter identification. Although deep neural networks are effective at extracting discriminative RF features, their performance is significantly affected by receiver-induced variability in practical deployments. In real-world scenarios, RF signals inherently entangle transmitter-specific characteristics with receiver-dependent distortions, leading models to capture receiver-related patterns when training and evaluation are conducted on the same device. Consequently, replacing the receiver during deployment often results in notable performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose a cross-receiver robust RFFI framework that explicitly disentangles transmitter-specific and receiver-specific representations. The proposed method integrates adversarial domain alignment with receiver-aware regularization to suppress residual receiver information in transmitter features while enforcing intra-receiver consistency in receiver-specific representations. A feature separation constraint is further introduced to decouple the two components in the latent space. Extensive experiments on multi-receiver WiFi datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under cross-receiver evaluation and significantly improves robustness to receiver replacement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于特征解耦和对抗训练的跨接收器射频指纹识别方法，解决接收器更换导致的性能下降问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 射频指纹识别（RFFI）利用硬件指纹实现发射机识别，但实际部署中接收器更换会导致性能显著下降。因为RF信号天然混合了发射机特性和接收器失真，模型在同设备训练后容易过拟合接收器相关模式。现有方法忽视了这一跨接收器泛化问题，亟需一种鲁棒的框架来解耦两种特征并抑制接收器干扰。
light_analysis.method: 提出跨接收器鲁棒RFFI框架，通过特征解耦和对抗训练实现。具体包括：对抗域对齐抑制接收器信息，接收器感知正则化强制接收器特征内一致性，特征分离约束在潜空间解耦发射机与接收器表示。使用多接收器WiFi数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在多接收器WiFi数据集上，该方法在跨接收器评估中持续优于现有基线方法，显著提升了对接收器更换的鲁棒性。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确表示性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的跨接收器RFFI框架，通过特征解耦和对抗训练增强了模型泛化能力。具有重要的实际应用价值，可提升无线网络安全系统的部署灵活性。未来可探索更复杂的场景或多接收器联合训练策略。

title: EconCausal: A Context-Aware Economic Reasoning Benchmark for Large Language Models
abstract: Socio-economic causal effects depend heavily on their institutional and environmental contexts. The same intervention can produce different, even opposite, effects across regulatory regimes, market conditions, time periods, or populations. This poses a challenge for large language models (LLMs) in decision-support roles: can they infer the direction of a causal effect under a specified context, and revise that judgment when the context changes?   To address this, we introduce EconCausal, a large-scale benchmark of 10,490 context-annotated causal triplets extracted from 2,595 high-quality empirical studies in top-tier economics and finance journals, constructed through a rigorous four-stage pipeline with multi-run consensus, context refinement, and multi-critic filtering.   Across models, LLMs often fail to condition their predictions on context. While top models reach 88% accuracy in fixed, explicit contexts, accuracy falls by 32.6~pp on cases that require revising the sign across contexts (73.9% to 41.3%), and drops below 50% once misleading signed evidence is introduced. Models also over-commit to directional (+/-) signs, recognizing null effects only 13.8% of the time while remaining poorly calibrated on these categories. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/econcausal-benchmark-6F12.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EconCausal基准，评估大语言模型在特定社会经济背景下推断因果效应的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 社会经济因果效应高度依赖制度与环境背景，相同干预在不同条件下可能产生相反效果。现有大语言模型在决策支持中常忽略上下文，无法准确推断因果方向或在背景变化时修正判断，亟需一个系统性基准来评估其上下文感知推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 从顶级经济金融期刊中提取2,595篇实证研究，经四阶段流程（多轮共识、上下文精炼、多批评过滤）构建10,490个上下文标注因果三元组。每个三元组包含干预、结果及显式上下文，并标注因果方向（正、负、零）。通过多模型评估验证基准的挑战性。
light_analysis.result: 顶级模型在固定显式上下文中准确率88%，但在跨上下文符号反转任务中下降32.6个百分点（73.9%→41.3%），引入误导证据后准确率低于50%。模型对零效应识别率仅13.8%，且校准不良。表明模型严重缺乏上下文条件化推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: EconCausal揭示了LLMs在上下文感知因果推理上的显著缺陷，为提升其经济决策支持能力提供了标准化评估工具。基准公开可促进相关研究，未来可探索上下文嵌入训练或多步推理策略。

title: Self-signals Driven Multi-LLM Debate for Efficient and Accurate Reasoning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have exhibited impressive capabilities across diverse application domains. Recent work has explored Multi-LLM Agent Debate (MAD) as a way to enhance performance by enabling multiple LLMs to discuss and refine responses iteratively. Nevertheless, existing MAD methods predominantly focus on utilizing external structures, such as debate graphs, using LLM-as-a-Judge, while neglecting the application of self signals, such as token logits and attention, that arise during generation. This omission leads to redundant computation and potential performance degradation. In this paper, we shift the focus to the self signals of multi-LLM debate and introduce a Self-Signals Driven Multi-LLM Debate (SID), which leverages two types of self-signals: model-level confidence and token-level semantic focus, to adaptively guide the debate process. Our approach enables high-confidence agents to exit early at the model level and compress the redundant debate contents based on the attention mechanism. We evaluate our method on various LLMs and Multimodal LLMs across multiple challenging benchmarks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method not only outperforms existing MAD techniques in accuracy but also reduces token consumption, highlighting the effectiveness of utilizing self signals in enhancing both the performance and efficiency of multi-agent debate systems. Our code will be available at~\href{https://github.com/xuhang2019/SID}{\texttt{https://github.com/xuhang2019/SID}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于自信号的多LLM辩论方法SID，利用模型置信度和注意力机制自适应引导辩论，提升准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Multi-LLM Agent Debate方法依赖外部结构（如辩论图）或LLM-as-a-Judge，忽视了生成过程中产生的自信号（如token logits和注意力），导致计算冗余和性能下降。为了充分利用这些内隐信号来优化辩论过程，本文旨在通过自信号驱动实现高效且准确的推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出Self-Signals Driven Multi-LLM Debate (SID)，利用两类自信号：模型级置信度（如logits概率）和token级语义焦点（注意力权重）。高置信度智能体可提前退出，通过注意力机制压缩冗余辩论内容。方法适用于多种LLM和MLLM，不依赖外部结构，自适应引导辩论流程。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准上，使用不同LLM和MLLM进行实验。SID在准确性上超越现有MAD技术，同时显著减少token消耗。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但突出展示了自信号在提升多智能体辩论系统性能和效率方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SID通过利用模型级和token级自信号，实现了高效准确的多LLM辩论，减少了计算冗余。学术贡献在于揭示了自信号的价值，实际应用可降低推理成本。未来工作可能探索更多自信号类型或扩展到更广泛的多智能体协作场景。

title: On the Sensitivity of Instruction-tuned LLMs to Harmful Sentences in Long Inputs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly operate on long inputs, yet their behavior when harmful sentences are sparsely embedded within such inputs remains poorly understood. We present a sensitivity analysis that probes how LLMs extract harmful sentences embedded in long inputs. We construct long inputs by combining neutral and harmful sentences, and systematically vary four factors: input length (600--30,000 tokens), the proportion of harmful sentences (0.01--0.50), harm realization (explicit vs. implicit), and the position of harmful sentences within the input (beginning, middle, end), enabling a controlled stress-test evaluation. Experiments across toxic, offensive, and hate content, and across LLaMA-3.1, Qwen-2.5, and Mistral, reveal consistent patterns: sensitivity is non-monotonic with respect to harmful prevalence, peaking at moderate levels; sensitivity degrades as input length increases; harmful sentences placed earlier in the input are more strongly prioritized; and explicit harm is more reliably identified than implicit harm. These findings provide a systematic view of how LLMs prioritize harmful sentences in long input under controlled stress conditions, highlighting both emerging strengths and remaining challenges for safety-related use.

light_analysis.overview: 系统揭示了指令微调LLM在长输入中对稀疏有害句子的敏感性规律，包括非单调、长度衰减、位置优先等模式。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM日益处理长输入，但稀疏嵌入的有害句子如何影响模型行为尚不明确。现有安全评估缺乏对长输入场景的受控应力测试，难以理解优先级机制。该问题对模型安全部署至关重要，需系统分析敏感性变化规律。
light_analysis.method: 构造包含中性句和有害句的混合长输入，系统变化输入长度（600-30000 token）、有害句子比例（0.01-0.50）、危害显隐性及位置（开头/中间/结尾）。在LLaMA-3.1、Qwen-2.5和Mistral三个模型上，对毒性、冒犯和仇恨三类内容进行受控应激评估。
light_analysis.result: 敏感性呈非单调：中等有害比例时峰值最高；输入长度增加导致敏感性下降；有害句子位于开头时优先级最强；显式危害比隐式更易识别。模式在三个模型和内容类型上一致，未发现具体数值差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统揭示了LLM在长输入中优先处理有害句子的规律，包括非单调性、长度衰减和位置效应。研究为评估和改进模型安全性提供了基准，但未探讨缓解策略。未来可研究对抗性输入或动态位置影响。

title: TAG: Tangential Amplifying Guidance for Hallucination-Resistant Sampling
abstract: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art image generation but often produce semantic inconsistencies, or hallucinations. Existing inference-time guidance methods rely on external signals or architectural modifications, adding computational overhead. We propose $\mathbf{T}$angential $\mathbf{A}$mplifying $\mathbf{G}$uidance $\mathbf{(TAG)}$, a training-free, architecture-agnostic, plug-and-play guidance method that operates purely on trajectory signals. TAG uses an intermediate sample as a projection basis and amplifies the tangential components of the estimated score to correct the sampling trajectory. A first-order Taylor analysis shows that this steers the state toward higher-probability regions of the data manifold, reducing inconsistencies and improving fidelity while adding negligible overhead to existing samplers. Code is available at our Project Page (https://hyeon-cho.github.io/TAG/).

light_analysis.overview: 提出TAG，一种无需训练、即插即用的引导方法，通过放大采样轨迹的切向分量来减少扩散模型的幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成中常出现语义不一致（幻觉），现有推理时引导方法依赖外部信号或架构修改，增加了计算开销。因此，需要一种轻量级、无需额外训练或架构变更的引导方法。
light_analysis.method: TAG利用中间样本作为投影基础，放大估计分数中的切向分量，从而纠正采样轨迹。通过一阶泰勒分析，该方法引导状态朝向数据流形的高概率区域，减少不一致性。无需训练，与架构无关，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: TAG在减少语义不一致和提高图像保真度方面有效，且仅向现有采样器添加可忽略的计算开销。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAG是一种抵抗幻觉的通用引导方法，无需训练和架构修改，适用于多种扩散模型。它的提出为提升生成质量提供了高效方案，未来可扩展到其他生成任务。

title: To model human linguistic prediction, make LLMs less superhuman
abstract: When we read, we make predictions about upcoming words; these predictions influence our reading behavior. The success of large language models (LLMs), which, like humans, make predictions about upcoming words, has motivated their use as models of human linguistic prediction. Surprisingly, in the last few years, as LLMs' ability to predict the next word has improved, their ability to explain reading behavior has declined. We argue this is because current LLMs can predict upcoming words much better than human readers can. This 'superhumanness' is driven by LLMs' extensive training data, stronger long-term memory of training examples, and stronger short-term memory. We advocate for LLMs with human-like memory and for new experiments to measure the alignment between humans and LLMs, and outline directions towards achieving these goals.
comment: Accepted to Trends in Cognitive Sciences

light_analysis.overview: 提出让大语言模型具备类人记忆以模仿人类语言预测能力，解决超人类预测能力带来的解释偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类阅读时会预测下一个词，LLM虽能预测但最近预测能力提升后反而更难以解释人类阅读行为。原因是LLM拥有大量训练数据、更强的长期和短期记忆，使其预测能力超越人类，导致模型与人类认知对齐度下降。因此需要调整LLM的记忆机制使其更像人类。
light_analysis.method: 作者未提出具体算法，但主张通过限制LLM的记忆能力（如减少训练数据暴露、弱化长短期记忆）来模拟人类预测行为。建议设计新的实验度量人类与LLM的预测对齐程度，并可能采用认知模型或对比学习等方法实现类人记忆。数据集和模型架构未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出量化实验结果，但指出近年LLM预测准确率提升的同时解释人类阅读行为的能力（如N400效应、眼动数据拟合）反而下降。这一观察揭示了超人类预测能力与人类认知模型的冲突，为后续研究提供了动机。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文批判性分析了LLM作为人类语言预测模型的局限性，强调超人类预测能力是根本原因。提出未来方向：构建具有类人记忆的LLM、开发新的对齐度量指标。研究对认知科学和NLP交叉领域有价值，但未提供具体技术方案，局限在于缺乏实证验证。

title: HiSpec: Hierarchical Speculative Decoding for LLMs
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a smaller draft model to speculate tokens that a larger target model verifies. Verification is often the bottleneck (e.g. verification is $4\times$ slower than token generation when a 3B model speculates for a 70B target model), but most prior works focus only on accelerating drafting. $\textit{``Intermediate"}$ verification reduces verification time by discarding inaccurate draft tokens early, but existing methods incur substantial training overheads in incorporating the intermediate verifier, increase the memory footprint to orchestrate the intermediate verification step, and compromise accuracy by relying on approximate heuristics.   We propose $\underline{\textit{Hi}}\textit{erarchical }\underline{\textit{Spec}}\textit{ulative Decoding (HiSpec)}$, a framework for high-throughput speculative decoding that exploits $\textit{early-exit (EE) models}$ for low-overhead intermediate verification. EE models allow tokens to exit early by skipping layer traversal and are explicitly trained so that hidden states at selected layers can be interpreted, making them uniquely suited for intermediate verification without drastically increasing compute and memory overheads. To improve resource-efficiency even further, we design a methodology that enables HiSpec to re-use key-value caches and hidden states between the draft, intermediate verifier, and target models. To maintain accuracy, HiSpec periodically validates the draft tokens accepted by the intermediate verifier against the target model. Our evaluations using various representative benchmarks and models show that HiSpec improves throughput by 1.28$\times$ on average and by up to 2.01$\times$ compared to the baseline single-layer speculation without compromising accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiSpec框架，利用早期退出模型实现低开销中间验证，显著加速LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码中验证阶段常成瓶颈，例如3B模型为70B目标模型推测时验证慢4倍。现有中间验证方法训练开销大、内存占用高，且依赖近似启发式导致精度损失，亟需高效低开销的验证方案。
light_analysis.method: HiSpec采用早期退出（EE）模型进行中间验证，EE模型允许token跳过部分层遍历，减少计算和内存开销。通过显式训练使隐藏状态可解释，并设计KV缓存和隐藏状态重用机制。周期性用目标模型验证已被中间验证器接受的token，维持精度。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试和模型上，HiSpec相比基线单层推测平均吞吐量提升1.28倍，最高达2.01倍，且不牺牲生成质量，验证了方法的高效性与准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiSpec通过早期退出模型实现高效中间验证，解决了推测解码中验证瓶颈问题，具有重要实用价值。未来可探索更优的EE模型训练策略及多级验证扩展。

title: Intuitions of Machine Learning Researchers about Transfer Learning for Medical Image Classification
abstract: Transfer learning is crucial for medical imaging, yet the selection of source datasets often relies on researchers' intuition rather than systematic principles, which can impact the generalizability of algorithms and, thus, patient outcomes. This study investigates these decisions through a task-based survey with machine learning practitioners. Unlike prior work that benchmarks models and experimental setups, we take a human-computer interaction (HCI) perspective on how practitioners select source datasets. Our findings indicate that choices are task-dependent and influenced by community practices, dataset properties, and computational (data embedding), or perceived visual or semantic similarity. However, similarity ratings and expected performance are not always aligned, challenging a traditional "more similar is better" view. Moreover, ethical and fairness considerations remain largely absent from source dataset sections. Participants often used ambiguous terminology, which suggests a need for clearer definitions and tools to make them explicit and usable. By clarifying these heuristics and introducing a conceptual framework of transfer learning factors, this work provides practical insights for more systematic source selection in transfer learning.

light_analysis.overview: 研究机器学习研究人员在医学图像分类迁移学习中选择源数据集的直觉，揭示决策因素并提出概念框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 迁移学习在医学成像中至关重要，但源数据集选择常依赖研究者直觉而非系统原则，影响算法泛化性和患者结果。现有工作聚焦模型基准测试，缺乏对实践者决策过程的理解。本研究从人机交互视角调查实践者如何选择源数据集，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 通过基于任务的调查，邀请机器学习实践者参与，分析其源数据集选择决策。研究采用人机交互视角，收集相似度评分、预期性能等数据，并识别选择因素：任务依赖性、社区实践、数据集属性、计算嵌入、视觉或语义相似性等。还引入迁移学习因素的概念框架。
light_analysis.result: 发现选择是任务相关的，受社区实践、数据集属性、相似性等影响。但相似度评分与预期性能并不总是一致，挑战了“越相似越好”的传统观点。此外，伦理和公平性考虑在源数据集选择中基本缺失。参与者使用模糊术语，表明需要更清晰的定义和工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过阐明这些启发式方法并引入迁移学习因素的概念框架，本研究为更系统的源数据集选择提供了实用见解。未来工作可开发显式工具和准则，促进可重复和公平的迁移学习实践。

title: DiVeQ: Differentiable Vector Quantization Using the Reparameterization Trick
abstract: Vector quantization is common in deep models, yet its hard assignments block gradients and hinder end-to-end training. We propose DiVeQ, which treats quantization as adding an error vector that mimics the quantization distortion, keeping the forward pass hard while letting gradients flow. We also present a space-filling variant (SF-DiVeQ) that assigns input to a curve constructed by the lines connecting codewords, resulting in less quantization error and full codebook usage. Both methods train end-to-end without requiring auxiliary losses or temperature schedules. In VQ-VAE image compression, VQGAN image generation, and DAC speech coding tasks across various data sets, our proposed methods improve reconstruction and sample quality over alternative quantization approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可微分向量量化方法DiVeQ，通过重参数化技巧实现端到端训练，并引入空间填充变体减少量化误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 向量量化在深度模型中广泛使用，但硬分配导致梯度阻断，妨碍端到端训练。现有方法需要辅助损失或温度调度，增加训练复杂性。本文旨在解决梯度不可微问题，同时避免额外损失函数，实现高效的端到端量化。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiVeQ，将量化视为添加模拟量化失真的误差向量，保持前向硬量化同时允许梯度流动。进一步提出SF-DiVeQ，将输入分配到码字连接构成的曲线上，减少量化误差并实现码本满利用率。无需辅助损失或温度调度，实现端到端训练。
light_analysis.result: 在VQ-VAE图像压缩、VQGAN图像生成和DAC语音编码任务中，DiVeQ和SF-DiVeQ相比其他量化方法提升了重建质量和样本质量。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的DiVeQ方法实现了可微分的向量量化，简化了训练流程，避免了辅助损失。在多个任务中效果优异，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的量化策略或应用于其他领域。

title: A Unified Framework for Diffusion Model Unlearning with f-Divergence
abstract: Most existing methods for concept unlearning in text-to-image diffusion models minimize a mean squared error (MSE) loss between the denoiser outputs conditioned on a target and an anchor concept, which is implicitly the KL divergence between two Gaussians. We generalize this objective to any $f$-divergence, recovering MSE as the KL instance, and identify a family of $α$-divergences whose Gaussian closed-form yields cheap, MSE-like training objectives. For the remaining $f$-divergences, we provide a min-max objective based on the variational formulation of the $f$-divergence. We theoretically analyze and numerically validate how different $f$-divergences impact the gradient magnitude and the convergence properties of the algorithm, affecting the quality of unlearning. For instance, we observe that the Hellinger closed-form instance consistently dominates MSE across multiple scenarios. More generally, the proposed unified framework offers a flexible paradigm for selecting the optimal divergence based on the application and user goal, allowing for finer control over the trade-off between unlearning efficacy and generative fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于f-散度的统一框架，将扩散模型概念遗忘从KL散度推广到更灵活的散度族。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的概念遗忘方法大多采用均方误差损失，这等价于两个高斯分布间的KL散度。然而，KL散度可能不是最优选择，且缺乏对不同遗忘目标的适应性。因此，需要一种更通用的框架，允许根据应用和用户目标选择最适合的散度度量，以在遗忘效果和生成保真度之间实现细粒度权衡。
light_analysis.method: 论文将遗忘目标推广到任意f-散度。对于α-散度族，利用高斯分布的封闭形式推导出类似MSE的高效训练目标；对于其他f-散度，基于变分公式提出最小-最大目标。通过理论分析不同散度对梯度大小和算法收敛性的影响，并在多个遗忘场景下进行数值验证。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，不同f-散度导致不同的梯度行为和收敛特性。实验发现，Hellinger散度的封闭形式实例在多种场景下持续优于MSE，例如在遗忘效果和生成保真度的平衡上表现更佳。论文还通过数值验证确认了框架的灵活性，允许用户根据需求选择散度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该统一框架为扩散模型概念遗忘提供了更灵活的选择，不再局限于KL散度。通过选择不同的f-散度，可以精细控制遗忘效果与生成质量的权衡。这具有重要的学术价值，为遗忘算法设计提供了理论指导；在实际应用中，用户可根据具体场景（如隐私保护或版权移除）定制最优散度。未来工作可探索更高效的变分训练或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: BESPOKE: Benchmark for Search-Augmented Large Language Model Personalization via Diagnostic Feedback
abstract: Search-augmented large language models (LLMs) have advanced information-seeking tasks by integrating retrieval into generation, reducing users' cognitive burden compared to traditional search systems. Yet they remain insufficient for fully addressing diverse user needs, which requires recognizing how the same query can reflect different intents across users and delivering information in preferred forms. While recent systems such as ChatGPT and Gemini attempt personalization by leveraging user histories, systematic evaluation of such personalization is under-explored. To address this gap, we propose BESPOKE, the realistic benchmark for evaluating personalization in search-augmented LLMs. BESPOKE is designed to be both realistic, by collecting authentic chat and search histories directly from humans, and diagnostic, by pairing responses with fine-grained preference scores and feedback. The benchmark is constructed through long-term, deeply engaged human annotation, where human annotators contributed their own histories, authored queries with detailed information needs, and evaluated responses with scores and diagnostic feedback. Leveraging BESPOKE, we conduct systematic analyses that reveal key requirements for effective personalization in information-seeking tasks, providing a foundation for fine-grained evaluation of personalized search-augmented LLMs. Our code and data are available at https://augustinlib.github.io/BESPOKE/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了BESPOKE基准，用于评估搜索增强型大语言模型在个性化信息检索中的表现，通过真实人类注释和细粒度偏好分数实现诊断性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有搜索增强型大语言模型如ChatGPT和Gemini虽尝试通过用户历史进行个性化，但缺乏系统性的个性化评估基准。同一查询可能反映不同用户意图，且信息偏好形式各异，现有方法未充分解决这一问题。BESPOKE旨在填补这一空白，提供真实、诊断性的个性化评估框架。
light_analysis.method: BESPOKE基准通过长期、深度的人类注释构建，要求注释者贡献自己的聊天和搜索历史、撰写反映详细信息需求的查询，并对响应进行评分和诊断性反馈。基准设计兼顾真实性和诊断性，收集真实历史数据，并将响应与细粒度偏好分数和反馈配对。
light_analysis.result: 利用BESPOKE开展系统分析，揭示了信息寻求任务中有效个性化的关键要求，为细粒度评估个性化搜索增强型大语言模型奠定了基础。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调基准可用于诊断性评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: BESPOKE提供了首个针对搜索增强型大语言模型个性化的真实诊断性基准，通过人类注释确保生态效度。该工作推动了个性化信息检索的细粒度评估，未来可用于改进模型适应不同用户意图和偏好。代码和数据公开。

title: Advancing Metallic Surface Defect Detection via Anomaly-Guided Pretraining on a Large Industrial Dataset
abstract: The pretraining-finetuning paradigm is a crucial strategy in metallic surface defect detection for mitigating the challenges posed by data scarcity. However, its implementation presents a critical dilemma. Pretraining on natural image datasets such as ImageNet, faces a significant domain gap. Meanwhile, naive self-supervised pretraining on in-domain industrial data is often ineffective due to the inability of existing learning objectives to distinguish subtle defect patterns from complex background noise and textures. To resolve this, we introduce Anomaly-Guided Self-Supervised Pretraining (AGSSP), a novel paradigm that explicitly guides representation learning through anomaly priors. AGSSP employs a two-stage framework: (1) it first pretrains the model's backbone by distilling knowledge from anomaly maps, encouraging the network to capture defect-salient features; (2) it then pretrains the detector using pseudo-defect boxes derived from these maps, aligning it with localization tasks. To enable this, we develop a knowledge-enhanced method to generate high-quality anomaly maps and collect a large-scale industrial dataset of 120,000 images. Additionally, we present two small-scale, pixel-level labeled metallic surface defect datasets for validation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AGSSP consistently enhances performance across various settings, achieving up to a 10\% improvement in mAP@0.5 and 11.4\% in mAP@0.5:0.95 compared to ImageNet-based models. All code, pretrained models, and datasets are publicly available at https://clovermini.github.io/AGSSP-Dev/.
comment: Accepted for publication in Pattern Recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出异常引导的自监督预训练方法(AGSSP)，解决金属表面缺陷检测中的领域差距和预训练效率问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 金属表面缺陷检测中，预训练-微调范式面临关键困境：使用ImageNet等自然图像数据集预训练存在显著领域差距；而基于工业数据的朴素自监督预训练由于现有学习目标无法区分细微缺陷与复杂背景噪声和纹理而效果不佳。这一问题阻碍了模型性能的提升，亟需一种能有效利用工业数据中异常先验的预训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出异常引导的自监督预训练(AGSSP)，采用两阶段框架：第一阶段通过从异常图蒸馏知识预训练骨干网络，使其捕捉缺陷显著特征；第二阶段利用异常图生成的伪缺陷框预训练检测器，对齐定位任务。为此开发知识增强方法生成高质量异常图，并收集包含12万张图像的大规模工业数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多个设置下，AGSSP相比基于ImageNet的模型，mAP@0.5提升高达10%，mAP@0.5:0.95提升11.4%。实验验证了该方法一致地提升性能，代码、预训练模型和数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGSSP通过异常先验引导自监督预训练，有效弥合领域差距，显著提升金属表面缺陷检测性能。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广至其他工业视觉检测任务。未来可探索更高效的异常图生成和预训练策略。

title: MetaGraph: A Large-Scale Meta-Analysis of GenAI in Financial NLP (2022-2025)
abstract: Financial NLP has evolved rapidly since late 2022, outpacing narrative surveys. We introduce MetaGraph, a methodology for extracting typed knowledge graphs from scientific corpora using ontology-guided LLM extraction to enable structured, large-scale trend analysis. Applied to 681 papers on GenAI in Finance (2022-2025), MetaGraph reveals three phases: early LLM-driven expansion of tasks and datasets, growing emphasis on limitations and risk, and a shift toward modular, system-oriented methods (e.g., retrieval-augmented designs). We release the resulting resource and artifacts to support reproducible meta-analysis and future monitoring of the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaGraph方法，利用本体引导的LLM从科学文献中提取知识图谱，用于大规模趋势分析，揭示金融NLP领域GenAI应用的三个阶段。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融NLP领域自2022年底以来快速发展，传统叙述性综述难以跟上步伐。现有方法缺乏结构化、可扩展的趋势分析手段，无法系统性地追踪大量文献中的技术演进和焦点变化。因此，需要一种自动化的元分析方法来从海量论文中提取结构化知识，支持可重复的领域监测和趋势识别。
light_analysis.method: MetaGraph是一种方法论，使用本体引导的LLM从科学语料中提取带类型的知识图谱。具体应用于2022-2025年间681篇金融领域GenAI论文。通过LLM解析论文内容，结合金融NLP本体定义实体和关系，构建知识图谱，从而进行大规模趋势分析。该方法支持结构化查询和计算，发现领域演化模式。
light_analysis.result: 应用MetaGraph分析681篇论文后，揭示了三个发展阶段：早期LLM驱动任务和数据集扩张；中期对局限性和风险的关注增加；近期转向模块化、系统导向方法（如检索增强设计）。该资源已公开以支持可重复元分析和未来领域监测，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaGraph提供了一种系统化的元分析框架，将LLM与知识图谱结合，有效追踪金融NLP中GenAI的快速演变。其贡献在于自动化趋势发现和资源发布，有助于科研人员理解领域动态和未来方向。局限性可能包括依赖LLM提取的准确性，未来可扩展至更多领域和更新数据。

title: Dual-Thresholded Heatmap-Guided Proposal Clustering and Negative Certainty Supervision with Enhanced Base Network for Weakly Supervised Object Detection
abstract: Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) has attracted significant attention in recent years, as it does not require box-level annotations. State-of-the-art methods generally adopt a multi-module network, which employs WSDDN as the multiple instance detection network module and uses multiple instance refinement modules to refine performance. However, these approaches suffer from three key limitations. First, existing methods tend to generate pseudo GT boxes that either focus only on discriminative parts, failing to capture the whole object, or cover the entire object but fail to distinguish between adjacent intra-class instances. Second, the foundational WSDDN architecture lacks a crucial background class representation for each proposal and exhibits a large semantic gap between its branches. Third, prior methods discard ignored proposals during optimization, leading to slow convergence. To address these challenges, we propose the Dual-thresholded heAtmap-guided proposal clustering and Negative Certainty supervision with Enhanced base network (DANCE) method for WSOD. Specifically, we first devise a heatmap-guided proposal selector (HGPS) algorithm, which utilizes dual thresholds on heatmaps to pre-select proposals, enabling pseudo GT boxes to both capture the full object extent and distinguish between adjacent intra-class instances. We then construct a weakly supervised basic detection network (WSBDN), which augments each proposal with a background class representation and uses heatmaps for pre-supervision to bridge the semantic gap between matrices. At last, we introduce a negative certainty supervision (NCS) loss on ignored proposals to accelerate convergence. Extensive experiments on the challenging PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our method. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/gyl2565309278/DANCE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DANCE方法，通过双阈值热力图引导的候选框聚类和负确定性监督，解决弱监督目标检测中的三个关键局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 弱监督目标检测（WSOD）无需框级标注，现有方法通常采用多模块网络（如WSDDN）但存在三个问题：伪GT框要么只关注判别性部分而忽略整体，要么无法区分邻近同类实例；基础WSDDN架构缺乏背景类别表示且分支间语义差距大；忽略的候选框被丢弃导致收敛慢。本文旨在解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出DANCE方法，包含三个创新：1）热力图引导候选框选择器（HGPS），在热力图上使用双阈值预选候选框，使伪GT框既能捕获完整目标又能区分邻近同类实例；2）构建弱监督基础检测网络（WSBDN），为每个候选框增加背景类别表示，并利用热力图进行预监督以缩小矩阵间的语义差距；3）引入负确定性监督（NCS）损失，对忽略的候选框进行加速收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上进行大量实验，结果表明DANCE方法优于现有方法，有效提升了弱监督目标检测性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源（https://github.com/gyl2565309278/DANCE）。
light_analysis.conclusion: DANCE通过双阈值热力图引导的候选框聚类、增强基础网络和负确定性监督，显著解决了WSOD中的关键问题，具有较高学术价值和实践意义。未来可探索更高效的热力图生成策略或扩展到其他弱监督任务。

title: EvoEmo: Towards Evolved Emotional Policies for Adversarial LLM Agents in Multi-Turn Price Negotiation
abstract: Recent research on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) has demonstrated that agents can engage in \textit{complex}, \textit{multi-turn} negotiations, opening new avenues for agentic AI. However, existing LLM agents largely overlook the functional role of emotions in such negotiations, instead generating passive, preference-driven emotional responses that make them vulnerable to manipulation and strategic exploitation by adversarial counterparts. To address this gap, we present EvoEmo, an evolutionary reinforcement learning framework that optimizes dynamic emotional expression in negotiations. EvoEmo models emotional state transitions as a Markov Decision Process and employs population-based genetic optimization to evolve high-reward emotion policies across diverse negotiation scenarios. We further propose an evaluation framework with two baselines -- vanilla strategies and fixed-emotion strategies -- for benchmarking emotion-aware negotiation. Extensive experiments and ablation studies show that EvoEmo consistently outperforms both baselines, achieving higher success rates, higher efficiency, and increased buyer savings. This findings highlight the importance of adaptive emotional expression in enabling more effective LLM agents for multi-turn negotiation. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Yunbo-max/EvoEmo}{\textcolor{red}{https://github.com/Yunbo-max/EvoEmo}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoEmo，一个进化强化学习框架，优化多轮谈判中LLM代理的动态情感表达策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理在多轮谈判中忽略情感的功能性作用，生成被动、偏好驱动的情感回应，易被对手操纵和策略性利用。缺乏自适应情感表达导致代理脆弱，无法有效应对对抗性谈判。因此，研究如何使代理学习并优化动态情感策略以提升谈判效果至关重要。
light_analysis.method: EvoEmo将情感状态转换建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用基于种群的遗传优化，在多样化的谈判场景中进化高奖励情感策略。框架包括两个基线：vanilla策略（无情感）和固定情感策略。通过演化学习动态调整情感表达，以最大化谈判成功率、效率和买家节省。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，EvoEmo在多项指标上持续优于两个基线：实现更高的成功率（具体数值未明确），更高的谈判效率（减少轮次），以及增加买家节省（金额未明确）。消融研究进一步验证了各组件有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoEmo证明了自适应情感表达在多轮谈判中的关键作用，使LLM代理更有效。该工作为情感智能代理提供了新范式，具有实际应用价值（如自动谈判系统）。未来可探索更复杂的情感模型或跨域泛化。

title: How Reliable are LLMs for Reasoning on the Re-ranking task?
abstract: With the improving semantic understanding capability of Large Language Models (LLMs), they exhibit a greater awareness and alignment with human values, but this comes at the cost of transparency. Although promising results are achieved via experimental analysis, an in-depth understanding of the LLM's internal workings is unavoidable to comprehend the reasoning behind the re-ranking, which provides end users with an explanation that enables them to make an informed decision. Moreover, in newly developed systems with limited user engagement and insufficient ranking data, accurately re-ranking content remains a significant challenge. While various training methods affect the training of LLMs and generate inference, our analysis has found that some training methods exhibit better explainability than others, implying that an accurate semantic understanding has not been learned through all training methods; instead, abstract knowledge has been gained to optimize evaluation, which raises questions about the true reliability of LLMs. Therefore, in this work, we analyze how different training methods affect the semantic understanding of the re-ranking task in LLMs and investigate whether these models can generate more informed textual reasoning to overcome the challenges of transparency or LLMs and limited training data. To analyze the LLMs for re-ranking tasks, we utilize a relatively small ranking dataset from the environment and the Earth science domain to re-rank retrieved content. Furthermore, we also analyze the explainable information to see if the re-ranking can be reasoned using explainability.
comment: This chapter has been published in Advancements in AI From Foundations to Cross-Disciplinary Applications, Springer, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 分析不同训练方法对LLM在重排序任务中语义理解和可解释性的影响，质疑其可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM语义理解提升但透明度降低，新系统中用户参与有限且排序数据不足，准确重排序面临挑战。不同训练方法导致可解释性差异，表明LLM可能仅学到抽象知识而非准确理解，需评估其可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 使用环境与地球科学领域的小型排序数据集，分析多种训练方法对LLM重排序任务语义理解的影响，并探究模型能否生成更明智的文本推理以提升可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，仅指出某些训练方法可解释性更好，暗示未学到准确语义理解，而是获得抽象知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM在重排序任务中因训练方法不同导致的可解释性差异，质疑其真实可靠性，为提升模型透明度和可信度提供研究方向。

title: Structured Relational Reasoning for Group Activity Assessment
abstract: Group Activity Detection (GAD) involves recognizing social groups and their collective behaviors in videos. Vision Foundation Models (VFMs), like DINOv2, offer excellent features but are pretrained on object-centric data. We find that naively substituting them into existing GAD pipelines actually degrades performance, exposing structured group-aware decoding as the true bottleneck.   We introduce ProGraD, a structured relational-reasoning framework for GAD built on top of frozen VFMs. At its core is a lightweight two-layer GroupContext Transformer that explicitly models actor-group associations and aggregates global context to infer collective behavior. Learnable group prompts serve as a minimal conditioning mechanism to guide the frozen backbone toward socially relevant representations, while the relational decoder performs the core reasoning over actors and groups. This design jointly infers group locations, memberships, and activities in a single pass using only 10M trainable parameters - less than half of prior methods. On the Cafe benchmark with multiple concurrent social groups, ProGraD improves the state-of-the-art by 6.5% Group mAP$@$1.0 and 8.2% Group mAP$@$0.5. On Social-CAD, it achieves state-of-the-art social and membership accuracy. ProGraD further produces interpretable attention maps that provide insights into actor-group reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProGraD框架，利用冻结的视觉基础模型和轻量级GroupContext Transformer进行群体活动检测，仅需10M参数即实现最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 群体活动检测（GAD）需要识别社交群体及其集体行为。视觉基础模型（如DINOv2）虽提供优质特征，但预训练于物体中心数据，直接替换现有GAD流水线反而降低性能，暴露结构化群体感知解码是真正瓶颈。现有方法依赖复杂模型，参数多且效率低。因此需要一种轻量级、可解释的框架，在冻结VFM基础上进行结构化关系推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出ProGraD框架，核心是轻量级两层的GroupContext Transformer，显式建模演员-群体关联并聚合全局上下文推断集体行为。可学习群体提示作为最小条件机制引导冻结骨干网络关注社会相关表征，关系解码器执行核心推理。整个设计仅用10M可训练参数（少于先前方法一半），在单次前向中联合推断群体位置、成员和活动。
light_analysis.result: 在含多个并发社交群体的Cafe基准上，ProGraD比当前最优方法提升6.5% Group mAP@1.0和8.2% Group mAP@0.5。在Social-CAD上达到最优社会性和成员准确性。模型还生成可解释的注意力图，为演员-群体推理提供洞察。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProGraD证明了冻结VFM结合轻量级结构化关系解码器可有效解决GAD，突破VFM直接迁移的瓶颈。其高效（10M参数）和可解释性具有实际应用价值。未来可在更多社会场景验证或扩展至在线推理。当前局限性可能在于依赖群体标签的可用性。

title: PyCAT4: A Hierarchical Vision Transformer-based Framework for 3D Human Pose Estimation
abstract: Recently, a significant improvement in the accuracy of 3D human pose estimation has been achieved by combining convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with pyramid grid alignment feedback loops. Additionally, innovative breakthroughs have been made in the field of computer vision through the adoption of Transformer-based temporal analysis architectures. Given these advancements, this study aims to deeply optimize and improve the existing Pymaf network architecture. The main innovations of this paper include: (1) Introducing a Transformer feature extraction network layer based on self-attention mechanisms to enhance the capture of low-level features; (2) Enhancing the understanding and capture of temporal signals in video sequences through feature temporal fusion techniques; (3) Implementing spatial pyramid structures to achieve multi-scale feature fusion, effectively balancing feature representations differences across different scales. The new PyCAT4 model obtained in this study is validated through experiments on the COCO and 3DPW datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed improvement strategies significantly enhance the network's detection capability in human pose estimation, further advancing the development of human pose estimation technology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PyCAT4框架，通过层次化视觉Transformer和多尺度时序融合优化3D人体姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D人体姿态估计方法结合CNN与金字塔网格对齐反馈回路取得进展，但Transformer时序分析的潜力未被充分挖掘。针对Pymaf网络架构，需增强低层特征捕获、时序信号理解和多尺度特征平衡，以提升检测精度。
light_analysis.method: 基于Pymaf引入自注意力Transformer特征提取层增强低层特征；通过特征时序融合技术强化视频时序信号理解；采用空间金字塔结构实现多尺度特征融合，平衡不同尺度表示差异。在COCO和3DPW数据集上训练验证。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO和3DPW数据集上的实验表明，PyCAT4显著提升了人体姿态估计的检测能力，具体性能指标因摘要未明确数值，但对比基线方法效果更优，验证了改进策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过层次化Transformer与多尺度融合策略优化Pymaf网络，有效推进了3D人体姿态估计技术。研究为视觉Transformer在姿态估计中的应用提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的时序建模或跨数据集泛化能力。

title: How Chain-of-Thought Works? Tracing Information Flow from Decoding, Projection, and Activation
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting significantly enhances model reasoning, yet its internal mechanisms remain poorly understood. We analyze CoT's operational principles by reversely tracing information flow across decoding, projection, and activation phases. Our quantitative analysis suggests that CoT may serve as a decoding space pruner, leveraging answer templates to guide output generation, with higher template adherence strongly correlating with improved performance. Furthermore, we surprisingly find that CoT modulates neuron engagement in a task-dependent manner: reducing neuron activation in open-domain tasks, yet increasing it in closed-domain scenarios. These findings offer a novel mechanistic interpretability framework and critical insights for enabling targeted CoT interventions to design more efficient and robust prompts. We released our code and data at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/cot-D247.

light_analysis.overview: 通过反向追踪信息流，揭示Chain-of-Thought作为解码空间剪枝器的内部机制，并发现其任务依赖的神经元调制作用。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 提示能显著提升模型推理能力，但其内部运作机制尚不明确。理解CoT的工作原理对于设计更高效和鲁棒的提示至关重要。现有研究主要关注效果，缺乏对信息流和神经元激活模式的分析。本研究旨在通过反向追踪解码、投影和激活阶段的信息流，揭示CoT的操作原理，以提供可解释性框架和干预指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用逆向追踪方法，从解码、投影和激活三个阶段分析信息流。通过定量分析，评估答案模板的遵循程度与模型性能的相关性。同时，研究神经元激活模式，比较开放域和封闭域任务中的差异。使用公开代码和数据进行实验。
light_analysis.result: CoT可能作为一种解码空间剪枝器，答案模板遵循度越高，模型性能提升越显著。在开放域任务中，CoT减少神经元激活；在封闭域任务中，增加神经元激活。这些发现揭示了CoT以任务依赖方式调制网络内部状态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一个新颖的机制可解释性框架，阐明了CoT通过解码空间修剪和任务依赖的神经元调制来增强推理。该框架为设计更高效、鲁棒的提示策略提供了关键见解。未来可进一步探索CoT在不同模型和任务上的泛化性以及干预机制。

title: PICACO: Pluralistic In-Context Value Alignment of LLMs via Total Correlation Optimization
abstract: In-Context Learning has shown great potential for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human values, helping reduce harmful outputs and accommodate diverse preferences without costly post-training, known as In-Context Alignment (ICA). However, LLMs' comprehension of input prompts remains agnostic, limiting ICA's ability to address value tensions--human values are inherently pluralistic, often imposing conflicting demands, e.g., stimulation vs. tradition. Current ICA methods therefore face the Instruction Bottleneck challenge, where LLMs struggle to reconcile multiple intended values within a single prompt, leading to incomplete or biased alignment. To address this, we propose PICACO, a novel pluralistic ICA method. Without fine-tuning, PICACO optimizes a meta-instruction that navigates multiple values to better elicit LLMs' understanding of them and improve their alignment. This is achieved by maximizing the total correlation between specified values and LLM responses, theoretically reinforcing value correlation while reducing distractive noise, resulting in effective value instructions. Extensive experiments on five value sets show that PICACO works well with both black-box and open-source LLMs, outperforms several recent strong baselines, and achieves a better balance across up to 8 distinct values.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PICACO方法，通过总相关性优化实现大语言模型的多元上下文价值对齐，无需微调即可平衡多种价值观。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有上下文对齐（ICA）方法受限于指令瓶颈，LLMs难以在同一提示中协调多种潜在冲突的人类价值观（如刺激 vs 传统），导致对齐不完整或有偏差。人类价值观本质上是多元的，常提出矛盾要求，因此需要一种能有效平衡多种价值观的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: PICACO是一种无需微调的多元ICA方法，通过优化元指令来引导LLMs理解并平衡多种价值观。核心创新是最大化指定价值观与LLM响应之间的总相关性，理论上强化价值观相关性并减少干扰噪声，从而生成有效的价值指令。实验覆盖5个价值集，兼容黑盒和开源模型。
light_analysis.result: 在5个价值集上，PICACO优于多个近期强基线方法，成功平衡多达8种不同价值观，且无需额外训练。该方法对黑盒和开源LLMs均有效，证明了其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PICACO解决了ICA中的指令瓶颈问题，实现了多元价值观的有效对齐，提升了LLMs在价值冲突场景下的表现。其无需微调的特点具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的价值关系或扩展到更大规模模型。

title: Pusa V1.0: Unlocking Temporal Control in Pretrained Video Diffusion Models via Vectorized Timestep Adaptation
abstract: The rapid advancement of video diffusion models has been hindered by fundamental limitations in temporal modeling, particularly the rigid synchronization of frame evolution imposed by conventional scalar timestep variables. While task-specific adaptations and autoregressive models have sought to address these challenges, they remain constrained by computational inefficiency, catastrophic forgetting, or narrow applicability. In this work, we present \textbf{Pusa} V1.0, a versatile model that leverages \textbf{vectorized timestep adaptation (VTA)} to enable fine-grained temporal control within a unified video diffusion framework. Note that VTA is a non-destructive adaptation, which means that it fully preserves the capabilities of the base model. Unlike conventional methods like Wan-I2V, which finetune a base text-to-video (T2V) model with abundant resources to do image-to-video (I2V), we achieve comparable results in a zero-shot manner after an ultra-efficient finetuning process based on VTA. Moreover, this method also unlocks many other zero-shot capabilities simultaneously, such as start-end frames and video extension -- all without task-specific training. Meanwhile, it keeps the T2V capability from the base model. Mechanistic analyses also reveal that our approach preserves the foundation model's generative priors while surgically injecting temporal dynamics, avoiding the combinatorial explosion inherent to the vectorized timestep. This work establishes a scalable, efficient, and versatile paradigm for next-generation video synthesis, democratizing high-fidelity video generation for research and industry alike.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Pusa V1.0，通过向量化时间步长适应（VTA）实现预训练视频扩散模型的细粒度时序控制，零样本实现多种任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在时间建模上存在帧演化刚性同步问题，传统标量时间步长限制了时序控制。任务特定微调或自回归模型存在计算效率低、灾难性遗忘或适用性窄的缺陷。需要一种高效且通用的方法，在不破坏基础模型能力的前提下实现灵活的时间控制。
light_analysis.method: 提出向量化时间步长适应（VTA），为每个帧分配独立的时间步长向量，在统一框架内实现细粒度时序控制。VTA是非破坏性适应，完全保留基础模型能力。通过超高效微调（而非大规模资源微调），在零样本下实现图像到视频、起始帧与结束帧控制、视频扩展等任务，同时保持文本到视频能力。
light_analysis.result: 与Wan-I2V等需要大量资源微调的方法相比，Pusa在零样本方式下达到可比结果。同时解锁多种零样本能力（如起始帧与结束帧、视频扩展），无需任务特定训练。机制分析表明，该方法保留基础模型的生成先验，同时精确注入时间动态，避免向量化时间步长固有的组合爆炸问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: Pusa V1.0建立了一种可扩展、高效且通用的视频合成范式，民主化高保真视频生成。其非破坏性适应特性使其易于集成到现有模型，潜在应用包括视频编辑、长视频生成等。未来可探索更复杂的时间控制策略，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: MolPIF: A Parameter Interpolation Flow Model for Molecule Generation
abstract: Motivation: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) has advanced with deep generative models, but bridging the gap between continuous atomic coordinates and discrete atom types remains a challenge. Current approaches, such as diffusion and flow matching models, often fail to unify these heterogeneous modalities, relying on separate strategies or ill-fitting Euclidean metrics for discrete variables. This lack of a consistent framework limits generative models' ability to capture the geometric and chemical structure of protein-ligand complexes. Results: We present MolPIF, a parameter interpolation flow mechanism designed to unify the generation of continuous and discrete molecular variables. Unlike traditional flow models that operate in sample space, MolPIF interpolates between distributions in the parameter space, theoretically recovering Wasserstein-2 optimal transport for continuous coordinates and establishing Fisher-Rao geodesics for discrete atom types. We further incorporate a geometry-enhanced learning strategy to improve the capture of atomic contexts. Extensive evaluations on the CrossDocked2020 dataset demonstrate that MolPIF outperforms baselines in binding affinity, chemical validity, geometric fidelity and chemical space coverage. Additionally, MolPIF exhibits versatility in lead optimization and offers flexible prior distribution selection (such as Laplace), establishing a robust paradigm for SBDD. Availability: Source code is freely available at https://github.com/BLEACH366/MolPIF. Supplementary information: Supplementary data are available at Bioinformatics.

light_analysis.overview: MolPIF提出参数插值流机制，统一连续坐标与离散原子类型的分子生成，实现Wasserstein-2最优传输和Fisher-Rao测地线。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构基于药物设计中，现有生成模型难以统一连续原子坐标与离散原子类型，常依赖分离策略或不合适的欧几里得度量，导致模型无法有效捕捉蛋白-配体复合物的几何与化学结构，限制了生成能力。
light_analysis.method: MolPIF在参数空间而非样本空间进行分布插值，理论上为连续坐标恢复Wasserstein-2最优传输，为离散原子类型建立Fisher-Rao测地线。结合几何增强学习策略改进原子上下文捕捉。在CrossDocked2020数据集上评估，支持灵活的先验分布选择（如Laplace）。
light_analysis.result: 在CrossDocked2020数据集上，MolPIF在结合亲和力、化学有效性、几何保真度和化学空间覆盖率上均优于基线方法。在先导优化中展现多功能性，验证了模型在多个维度的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MolPIF为结构基于药物设计提供了统一且鲁棒的生成框架，理论贡献与实践效果俱佳。代码开源有助于复现与扩展。未来可探索更复杂的几何先验或应用于其他分子生成任务。

title: "PhyWorldBench": A Comprehensive Evaluation of Physical Realism in Text-to-Video Models
abstract: Video generation models have achieved remarkable progress in creating high-quality, photorealistic content. However, their ability to accurately simulate physical phenomena remains a critical and unresolved challenge. This paper presents PhyWorldBench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate video generation models based on their adherence to the laws of physics. The benchmark covers multiple levels of physical phenomena, ranging from fundamental principles such as object motion and energy conservation to more complex scenarios involving rigid body interactions and human or animal motion. Additionally, we introduce a novel Anti-Physics category, where prompts intentionally violate real-world physics, enabling the assessment of whether models can follow such instructions while maintaining logical consistency. Besides large-scale human evaluation, we also design a simple yet effective method that utilizes current multimodal large language models to evaluate physics realism in a zero-shot fashion.   We evaluate 12 state-of-the-art text-to-video generation models, including five open-source and five proprietary models, with detailed comparison and analysis. Through systematic testing across 1050 curated prompts spanning fundamental, composite, and anti-physics scenarios, we identify pivotal challenges these models face in adhering to real-world physics. We further examine their performance under diverse physical phenomena and prompt types, and derive targeted recommendations for crafting prompts that enhance fidelity to physical principles.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhyWorldBench基准，系统评估文本生成视频模型的物理真实性，引入反物理提示和多模态LLM自动化评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型虽在画质上取得突破，但模拟物理现象的能力仍是关键且未解决的挑战。现有评估缺乏对物理规律的全面考量，无法识别模型在物体运动、能量守恒、刚体交互等场景中的缺陷。该研究旨在构建系统基准，揭示模型物理违例的共性问题，并为提示工程提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含1050条精心设计的提示的基准，覆盖基础物理（如物体运动）、复合场景（如刚体交互）及反物理（故意违反真实世界规律）三大类别。除大规模人工评估外，还利用多模态大语言模型进行零样本物理真实性评估。对12个SOTA模型（5个开源、5个闭源）进行系统测试。
light_analysis.result: 通过1050条提示对12个模型（含开源与闭源）进行系统测试，确定模型在遵循真实物理规律方面面临的关键挑战。分析了不同物理现象和提示类型下的性能差异，并针对如何编写增强物理保真度的提示提出了具体建议。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhyWorldBench为评估视频生成模型的物理真实性提供了全面基准和自动化评估方法。研究揭示了现有模型在物理建模上的共性问题，为模型改进提供了方向。反物理类别提供了独特视角，未来可扩展更复杂的物理交互评估。

title: What Demands Attention in Urban Street Scenes? From Scene Understanding towards Road Safety: A Survey of Vision-driven Datasets and Studies
abstract: Advances in vision-based sensors and computer vision algorithms have significantly improved the analysis and understanding of traffic scenarios. To facilitate the use of these improvements for road safety, this survey systematically categorizes the critical elements that demand attention in traffic scenarios and comprehensively analyzes available vision-driven tasks and datasets. Compared to existing surveys that focus on isolated domains, our taxonomy categorizes attention-worthy traffic entities into two main groups that are anomalies and normal but critical entities, integrating ten categories and twenty subclasses. It establishes connections between inherently related fields and provides a unified analytical framework. Our survey highlights the analysis of 35 vision-driven tasks and comprehensive examinations and visualizations of 73 available datasets based on the proposed taxonomy. The cross-domain investigation covers the pros and cons of each benchmark with the aim of providing information on standards unification and resource optimization. Our article concludes with a systematic discussion of the existing weaknesses, underlining the potential effects and promising solutions from various perspectives. The integrated taxonomy, comprehensive analysis, and recapitulatory tables serve as valuable contributions to this rapidly evolving field by providing researchers with a holistic overview, guiding strategic resource selection, and highlighting critical research gaps.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述城市街道场景中需关注的视觉元素，提出统一分类法并分析35个任务和73个数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有综述多聚焦孤立领域，缺乏对交通场景中注意力关键元素的统一分类和全面分析。该研究旨在整合异常与正常但关键实体，建立跨领域连接框架，指导资源优化和标准统一，从而提升道路安全。
light_analysis.method: 提出两分类法：异常和正常但关键实体，涵盖10个类别和20个子类。基于此分类，分析35个视觉驱动任务，并可视化审查73个数据集，评估各基准优缺点，形成统一分析框架。
light_analysis.result: 系统梳理了35个任务和73个数据集，通过分类法揭示了各领域关联性，提供了标准统一和资源优化的参考信息。分析表格展示了各数据集特性，但未提供具体性能数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述为快速发展的道路场景理解领域提供了完整分类法、全面分析和汇总表，有助于研究者把握全局、选择合适资源并识别研究空白。未来可拓展至动态场景及多模态融合。

title: Real-Time Progress Prediction in Reasoning Language Models
abstract: Recent reasoning language models, particularly those that employ long latent chains of thought, achieve strong performance on complex agentic tasks. However, as these models operate over increasingly long time horizons, their internal progress becomes opaque to users, making expectation management and real-time oversight difficult. In this work, we investigate whether real-time progress prediction is feasible for such models. We first test whether hidden states encode progress information by discretizing reasoning trajectories and training a linear probe to classify reasoning states. We then fine-tune models to generate progress estimates from 0--100\% during chain-of-thought reasoning. Our strongest progress-reporting checkpoint reaches 0.161 MAE on mathematical reasoning traces and outperforms position baselines in this setting. Finally, we quantify the intrinsic ambiguity of progress labels by measuring how much the implied progress value varies from the same partial rollout. This ambiguity is lowest for Qwen3-4B, whose continuations produce the smallest rollout dispersion, suggesting that larger models can make progress labels more stable by reducing variation in remaining solution length.

light_analysis.overview: 提出实时进度预测方法，使推理语言模型在长链思考中透明化，通过线性探针和微调实现进度估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理语言模型（如长链思维模型）在复杂任务中表现优异，但其内部进度对用户不透明，导致期望管理和实时监督困难。现有方法缺乏对推理过程进度的量化，用户无法了解模型完成比例，影响交互体验和任务控制。因此，研究实时进度预测的可行性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 首先离散化推理轨迹，训练线性探针从隐藏状态分类推理阶段。然后微调模型，在思维链推理中直接生成0-100%的进度估计。使用数学推理轨迹进行评估，并测量进度标签的固有模糊性，通过同一部分推理的多次续写计算进度值变化的分散度。
light_analysis.result: 最强进度报告检查点在数学推理轨迹上达到0.161的MAE，优于位置基线。进度标签模糊性最低的模型是Qwen3-4B，其续写产生的滚动分散度最小，表明更大模型通过减少剩余解长度的变化使进度标签更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了实时进度预测在推理语言模型中的可行性，通过直接生成进度估计实现了透明化。该方法可改善用户期望管理和实时监督。未来工作可扩展至更多任务和模型，并探索进度信息用于主动中断或辅助决策。

title: Efficient Prediction of SO(3)-Equivariant Hamiltonian Matrices via SO(2) Local Frames
abstract: We consider the task of predicting Hamiltonian matrices to accelerate electronic structure calculations, which plays an important role in physics, chemistry, and materials science. Motivated by the inherent relationship between the off-diagonal blocks of the Hamiltonian matrix and the SO(2) local frame, we propose a novel and efficient network, called QHNetV2, that achieves global SO(3) equivariance without the costly SO(3) Clebsch-Gordan tensor products. This is achieved by introducing a set of new efficient and powerful SO(2)-equivariant operations and performing all off-diagonal feature updates and message passing within SO(2) local frames, thereby eliminating the need of SO(3) tensor products. Moreover, a continuous SO(2) tensor product is performed within the SO(2) local frame at each node to fuse node features, mimicking the symmetric contraction operation. Extensive experiments on the large QH9 and MD17 datasets demonstrate that our model achieves superior performance across a wide range of molecular structures and trajectories, highlighting its strong generalization capability. The proposed SO(2) operations on SO(2) local frames offer a promising direction for scalable and symmetry-aware learning of electronic structures. Our code will be released as part of the AIRS library https://github.com/divelab/AIRS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QHNetV2网络，利用SO(2)局部帧实现全局SO(3)等变的哈密顿矩阵预测，避免昂贵的SO(3)张量积。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子结构计算中的哈密顿矩阵预测对物理、化学和材料科学至关重要。现有方法通常使用SO(3)等变网络，但SO(3) Clebsch-Gordan张量积计算成本高且效率低。此外，哈密顿矩阵的off-diagonal块与SO(2)局部帧存在内在关联，现有模型未充分利用这一特性，导致计算复杂度和性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出QHNetV2，通过引入一组高效的SO(2)等变操作，在SO(2)局部帧内进行所有非对角特征更新和消息传递，从而消除SO(3)张量积。在每个节点上执行连续SO(2)张量积以融合节点特征，模拟对称收缩操作。模型在局部帧内保持等变性，实现全局SO(3)等变。
light_analysis.result: 在大型QH9和MD17数据集上的大量实验表明，QHNetV2在各种分子结构和轨迹上均取得了优越性能，显著优于基线模型，并展现出强泛化能力。具体性能指标（如准确率或误差）摘要未明确说明，但强调其高效性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QHNetV2通过SO(2)局部帧上的SO(2)操作实现了可扩展且对称感知的电子结构学习，为高效预测哈密顿矩阵提供了新方向。其避免了昂贵的SO(3)张量积，具有较高的计算效率。未来可进一步探索其他对称性操作或应用于更大规模材料系统。

title: Self-Cascaded Diffusion Models for Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Arbitrary-scale image super-resolution aims to upsample images to any desired resolution, offering greater flexibility than traditional fixed-scale super-resolution. Recent approaches based on regression-based or generative models have shown promising results but often suffer from scale inconsistency due to their single-stage formulation, which must handle a wide range of scaling factors simultaneously. To address this, we propose CasArbi, a self-cascaded diffusion framework for arbitrary-scale image super-resolution. CasArbi decomposes varying scaling factors into smaller sequential steps, progressively enhancing the image resolution at each step with seamless transitions for arbitrary scales. CasArbi leverages a coordinate-conditioned diffusion model for learning continuous image representations and adopts self-consistency guidance to generate scale-consistent details at inference time. Extensive experiments show that CasArbi outperforms existing methods in both perceptual and distortion metrics and demonstrates superior scale consistency across diverse arbitrary-scale super-resolution benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/junseo88/CasArbi.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CasArbi，一种自级联扩散框架，通过将任意缩放因子分解为逐步步骤实现灵活且尺度一致的图像超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有任意尺度超分辨率方法多采用单阶段公式，需同时处理多种缩放因子，导致尺度不一致问题。这限制了图像恢复质量，尤其在需要灵活缩放时表现不佳。因此，亟需一种能兼顾性能与尺度一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: CasArbi采用自级联扩散模型，将任意缩放因子分解为多个小步，逐步提升分辨率。它使用坐标条件扩散模型学习连续图像表示，并在推理时通过自一致性指导生成尺度一致的细节。无需修改模型架构即可适用于任意缩放因子。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任意尺度超分辨率基准上，CasArbi在感知和失真指标上均优于现有方法，表现出卓越的尺度一致性。具体数值未在摘要中明确说明，但实验验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CasArbi通过自级联策略有效解决了任意尺度超分辨率中的尺度不一致问题，兼顾了灵活性和图像质量。该框架为扩散模型在连续图像表示中的应用提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的级联步骤设计。

title: PersianMedQA: Evaluating Large Language Models on a Persian-English Bilingual Medical Question Answering Benchmark
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on a wide range of Natural Language Processing (NLP) benchmarks, often surpassing human-level accuracy. However, their reliability in high-stakes domains such as medicine, particularly in low-resource languages, remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce PersianMedQA, a large-scale dataset of 20,785 expert-validated multiple-choice Persian medical questions from 14 years of Iranian national medical exams, spanning 23 medical specialties and designed to evaluate LLMs in both Persian and English. We benchmark 41 state-of-the-art models, including general-purpose, Persian, and medical LLMs, in zero-shot and chain-of-thought (CoT) settings. Our results show that closed-weight general models (e.g., GPT-4.1) consistently outperform all other categories, achieving 83.09% accuracy in Persian and 80.7% in English, while Persian LLMs such as Dorna underperform significantly (e.g., 34.9% in Persian), often struggling with both instruction-following and domain reasoning.
